authors_text: Lirong Xia
title: Most Equitable Voting Rules
title_zh: 最公平的投票规则
abstract: In social choice theory, anonymity (all agents being treated equally) and neutrality (all alternatives being treated equally) are widely regarded as ``minimal demands'' and ``uncontroversial'' axioms of equity and fairness. However, the ANR impossibility -- there is no voting rule that satisfies anonymity, neutrality, and resolvability (always choosing one winner) -- holds even in the simple setting of two alternatives and two agents. How to design voting rules that optimally satisfy anonymity, neutrality, and resolvability remains an open question. We address the optimal design question for a wide range of preferences and decisions that include ranked lists and committees. Our conceptual contribution is a novel and strong notion of most equitable refinements that optimally preserves anonymity and neutrality for any irresolute rule that satisfies the two axioms. Our technical contributions are twofold. First, we characterize the conditions for the ANR impossibility to hold under general settings, especially when the number of agents is large. Second, we propose the most-favorable-permutation (MFP) tie-breaking to compute a most equitable refinement and design a polynomial-time algorithm to compute MFP when agents' preferences are full rankings.
summary: In social choice theory, anonymity (all agents being treated equally) and neutrality (all alternatives being treated equally) are widely regarded as ``minimal demands'' and ``uncontroversial'' axioms of equity and fairness. However, the ANR impossibility -- there is no voting rule that satisfies anonymity, neutrality, and resolvability (always choosing one winner) -- holds even in the simple setting of two alternatives and two agents. How to design voting rules that optimally satisfy anonymity, neutrality, and resolvability remains an open question. We address the optimal design question for a wide range of preferences and decisions that include ranked lists and committees. Our conceptual contribution is a novel and strong notion of most equitable refinements that optimally preserves anonymity and neutrality for any irresolute rule that satisfies the two axioms. Our technical contributions are twofold. First, we characterize the conditions for the ANR impossibility to hold under general settings, especially when the number of agents is large. Second, we propose the most-favorable-permutation (MFP) tie-breaking to compute a most equitable refinement and design a polynomial-time algorithm to compute MFP when agents' preferences are full rankings.
abstract_zh: 在社会选择理论中，匿名（所有代理人都受到平等对待）和中立（所有替代方案都受到平等对待）被广泛视为公平和公正的“最低要求”和“无争议”公理。然而，ANR 不可能性——没有满足匿名性、中立性和可解决性（总是选择一个获胜者）的投票规则——即使在两个替代方案和两个代理的简单设置中也成立。如何设计最佳地满足匿名性、中立性和可解决性的投票规则仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。我们针对各种偏好和决策（包括排名列表和委员会）解决最佳设计问题。我们的概念贡献是一种新颖且强有力的最公平改进概念，对于满足这两个公理的任何不确定规则，最佳地保留匿名性和中立性。我们的技术贡献是双重的。首先，我们描述了一般设置下 ANR 不成立的条件，特别是当智能体数量很大时。其次，我们提出了最有利排列（MFP）平局打破来计算最公平的细化，并设计了一个多项式时间算法来计算当代理的偏好完全排名时的 MFP。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何设计满足匿名性、中立性和可解性最优平衡的投票规则，解决ANR不可能性问题。
AI.motivation: 在社会选择理论中，匿名性与中立性被视为公平的基石，但ANR不可能性表明无法同时满足三者，现有方法未能有效解决这一矛盾。
AI.method: 提出'最公平细化'概念及'最优排列破 tie'（MFP）方法，结合多项式时间算法处理全排序偏好。
AI.result: 刻画了ANR不可能性的一般条件，设计出可在多项式时间内计算的MFP算法，实现匿名性与中立性的最优保留。
AI.conclusion: 通过MFP方法有效缓解ANR矛盾，在大规模代理场景下提供了兼顾公平性与可解性的投票规则设计框架。

authors_text: Yixin Zhang,Yong Liu,Yonghui Xu,Hao Xiong,Chenyi Lei,Wei He,Lizhen Cui,Chunyan Miao
title: Enhancing Sequential Recommendation with Graph Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 通过图对比学习增强顺序推荐
abstract: The sequential recommendation systems capture users' dynamic behavior patterns to predict their next interaction behaviors. Most existing sequential recommendation methods only exploit the local context information of an individual interaction sequence and learn model parameters solely based on the item prediction loss. Thus, they usually fail to learn appropriate sequence representations. This paper proposes a novel recommendation framework, namely Graph Contrastive Learning for Sequential Recommendation (GCL4SR). Specifically, GCL4SR employs a Weighted Item Transition Graph (WITG), built based on interaction sequences of all users, to provide global context information for each interaction and weaken the noise information in the sequence data. Moreover, GCL4SR uses subgraphs of WITG to augment the representation of each interaction sequence. Two auxiliary learning objectives have also been proposed to maximize the consistency between augmented representations induced by the same interaction sequence on WITG, and minimize the difference between the representations augmented by the global context on WITG and the local representation of the original sequence. Extensive experiments on real-world datasets demonstrate that GCL4SR consistently outperforms state-of-the-art sequential recommendation methods.
summary: The sequential recommendation systems capture users' dynamic behavior patterns to predict their next interaction behaviors. Most existing sequential recommendation methods only exploit the local context information of an individual interaction sequence and learn model parameters solely based on the item prediction loss. Thus, they usually fail to learn appropriate sequence representations. This paper proposes a novel recommendation framework, namely Graph Contrastive Learning for Sequential Recommendation (GCL4SR). Specifically, GCL4SR employs a Weighted Item Transition Graph (WITG), built based on interaction sequences of all users, to provide global context information for each interaction and weaken the noise information in the sequence data. Moreover, GCL4SR uses subgraphs of WITG to augment the representation of each interaction sequence. Two auxiliary learning objectives have also been proposed to maximize the consistency between augmented representations induced by the same interaction sequence on WITG, and minimize the difference between the representations augmented by the global context on WITG and the local representation of the original sequence. Extensive experiments on real-world datasets demonstrate that GCL4SR consistently outperforms state-of-the-art sequential recommendation methods.
abstract_zh: 顺序推荐系统捕获用户的动态行为模式以预测他们的下一次交互行为。大多数现有的顺序推荐方法仅利用单个交互序列的局部上下文信息，并仅基于项目预测损失来学习模型参数。因此，他们通常无法学习适当的序列表示。本文提出了一种新颖的推荐框架，即顺序推荐的图对比学习（GCL4SR）。具体来说，GCL4SR采用基于所有用户的交互序列构建的加权项目转换图（WITG），为每次交互提供全局上下文信息，并削弱序列数据中的噪声信息。此外，GCL4SR 使用 WITG 的子图来增强每个交互序列的表示。还提出了两个辅助学习目标，以最大化 WITG 上相同交互序列引起的增强表示之间的一致性，并最小化 WITG 上全局上下文增强的表示与原始序列的局部表示之间的差异。对现实世界数据集的大量实验表明，GCL4SR 始终优于最先进的顺序推荐方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图对比学习的序列推荐框架GCL4SR，通过构建加权物品转换图和子图增强序列表示，提升推荐效果。
AI.motivation: 现有序列推荐方法仅依赖局部上下文信息和物品预测损失，难以学习到有效的全局序列表示且易受噪声干扰。
AI.method: 构建用户交互序列的加权物品转换图（WITG）提供全局上下文，利用子图增强序列表示，并设计两个辅助目标：最大化相同序列在WITG上的增强表示一致性，最小化全局与局部表示差异。
AI.result: 在多个真实数据集上实验表明，GCL4SR显著优于现有最先进的序列推荐方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过图对比学习融合全局上下文与局部信息，有效提升了序列推荐的表示能力和预测性能。

authors_text: Truong Son Hy,Viet Bach Nguyen,Long Tran-Thanh,Risi Kondor
title: Temporal Multiresolution Graph Neural Networks For Epidemic Prediction
title_zh: 用于流行病预测的时态多分辨率图神经网络
abstract: In this paper, we introduce Temporal Multiresolution Graph Neural Networks (TMGNN), the first architecture that both learns to construct the multiscale and multiresolution graph structures and incorporates the time-series signals to capture the temporal changes of the dynamic graphs. We have applied our proposed model to the task of predicting future spreading of epidemic and pandemic based on the historical time-series data collected from the actual COVID-19 pandemic and chickenpox epidemic in several European countries, and have obtained competitive results in comparison to other previous state-of-the-art temporal architectures and graph learning algorithms. We have shown that capturing the multiscale and multiresolution structures of graphs is important to extract either local or global information that play a critical role in understanding the dynamic of a global pandemic such as COVID-19 which started from a local city and spread to the whole world. Our work brings a promising research direction in forecasting and mitigating future epidemics and pandemics.
summary: In this paper, we introduce Temporal Multiresolution Graph Neural Networks (TMGNN), the first architecture that both learns to construct the multiscale and multiresolution graph structures and incorporates the time-series signals to capture the temporal changes of the dynamic graphs. We have applied our proposed model to the task of predicting future spreading of epidemic and pandemic based on the historical time-series data collected from the actual COVID-19 pandemic and chickenpox epidemic in several European countries, and have obtained competitive results in comparison to other previous state-of-the-art temporal architectures and graph learning algorithms. We have shown that capturing the multiscale and multiresolution structures of graphs is important to extract either local or global information that play a critical role in understanding the dynamic of a global pandemic such as COVID-19 which started from a local city and spread to the whole world. Our work brings a promising research direction in forecasting and mitigating future epidemics and pandemics.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了时间多分辨率图神经网络（TMGNN），这是第一个既学习构建多尺度和多分辨率图结构又结合时间序列信号来捕获动态图的时间变化的架构。我们根据从多个欧洲国家的实际 COVID-19 大流行和水痘流行中收集的历史时间序列数据，将我们提出的模型应用于预测流行病和大流行的未来传播的任务，并且与之前其他最先进的时间架构和图学习算法相比，获得了有竞争力的结果。我们已经证明，捕获图形的多尺度和多分辨率结构对于提取本地或全球信息非常重要，这些信息在理解全球流行病（例如从当地城市传播到全世界的 COVID-19）的动态方面发挥着关键作用。我们的工作为预测和减轻未来流行病和大流行病带来了一个有前途的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文提出时间多分辨率图神经网络（TMGNN），用于基于历史数据预测流行病传播。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以同时捕捉疫情传播的多尺度空间结构和动态时间特征，需结合局部与全局信息以提升预测精度。
AI.method: 设计TMGNN架构，通过学习多分辨率图结构并融合时间序列信号，提取动态图的时空特征。
AI.result: 在新冠和水痘疫情数据集上优于现有时序模型和图学习算法，验证了多尺度建模的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 多尺度图神经网络为流行病预测提供了新方向，有助于未来疫情的防控决策。

ai_content_json.result: 在新冠和水痘疫情数据集上优于现有时序模型和图学习算法，验证了多尺度建模的有效性。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 多尺度图神经网络为流行病预测提供了新方向，有助于未来疫情的防控决策。

search_text: Temporal Multiresolution Graph Neural Networks For Epidemic Prediction 用于流行病预测的时态多分辨率图神经网络 In this paper, we introduce Temporal Multiresolution Graph Neural Networks (TMGNN), the first architecture that both learns to construct the multiscale and multiresolution graph structures and incorporates the time-series signals to capture the temporal changes of the dynamic graphs. We have applied our proposed model to the task of predicting future spreading of epidemic and pandemic based on the historical time-series data collected from the actual COVID-19 pandemic and chickenpox epidemic in several European countries, and have obtained competitive results in comparison to other previous state-of-the-art temporal architectures and graph learning algorithms. We have shown that capturing the multiscale and multiresolution structures of graphs is important to extract either local or global information that play a critical role in understanding the dynamic of a global pandemic such as COVID-19 which started from a local city and spread to the whole world. Our work brings a promising research direction in forecasting and mitigating future epidemics and pandemics. 在本文中，我们介绍了时间多分辨率图神经网络（TMGNN），这是第一个既学习构建多尺度和多分辨率图结构又结合时间序列信号来捕获动态图的时间变化的架构。我们根据从多个欧洲国家的实际 COVID-19 大流行和水痘流行中收集的历史时间序列数据，将我们提出的模型应用于预测流行病和大流行的未来传播的任务，并且与之前其他最先进的时间架构和图学习算法相比，获得了有竞争力的结果。我们已经证明，捕获图形的多尺度和多分辨率结构对于提取本地或全球信息非常重要，这些信息在理解全球流行病（例如从当地城市传播到全世界的 COVID-19）的动态方面发挥着关键作用。我们的工作为预测和减轻未来流行病和大流行病带来了一个有前途的研究方向。 本文提出时间多分辨率图神经网络（TMGNN），用于基于历史数据预测流行病传播。 Truong Son Hy,Viet Bach Nguyen,Long Tran-Thanh,Risi Kondor cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.SI,physics.soc-ph

authors_text: Bo Jiang,Meijun Gu,Chengjiu Yin
title: Exploring students' backtracking behaviors in digital textbooks and its relationship to learning styles
title_zh: 探究学生在数字教科书中的回溯行为及其与学习风格的关系
comment: I'm very sorry that there is a statistical error in the data shown in Fig.6 in the Result section
comments: I'm very sorry that there is a statistical error in the data shown in Fig.6 in the Result section
abstract: The purpose of this study is to explore students' backtracking patterns in using a digital textbook and reveal the relationship between backtracking behaviors and academic performance as well as learning styles. The study was carried out for two semesters on 102 university students and they are required to use a digital textbook system called DITeL to review courseware. Students' backtracking behaviors are characterized by seven backtracking features extracted from interaction log data and their learning styles are measured by Felder-Silverman learning style model. The results of the study reveal that there is a subgroup of students called backtrackers who backtrack more frequently and performed better than the average students. Furthermore, the causal inference analysis reveals that a higher initial ability can directly cause a higher frequency of backtracking, thus affecting the final test score. In addition, most backtrackers are reflective and visual learners, and the seven backtracking features are good predictors in automatically identifying learning styles. Based on the results of qualitative data analysis, recommendations were made on how to provide prompt backtracking assistants and automatically detect learning styles in digital textbooks.

Students' backtracking behaviors are characterized by seven backtracking features extracted from interaction log data and their learning styles are measured by Felder-Silverman learning style model. The results of the study reveal that there is a subgroup of students called backtrackers who backtrack more frequently and performed better than the average students. Furthermore, the causal inference analysis reveals that a higher initial ability can directly cause a higher frequency of backtracking, thus affecting the final test score. In addition, most backtrackers are reflective and visual learners, and the seven backtracking features are good predictors in automatically identifying learning styles. Based on the results of qualitative data analysis, recommendations were made on how to provide prompt backtracking assistants and automatically detect learning styles in digital textbooks.
abstract_zh: 本研究的目的是探索学生使用数字教科书时的回溯模式，揭示回溯行为与学业成绩和学习方式之间的关系。这项研究对 102 名大学生进行了两个学期，要求他们使用名为 DITeL 的数字教科书系统来复习课件。通过从交互日志数据中提取的七个回溯特征来表征学生的回溯行为，并通过 Felder-Silverman 学习风格模型来衡量他们的学习风格。研究结果表明，有一个被称为“回溯者”的学生群体，他们回溯的频率更高，表现也比普通学生更好。此外，因果推理分析表明，较高的初始能力可以直接导致较高的回溯频率，从而影响最终的测试成绩。此外，大多数回溯者都是反思性和视觉学习者，七个回溯特征是自动识别学习风格的良好预测器。根据定性数据分析的结果，提出了如何提供及时的回溯助手并自动检测数字教科书中的学习风格的建议。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨大学生在数字教科书中的回溯行为模式及其与学习风格和学业成绩的关系。
AI.motivation: 通过分析回溯行为与学习风格的关联，为数字教科书设计个性化学习辅助工具提供依据。
AI.method: 追踪102名大学生使用DITeL系统的交互日志，提取7个回溯特征，并采用Felder-Silverman模型分析学习风格，结合因果推断方法验证变量关系。
AI.result: 发现高频回溯学生（Backtrackers）学业表现更优，初始能力与回溯频率呈因果关系，且回溯特征可预测学习风格。
AI.conclusion: 数字教科书应结合回溯行为分析开发智能辅助系统，并实现学习风格的自动识别以优化教学策略。

authors_text: Yichuan Deng,Zhao Song,Omri Weinstein,Ruizhe Zhang
title: Fast Distance Oracles for Any Symmetric Norm
title_zh: 适用于任何对称范数的快速距离预言机
abstract: In the Distance Oracle problem, the goal is to preprocess $n$ vectors $x_1, x_2, \cdots, x_n$ in a $d$-dimensional metric space $(\mathbb{X}^d, \| \cdot \|_l)$ into a cheap data structure, so that given a query vector $q \in \mathbb{X}^d$ and a subset $S\subseteq [n]$ of the input data points, all distances $\| q - x_i \|_l$ for $x_i\in S$ can be quickly approximated (faster than the trivial $\sim d|S|$ query time). This primitive is a basic subroutine in machine learning, data mining and similarity search applications. In the case of $\ell_p$ norms, the problem is well understood, and optimal data structures are known for most values of $p$. Our main contribution is a fast $(1+\varepsilon)$ distance oracle for any symmetric norm $\|\cdot\|_l$. This class includes $\ell_p$ norms and Orlicz norms as special cases, as well as other norms used in practice, e.g. top-$k$ norms, max-mixture and sum-mixture of $\ell_p$ norms, small-support norms and the box-norm. We propose a novel data structure with $\tilde{O}(n (d + \mathrm{mmc}(l)^2 ) )$ preprocessing time and space, and $t_q = \tilde{O}(d + |S| \cdot \mathrm{mmc}(l)^2)$ query time, for computing distances to a subset $S$ of data points, where $\mathrm{mmc}(l)$ is a complexity-measure (concentration modulus) of the symmetric norm. When $l = \ell_{p}$ , this runtime matches the aforementioned state-of-art oracles.

This primitive is a basic subroutine in machine learning, data mining and similarity search applications. In the case of $\ell_p$ norms, the problem is well understood, and optimal data structures are known for most values of $p$. Our main contribution is a fast $(1+\varepsilon)$ distance oracle for any symmetric norm $\|\cdot\|_l$. This class includes $\ell_p$ norms and Orlicz norms as special cases, as well as other norms used in practice, e.g. top-$k$ norms, max-mixture and sum-mixture of $\ell_p$ norms, small-support norms and the box-norm. We propose a novel data structure with $\tilde{O}(n (d + \mathrm{mmc}(l)^2 ) )$ preprocessing time and space, and $t_q = \tilde{O}(d + |S| \cdot \mathrm{mmc}(l)^2)$ query time, for computing distances to a subset $S$ of data points, where $\mathrm{mmc}(l)$ is a complexity-measure (concentration modulus) of the symmetric norm. When $l = \ell_{p}$ , this runtime matches the aforementioned state-of-art oracles.
abstract_zh: 在距离预言机问题中，目标是将 $d$ 维度量空间 $(\mathbb{X}^d, \| \cdot \|_l)$ 中的 $n$ 个向量 $x_1, x_2, \cdots, x_n$ 预处理为廉价的数据结构，以便给定查询向量 $q \in \mathbb{X}^d$ 和输入数据点的子集 $S\subseteq [n]$，所有距离$\| q - x_i \|_l$ for $x_i\in S$ 可以快速近似（比简单的 $\sim d|S|$ 查询时间更快）。该原语是机器学习、数据挖掘和相似性搜索应用程序中的基本子例程。在 $\ell_p$ 范数的情况下，问题很好理解，对于大多数 $p$ 值来说，最佳数据结构是已知的。我们的主要贡献是针对任何对称范数 $\|\cdot\|_l$ 的快速 $(1+\varepsilon)$ 距离预言。此类包括作为特殊情况的 $\ell_p$ 规范和 Orlicz 规范，以及实践中使用的其他规范，例如top-$k$ 范数、$\ell_p$ 范数的最大混合和总和混合、小支持范数和盒范数。我们提出了一种新颖的数据结构，具有 $\tilde{O}(n (d + \mathrm{mmc}(l)^2 ) )$ 预处理时间和空间，以及 $t_q = \tilde{O}(d + |S| \cdot \mathrm{mmc}(l)^2)$ 查询时间，用于计算到数据点子集 $S$ 的距离，其中 $\mathrm{mmc}(l)$ 是复杂性度量对称范数（浓度模量）。当 $l = \ell_{p}$ 时，该运行时与前面提到的最先进的预言机相匹配。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种快速距离预言机，用于处理任意对称范数下的距离近似问题。
AI.motivation: 距离预言机在机器学习和数据挖掘中是基础工具，但现有方法仅针对ℓ_p范数优化，无法处理其他对称范数（如top-k范数、箱范数等）。本文旨在为所有对称范数设计高效解决方案。
AI.method: 通过引入对称范数的复杂度度量（浓度模量mmc(l)），设计了一种预处理时间为~O(n(d + mmc(l)^2))、查询时间为~O(d + |S|·mmc(l)^2)的数据结构，适用于任意对称范数。
AI.result: 实现了对任意对称范数的(1+ε)近似距离查询，当范数为ℓ_p时，性能与现有最优方法一致。
AI.conclusion: 该方法首次将距离预言机扩展到所有对称范数，为实际应用中多种复杂范数的快速距离计算提供了统一框架。

When $l = \ell_{p}$ , this runtime matches the aforementioned state-of-art oracles. 在距离预言机问题中，目标是将 $d$ 维度量空间 $(\mathbb{X}^d, \| \cdot \|_l)$ 中的 $n$ 个向量 $x_1, x_2, \cdots, x_n$ 预处理为廉价的数据结构，以便给定查询向量 $q \in \mathbb{X}^d$ 和输入数据点的子集 $S\subseteq [n]$，所有距离$\| q - x_i \|_l$ for $x_i\in S$ 可以快速近似（比简单的 $\sim d|S|$ 查询时间更快）。该原语是机器学习、数据挖掘和相似性搜索应用程序中的基本子例程。在 $\ell_p$ 范数的情况下，问题很好理解，对于大多数 $p$ 值来说，最佳数据结构是已知的。我们的主要贡献是针对任何对称范数 $\|\cdot\|_l$ 的快速 $(1+\varepsilon)$ 距离预言。此类包括作为特殊情况的 $\ell_p$ 规范和 Orlicz 规范，以及实践中使用的其他规范，例如top-$k$ 范数、$\ell_p$ 范数的最大混合和总和混合、小支持范数和盒范数。我们提出了一种新颖的数据结构，具有 $\tilde{O}(n (d + \mathrm{mmc}(l)^2 ) )$ 预处理时间和空间，以及 $t_q = \tilde{O}(d + |S| \cdot \mathrm{mmc}(l)^2)$ 查询时间，用于计算到数据点子集 $S$ 的距离，其中 $\mathrm{mmc}(l)$ 是复杂性度量对称范数（浓度模量）。当 $l = \ell_{p}$ 时，该运行时与前面提到的最先进的预言机相匹配。 本文提出了一种快速距离预言机，用于处理任意对称范数下的距离近似问题。 Yichuan Deng,Zhao Song,Omri Weinstein,Ruizhe Zhang cs.DS

authors_text: Tianyang Hu,Zhili Liu,Fengwei Zhou,Wenjia Wang,Weiran Huang
title: Your Contrastive Learning Is Secretly Doing Stochastic Neighbor Embedding
title_zh: 你的对比学习正在秘密进行随机邻居嵌入
abstract: Contrastive learning, especially self-supervised contrastive learning (SSCL), has achieved great success in extracting powerful features from unlabeled data. In this work, we contribute to the theoretical understanding of SSCL and uncover its connection to the classic data visualization method, stochastic neighbor embedding (SNE), whose goal is to preserve pairwise distances. From the perspective of preserving neighboring information, SSCL can be viewed as a special case of SNE with the input space pairwise similarities specified by data augmentation. The established correspondence facilitates deeper theoretical understanding of learned features of SSCL, as well as methodological guidelines for practical improvement. Specifically, through the lens of SNE, we provide novel analysis on domain-agnostic augmentations, implicit bias and robustness of learned features. To illustrate the practical advantage, we demonstrate that the modifications from SNE to $t$-SNE can also be adopted in the SSCL setting, achieving significant improvement in both in-distribution and out-of-distribution generalization.
summary: Contrastive learning, especially self-supervised contrastive learning (SSCL), has achieved great success in extracting powerful features from unlabeled data. In this work, we contribute to the theoretical understanding of SSCL and uncover its connection to the classic data visualization method, stochastic neighbor embedding (SNE), whose goal is to preserve pairwise distances. From the perspective of preserving neighboring information, SSCL can be viewed as a special case of SNE with the input space pairwise similarities specified by data augmentation. The established correspondence facilitates deeper theoretical understanding of learned features of SSCL, as well as methodological guidelines for practical improvement. Specifically, through the lens of SNE, we provide novel analysis on domain-agnostic augmentations, implicit bias and robustness of learned features. To illustrate the practical advantage, we demonstrate that the modifications from SNE to $t$-SNE can also be adopted in the SSCL setting, achieving significant improvement in both in-distribution and out-of-distribution generalization.
abstract_zh: 对比学习，特别是自监督对比学习（SSCL），在从未标记数据中提取强大特征方面取得了巨大成功。在这项工作中，我们为 SSCL 的理论理解做出了贡献，并揭示了它与经典数据可视化方法随机邻居嵌入 (SNE) 的联系，其目标是保持成对距离。从保留邻近信息的角度来看，SSCL 可以被视为 SNE 的特例，其输入空间成对相似性由数据增强指定。所建立的对应关系有助于对 SSCL 的学习特征进行更深入的理论理解，并为实践改进提供方法指南。具体来说，通过 SNE 的视角，我们对领域无关的增强、隐式偏差和学习特征的鲁棒性进行了新颖的分析。为了说明实际优势，我们证明从 SNE 到 $t$-SNE 的修改也可以在 SSCL 设置中采用，从而在分布内和分布外泛化方面取得显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了自监督对比学习（SSCL）与随机邻域嵌入（SNE）之间的理论联系，并通过SNE视角改进SSCL方法。
AI.motivation: 为深入理解SSCL的理论机制并指导实践优化，本文试图建立其与经典数据可视化方法SNE的关联。
AI.method: 从保留邻域信息的角度，将SSCL视为SNE的特例，通过数据增强定义输入空间相似性，并借鉴t-SNE改进策略优化SSCL。
AI.result: 通过SNE视角分析了领域无关增强、隐含偏差和鲁棒性，采用t-SNE改进方法显著提升了SSCL在分布内和分布外的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: SSCL本质可视为SNE的特殊形式，该理论联系为特征学习提供了新见解，并通过迁移t-SNE技术实现了实践性能提升。

authors_text: Yichong Leng,Zehua Chen,Junliang Guo,Haohe Liu,Jiawei Chen,Xu Tan,Danilo Mandic,Lei He,Xiang-Yang Li,Tao Qin,Sheng Zhao,Tie-Yan Liu
title: BinauralGrad: A Two-Stage Conditional Diffusion Probabilistic Model for Binaural Audio Synthesis
title_zh: BinauralGrad：用于双耳音频合成的两阶段条件扩散概率模型
abstract: Binaural audio plays a significant role in constructing immersive augmented and virtual realities. As it is expensive to record binaural audio from the real world, synthesizing them from mono audio has attracted increasing attention. This synthesis process involves not only the basic physical warping of the mono audio, but also room reverberations and head/ear related filtrations, which, however, are difficult to accurately simulate in traditional digital signal processing. In this paper, we formulate the synthesis process from a different perspective by decomposing the binaural audio into a common part that shared by the left and right channels as well as a specific part that differs in each channel. Accordingly, we propose BinauralGrad, a novel two-stage framework equipped with diffusion models to synthesize them respectively. Specifically, in the first stage, the common information of the binaural audio is generated with a single-channel diffusion model conditioned on the mono audio, based on which the binaural audio is generated by a two-channel diffusion model in the second stage. Combining this novel perspective of two-stage synthesis with advanced generative models (i.e., the diffusion models),the proposed BinauralGrad is able to generate accurate and high-fidelity binaural audio samples. Experiment results show that on a benchmark dataset, BinauralGrad outperforms the existing baselines by a large margin in terms of both object and subject evaluation metrics (Wave L2: 0.128 vs. 0.157, MOS: 3.80 vs. 3.61). The generated audio samples (https://speechresearch.github.io/binauralgrad) and code (https://github.com/microsoft/NeuralSpeech/tree/master/BinauralGrad) are available online.
summary: Binaural audio plays a significant role in constructing immersive augmented and virtual realities. As it is expensive to record binaural audio from the real world, synthesizing them from mono audio has attracted increasing attention. This synthesis process involves not only the basic physical warping of the mono audio, but also room reverberations and head/ear related filtrations, which, however, are difficult to accurately simulate in traditional digital signal processing. In this paper, we formulate the synthesis process from a different perspective by decomposing the binaural audio into a common part that shared by the left and right channels as well as a specific part that differs in each channel. Accordingly, we propose BinauralGrad, a novel two-stage framework equipped with diffusion models to synthesize them respectively. Specifically, in the first stage, the common information of the binaural audio is generated with a single-channel diffusion model conditioned on the mono audio, based on which the binaural audio is generated by a two-channel diffusion model in the second stage. Combining this novel perspective of two-stage synthesis with advanced generative models (i.e., the diffusion models),the proposed BinauralGrad is able to generate accurate and high-fidelity binaural audio samples. Experiment results show that on a benchmark dataset, BinauralGrad outperforms the existing baselines by a large margin in terms of both object and subject evaluation metrics (Wave L2: 0.128 vs. 0.157, MOS: 3.80 vs. 3.61). The generated audio samples (https://speechresearch.github.io/binauralgrad) and code (https://github.com/microsoft/NeuralSpeech/tree/master/BinauralGrad) are available online.
abstract_zh: 双耳音频在构建沉浸式增强现实和虚拟现实中发挥着重要作用。由于录制现实世界的双耳音频成本高昂，因此从单声道音频合成它们引起了越来越多的关注。该合成过程不仅涉及单声道音频的基本物理变形，还涉及房间混响和头/耳相关过滤，然而，这些在传统数字信号处理中很难准确模拟。在本文中，我们通过将双耳音频分解为左右声道共享的公共部分以及每个声道不同的特定部分，从不同的角度制定合成过程。因此，我们提出了 BinauralGrad，一种新颖的两阶段框架，配备了扩散模型来分别合成它们。具体地，第一阶段利用以单声道音频为条件的单声道扩散模型生成双耳音频的公共信息，在此基础上第二阶段利用双声道扩散模型生成双耳音频。将这种两阶段合成的新颖视角与先进的生成模型（即扩散模型）相结合，所提出的 BinauralGrad 能够生成准确且高保真的双耳音频样本。实验结果表明，在基准数据集上，BinauralGrad 在对象和主体评估指标方面都大幅优于现有基线（Wave L2：0.128 vs. 0.157，MOS：3.80 vs. 3.61）。生成的音频样本 (https://speechresearch.github.io/binauralgrad) 和代码 (https://github.com/microsoft/NeuralSpeech/tree/master/BinauralGrad) 可在线获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BinauralGrad，一种基于扩散模型的两阶段条件概率框架，用于从单声道音频合成双耳音频。
AI.motivation: 双耳音频在构建沉浸式虚拟现实场景中至关重要，但真实录制成本高昂且传统信号处理难以准确模拟房间混响和头部/耳部滤波效应，因此需要更高效的合成方法。
AI.method: 将双耳音频分解为左右通道共享的公共部分和通道特异部分，采用两阶段扩散模型：第一阶段通过单通道模型生成公共信息，第二阶段通过双通道模型生成特异部分。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上，BinauralGrad在客观指标（Wave L2: 0.128）和主观评分（MOS: 3.80）上均显著优于现有方法（Wave L2: 0.157, MOS: 3.61）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过新颖的两阶段框架与扩散模型结合，实现了高保真双耳音频合成，代码和样本已开源共享。

Combining this novel perspective of two-stage synthesis with advanced generative models (i.e., the diffusion models),the proposed BinauralGrad is able to generate accurate and high-fidelity binaural audio samples. Experiment results show that on a benchmark dataset, BinauralGrad outperforms the existing baselines by a large margin in terms of both object and subject evaluation metrics (Wave L2: 0.128 vs. 0.157, MOS: 3.80 vs. 3.61). The generated audio samples (https://speechresearch.github.io/binauralgrad) and code (https://github.com/microsoft/NeuralSpeech/tree/master/BinauralGrad) are available online. 双耳音频在构建沉浸式增强现实和虚拟现实中发挥着重要作用。由于录制现实世界的双耳音频成本高昂，因此从单声道音频合成它们引起了越来越多的关注。该合成过程不仅涉及单声道音频的基本物理变形，还涉及房间混响和头/耳相关过滤，然而，这些在传统数字信号处理中很难准确模拟。在本文中，我们通过将双耳音频分解为左右声道共享的公共部分以及每个声道不同的特定部分，从不同的角度制定合成过程。因此，我们提出了 BinauralGrad，一种新颖的两阶段框架，配备了扩散模型来分别合成它们。具体地，第一阶段利用以单声道音频为条件的单声道扩散模型生成双耳音频的公共信息，在此基础上第二阶段利用双声道扩散模型生成双耳音频。将这种两阶段合成的新颖视角与先进的生成模型（即扩散模型）相结合，所提出的 BinauralGrad 能够生成准确且高保真的双耳音频样本。实验结果表明，在基准数据集上，BinauralGrad 在对象和主体评估指标方面都大幅优于现有基线（Wave L2：0.128 vs. 0.157，MOS：3.80 vs. 3.61）。生成的音频样本 (https://speechresearch.github.io/binauralgrad) 和代码 (https://github.com/microsoft/NeuralSpeech/tree/master/BinauralGrad) 可在线获取。 本文提出BinauralGrad，一种基于扩散模型的两阶段条件概率框架，用于从单声道音频合成双耳音频。 Yichong Leng,Zehua Chen,Junliang Guo,Haohe Liu,Jiawei Chen,Xu Tan,Danilo Mandic,Lei He,Xiang-Yang Li,Tao Qin,Sheng Zhao,Tie-Yan Liu eess.AS,cs.LG,cs.SD

authors_text: Haris Aziz,Alexander Lam,Mashbat Suzuki,Toby Walsh
title: Random Rank: The One and Only Strategyproof and Proportionally Fair Randomized Facility Location Mechanism
title_zh: 随机排名：唯一的策略证明和比例公平的随机设施定位机制
abstract: Proportionality is an attractive fairness concept that has been applied to a range of problems including the facility location problem, a classic problem in social choice. In our work, we propose a concept called Strong Proportionality, which ensures that when there are two groups of agents at different locations, both groups incur the same total cost. We show that although Strong Proportionality is a well-motivated and basic axiom, there is no deterministic strategyproof mechanism satisfying the property. We then identify a randomized mechanism called Random Rank (which uniformly selects a number $k$ between $1$ to $n$ and locates the facility at the $k$'th highest agent location) which satisfies Strong Proportionality in expectation. Our main theorem characterizes Random Rank as the unique mechanism that achieves universal truthfulness, universal anonymity, and Strong Proportionality in expectation among all randomized mechanisms. Finally, we show via the AverageOrRandomRank mechanism that even stronger ex-post fairness guarantees can be achieved by weakening universal truthfulness to strategyproofness in expectation.
summary: Proportionality is an attractive fairness concept that has been applied to a range of problems including the facility location problem, a classic problem in social choice. In our work, we propose a concept called Strong Proportionality, which ensures that when there are two groups of agents at different locations, both groups incur the same total cost. We show that although Strong Proportionality is a well-motivated and basic axiom, there is no deterministic strategyproof mechanism satisfying the property. We then identify a randomized mechanism called Random Rank (which uniformly selects a number $k$ between $1$ to $n$ and locates the facility at the $k$'th highest agent location) which satisfies Strong Proportionality in expectation. Our main theorem characterizes Random Rank as the unique mechanism that achieves universal truthfulness, universal anonymity, and Strong Proportionality in expectation among all randomized mechanisms. Finally, we show via the AverageOrRandomRank mechanism that even stronger ex-post fairness guarantees can be achieved by weakening universal truthfulness to strategyproofness in expectation.
abstract_zh: 比例性是一个有吸引力的公平概念，已应用于一系列问题，包括设施选址问题，这是社会选择中的一个经典问题。在我们的工作中，我们提出了一个称为“强比例性”的概念，它确保当有两组代理位于不同地点时，两组代理会产生相同的总成本。我们证明，尽管强比例性是一个动机良好且基本的公理，但没有满足该属性的确定性策略证明机制。然后，我们确定了一种称为“随机排名”的随机机制（它统一选择 $1$ 到 $n$ 之间的数字 $k$，并将设施定位在第 $k$ 个最高代理位置），它满足期望中的强比例性。我们的主要定理将随机排名描述为在所有随机机制中实现普遍真实性、普遍匿名性和期望强比例性的独特机制。最后，我们通过 AverageOrRandomRank 机制表明，通过削弱期望中的策略证明的普遍真实性，可以实现更强的事后公平保证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Random Rank的随机化设施选址机制，该机制在满足策略证明和强比例公平性方面具有唯一性。
AI.motivation: 比例公平性是设施选址问题中的重要公平性概念，但现有确定性机制无法同时满足强比例公平性和策略证明，需探索随机化方法。
AI.method: 提出Random Rank机制（随机选择k值并定位到第k高代理位置），并通过理论分析证明其满足期望强比例公平性及策略证明性质。
AI.result: 证明Random Rank是唯一满足普遍诚实、匿名性和期望强比例公平性的随机机制，并设计AverageOrRandomRank实现更强的事后公平性。
AI.conclusion: Random Rank在设施选址中实现了策略证明与强比例公平性的统一，且通过放宽诚实条件可进一步提升公平性保证。

authors_text: Vignesh Manoharan,Vijaya Ramachandran
title: Near Optimal Bounds for Replacement Paths and Related Problems in the CONGEST Model
title_zh: CONGEST 模型中替换路径的近最优界及相关问题
abstract: We present several results in the CONGEST model on round complexity for Replacement Paths (RPaths), Minimum Weight Cycle (MWC), and All Nodes Shortest Cycles (ANSC). We study these fundamental problems in both directed and undirected graphs, both weighted and unweighted. Many of our results are optimal to within a polylog factor: For an $n$-node graph $G$ we establish near linear lower and upper bounds for computing RPaths if $G$ is directed and weighted, and for computing MWC and ANSC if $G$ is weighted, directed or undirected; near $\sqrt{n}$ lower and upper bounds for undirected weighted RPaths; and $Θ(D)$ bound for undirected unweighted RPaths. We also present lower and upper bounds for approximation versions of these problems, notably a $(2-(1/g))$-approximation algorithm for undirected unweighted MWC that runs in $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{n}+D)$ rounds, improving on the previous best bound of $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{ng}+D)$ rounds, where $g$ is the MWC length. We present a $(1+ε)$-approximation algorithm for directed weighted RPaths, which beats the linear lower bound for exact RPaths.
summary: We present several results in the CONGEST model on round complexity for Replacement Paths (RPaths), Minimum Weight Cycle (MWC), and All Nodes Shortest Cycles (ANSC). We study these fundamental problems in both directed and undirected graphs, both weighted and unweighted. Many of our results are optimal to within a polylog factor: For an $n$-node graph $G$ we establish near linear lower and upper bounds for computing RPaths if $G$ is directed and weighted, and for computing MWC and ANSC if $G$ is weighted, directed or undirected; near $\sqrt{n}$ lower and upper bounds for undirected weighted RPaths; and $Θ(D)$ bound for undirected unweighted RPaths. We also present lower and upper bounds for approximation versions of these problems, notably a $(2-(1/g))$-approximation algorithm for undirected unweighted MWC that runs in $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{n}+D)$ rounds, improving on the previous best bound of $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{ng}+D)$ rounds, where $g$ is the MWC length. We present a $(1+ε)$-approximation algorithm for directed weighted RPaths, which beats the linear lower bound for exact RPaths.
abstract_zh: 我们在 CONGEST 模型中展示了关于替换路径 (RPath)、最小权重循环 (MWC) 和所有节点最短循环 (ANSC) 的回合复杂性的几个结果。我们在有向图和无向图（加权和未加权）中研究这些基本问题。我们的许多结果在多对数因子内是最佳的：对于$n$节点图$G$，如果$G$是有向且加权的，我们建立用于计算RPath的接近线性的下限和上限，如果$G$是加权、有向或无向的，则用于计算MWC和ANSC；接近无向加权 RPath 的 $\sqrt{n}$ 下限和上限；和 $θ(D)$ 绑定为无向未加权 RPath。我们还提出了这些问题的近似版本的下限和上限，特别是用于无向无权 MWC 的 $(2-(1/g))$ 近似算法，该算法在 $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{n}+D)$ 轮中运行，改进了 $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{ng}+D)$ 轮的先前最佳边界，其中 $g$ 是 MWC 长度。我们提出了一种用于有向加权 RPath 的 $(1+ε)$ 近似算法，该算法击败了精确 RPath 的线性下界。

AI.tldr: 研究替换路径、最小权重环等图问题在CONGEST模型中的轮复杂度，提出近似最优的上下界。
AI.motivation: 在分布式计算中优化图问题的处理效率，填补现有理论界限的空白。
AI.method: 基于CONGEST模型设计分布式算法，结合图论分析与复杂度理论，针对不同图类型（有向/无向、加权/无权）分别处理。
AI.result: 获得近线性、√n、Θ(D)等界，提出(2-1/g)-近似MWC算法及(1+ε)-近似RPaths算法，改进现有结果。
AI.conclusion: 为分布式图算法提供理论基础，改进多项问题的复杂度界限，推动CONGEST模型研究进展。

authors_text: Aniket Didolkar,Kshitij Gupta,Anirudh Goyal,Nitesh B. Gundavarapu,Alex Lamb,Nan Rosemary Ke,Yoshua Bengio
title: Temporal Latent Bottleneck: Synthesis of Fast and Slow Processing Mechanisms in Sequence Learning
title_zh: 时间潜在瓶颈：序列学习中快慢处理机制的综合
abstract: Recurrent neural networks have a strong inductive bias towards learning temporally compressed representations, as the entire history of a sequence is represented by a single vector. By contrast, Transformers have little inductive bias towards learning temporally compressed representations, as they allow for attention over all previously computed elements in a sequence. Having a more compressed representation of a sequence may be beneficial for generalization, as a high-level representation may be more easily re-used and re-purposed and will contain fewer irrelevant details. At the same time, excessive compression of representations comes at the cost of expressiveness. We propose a solution which divides computation into two streams. A slow stream that is recurrent in nature aims to learn a specialized and compressed representation, by forcing chunks of $K$ time steps into a single representation which is divided into multiple vectors. At the same time, a fast stream is parameterized as a Transformer to process chunks consisting of $K$ time-steps conditioned on the information in the slow-stream. In the proposed approach we hope to gain the expressiveness of the Transformer, while encouraging better compression and structuring of representations in the slow stream. We show the benefits of the proposed method in terms of improved sample efficiency and generalization performance as compared to various competitive baselines for visual perception and sequential decision making tasks.
summary: Recurrent neural networks have a strong inductive bias towards learning temporally compressed representations, as the entire history of a sequence is represented by a single vector. By contrast, Transformers have little inductive bias towards learning temporally compressed representations, as they allow for attention over all previously computed elements in a sequence. Having a more compressed representation of a sequence may be beneficial for generalization, as a high-level representation may be more easily re-used and re-purposed and will contain fewer irrelevant details. At the same time, excessive compression of representations comes at the cost of expressiveness. We propose a solution which divides computation into two streams. A slow stream that is recurrent in nature aims to learn a specialized and compressed representation, by forcing chunks of $K$ time steps into a single representation which is divided into multiple vectors. At the same time, a fast stream is parameterized as a Transformer to process chunks consisting of $K$ time-steps conditioned on the information in the slow-stream. In the proposed approach we hope to gain the expressiveness of the Transformer, while encouraging better compression and structuring of representations in the slow stream. We show the benefits of the proposed method in terms of improved sample efficiency and generalization performance as compared to various competitive baselines for visual perception and sequential decision making tasks.
abstract_zh: 循环神经网络对于学习时间压缩表示有很强的归纳偏差，因为序列的整个历史由单个向量表示。相比之下，Transformers 对于学习时间压缩表示几乎没有归纳偏差，因为它们允许关注序列中所有先前计算的元素。具有更压缩的序列表示可能有利于泛化，因为高级表示可以更容易地重用和重新调整用途，并且包含更少的不相关细节。同时，过度压缩表示会牺牲表达能力。我们提出了一种将计算分为两个流的解决方案。本质上是循环的慢流旨在通过将 $K$ 时间步长的块强制转换为分为多个向量的单个表示来学习专门的压缩表示。同时，快速流被参数化为 Transformer，以处理由 $K$ 个时间步长组成的块，这些块以慢速流中的信息为条件。在所提出的方法中，我们希望获得 Transformer 的表现力，同时鼓励慢流中更好的压缩和结构化表示。与视觉感知和顺序决策任务的各种竞争基线相比，我们展示了所提出的方法在提高样本效率和泛化性能方面的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合慢速递归流和快速Transformer流的混合模型，用于序列学习任务，旨在平衡表示压缩与表达能力。
AI.motivation: 递归神经网络（RNN）倾向于学习时间压缩表示，有利于泛化，但表达能力有限；Transformer缺乏这种压缩偏向，可能导致冗余。需结合两者优势以提升效率与泛化能力。
AI.method: 将计算分为两股流：慢速递归流通过强制将K个时间步压缩为多个向量学习紧凑表示；快速Transformer流基于慢流信息处理相同长度的序列块，实现表达与压缩的平衡。
AI.result: 在视觉感知和序列决策任务中，该方法相比多种基线模型表现出更高的样本效率和泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过分离慢速压缩表示与快速处理机制，该方法有效提升了序列学习的效率与泛化能力，验证了混合架构的优势。

search_text: Temporal Latent Bottleneck: Synthesis of Fast and Slow Processing Mechanisms in Sequence Learning 时间潜在瓶颈：序列学习中快慢处理机制的综合 Recurrent neural networks have a strong inductive bias towards learning temporally compressed representations, as the entire history of a sequence is represented by a single vector. By contrast, Transformers have little inductive bias towards learning temporally compressed representations, as they allow for attention over all previously computed elements in a sequence. Having a more compressed representation of a sequence may be beneficial for generalization, as a high-level representation may be more easily re-used and re-purposed and will contain fewer irrelevant details. At the same time, excessive compression of representations comes at the cost of expressiveness. We propose a solution which divides computation into two streams. A slow stream that is recurrent in nature aims to learn a specialized and compressed representation, by forcing chunks of $K$ time steps into a single representation which is divided into multiple vectors. At the same time, a fast stream is parameterized as a Transformer to process chunks consisting of $K$ time-steps conditioned on the information in the slow-stream. In the proposed approach we hope to gain the expressiveness of the Transformer, while encouraging better compression and structuring of representations in the slow stream. We show the benefits of the proposed method in terms of improved sample efficiency and generalization performance as compared to various competitive baselines for visual perception and sequential decision making tasks. 循环神经网络对于学习时间压缩表示有很强的归纳偏差，因为序列的整个历史由单个向量表示。相比之下，Transformers 对于学习时间压缩表示几乎没有归纳偏差，因为它们允许关注序列中所有先前计算的元素。具有更压缩的序列表示可能有利于泛化，因为高级表示可以更容易地重用和重新调整用途，并且包含更少的不相关细节。同时，过度压缩表示会牺牲表达能力。我们提出了一种将计算分为两个流的解决方案。本质上是循环的慢流旨在通过将 $K$ 时间步长的块强制转换为分为多个向量的单个表示来学习专门的压缩表示。同时，快速流被参数化为 Transformer，以处理由 $K$ 个时间步长组成的块，这些块以慢速流中的信息为条件。在所提出的方法中，我们希望获得 Transformer 的表现力，同时鼓励慢流中更好的压缩和结构化表示。与视觉感知和顺序决策任务的各种竞争基线相比，我们展示了所提出的方法在提高样本效率和泛化性能方面的优势。 本文提出了一种结合慢速递归流和快速Transformer流的混合模型，用于序列学习任务，旨在平衡表示压缩与表达能力。 Aniket Didolkar,Kshitij Gupta,Anirudh Goyal,Nitesh B. Gundavarapu,Alex Lamb,Nan Rosemary Ke,Yoshua Bengio cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Yongli Zhu,Chanan Singh
title: End-to-End Topology-Aware Machine Learning for Power System Reliability Assessment
title_zh: 用于电力系统可靠性评估的端到端拓扑感知机器学习
comment: This paper has been accepted by PMAPS 2022 and will be officially presented on 14 June 2022
comments: This paper has been accepted by PMAPS 2022 and will be officially presented on 14 June 2022
abstract: Conventional power system reliability suffers from the long run time of Monte Carlo simulation and the dimension-curse of analytic enumeration methods. This paper proposes a preliminary investigation on end-to-end machine learning for directly predicting the reliability index, e.g., the Loss of Load Probability (LOLP). By encoding the system admittance matrix into the input feature, the proposed machine learning pipeline can consider the impact of specific topology changes due to regular maintenances of transmission lines. Two models (Support Vector Machine and Boosting Trees) are trained and compared. Details regarding the training data creation and preprocessing are also discussed. Finally, experiments are conducted on the IEEE RTS-79 system. Results demonstrate the applicability of the proposed end-to-end machine learning pipeline in reliability assessment.
summary: Conventional power system reliability suffers from the long run time of Monte Carlo simulation and the dimension-curse of analytic enumeration methods. This paper proposes a preliminary investigation on end-to-end machine learning for directly predicting the reliability index, e.g., the Loss of Load Probability (LOLP). By encoding the system admittance matrix into the input feature, the proposed machine learning pipeline can consider the impact of specific topology changes due to regular maintenances of transmission lines. Two models (Support Vector Machine and Boosting Trees) are trained and compared. Details regarding the training data creation and preprocessing are also discussed. Finally, experiments are conducted on the IEEE RTS-79 system. Results demonstrate the applicability of the proposed end-to-end machine learning pipeline in reliability assessment.
abstract_zh: 传统电力系统的可靠性受到蒙特卡罗模拟运行时间长和解析枚举方法的维数灾难的影响。本文提出了对端到端机器学习的初步研究，用于直接预测可靠性指标，例如负载概率损失（LOLP）。通过将系统导纳矩阵编码到输入特征中，所提出的机器学习管道可以考虑由于传输线路的定期维护而导致的特定拓扑变化的影响。训练并比较两个模型（支持向量机和提升树）。还讨论了有关训练数据创建和预处理的详细信息。最后在IEEE RTS-79系统上进行了实验。结果证明了所提出的端到端机器学习管道在可靠性评估中的适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端的机器学习方法，通过编码系统导纳矩阵直接预测电力系统可靠性指标（如LOLP），并考虑拓扑变化的影响。
AI.motivation: 传统电力系统可靠性评估方法存在蒙特卡洛模拟耗时长、解析枚举方法维度灾难等问题，需更高效解决方案。
AI.method: 采用支持向量机和提升树模型，以系统导纳矩阵为输入特征，构建端到端机器学习流水线，并讨论数据生成与预处理细节。
AI.result: 在IEEE RTS-79系统实验中验证了所提方法在可靠性评估中的适用性，证明其能有效处理拓扑变化带来的影响。
AI.conclusion: 该端到端机器学习框架为电力系统可靠性评估提供了高效替代方案，未来可探索更复杂模型与更大规模数据验证。

authors_text: Orestis Papadigenopoulos,Constantine Caramanis,Sanjay Shakkottai
title: Non-Stationary Bandits under Recharging Payoffs: Improved Planning with Sublinear Regret
title_zh: 充值收益下的非固定强盗：改进规划与次线性遗憾
abstract: The stochastic multi-armed bandit setting has been recently studied in the non-stationary regime, where the mean payoff of each action is a non-decreasing function of the number of rounds passed since it was last played. This model captures natural behavioral aspects of the users which crucially determine the performance of recommendation platforms, ad placement systems, and more. Even assuming prior knowledge of the mean payoff functions, computing an optimal planning in the above model is NP-hard, while the state-of-the-art is a $1/4$-approximation algorithm for the case where at most one arm can be played per round. We first focus on the setting where the mean payoff functions are known. In this setting, we significantly improve the best-known guarantees for the planning problem by developing a polynomial-time $(1-{1}/{e})$-approximation algorithm (asymptotically and in expectation), based on a novel combination of randomized LP rounding and a time-correlated (interleaved) scheduling method. Furthermore, our algorithm achieves improved guarantees -- compared to prior work -- for the case where more than one arm can be played at each round. Moving to the bandit setting, when the mean payoff functions are initially unknown, we show how our algorithm can be transformed into a bandit algorithm with sublinear regret.
summary: The stochastic multi-armed bandit setting has been recently studied in the non-stationary regime, where the mean payoff of each action is a non-decreasing function of the number of rounds passed since it was last played. This model captures natural behavioral aspects of the users which crucially determine the performance of recommendation platforms, ad placement systems, and more. Even assuming prior knowledge of the mean payoff functions, computing an optimal planning in the above model is NP-hard, while the state-of-the-art is a $1/4$-approximation algorithm for the case where at most one arm can be played per round. We first focus on the setting where the mean payoff functions are known. In this setting, we significantly improve the best-known guarantees for the planning problem by developing a polynomial-time $(1-{1}/{e})$-approximation algorithm (asymptotically and in expectation), based on a novel combination of randomized LP rounding and a time-correlated (interleaved) scheduling method. Furthermore, our algorithm achieves improved guarantees -- compared to prior work -- for the case where more than one arm can be played at each round. Moving to the bandit setting, when the mean payoff functions are initially unknown, we show how our algorithm can be transformed into a bandit algorithm with sublinear regret.
abstract_zh: 最近在非平稳状态下研究了随机多臂老虎机设置，其中每个动作的平均收益是自上次进行以来经过的轮数的非递减函数。该模型捕获了用户的自然行为方面，这对于推荐平台、广告投放系统等的性能至关重要。即使假设先验知识平均收益函数，在上述模型中计算最佳规划也是 NP 困难的，而最先进的算法是针对每轮最多可以玩一只手臂的情况的 1/4$ 近似算法。我们首先关注平均收益函数已知的情况。在这种情况下，我们基于随机 LP 舍入和时间相关（交错）调度方法的新颖组合，开发了多项式时间 $(1-{1}/{e})$ 逼近算法（渐近和期望），显着改进了规划问题的最著名保证。此外，与之前的工作相比，我们的算法对于每轮可以玩多个手臂的情况实现了改进的保证。转向强盗设置，当平均收益函数最初未知时，我们展示了如何将我们的算法转换为具有亚线性遗憾的强盗算法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了非平稳多臂老虎机问题，其中每个动作的平均收益是自上次执行以来轮数的非递减函数，并提出了一种改进的规划算法。
AI.motivation: 非平稳多臂老虎机模型能够捕捉用户行为的自然变化，这对推荐系统和广告投放系统等应用至关重要。然而，即使已知平均收益函数，计算最优规划也是NP难问题。
AI.method: 本文基于随机线性规划松弛和时间相关调度方法，提出了一种多项式时间的近似算法，并将其扩展到多臂同时执行的情况。
AI.result: 该算法在渐进期望意义上实现了(1-1/e)的近似比，且在多臂同时执行的情况下也取得了比先前工作更好的结果。此外，该算法在平均收益函数未知的情况下，也实现了次线性遗憾。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出了一种改进的非平稳多臂老虎机规划算法，并在理论和实际应用中均取得了良好的结果。

search_text: Non-Stationary Bandits under Recharging Payoffs: Improved Planning with Sublinear Regret 充值收益下的非固定强盗：改进规划与次线性遗憾 The stochastic multi-armed bandit setting has been recently studied in the non-stationary regime, where the mean payoff of each action is a non-decreasing function of the number of rounds passed since it was last played. This model captures natural behavioral aspects of the users which crucially determine the performance of recommendation platforms, ad placement systems, and more. Even assuming prior knowledge of the mean payoff functions, computing an optimal planning in the above model is NP-hard, while the state-of-the-art is a $1/4$-approximation algorithm for the case where at most one arm can be played per round. We first focus on the setting where the mean payoff functions are known. In this setting, we significantly improve the best-known guarantees for the planning problem by developing a polynomial-time $(1-{1}/{e})$-approximation algorithm (asymptotically and in expectation), based on a novel combination of randomized LP rounding and a time-correlated (interleaved) scheduling method. Furthermore, our algorithm achieves improved guarantees -- compared to prior work -- for the case where more than one arm can be played at each round. Moving to the bandit setting, when the mean payoff functions are initially unknown, we show how our algorithm can be transformed into a bandit algorithm with sublinear regret. 最近在非平稳状态下研究了随机多臂老虎机设置，其中每个动作的平均收益是自上次进行以来经过的轮数的非递减函数。该模型捕获了用户的自然行为方面，这对于推荐平台、广告投放系统等的性能至关重要。即使假设先验知识平均收益函数，在上述模型中计算最佳规划也是 NP 困难的，而最先进的算法是针对每轮最多可以玩一只手臂的情况的 1/4$ 近似算法。我们首先关注平均收益函数已知的情况。在这种情况下，我们基于随机 LP 舍入和时间相关（交错）调度方法的新颖组合，开发了多项式时间 $(1-{1}/{e})$ 逼近算法（渐近和期望），显着改进了规划问题的最著名保证。此外，与之前的工作相比，我们的算法对于每轮可以玩多个手臂的情况实现了改进的保证。转向强盗设置，当平均收益函数最初未知时，我们展示了如何将我们的算法转换为具有亚线性遗憾的强盗算法。 本文研究了非平稳多臂老虎机问题，其中每个动作的平均收益是自上次执行以来轮数的非递减函数，并提出了一种改进的规划算法。 Orestis Papadigenopoulos,Constantine Caramanis,Sanjay Shakkottai cs.LG,cs.DS

authors_text: Zachariah Carmichael,Walter J Scheirer
title: Unfooling Perturbation-Based Post Hoc Explainers
title_zh: 揭开基于扰动的事后解释器的愚弄
comment: Accepted to AAAI-23. See the companion blog post at https://medium.com/@craymichael/noncompliance-in-algorithmic-audits-and-defending-auditors-5b9fbdab2615. 9 pages (not including references and supplemental)
comments: Accepted to AAAI-23. See the companion blog post at https://medium.com/@craymichael/noncompliance-in-algorithmic-audits-and-defending-auditors-5b9fbdab2615. 9 pages (not including references and supplemental)
abstract: Monumental advancements in artificial intelligence (AI) have lured the interest of doctors, lenders, judges, and other professionals. While these high-stakes decision-makers are optimistic about the technology, those familiar with AI systems are wary about the lack of transparency of its decision-making processes. Perturbation-based post hoc explainers offer a model agnostic means of interpreting these systems while only requiring query-level access. However, recent work demonstrates that these explainers can be fooled adversarially. This discovery has adverse implications for auditors, regulators, and other sentinels. With this in mind, several natural questions arise - how can we audit these black box systems? And how can we ascertain that the auditee is complying with the audit in good faith? In this work, we rigorously formalize this problem and devise a defense against adversarial attacks on perturbation-based explainers. We propose algorithms for the detection (CAD-Detect) and defense (CAD-Defend) of these attacks, which are aided by our novel conditional anomaly detection approach, KNN-CAD. We demonstrate that our approach successfully detects whether a black box system adversarially conceals its decision-making process and mitigates the adversarial attack on real-world data for the prevalent explainers, LIME and SHAP.
summary: Monumental advancements in artificial intelligence (AI) have lured the interest of doctors, lenders, judges, and other professionals. While these high-stakes decision-makers are optimistic about the technology, those familiar with AI systems are wary about the lack of transparency of its decision-making processes. Perturbation-based post hoc explainers offer a model agnostic means of interpreting these systems while only requiring query-level access. However, recent work demonstrates that these explainers can be fooled adversarially. This discovery has adverse implications for auditors, regulators, and other sentinels. With this in mind, several natural questions arise - how can we audit these black box systems? And how can we ascertain that the auditee is complying with the audit in good faith? In this work, we rigorously formalize this problem and devise a defense against adversarial attacks on perturbation-based explainers. We propose algorithms for the detection (CAD-Detect) and defense (CAD-Defend) of these attacks, which are aided by our novel conditional anomaly detection approach, KNN-CAD. We demonstrate that our approach successfully detects whether a black box system adversarially conceals its decision-making process and mitigates the adversarial attack on real-world data for the prevalent explainers, LIME and SHAP.
abstract_zh: 人工智能 (AI) 的巨大进步吸引了医生、贷款人、法官和其他专业人士的兴趣。虽然这些高风险决策者对这项技术持乐观态度，但熟悉人工智能系统的人对其决策过程缺乏透明度持谨慎态度。基于扰动的事后解释器提供了一种与模型无关的方法来解释这些系统，同时只需要查询级别的访问。然而，最近的研究表明，这些解释者可能会被对手愚弄。这一发现对审计师、监管机构和其他哨兵产生了不利影响。考虑到这一点，几个自然的问题就出现了——我们如何审计这些黑匣子系统？我们如何确定被审核方是否善意地遵守审核？在这项工作中，我们严格地形式化了这个问题，并设计了针对基于扰动的解释器的对抗性攻击的防御措施。我们提出了用于检测（CAD-Detect）和防御（CAD-Defend）这些攻击的算法，并在我们新颖的条件异常检测方法 KNN-CAD 的帮助下。我们证明，我们的方法成功地检测黑匣子系统是否敌对地隐藏其决策过程，并减轻对流行解释器 LIME 和 SHAP 的现实世界数据的敌对攻击。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在针对基于扰动的后验解释器（如LIME和SHAP）设计防御方法，以检测和抵御对抗性攻击。
AI.motivation: AI决策透明度不足引发担忧，而现有解释器易受对抗攻击，可能误导审计和监管，需有效防御机制。
AI.method: 提出条件异常检测方法KNN-CAD，开发检测算法CAD-Detect和防御算法CAD-Defend，用于识别并缓解对抗攻击。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法能有效检测黑盒系统是否隐藏决策逻辑，并在真实数据上成功防御LIME和SHAP的对抗攻击。
AI.conclusion: 通过形式化问题并引入KNN-CAD，本文为保障解释器可靠性提供了可行的检测与防御框架。

authors_text: Andrei Paraschiv,Mihai Dascalu,Dumitru-Clementin Cercel
title: UPB at SemEval-2022 Task 5: Enhancing UNITER with Image Sentiment and Graph Convolutional Networks for Multimedia Automatic Misogyny Identification
title_zh: UPB at SemEval-2022 任务 5：通过图像情感和图卷积网络增强 UNITER，以实现多媒体自动厌女症识别
abstract: In recent times, the detection of hate-speech, offensive, or abusive language in online media has become an important topic in NLP research due to the exponential growth of social media and the propagation of such messages, as well as their impact. Misogyny detection, even though it plays an important part in hate-speech detection, has not received the same attention. In this paper, we describe our classification systems submitted to the SemEval-2022 Task 5: MAMI - Multimedia Automatic Misogyny Identification. The shared task aimed to identify misogynous content in a multi-modal setting by analysing meme images together with their textual captions. To this end, we propose two models based on the pre-trained UNITER model, one enhanced with an image sentiment classifier, whereas the second leverages a Vocabulary Graph Convolutional Network (VGCN). Additionally, we explore an ensemble using the aforementioned models. Our best model reaches an F1-score of 71.4% in Sub-task A and 67.3% for Sub-task B positioning our team in the upper third of the leaderboard. We release the code and experiments for our models on GitHub
summary: In recent times, the detection of hate-speech, offensive, or abusive language in online media has become an important topic in NLP research due to the exponential growth of social media and the propagation of such messages, as well as their impact. Misogyny detection, even though it plays an important part in hate-speech detection, has not received the same attention. In this paper, we describe our classification systems submitted to the SemEval-2022 Task 5: MAMI - Multimedia Automatic Misogyny Identification. The shared task aimed to identify misogynous content in a multi-modal setting by analysing meme images together with their textual captions. To this end, we propose two models based on the pre-trained UNITER model, one enhanced with an image sentiment classifier, whereas the second leverages a Vocabulary Graph Convolutional Network (VGCN). Additionally, we explore an ensemble using the aforementioned models. Our best model reaches an F1-score of 71.4% in Sub-task A and 67.3% for Sub-task B positioning our team in the upper third of the leaderboard. We release the code and experiments for our models on GitHub
abstract_zh: 近年来，由于社交媒体的指数级增长和此类消息的传播及其影响，在线媒体中仇恨言论、攻击性或辱骂性语言的检测已成为 NLP 研究的一个重要课题。厌女症检测尽管在仇恨言论检测中发挥着重要作用，但尚未受到同样的关注。在本文中，我们描述了提交给 SemEval-2022 任务 5 的分类系统：MAMI - 多媒体自动厌女症识别。共享任务旨在通过分析模因图像及其文本标题来识别多模式环境中的厌女内容。为此，我们提出了两种基于预训练 UNITER 模型的模型，一种使用图像情感分类器进行增强，而第二种则利用词汇图卷积网络（VGCN）。此外，我们还使用上述模型探索了一个集成。我们的最佳模型在子任务 A 中的 F1 分数为 71.4%，在子任务 B 中的 F1 分数为 67.3%，使我们的团队位于排行榜的前三分之一。我们在 GitHub 上发布了模型的代码和实验

AI.tldr: 本文针对多模态场景下的网络谩骂内容检测任务，提出基于UNITER模型的改进方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管仇恨言论检测备受关注，但针对性别歧视（Misogyny）的检测研究相对不足，需专门优化多模态分析技术。
AI.method: 基于预训练UNITER模型，分别融合图像情感分类器和词汇图卷积网络（VGCN），并通过模型集成提升性能。
AI.result: 在SemEval-2022任务中，最佳模型在子任务A和B中分别达到71.4%和67.3%的F1分数，排名前三分之一。
AI.conclusion: 多模态特征融合有效提升性别歧视检测效果，开源代码可为后续研究提供参考。

search_text: UPB at SemEval-2022 Task 5: Enhancing UNITER with Image Sentiment and Graph Convolutional Networks for Multimedia Automatic Misogyny Identification UPB at SemEval-2022 任务 5：通过图像情感和图卷积网络增强 UNITER，以实现多媒体自动厌女症识别 In recent times, the detection of hate-speech, offensive, or abusive language in online media has become an important topic in NLP research due to the exponential growth of social media and the propagation of such messages, as well as their impact. Misogyny detection, even though it plays an important part in hate-speech detection, has not received the same attention. In this paper, we describe our classification systems submitted to the SemEval-2022 Task 5: MAMI - Multimedia Automatic Misogyny Identification. The shared task aimed to identify misogynous content in a multi-modal setting by analysing meme images together with their textual captions. To this end, we propose two models based on the pre-trained UNITER model, one enhanced with an image sentiment classifier, whereas the second leverages a Vocabulary Graph Convolutional Network (VGCN). Additionally, we explore an ensemble using the aforementioned models. Our best model reaches an F1-score of 71.4% in Sub-task A and 67.3% for Sub-task B positioning our team in the upper third of the leaderboard. We release the code and experiments for our models on GitHub 近年来，由于社交媒体的指数级增长和此类消息的传播及其影响，在线媒体中仇恨言论、攻击性或辱骂性语言的检测已成为 NLP 研究的一个重要课题。厌女症检测尽管在仇恨言论检测中发挥着重要作用，但尚未受到同样的关注。在本文中，我们描述了提交给 SemEval-2022 任务 5 的分类系统：MAMI - 多媒体自动厌女症识别。共享任务旨在通过分析模因图像及其文本标题来识别多模式环境中的厌女内容。为此，我们提出了两种基于预训练 UNITER 模型的模型，一种使用图像情感分类器进行增强，而第二种则利用词汇图卷积网络（VGCN）。此外，我们还使用上述模型探索了一个集成。我们的最佳模型在子任务 A 中的 F1 分数为 71.4%，在子任务 B 中的 F1 分数为 67.3%，使我们的团队位于排行榜的前三分之一。我们在 GitHub 上发布了模型的代码和实验 本文针对多模态场景下的网络谩骂内容检测任务，提出基于UNITER模型的改进方法。 Andrei Paraschiv,Mihai Dascalu,Dumitru-Clementin Cercel cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Shiyang Lu,William R. Johnson III,Kun Wang,Xiaonan Huang,Joran Booth,Rebecca Kramer-Bottiglio,Kostas Bekris
title: 6N-DoF Pose Tracking for Tensegrity Robots
title_zh: 张拉整体机器人的 6N-DoF 位姿跟踪
abstract: Tensegrity robots, which are composed of compressive elements (rods) and flexible tensile elements (e.g., cables), have a variety of advantages, including flexibility, low weight, and resistance to mechanical impact. Nevertheless, the hybrid soft-rigid nature of these robots also complicates the ability to localize and track their state. This work aims to address what has been recognized as a grand challenge in this domain, i.e., the state estimation of tensegrity robots through a markerless, vision-based method, as well as novel, onboard sensors that can measure the length of the robot's cables. In particular, an iterative optimization process is proposed to track the 6-DoF pose of each rigid element of a tensegrity robot from an RGB-D video as well as endcap distance measurements from the cable sensors. To ensure that the pose estimates of rigid elements are physically feasible, i.e., they are not resulting in collisions between rods or with the environment, physical constraints are introduced during the optimization. Real-world experiments are performed with a 3-bar tensegrity robot, which performs locomotion gaits. Given ground truth data from a motion capture system, the proposed method achieves less than 1~cm translation error and 3 degrees rotation error, which significantly outperforms alternatives. At the same time, the approach can provide accurate pose estimation throughout the robot's motion, while motion capture often fails due to occlusions.
summary: Tensegrity robots, which are composed of compressive elements (rods) and flexible tensile elements (e.g., cables), have a variety of advantages, including flexibility, low weight, and resistance to mechanical impact. Nevertheless, the hybrid soft-rigid nature of these robots also complicates the ability to localize and track their state. In particular, an iterative optimization process is proposed to track the 6-DoF pose of each rigid element of a tensegrity robot from an RGB-D video as well as endcap distance measurements from the cable sensors. To ensure that the pose estimates of rigid elements are physically feasible, i.e., they are not resulting in collisions between rods or with the environment, physical constraints are introduced during the optimization. Real-world experiments are performed with a 3-bar tensegrity robot, which performs locomotion gaits. Given ground truth data from a motion capture system, the proposed method achieves less than 1~cm translation error and 3 degrees rotation error, which significantly outperforms alternatives. At the same time, the approach can provide accurate pose estimation throughout the robot's motion, while motion capture often fails due to occlusions.
abstract_zh: 张拉整体机器人由压缩元件（杆）和柔性拉伸元件（例如电缆）组成，具有多种优点，包括灵活性、重量轻和抗机械冲击。然而，这些机器人的软刚混合性质也使定位和跟踪其状态的能力变得复杂。这项工作旨在解决该领域公认的巨大挑战，即通过无标记、基于视觉的方法以及可以测量机器人电缆长度的新型机载传感器来估计张拉整体机器人的状态。特别是，提出了一种迭代优化过程，用于从 RGB-D 视频中跟踪张拉整体机器人每个刚性元件的 6-DoF 位姿，以及从电缆传感器中测量端盖距离。为了确保刚性元件的位姿估计在物理上可行，即它们不会导致杆之间或与环境的碰撞，在优化过程中引入了物理约束。现实世界的实验是使用执行运动步态的 3 杆张拉整体机器人进行的。给定来自运动捕捉系统的地面实况数据，所提出的方法实现了小于 1~cm 的平移误差和 3 度的旋转误差，这明显优于替代方法。同时，该方法可以在机器人的整个运动过程中提供准确的姿态估计，而运动捕捉经常由于遮挡而失败。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于无标记视觉和新型电缆传感器的6自由度姿态跟踪方法，用于解决张力结构机器人状态估计的难题。
AI.motivation: 张力结构机器人因混合软硬特性导致姿态估计困难，现有方法存在遮挡失效、依赖外部设备等问题，需开发更鲁棒的自主定位方案。
AI.method: 结合RGB-D视频与电缆长度传感器数据，通过迭代优化算法估计刚性元件姿态，并引入物理约束避免碰撞。
AI.result: 在3杆张力机器人实验中，平移误差<1cm，旋转误差<3度，显著优于传统方法，且在运动过程中保持稳定估计。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在精度和鲁棒性上优于现有技术，为张力机器人自主导航提供了可行方案，未来可扩展至更复杂结构。

authors_text: Aditya Shukla,Mikhail Erementchouk,Pinaki Mazumder
title: Scalable almost-linear dynamical Ising machines
title_zh: 可扩展的近线性动态伊辛机
abstract: The past decade has seen the emergence of Ising machines targeting hard combinatorial optimization problems by minimizing the Ising Hamiltonian with spins represented by continuous dynamical variables. However, capabilities of these machines at larger scales are yet to be fully explored. We investigate an Ising machine based on a network of almost-linearly coupled analog spins. We show that such networks leverage the computational resource similar to that of the semidefinite positive relaxation of the Ising model. We estimate the expected performance of the almost-linear machine and benchmark it on a set of {0,1}-weighted graphs. We show that the running time of the investigated machine scales polynomially (linearly with the number of edges in the connectivity graph). As an example of the physical realization of the machine, we present a CMOS-compatible implementation comprising an array of vertices efficiently storing the continuous spins on charged capacitors and communicating externally via analog current.
summary: The past decade has seen the emergence of Ising machines targeting hard combinatorial optimization problems by minimizing the Ising Hamiltonian with spins represented by continuous dynamical variables. However, capabilities of these machines at larger scales are yet to be fully explored. We investigate an Ising machine based on a network of almost-linearly coupled analog spins. We show that such networks leverage the computational resource similar to that of the semidefinite positive relaxation of the Ising model. We estimate the expected performance of the almost-linear machine and benchmark it on a set of {0,1}-weighted graphs. We show that the running time of the investigated machine scales polynomially (linearly with the number of edges in the connectivity graph). As an example of the physical realization of the machine, we present a CMOS-compatible implementation comprising an array of vertices efficiently storing the continuous spins on charged capacitors and communicating externally via analog current.
abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，伊辛机的出现通过最小化由连续动态变量表示的自旋的伊辛哈密顿量来解决硬组合优化问题。然而，这些机器在更大规模上的能力尚未得到充分探索。我们研究了基于几乎线性耦合的模拟自旋网络的伊辛机。我们表明，此类网络利用的计算资源类似于伊辛模型的半定正松弛。我们估计几乎线性机器的预期性能，并在一组 {0,1} 加权图上对其进行基准测试。我们表明，所研究机器的运行时间呈多项式缩放（与连接图中的边数呈线性关系）。作为机器物理实现的一个示例，我们提出了一种 CMOS 兼容实现，其中包含一系列顶点，可有效地将连续自旋存储在充电电容器上，并通过模拟电流与外部进行通信。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可扩展的几乎线性动态Ising机器，用于解决大规模组合优化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有Ising机器在处理大规模问题时的计算能力和效率尚未得到充分验证，需探索更高效的实现方案。
AI.method: 基于几乎线性耦合的模拟自旋网络，结合半正定松弛计算资源，并通过基准测试和CMOS电路实现验证。
AI.result: 机器运行时间随连接图边数线性增长，在{0,1}-加权图测试中表现优异，CMOS实现方案可行。
AI.conclusion: 该机器在可扩展性和计算效率上具有优势，为实际物理实现提供了理论支持和工程路径。

authors_text: Han Cai,Junyan Li,Muyan Hu,Chuang Gan,Song Han
title: EfficientViT: Multi-Scale Linear Attention for High-Resolution Dense Prediction
title_zh: EfficientViT：用于高分辨率密集预测的多尺度线性注意力
abstract: High-resolution dense prediction enables many appealing real-world applications, such as computational photography, autonomous driving, etc. However, the vast computational cost makes deploying state-of-the-art high-resolution dense prediction models on hardware devices difficult. This work presents EfficientViT, a new family of high-resolution vision models with novel multi-scale linear attention. Unlike prior high-resolution dense prediction models that rely on heavy softmax attention, hardware-inefficient large-kernel convolution, or complicated topology structure to obtain good performances, our multi-scale linear attention achieves the global receptive field and multi-scale learning (two desirable features for high-resolution dense prediction) with only lightweight and hardware-efficient operations. As such, EfficientViT delivers remarkable performance gains over previous state-of-the-art models with significant speedup on diverse hardware platforms, including mobile CPU, edge GPU, and cloud GPU. Without performance loss on Cityscapes, our EfficientViT provides up to 13.9$\times$ and 6.2$\times$ GPU latency reduction over SegFormer and SegNeXt, respectively. For super-resolution, EfficientViT delivers up to 6.4x speedup over Restormer while providing 0.11dB gain in PSNR. For Segment Anything, EfficientViT delivers 48.9x higher throughput on A100 GPU while achieving slightly better zero-shot instance segmentation performance on COCO.
summary: High-resolution dense prediction enables many appealing real-world applications, such as computational photography, autonomous driving, etc. However, the vast computational cost makes deploying state-of-the-art high-resolution dense prediction models on hardware devices difficult. This work presents EfficientViT, a new family of high-resolution vision models with novel multi-scale linear attention. Unlike prior high-resolution dense prediction models that rely on heavy softmax attention, hardware-inefficient large-kernel convolution, or complicated topology structure to obtain good performances, our multi-scale linear attention achieves the global receptive field and multi-scale learning (two desirable features for high-resolution dense prediction) with only lightweight and hardware-efficient operations. As such, EfficientViT delivers remarkable performance gains over previous state-of-the-art models with significant speedup on diverse hardware platforms, including mobile CPU, edge GPU, and cloud GPU. Without performance loss on Cityscapes, our EfficientViT provides up to 13.9$\times$ and 6.2$\times$ GPU latency reduction over SegFormer and SegNeXt, respectively. For super-resolution, EfficientViT delivers up to 6.4x speedup over Restormer while providing 0.11dB gain in PSNR. For Segment Anything, EfficientViT delivers 48.9x higher throughput on A100 GPU while achieving slightly better zero-shot instance segmentation performance on COCO.
abstract_zh: 高分辨率密集预测使许多有吸引力的现实应用成为可能，例如计算摄影、自动驾驶等。然而，巨大的计算成本使得在硬件设备上部署最先进的高分辨率密集预测模型变得困难。这项工作提出了 EfficientViT，这是一个新的高分辨率视觉模型系列，具有新颖的多尺度线性注意力。与之前依赖于大量softmax注意力、硬件效率低下的大内核卷积或复杂拓扑结构来获得良好性能的高分辨率密集预测模型不同，我们的多尺度线性注意力仅通过轻量级和硬件高效的操作实现了全局感受野和多尺度学习（高分辨率密集预测的两个理想特征）。因此，与之前最先进的模型相比，EfficientViT 提供了显着的性能提升，并在各种硬件平台（包括移动 CPU、边缘 GPU 和云 GPU）上显着加速。在 Cityscapes 上没有性能损失的情况下，我们的 EfficientViT 比 SegFormer 和 SegNeXt 分别减少了高达 13.9$\times$ 和 6.2$\times$ 的 GPU 延迟。对于超分辨率，EfficientViT 比 Restormer 提供高达 6.4 倍的加速，同时提供 0.11dB 的 PSNR 增益。对于 Segment Anything，EfficientViT 在 A100 GPU 上提供了 48.9 倍的吞吐量，同时在 COCO 上实现了稍微更好的零样本实例分割性能。

AI.tldr: 提出高效视觉模型EfficientViT，通过多尺度线性注意力机制实现高分辨率密集预测任务的计算优化。
AI.motivation: 现有高分辨率密集预测模型存在计算成本高、硬件部署困难的问题，传统方法依赖softmax注意力、大核卷积或复杂结构导致效率低下。
AI.method: 设计多尺度线性注意力机制，以轻量且硬件友好的操作替代传统重计算模块，实现全局感受野和多尺度学习。

authors_text: Nguyen Dang,Özgür Akgün,Joan Espasa,Ian Miguel,Peter Nightingale
title: A Framework for Generating Informative Benchmark Instances
title_zh: 用于生成信息丰富的基准实例的框架
abstract: Benchmarking is an important tool for assessing the relative performance of alternative solving approaches. However, the utility of benchmarking is limited by the quantity and quality of the available problem instances. Modern constraint programming languages typically allow the specification of a class-level model that is parameterised over instance data. This separation presents an opportunity for automated approaches to generate instance data that define instances that are graded (solvable at a certain difficulty level for a solver) or can discriminate between two solving approaches. In this paper, we introduce a framework that combines these two properties to generate a large number of benchmark instances, purposely generated for effective and informative benchmarking. We use five problems that were used in the MiniZinc competition to demonstrate the usage of our framework. In addition to producing a ranking among solvers, our framework gives a broader understanding of the behaviour of each solver for the whole instance space; for example by finding subsets of instances where the solver performance significantly varies from its average performance.
summary: Benchmarking is an important tool for assessing the relative performance of alternative solving approaches. However, the utility of benchmarking is limited by the quantity and quality of the available problem instances. Modern constraint programming languages typically allow the specification of a class-level model that is parameterised over instance data. This separation presents an opportunity for automated approaches to generate instance data that define instances that are graded (solvable at a certain difficulty level for a solver) or can discriminate between two solving approaches. In this paper, we introduce a framework that combines these two properties to generate a large number of benchmark instances, purposely generated for effective and informative benchmarking. We use five problems that were used in the MiniZinc competition to demonstrate the usage of our framework. In addition to producing a ranking among solvers, our framework gives a broader understanding of the behaviour of each solver for the whole instance space; for example by finding subsets of instances where the solver performance significantly varies from its average performance.
abstract_zh: 基准测试是评估替代解决方法相对性能的重要工具。然而，基准测试的效用受到可用问题实例的数量和质量的限制。现代约束编程语言通常允许指定通过实例数据参数化的类级模型。这种分离为自动化方法提供了生成实例数据的机会，这些实例数据定义了分级实例（求解器在一定难度下可求解）或可以区分两种求解方法。在本文中，我们介绍了一个框架，该框架结合了这两个属性来生成大量基准实例，专门为有效且信息丰富的基准测试而生成。我们使用 MiniZinc 竞赛中使用的五个问题来演示我们框架的用法。除了在求解器之间进行排名之外，我们的框架还可以更广泛地了解整个实例空间中每个求解器的行为；例如，通过查找求解器性能与其平均性能显着不同的实例子集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个生成信息丰富基准实例的框架，用于提升求解器性能评估的效率和有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有基准实例的数量和质量限制了求解器性能比较的全面性，需自动化生成具有分级难度或能区分求解方法的实例。
AI.method: 结合参数化模型与自动化生成技术，设计框架生成大规模基准实例，并通过MiniZinc竞赛的五个问题验证框架有效性。
AI.result: 框架成功生成用于求解器排名的实例，并揭示了求解器在不同实例子集中的性能波动特征。
AI.conclusion: 该框架显著提升了基准测试的信息量，为求解器行为分析和优化提供了更全面的视角。

authors_text: Antik Mallick,Zijian Zhao,Mohammad Khairul Bashar,Shamiul Alam,Md Mazharul Islam,Yi Xiao,Yixin Xu,Ahmedullah Aziz,Vijaykrishnan Narayanan,Kai Ni,Nikhil Shukla
title: CMOS-Compatible Ising Machines built using Bistable Latches Coupled through Ferroelectric Transistor Arrays
title_zh: 使用通过铁电晶体管阵列耦合的双稳态锁存器构建的 CMOS 兼容 Ising 机器
abstract: Realizing compact and scalable Ising machines that are compatible with CMOS-process technology is crucial to the effectiveness and practicality of using such hardware platforms for accelerating computationally intractable problems. Besides the need for realizing compact Ising spins, the implementation of the coupling network, which describes the spin interaction, is also a potential bottleneck in the scalability of such platforms. Therefore, in this work, we propose an Ising machine platform that exploits the novel behavior of compact bi-stable CMOS-latches (cross-coupled inverters) as classical Ising spins interacting through highly scalable and CMOS-process compatible ferroelectric-HfO2-based Ferroelectric FETs (FeFETs) which act as coupling elements. We experimentally demonstrate the prototype building blocks of this system, and evaluate the behavior of the scaled system using simulations. We project that the proposed architecture can compute Ising solutions with an efficiency of ~1.04 x 10^8 solutions/W/second. Our work not only provides a pathway to realizing CMOS-compatible designs but also to overcoming their scaling challenges.
summary: Realizing compact and scalable Ising machines that are compatible with CMOS-process technology is crucial to the effectiveness and practicality of using such hardware platforms for accelerating computationally intractable problems. Besides the need for realizing compact Ising spins, the implementation of the coupling network, which describes the spin interaction, is also a potential bottleneck in the scalability of such platforms. Therefore, in this work, we propose an Ising machine platform that exploits the novel behavior of compact bi-stable CMOS-latches (cross-coupled inverters) as classical Ising spins interacting through highly scalable and CMOS-process compatible ferroelectric-HfO2-based Ferroelectric FETs (FeFETs) which act as coupling elements. We experimentally demonstrate the prototype building blocks of this system, and evaluate the behavior of the scaled system using simulations. We project that the proposed architecture can compute Ising solutions with an efficiency of ~1.04 x 10^8 solutions/W/second. Our work not only provides a pathway to realizing CMOS-compatible designs but also to overcoming their scaling challenges.
abstract_zh: 实现与 CMOS 工艺技术兼容的紧凑且可扩展的 Ising 机器对于使用此类硬件平台加速计算棘手问题的有效性和实用性至关重要。除了需要实现紧凑的伊辛自旋之外，描述自旋相互作用的耦合网络的实现也是此类平台可扩展性的潜在瓶颈。因此，在这项工作中，我们提出了一个 Ising 机器平台，该平台利用紧凑型双稳态 CMOS 锁存器（交叉耦合反相器）的新颖行为，作为经典 Ising 自旋通过高度可扩展且 CMOS 工艺兼容的铁电 HfO2 基铁电 FET (FeFET) 相互作用，充当耦合元件。我们通过实验演示了该系统的原型构建块，并使用模拟来评估缩放系统的行为。我们预计所提出的架构可以以约 1.04 x 10^8 解决方案/W/秒的效率计算 Ising 解决方案。我们的工作不仅提供了实现 CMOS 兼容设计的途径，而且还克服了其扩展挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于双稳态CMOS锁存器和铁电场效应晶体管（FeFET）的CMOS兼容型Ising机器架构，以解决传统Ising机器在可扩展性方面的瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的Ising机器在实现紧凑型自旋和可扩展耦合网络方面存在挑战，限制了其在解决计算难题中的实际应用效率。
AI.method: 利用双稳态CMOS锁存器（交叉耦合反相器）作为经典Ising自旋，并通过铁电HfO₂基FeFET实现高可扩展性耦合网络，结合实验原型与仿真验证系统行为。
AI.result: 实验验证了原型模块的可行性，仿真表明该架构可实现约1.04×10⁸个解/秒/瓦的计算效率。
AI.conclusion: 该设计为实现CMOS兼容型Ising机器提供了可行路径，并有效克服了其扩展性难题。

search_text: CMOS-Compatible Ising Machines built using Bistable Latches Coupled through Ferroelectric Transistor Arrays 使用通过铁电晶体管阵列耦合的双稳态锁存器构建的 CMOS 兼容 Ising 机器 Realizing compact and scalable Ising machines that are compatible with CMOS-process technology is crucial to the effectiveness and practicality of using such hardware platforms for accelerating computationally intractable problems. Besides the need for realizing compact Ising spins, the implementation of the coupling network, which describes the spin interaction, is also a potential bottleneck in the scalability of such platforms. Therefore, in this work, we propose an Ising machine platform that exploits the novel behavior of compact bi-stable CMOS-latches (cross-coupled inverters) as classical Ising spins interacting through highly scalable and CMOS-process compatible ferroelectric-HfO2-based Ferroelectric FETs (FeFETs) which act as coupling elements. We experimentally demonstrate the prototype building blocks of this system, and evaluate the behavior of the scaled system using simulations. We project that the proposed architecture can compute Ising solutions with an efficiency of ~1.04 x 10^8 solutions/W/second. Our work not only provides a pathway to realizing CMOS-compatible designs but also to overcoming their scaling challenges. 实现与 CMOS 工艺技术兼容的紧凑且可扩展的 Ising 机器对于使用此类硬件平台加速计算棘手问题的有效性和实用性至关重要。除了需要实现紧凑的伊辛自旋之外，描述自旋相互作用的耦合网络的实现也是此类平台可扩展性的潜在瓶颈。因此，在这项工作中，我们提出了一个 Ising 机器平台，该平台利用紧凑型双稳态 CMOS 锁存器（交叉耦合反相器）的新颖行为，作为经典 Ising 自旋通过高度可扩展且 CMOS 工艺兼容的铁电 HfO2 基铁电 FET (FeFET) 相互作用，充当耦合元件。我们通过实验演示了该系统的原型构建块，并使用模拟来评估缩放系统的行为。我们预计所提出的架构可以以约 1.04 x 10^8 解决方案/W/秒的效率计算 Ising 解决方案。我们的工作不仅提供了实现 CMOS 兼容设计的途径，而且还克服了其扩展挑战。 本文提出了一种基于双稳态CMOS锁存器和铁电场效应晶体管（FeFET）的CMOS兼容型Ising机器架构，以解决传统Ising机器在可扩展性方面的瓶颈问题。 Antik Mallick,Zijian Zhao,Mohammad Khairul Bashar,Shamiul Alam,Md Mazharul Islam,Yi Xiao,Yixin Xu,Ahmedullah Aziz,Vijaykrishnan Narayanan,Kai Ni,Nikhil Shukla physics.app-ph,cs.ET

authors_text: Yirong Chen,Weiquan Fan,Xiaofen Xing,Jianxin Pang,Minlie Huang,Wenjing Han,Qianfeng Tie,Xiangmin Xu
title: CPED: A Large-Scale Chinese Personalized and Emotional Dialogue Dataset for Conversational AI
title_zh: CPED：用于对话人工智能的大规模中文个性化情感对话数据集
abstract: Human language expression is based on the subjective construal of the situation instead of the objective truth conditions, which means that speakers' personalities and emotions after cognitive processing have an important influence on conversation. However, most existing datasets for conversational AI ignore human personalities and emotions, or only consider part of them. It's difficult for dialogue systems to understand speakers' personalities and emotions although large-scale pre-training language models have been widely used. In order to consider both personalities and emotions in the process of conversation generation, we propose CPED, a large-scale Chinese personalized and emotional dialogue dataset, which consists of multi-source knowledge related to empathy and personal characteristic. These knowledge covers gender, Big Five personality traits, 13 emotions, 19 dialogue acts and 10 scenes. CPED contains more than 12K dialogues of 392 speakers from 40 TV shows. We release the textual dataset with audio features and video features according to the copyright claims, privacy issues, terms of service of video platforms. We provide detailed description of the CPED construction process and introduce three tasks for conversational AI, including personality recognition, emotion recognition in conversations as well as personalized and emotional conversation generation. Finally, we provide baseline systems for these tasks and consider the function of speakers' personalities and emotions on conversation. Our motivation is to propose a dataset to be widely adopted by the NLP community as a new open benchmark for conversational AI research. The full dataset is available at https://github.com/scutcyr/CPED.
