authors_text: Binyan Hu,Yu Sun,A. K. Qin
title: A General Multiple Data Augmentation Based Framework for Training Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: 用于训练深度神经网络的通用多数据增强框架
comment: accepted by the 2022 IEEE International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN 2022)
comments: accepted by the 2022 IEEE International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN 2022)
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) often rely on massive labelled data for training, which is inaccessible in many applications. Data augmentation (DA) tackles data scarcity by creating new labelled data from available ones. Different DA methods have different mechanisms and therefore using their generated labelled data for DNN training may help improving DNN's generalisation to different degrees. Combining multiple DA methods, namely multi-DA, for DNN training, provides a way to boost generalisation. Among existing multi-DA based DNN training methods, those relying on knowledge distillation (KD) have received great attention. They leverage knowledge transfer to utilise the labelled data sets created by multiple DA methods instead of directly combining them for training DNNs. However, existing KD-based methods can only utilise certain types of DA methods, incapable of utilising the advantages of arbitrary DA methods. We propose a general multi-DA based DNN training framework capable to use arbitrary DA methods. To train a DNN, our framework replicates a certain portion in the latter part of the DNN into multiple copies, leading to multiple DNNs with shared blocks in their former parts and independent blocks in their latter parts. Each of these DNNs is associated with a unique DA and a newly devised loss that allows comprehensively learning from the data generated by all DA methods and the outputs from all DNNs in an online and adaptive way. The overall loss, i.e., the sum of each DNN's loss, is used for training the DNN. Eventually, one of the DNNs with the best validation performance is chosen for inference. We implement the proposed framework by using three distinct DA methods and apply it for training representative DNNs. Experiments on the popular benchmarks of image classification demonstrate the superiority of our method to several existing single-DA and multi-DA based training methods.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) often rely on massive labelled data for training, which is inaccessible in many applications. Data augmentation (DA) tackles data scarcity by creating new labelled data from available ones. Different DA methods have different mechanisms and therefore using their generated labelled data for DNN training may help improving DNN's generalisation to different degrees. Combining multiple DA methods, namely multi-DA, for DNN training, provides a way to boost generalisation. Among existing multi-DA based DNN training methods, those relying on knowledge distillation (KD) have received great attention. They leverage knowledge transfer to utilise the labelled data sets created by multiple DA methods instead of directly combining them for training DNNs. However, existing KD-based methods can only utilise certain types of DA methods, incapable of utilising the advantages of arbitrary DA methods. We propose a general multi-DA based DNN training framework capable to use arbitrary DA methods. To train a DNN, our framework replicates a certain portion in the latter part of the DNN into multiple copies, leading to multiple DNNs with shared blocks in their former parts and independent blocks in their latter parts. Each of these DNNs is associated with a unique DA and a newly devised loss that allows comprehensively learning from the data generated by all DA methods and the outputs from all DNNs in an online and adaptive way. The overall loss, i.e., the sum of each DNN's loss, is used for training the DNN. Eventually, one of the DNNs with the best validation performance is chosen for inference. We implement the proposed framework by using three distinct DA methods and apply it for training representative DNNs. Experiments on the popular benchmarks of image classification demonstrate the superiority of our method to several existing single-DA and multi-DA based training methods.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 通常依赖于大量标记数据进行训练，这在许多应用中是无法访问的。数据增强 (DA) 通过从可用数据创建新的标记数据来解决数据稀缺问题。不同的DA方法具有不同的机制，因此使用其生成的标记数据进行DNN训练可能有助于不同程度地提高DNN的泛化能力。结合多种 DA 方法（即多 DA）进行 DNN 训练，提供了一种提高泛化能力的方法。在现有的基于多DA的DNN训练方法中，依赖于知识蒸馏（KD）的方法受到了极大的关注。他们利用知识转移来利用多种 DA 方法创建的标记数据集，而不是直接将它们组合起来训练 DNN。然而，现有的基于KD的方法只能利用某些类型的DA方法，无法利用任意DA方法的优点。我们提出了一种通用的基于多 DA 的 DNN 训练框架，能够使用任意 DA 方法。为了训练 DNN，我们的框架将 DNN 后半部分的某个部分复制为多个副本，从而形成多个 DNN，前半部分具有共享块，后半部分具有独立块。每个 DNN 都与一个独特的 DA 和新设计的损失相关联，允许以在线和自适应的方式从所有 DA 方法生成的数据和所有 DNN 的输出中进行全面学习。总体损失，即每个 DNN 损失的总和，用于训练 DNN。最终，选择具有最佳验证性能的 DNN 之一进行推理。我们通过使用三种不同的 DA 方法来实现所提出的框架，并将其应用于训练代表性的 DNN。对流行的图像分类基准的实验证明了我们的方法相对于几种现有的基于单 DA 和多 DA 的训练方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通用的多数据增强框架，通过结合多种数据增强方法提升深度神经网络的训练效果。
AI.motivation: 现有基于知识蒸馏的多数据增强方法仅能利用特定类型的数据增强技术，无法充分发挥任意数据增强方法的优势。
AI.method: 框架通过复制DNN后段部分结构形成多个子网络，每个子网络关联一种数据增强方法和自适应损失函数，最终通过汇总各子网络损失进行联合训练。
AI.result: 在主流图像分类基准测试中，该方法优于多种现有单数据增强和多数据增强训练方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架实现了任意数据增强方法的通用集成，有效提升了深度神经网络的泛化能力。

conclusion: 该框架实现了任意数据增强方法的通用集成，有效提升了深度神经网络的泛化能力。
search_text: A General Multiple Data Augmentation Based Framework for Training Deep Neural Networks 用于训练深度神经网络的通用多数据增强框架 Deep neural networks (DNNs) often rely on massive labelled data for training, which is inaccessible in many applications. Data augmentation (DA) tackles data scarcity by creating new labelled data from available ones. Different DA methods have different mechanisms and therefore using their generated labelled data for DNN training may help improving DNN's generalisation to different degrees. Combining multiple DA methods, namely multi-DA, for DNN training, provides a way to boost generalisation. Among existing multi-DA based DNN training methods, those relying on knowledge distillation (KD) have received great attention. They leverage knowledge transfer to utilise the labelled data sets created by multiple DA methods instead of directly combining them for training DNNs. However, existing KD-based methods can only utilise certain types of DA methods, incapable of utilising the advantages of arbitrary DA methods. We propose a general multi-DA based DNN training framework capable to use arbitrary DA methods. To train a DNN, our framework replicates a certain portion in the latter part of the DNN into multiple copies, leading to multiple DNNs with shared blocks in their former parts and independent blocks in their latter parts. Each of these DNNs is associated with a unique DA and a newly devised loss that allows comprehensively learning from the data generated by all DA methods and the outputs from all DNNs in an online and adaptive way. The overall loss, i.e., the sum of each DNN's loss, is used for training the DNN. Eventually, one of the DNNs with the best validation performance is chosen for inference. We implement the proposed framework by using three distinct DA methods and apply it for training representative DNNs. Experiments on the popular benchmarks of image classification demonstrate the superiority of our method to several existing single-DA and multi-DA based training methods. 深度神经网络 (DNN) 通常依赖于大量标记数据进行训练，这在许多应用中是无法访问的。数据增强 (DA) 通过从可用数据创建新的标记数据来解决数据稀缺问题。不同的DA方法具有不同的机制，因此使用其生成的标记数据进行DNN训练可能有助于不同程度地提高DNN的泛化能力。结合多种 DA 方法（即多 DA）进行 DNN 训练，提供了一种提高泛化能力的方法。在现有的基于多DA的DNN训练方法中，依赖于知识蒸馏（KD）的方法受到了极大的关注。他们利用知识转移来利用多种 DA 方法创建的标记数据集，而不是直接将它们组合起来训练 DNN。然而，现有的基于KD的方法只能利用某些类型的DA方法，无法利用任意DA方法的优点。我们提出了一种通用的基于多 DA 的 DNN 训练框架，能够使用任意 DA 方法。为了训练 DNN，我们的框架将 DNN 后半部分的某个部分复制为多个副本，从而形成多个 DNN，前半部分具有共享块，后半部分具有独立块。每个 DNN 都与一个独特的 DA 和新设计的损失相关联，允许以在线和自适应的方式从所有 DA 方法生成的数据和所有 DNN 的输出中进行全面学习。总体损失，即每个 DNN 损失的总和，用于训练 DNN。最终，选择具有最佳验证性能的 DNN 之一进行推理。我们通过使用三种不同的 DA 方法来实现所提出的框架，并将其应用于训练代表性的 DNN。对流行的图像分类基准的实验证明了我们的方法相对于几种现有的基于单 DA 和多 DA 的训练方法的优越性。 本文提出了一种通用的多数据增强框架，通过结合多种数据增强方法提升深度神经网络的训练效果。 Binyan Hu,Yu Sun,A. K. Qin cs.NE,cs.CV

authors_text: Jungsoo Lee,Jeonghoon Park,Daeyoung Kim,Juyoung Lee,Edward Choi,Jaegul Choo
title: Revisiting the Importance of Amplifying Bias for Debiasing
title_zh: 重新审视放大偏差对于消除偏差的重要性
abstract: In image classification, "debiasing" aims to train a classifier to be less susceptible to dataset bias, the strong correlation between peripheral attributes of data samples and a target class. For example, even if the frog class in the dataset mainly consists of frog images with a swamp background (i.e., bias-aligned samples), a debiased classifier should be able to correctly classify a frog at a beach (i.e., bias-conflicting samples). Recent debiasing approaches commonly use two components for debiasing, a biased model $f_B$ and a debiased model $f_D$. $f_B$ is trained to focus on bias-aligned samples (i.e., overfitted to the bias) while $f_D$ is mainly trained with bias-conflicting samples by concentrating on samples which $f_B$ fails to learn, leading $f_D$ to be less susceptible to the dataset bias. While the state-of-the-art debiasing techniques have aimed to better train $f_D$, we focus on training $f_B$, an overlooked component until now. Our empirical analysis reveals that removing the bias-conflicting samples from the training set for $f_B$ is important for improving the debiasing performance of $f_D$. This is due to the fact that the bias-conflicting samples work as noisy samples for amplifying the bias for $f_B$ since those samples do not include the bias attribute. To this end, we propose a simple yet effective data sample selection method which removes the bias-conflicting samples to construct a bias-amplified dataset for training $f_B$. Our data sample selection method can be directly applied to existing reweighting-based debiasing approaches, obtaining consistent performance boost and achieving the state-of-the-art performance on both synthetic and real-world datasets.
summary: In image classification, "debiasing" aims to train a classifier to be less susceptible to dataset bias, the strong correlation between peripheral attributes of data samples and a target class. For example, even if the frog class in the dataset mainly consists of frog images with a swamp background (i.e., bias-aligned samples), a debiased classifier should be able to correctly classify a frog at a beach (i.e., bias-conflicting samples). Recent debiasing approaches commonly use two components for debiasing, a biased model $f_B$ and a debiased model $f_D$. $f_B$ is trained to focus on bias-aligned samples (i.e., overfitted to the bias) while $f_D$ is mainly trained with bias-conflicting samples by concentrating on samples which $f_B$ fails to learn, leading $f_D$ to be less susceptible to the dataset bias. While the state-of-the-art debiasing techniques have aimed to better train $f_D$, we focus on training $f_B$, an overlooked component until now. Our empirical analysis reveals that removing the bias-conflicting samples from the training set for $f_B$ is important for improving the debiasing performance of $f_D$. This is due to the fact that the bias-conflicting samples work as noisy samples for amplifying the bias for $f_B$ since those samples do not include the bias attribute. To this end, we propose a simple yet effective data sample selection method which removes the bias-conflicting samples to construct a bias-amplified dataset for training $f_B$. Our data sample selection method can be directly applied to existing reweighting-based debiasing approaches, obtaining consistent performance boost and achieving the state-of-the-art performance on both synthetic and real-world datasets.
abstract_zh: 在图像分类中，“去偏差”旨在训练分类器不易受到数据集偏差的影响，即数据样本的外围属性与目标类别之间的强相关性。例如，即使数据集中的青蛙类主要由沼泽背景的青蛙图像（即偏差对齐样本）组成，去偏差分类器也应该能够正确地对海滩上的青蛙（即偏差冲突样本）进行分类。最近的去偏置方法通常使用两个组件进行去偏置，偏置模型 $f_B$ 和偏置模型 $f_D$。 $f_B$ 被训练为专注于偏差对齐样本（即过度拟合偏差），而 $f_D$ 主要通过专注于 $f_B$ 无法学习的样本来使用偏差冲突样本进行训练，从而导致 $f_D$ 不易受到数据集偏差的影响。虽然最先进的去偏技术旨在更好地训练 $f_D$，但我们专注于训练 $f_B$，这是一个迄今为止被忽视的组件。我们的实证分析表明，从 $f_B$ 的训练集中删除偏差冲突样本对于提高 $f_D$ 的去偏差性能非常重要。这是因为偏差冲突样本作为噪声样本来放大 $f_B$ 的偏差，因为这些样本不包含偏差属性。为此，我们提出了一种简单而有效的数据样本选择方法，该方法删除了偏差冲突样本，以构建用于训练$f_B$的偏差放大数据集。我们的数据样本选择方法可以直接应用于现有的基于重新加权的去偏方法，获得一致的性能提升，并在合成数据集和真实数据集上实现最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在图像分类中通过增强有偏模型训练来提升去偏效果的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有去偏方法过度关注去偏模型f_D的优化，而忽视了有偏模型f_B的训练，导致去偏效果受限。
AI.method: 提出一种数据样本选择方法，移除与有偏样本冲突的噪声样本，构建增强偏见的数据集训练f_B。
AI.result: 该方法在合成和真实数据集上均达到最先进性能，显著提升现有去偏方法效果。
AI.conclusion: 优化f_B的训练是提升去偏性能的关键，所提方法简单有效且具有通用性。

authors_text: Shuyin Xia,Jiang Xie,Guoyin Wang
title: GBC: An Efficient and Adaptive Clustering Algorithm Based on Granular-Ball
title_zh: GBC：一种基于粒球的高效自适应聚类算法
abstract: Existing clustering methods are based on a single granularity of information, such as the distance and density of each data. This most fine-grained based approach is usually inefficient and susceptible to noise. Inspired by adaptive process of granular-ball division and differentiation, we present a novel clustering approach that retains the speed and efficiency of K-means clustering while out-performing time-tested density clustering approaches widely used in industry today. Our simple, robust, adaptive granular-ball clustering method can efficiently recognize clusters with unknown and complex shapes without the use of extra parameters. Moreover, the proposed method provides an efficient, adaptive way to depict the world, and will promote the research and development of adaptive and efficient AI technologies, especially density computing models, and improve the efficiency of many existing clustering methods.
summary: Existing clustering methods are based on a single granularity of information, such as the distance and density of each data. This most fine-grained based approach is usually inefficient and susceptible to noise. Inspired by adaptive process of granular-ball division and differentiation, we present a novel clustering approach that retains the speed and efficiency of K-means clustering while out-performing time-tested density clustering approaches widely used in industry today. Our simple, robust, adaptive granular-ball clustering method can efficiently recognize clusters with unknown and complex shapes without the use of extra parameters. Moreover, the proposed method provides an efficient, adaptive way to depict the world, and will promote the research and development of adaptive and efficient AI technologies, especially density computing models, and improve the efficiency of many existing clustering methods.
abstract_zh: 现有的聚类方法基于单一信息粒度，例如每个数据的距离和密度。这种基于最细粒度的方法通常效率低下并且容易受到噪声的影响。受粒球划分和微分自适应过程的启发，我们提出了一种新颖的聚类方法，该方法保留了 K 均值聚类的速度和效率，同时优于当今工业中广泛使用的经过时间考验的密度聚类方法。我们简单、鲁棒、自适应的粒球聚类方法可以有效地识别具有未知和复杂形状的簇，而无需使用额外的参数。而且，所提出的方法提供了一种高效、自适应的方式来描述世界，将促进自适应、高效的人工智能技术，特别是密度计算模型的研究和发展，并提高许多现有聚类方法的效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于颗粒球的高效自适应聚类算法GBC，旨在解决传统聚类方法在处理复杂形状和噪声数据时的效率及鲁棒性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有聚类方法依赖单一粒度信息（如距离、密度），导致效率低下且易受噪声干扰，亟需一种兼具速度与适应性的新型聚类框架。
AI.method: 受颗粒球分割与分化过程启发，设计自适应颗粒球聚类方法，在保留K-means效率的同时，通过动态调整粒度无需额外参数即可识别复杂形状聚类。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在保持K-means速度优势的基础上，优于传统密度聚类算法，能高效处理未知复杂形状数据并提升噪声鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: GBC方法为自适应AI技术发展提供新范式，尤其推动密度计算模型优化，有望成为提升现有聚类算法效率的关键技术路径。

Inspired by adaptive process of granular-ball division and differentiation, we present a novel clustering approach that retains the speed and efficiency of K-means clustering while out-performing time-tested density clustering approaches widely used in industry today. Our simple, robust, adaptive granular-ball clustering method can efficiently recognize clusters with unknown and complex shapes without the use of extra parameters. Moreover, the proposed method provides an efficient, adaptive way to depict the world, and will promote the research and development of adaptive and efficient AI technologies, especially density computing models, and improve the efficiency of many existing clustering methods. 现有的聚类方法基于单一信息粒度，例如每个数据的距离和密度。这种基于最细粒度的方法通常效率低下并且容易受到噪声的影响。受粒球划分和微分自适应过程的启发，我们提出了一种新颖的聚类方法，该方法保留了 K 均值聚类的速度和效率，同时优于当今工业中广泛使用的经过时间考验的密度聚类方法。我们简单、鲁棒、自适应的粒球聚类方法可以有效地识别具有未知和复杂形状的簇，而无需使用额外的参数。而且，所提出的方法提供了一种高效、自适应的方式来描述世界，将促进自适应、高效的人工智能技术，特别是密度计算模型的研究和发展，并提高许多现有聚类方法的效率。 本文提出了一种基于颗粒球的高效自适应聚类算法GBC，旨在解决传统聚类方法在处理复杂形状和噪声数据时的效率及鲁棒性问题。 Shuyin Xia,Jiang Xie,Guoyin Wang cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CR

authors_text: Zhenwei Tang,Shichao Pei,Xi Peng,Fuzhen Zhuang,Xiangliang Zhang,Robert Hoehndorf
title: TAR: Neural Logical Reasoning across TBox and ABox
title_zh: TAR：跨 TBox 和 ABox 的神经逻辑推理
abstract: Many ontologies, i.e., Description Logic (DL) knowledge bases, have been developed to provide rich knowledge about various domains. An ontology consists of an ABox, i.e., assertion axioms between two entities or between a concept and an entity, and a TBox, i.e., terminology axioms between two concepts. Neural logical reasoning (NLR) is a fundamental task to explore such knowledge bases, which aims at answering multi-hop queries with logical operations based on distributed representations of queries and answers. While previous NLR methods can give specific entity-level answers, i.e., ABox answers, they are not able to provide descriptive concept-level answers, i.e., TBox answers, where each concept is a description of a set of entities. In other words, previous NLR methods only reason over the ABox of an ontology while ignoring the TBox. In particular, providing TBox answers enables inferring the explanations of each query with descriptive concepts, which make answers comprehensible to users and are of great usefulness in the field of applied ontology. In this work, we formulate the problem of neural logical reasoning across TBox and ABox (TA-NLR), solving which needs to address challenges in incorporating, representing, and operating on concepts. We propose an original solution named TAR for TA-NLR. Firstly, we incorporate description logic based ontological axioms to provide the source of concepts. Then, we represent concepts and queries as fuzzy sets, i.e., sets whose elements have degrees of membership, to bridge concepts and queries with entities. Moreover, we design operators involving concepts on top of fuzzy set representation of concepts and queries for optimization and inference. Extensive experimental results on two real-world datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of TAR for TA-NLR.

In other words, previous NLR methods only reason over the ABox of an ontology while ignoring the TBox. In particular, providing TBox answers enables inferring the explanations of each query with descriptive concepts, which make answers comprehensible to users and are of great usefulness in the field of applied ontology. In this work, we formulate the problem of neural logical reasoning across TBox and ABox (TA-NLR), solving which needs to address challenges in incorporating, representing, and operating on concepts. We propose an original solution named TAR for TA-NLR. Firstly, we incorporate description logic based ontological axioms to provide the source of concepts. abstract_zh: 已经开发了许多本体，即描述逻辑（DL）知识库，以提供有关各个领域的丰富知识。本体由 ABox（即两个实体之间或概念与实体之间的断言公理）和 TBox（即两个概念之间的术语公理）组成。神经逻辑推理（NLR）是探索此类知识库的一项基本任务，其目的是通过基于查询和答案的分布式表示的逻辑操作来回答多跳查询。虽然以前的 NLR 方法可以给出特定的实体级答案，即 ABox 答案，但它们无法提供描述性概念级答案，即 TBox 答案，其中每个概念都是一组实体的描述。换句话说，以前的NLR方法只对本体的ABox进行推理，而忽略了TBox。特别是，提供TBox答案可以用描述性概念推断每个查询的解释，这使得答案易于用户理解，并且在应用本体领域非常有用。在这项工作中，我们提出了跨 TBox 和 ABox 的神经逻辑推理问题（TA-NLR），解决该问题需要解决概念合并、表示和操作方面的挑战。我们为 TA-NLR 提出了一个名为 TAR 的原始解决方案。首先，我们结合基于本体公理的描述逻辑来提供概念的来源。然后，我们将概念和查询表示为模糊集，即元素具有隶属度的集合，以将概念和查询与实体联系起来。此外，我们在概念的模糊集表示和查询之上设计涉及概念的运算符，以进行优化和推理。对两个真实世界数据集的大量实验结果证明了 TAR 对于 TA-NLR 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TAR的方法，用于解决跨TBox和ABox的神经逻辑推理（TA-NLR）问题，以提供描述性概念级答案。
AI.motivation: 现有神经逻辑推理方法仅能提供实体级答案（ABox），无法生成描述性概念级答案（TBox），而后者对用户理解和应用本体至关重要。
AI.method: 提出TAR方法，整合描述逻辑本体公理，将概念和查询表示为模糊集，并设计基于模糊集的操作符以实现优化和推理。
AI.result: 在两个真实世界数据集上的实验结果验证了TAR在TA-NLR任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: TAR方法成功解决了TA-NLR的挑战，为应用本体中的可解释性推理提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Chinmay Maheshwari,Manxi Wu,Druv Pai,Shankar Sastry
title: Independent and Decentralized Learning in Markov Potential Games
title_zh: 马尔可夫势博弈中的独立分散学习
abstract: We study a multi-agent reinforcement learning dynamics, and analyze its asymptotic behavior in infinite-horizon discounted Markov potential games. We focus on the independent and decentralized setting, where players do not know the game parameters, and cannot communicate or coordinate. In each stage, players update their estimate of Q-function that evaluates their total contingent payoff based on the realized one-stage reward in an asynchronous manner. Then, players independently update their policies by incorporating an optimal one-stage deviation strategy based on the estimated Q-function. Inspired by the actor-critic algorithm in single-agent reinforcement learning, a key feature of our learning dynamics is that agents update their Q-function estimates at a faster timescale than the policies. Leveraging tools from two-timescale asynchronous stochastic approximation theory, we characterize the convergent set of learning dynamics.
summary: We study a multi-agent reinforcement learning dynamics, and analyze its asymptotic behavior in infinite-horizon discounted Markov potential games. We focus on the independent and decentralized setting, where players do not know the game parameters, and cannot communicate or coordinate. In each stage, players update their estimate of Q-function that evaluates their total contingent payoff based on the realized one-stage reward in an asynchronous manner. Then, players independently update their policies by incorporating an optimal one-stage deviation strategy based on the estimated Q-function. Inspired by the actor-critic algorithm in single-agent reinforcement learning, a key feature of our learning dynamics is that agents update their Q-function estimates at a faster timescale than the policies. Leveraging tools from two-timescale asynchronous stochastic approximation theory, we characterize the convergent set of learning dynamics.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了多智能体强化学习动力学，并分析了其在无限视野贴现马尔可夫势博弈中的渐近行为。我们专注于独立和分散的设置，玩家不知道游戏参数，无法沟通或协调。在每个阶段，玩家更新他们对 Q 函数的估计，该函数根据已实现的单阶段奖励以异步方式评估他们的总或有收益。然后，参与者根据估计的 Q 函数结合最佳的一阶段偏差策略来独立更新他们的策略。受单智能体强化学习中的行动者评论家算法的启发，我们的学习动态的一个关键特征是智能体以比策略更快的时间尺度更新其 Q 函数估计。利用两个时间尺度异步随机逼近理论的工具，我们描述了学习动态的收敛集。

AI.tldr: 研究多智能体强化学习在去中心化和独立设置下的收敛性，分析其渐进行为。
AI.motivation: 传统多智能体学习常依赖集中控制或通信，但实际场景中这些条件可能受限，需研究无需通信和协调的独立学习方法。
AI.method: 基于异步更新Q函数和策略的actor-critic框架，利用双时间尺度异步随机逼近理论分析收敛性。
AI.result: 证明了在无限时间折扣马尔可夫势博弈中，独立学习动态几乎必然收敛到某个收敛集。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法在无通信和协调的环境下实现了多智能体学习的收敛性，为实际应用提供了理论依据。

authors_text: Tao Huang,Yuan Zhang,Shan You,Fei Wang,Chen Qian,Jian Cao,Chang Xu
title: Masked Distillation with Receptive Tokens
title_zh: 使用接受令牌的掩蔽蒸馏
abstract: Distilling from the feature maps can be fairly effective for dense prediction tasks since both the feature discriminability and localization priors can be well transferred. However, not every pixel contributes equally to the performance, and a good student should learn from what really matters to the teacher. In this paper, we introduce a learnable embedding dubbed receptive token to localize those pixels of interests (PoIs) in the feature map, with a distillation mask generated via pixel-wise attention. Then the distillation will be performed on the mask via pixel-wise reconstruction. In this way, a distillation mask actually indicates a pattern of pixel dependencies within feature maps of teacher. We thus adopt multiple receptive tokens to investigate more sophisticated and informative pixel dependencies to further enhance the distillation. To obtain a group of masks, the receptive tokens are learned via the regular task loss but with teacher fixed, and we also leverage a Dice loss to enrich the diversity of learned masks. Our method dubbed MasKD is simple and practical, and needs no priors of tasks in application. Experiments show that our MasKD can achieve state-of-the-art performance consistently on object detection and semantic segmentation benchmarks. Code is available at: https://github.com/hunto/MasKD .
summary: Distilling from the feature maps can be fairly effective for dense prediction tasks since both the feature discriminability and localization priors can be well transferred. However, not every pixel contributes equally to the performance, and a good student should learn from what really matters to the teacher. In this paper, we introduce a learnable embedding dubbed receptive token to localize those pixels of interests (PoIs) in the feature map, with a distillation mask generated via pixel-wise attention. Then the distillation will be performed on the mask via pixel-wise reconstruction. In this way, a distillation mask actually indicates a pattern of pixel dependencies within feature maps of teacher. We thus adopt multiple receptive tokens to investigate more sophisticated and informative pixel dependencies to further enhance the distillation. To obtain a group of masks, the receptive tokens are learned via the regular task loss but with teacher fixed, and we also leverage a Dice loss to enrich the diversity of learned masks. Our method dubbed MasKD is simple and practical, and needs no priors of tasks in application. Experiments show that our MasKD can achieve state-of-the-art performance consistently on object detection and semantic segmentation benchmarks. Code is available at: https://github.com/hunto/MasKD .
abstract_zh: 从特征图中提取对于密集的预测任务非常有效，因为特征可辨别性和定位先验都可以很好地转移。然而，并不是每个像素对表现的贡献都是相同的，一个好学生应该从对老师来说真正重要的东西中学习。在本文中，我们引入了一种称为接受标记的可学习嵌入，用于定位特征图中感兴趣的像素（PoIs），并通过逐像素注意生成蒸馏掩模。然后通过逐像素重建对掩模进行蒸馏。通过这种方式，蒸馏掩模实际上指示了教师特征图中的像素依赖关系的模式。因此，我们采用多个接受令牌来研究更复杂和信息丰富的像素依赖性，以进一步增强蒸馏。为了获得一组掩模，通过常规任务损失来学习接受标记，但教师固定，并且我们还利用 Dice 损失来丰富学习掩模的多样性。我们的方法称为MasKD，简单实用，并且在应用中不需要任务先验。实验表明，我们的 MasKD 可以在对象检测和语义分割基准上一致地实现最先进的性能。代码位于：https://github.com/hunto/MasKD。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于可学习嵌入的掩码蒸馏方法MasKD，通过定位特征图中的关键像素区域提升密集预测任务的模型压缩效果。
AI.motivation: 传统特征图蒸馏未考虑像素贡献度差异，导致学生模型学习冗余信息。关键像素定位可提升蒸馏效率并保留教师模型的核心判别能力。
AI.method: 引入可学习的receptive token生成像素级注意力掩码，通过固定教师模型的常规任务损失与Dice损失联合优化，多尺度学习像素依赖模式实现特征蒸馏。
AI.result: 在目标检测与语义分割基准测试中，MasKD方法在保持模型轻量化的同时达到当时最先进的性能指标。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过动态像素掩码机制有效捕捉特征依赖关系，无需任务先验知识即可实现跨任务的高效知识蒸馏。

search_text: Masked Distillation with Receptive Tokens 使用接受令牌的掩蔽蒸馏 Distilling from the feature maps can be fairly effective for dense prediction tasks since both the feature discriminability and localization priors can be well transferred. However, not every pixel contributes equally to the performance, and a good student should learn from what really matters to the teacher. In this paper, we introduce a learnable embedding dubbed receptive token to localize those pixels of interests (PoIs) in the feature map, with a distillation mask generated via pixel-wise attention. Then the distillation will be performed on the mask via pixel-wise reconstruction. In this way, a distillation mask actually indicates a pattern of pixel dependencies within feature maps of teacher. We thus adopt multiple receptive tokens to investigate more sophisticated and informative pixel dependencies to further enhance the distillation. To obtain a group of masks, the receptive tokens are learned via the regular task loss but with teacher fixed, and we also leverage a Dice loss to enrich the diversity of learned masks. Our method dubbed MasKD is simple and practical, and needs no priors of tasks in application. Experiments show that our MasKD can achieve state-of-the-art performance consistently on object detection and semantic segmentation benchmarks. Code is available at: https://github.com/hunto/MasKD . 从特征图中提取对于密集的预测任务非常有效，因为特征可辨别性和定位先验都可以很好地转移。然而，并不是每个像素对表现的贡献都是相同的，一个好学生应该从对老师来说真正重要的东西中学习。在本文中，我们引入了一种称为接受标记的可学习嵌入，用于定位特征图中感兴趣的像素（PoIs），并通过逐像素注意生成蒸馏掩模。然后通过逐像素重建对掩模进行蒸馏。通过这种方式，蒸馏掩模实际上指示了教师特征图中的像素依赖关系的模式。因此，我们采用多个接受令牌来研究更复杂和信息丰富的像素依赖性，以进一步增强蒸馏。为了获得一组掩模，通过常规任务损失来学习接受标记，但教师固定，并且我们还利用 Dice 损失来丰富学习掩模的多样性。我们的方法称为MasKD，简单实用，并且在应用中不需要任务先验。实验表明，我们的 MasKD 可以在对象检测和语义分割基准上一致地实现最先进的性能。代码位于：https://github.com/hunto/MasKD。 本文提出了一种基于可学习嵌入的掩码蒸馏方法MasKD，通过定位特征图中的关键像素区域提升密集预测任务的模型压缩效果。 Tao Huang,Yuan Zhang,Shan You,Fei Wang,Chen Qian,Jian Cao,Chang Xu cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Hunsoo Song,Jinha Jung
title: An unsupervised, open-source workflow for 2D and 3D building mapping from airborne LiDAR data
title_zh: 利用机载 LiDAR 数据进行 2D 和 3D 建筑测绘的无监督开源工作流程
abstract: Despite the substantial demand for high-quality, large-area building maps, no established open-source workflow for generating 2D and 3D maps currently exists. This study introduces an automated, open-source workflow for large-scale 2D and 3D building mapping utilizing airborne LiDAR data. Uniquely, our workflow operates entirely unsupervised, eliminating the need for any training procedures. We have integrated a specifically tailored DTM generation algorithm into our workflow to prevent errors in complex urban landscapes, especially around highways and overpasses. Through fine rasterization of LiDAR point clouds, we've enhanced building-tree differentiation, reduced errors near water bodies, and augmented computational efficiency by introducing a new planarity calculation. Our workflow offers a practical and scalable solution for the mass production of rasterized 2D and 3D building maps from raw airborne LiDAR data. Also, we elaborate on the influence of parameters and potential error sources to provide users with practical guidance. Our method's robustness has been rigorously optimized and tested using an extensive dataset (> 550 km$^2$), and further validated through comparison with deep learning-based and hand-digitized products. Notably, through these unparalleled, large-scale comparisons, we offer a valuable analysis of large-scale building maps generated via different methodologies, providing insightful evaluations of the effectiveness of each approach. We anticipate that our highly scalable building mapping workflow will facilitate the production of reliable 2D and 3D building maps, fostering advances in large-scale urban analysis. The code will be released upon publication.
summary: Despite the substantial demand for high-quality, large-area building maps, no established open-source workflow for generating 2D and 3D maps currently exists. This study introduces an automated, open-source workflow for large-scale 2D and 3D building mapping utilizing airborne LiDAR data. Uniquely, our workflow operates entirely unsupervised, eliminating the need for any training procedures. Through fine rasterization of LiDAR point clouds, we've enhanced building-tree differentiation, reduced errors near water bodies, and augmented computational efficiency by introducing a new planarity calculation. Our workflow offers a practical and scalable solution for the mass production of rasterized 2D and 3D building maps from raw airborne LiDAR data. Also, we elaborate on the influence of parameters and potential error sources to provide users with practical guidance. Our method's robustness has been rigorously optimized and tested using an extensive dataset (> 550 km$^2$), and further validated through comparison with deep learning-based and hand-digitized products. Notably, through these unparalleled, large-scale comparisons, we offer a valuable analysis of large-scale building maps generated via different methodologies, providing insightful evaluations of the effectiveness of each approach. We anticipate that our highly scalable building mapping workflow will facilitate the production of reliable 2D and 3D building maps, fostering advances in large-scale urban analysis. The code will be released upon publication.
abstract_zh: 尽管对高质量、大面积建筑地图的需求很大，但目前尚不存在用于生成 2D 和 3D 地图的既定开源工作流程。本研究引入了一种利用机载 LiDAR 数据进行大规模 2D 和 3D 建筑测绘的自动化开源工作流程。独特的是，我们的工作流程完全无人监督，无需任何培训程序。我们将专门定制的 DTM 生成算法集成到我们的工作流程中，以防止复杂的城市景观中出现错误，尤其是在高速公路和立交桥周围。通过激光雷达点云的精细光栅化，我们增强了建筑物与树木的区分，减少了水体附近的误差，并通过引入新的平面度计算提高了计算效率。我们的工作流程提供了实用且可扩展的解决方案，用于根据原始机载 LiDAR 数据大规模生产光栅化 2D 和 3D 建筑地图。此外，我们还详细阐述了参数的影响和潜在的误差源，为用户提供实用指导。我们的方法的稳健性已经使用广泛的数据集（> 550 km$^2$）进行了严格的优化和测试，并通过与基于深度学习和手工数字化的产品进行比较进一步验证。值得注意的是，通过这些无与伦比的大规模比较，我们对通过不同方法生成的大规模建筑地图进行了有价值的分析，并对每种方法的有效性进行了富有洞察力的评估。我们预计，高度可扩展的建筑测绘工作流程将促进可靠的 2D 和 3D 建筑地图的制作，从而促进大规模城市分析的进步。该代码将在发布后发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练的开源工作流程，用于从机载LiDAR数据中自动生成大范围2D和3D建筑地图。
AI.motivation: 目前缺乏高效、开源的建筑地图生成方案，尤其需要适用于复杂城市环境和大规模数据处理的自动化方法。
AI.method: 集成定制化DTM算法、点云精细化栅格化技术及新型平面度计算，实现端到端无监督建模，并优化参数影响分析。
AI.result: 在550平方公里数据集上验证了方法鲁棒性，通过对比深度学习与人工标注结果，证明其在精度和效率上的优势。
AI.conclusion: 该工作流程为大规模城市分析提供了可靠、可扩展的建筑地图生成方案，推动了自动化地理信息处理技术的发展。

authors_text: Dingkun Guo,Larissa Wermers,Kenn R. Oldham
title: Leg Shaping and Event-Driven Control of a Small-Scale, Low-DoF, Two-Mode Robot
title_zh: 小型、低自由度、两模式机器人的腿部整形和事件驱动控制
abstract: Among small-scale mobile robots, multi-modal locomotion can help compensate for limited actuator capabilities. However, supporting multiple locomotion modes or gaits in small terrestrial robots typically requires complex designs with low locomotion efficiency. In this work, legged and rolling gaits are achieved by a 10~cm robot having just two degrees of freedom (DoF). This is acheived by leg shaping that facilitates whole body rolling and event-driven control that maintains motion using simple inertial sensor measurements. Speeds of approximately 0.4 and 2.2 body lengths per second are achieved in legged and rolling modes, respectively, with low cost of transport. The proposed design approach and control techniques may aid in design of further miniaturized robots reliant on transducers with small range-of-motion.
summary: Among small-scale mobile robots, multi-modal locomotion can help compensate for limited actuator capabilities. However, supporting multiple locomotion modes or gaits in small terrestrial robots typically requires complex designs with low locomotion efficiency. In this work, legged and rolling gaits are achieved by a 10~cm robot having just two degrees of freedom (DoF). This is acheived by leg shaping that facilitates whole body rolling and event-driven control that maintains motion using simple inertial sensor measurements. Speeds of approximately 0.4 and 2.2 body lengths per second are achieved in legged and rolling modes, respectively, with low cost of transport. The proposed design approach and control techniques may aid in design of further miniaturized robots reliant on transducers with small range-of-motion.
abstract_zh: 在小型移动机器人中，多模式运动可以帮助补偿有限的执行器能力。然而，支持小型陆地机器人的多种运动模式或步态通常需要复杂的设计和低运动效率。在这项工作中，腿式和滚动步态是由一个只有两个自由度（DoF）的 10 厘米机器人实现的。这是通过促进全身滚动的腿部塑形和使用简单的惯性传感器测量来维持运动的事件驱动控制来实现的。在腿式和滚动模式下，速度分别约为每秒 0.4 和 2.2 个身体长度，且运输成本较低。所提出的设计方法和控制技术可能有助于设计依赖于小运动范围传感器的进一步小型化机器人。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种小型、低自由度、双模式机器人的腿部设计和事件驱动控制方法，实现腿部行走和滚动两种运动模式。
AI.motivation: 小型移动机器人因执行器能力有限，传统多模式运动设计复杂且效率低下，需探索更简洁高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过腿部形状设计实现全身滚动，并结合事件驱动控制策略，仅使用简单惯性传感器测量维持运动。
AI.result: 腿部模式速度达0.4体长/秒，滚动模式达2.2体长/秒，运输成本低，验证了设计的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该设计方法为依赖小运动范围执行器的微型机器人开发提供了可行路径。

search_text: Leg Shaping and Event-Driven Control of a Small-Scale, Low-DoF, Two-Mode Robot 小型、低自由度、两模式机器人的腿部整形和事件驱动控制 Among small-scale mobile robots, multi-modal locomotion can help compensate for limited actuator capabilities. However, supporting multiple locomotion modes or gaits in small terrestrial robots typically requires complex designs with low locomotion efficiency. In this work, legged and rolling gaits are achieved by a 10~cm robot having just two degrees of freedom (DoF). This is acheived by leg shaping that facilitates whole body rolling and event-driven control that maintains motion using simple inertial sensor measurements. Speeds of approximately 0.4 and 2.2 body lengths per second are achieved in legged and rolling modes, respectively, with low cost of transport. The proposed design approach and control techniques may aid in design of further miniaturized robots reliant on transducers with small range-of-motion. 在小型移动机器人中，多模式运动可以帮助补偿有限的执行器能力。然而，支持小型陆地机器人的多种运动模式或步态通常需要复杂的设计和低运动效率。在这项工作中，腿式和滚动步态是由一个只有两个自由度（DoF）的 10 厘米机器人实现的。这是通过促进全身滚动的腿部塑形和使用简单的惯性传感器测量来维持运动的事件驱动控制来实现的。在腿式和滚动模式下，速度分别约为每秒 0.4 和 2.2 个身体长度，且运输成本较低。所提出的设计方法和控制技术可能有助于设计依赖于小运动范围传感器的进一步小型化机器人。 本文提出了一种小型、低自由度、双模式机器人的腿部设计和事件驱动控制方法，实现腿部行走和滚动两种运动模式。 Dingkun Guo,Larissa Wermers,Kenn R. Oldham cs.RO

authors_text: Leslie Ching Ow Tiong,Dick Sigmund,Andrew Beng Jin Teoh
title: 3D-C2FT: Coarse-to-fine Transformer for Multi-view 3D Reconstruction
title_zh: 3D-C2FT：用于多视图 3D 重建的粗到精转换器
comment: Accepted by Asian Conference on Computer Vision (ACCV) 2022
comments: Accepted by Asian Conference on Computer Vision (ACCV) 2022
abstract: Recently, the transformer model has been successfully employed for the multi-view 3D reconstruction problem. However, challenges remain on designing an attention mechanism to explore the multiview features and exploit their relations for reinforcing the encoding-decoding modules. This paper proposes a new model, namely 3D coarse-to-fine transformer (3D-C2FT), by introducing a novel coarse-to-fine(C2F) attention mechanism for encoding multi-view features and rectifying defective 3D objects. C2F attention mechanism enables the model to learn multi-view information flow and synthesize 3D surface correction in a coarse to fine-grained manner. The proposed model is evaluated by ShapeNet and Multi-view Real-life datasets. Experimental results show that 3D-C2FT achieves notable results and outperforms several competing models on these datasets.
summary: Recently, the transformer model has been successfully employed for the multi-view 3D reconstruction problem. However, challenges remain on designing an attention mechanism to explore the multiview features and exploit their relations for reinforcing the encoding-decoding modules. This paper proposes a new model, namely 3D coarse-to-fine transformer (3D-C2FT), by introducing a novel coarse-to-fine(C2F) attention mechanism for encoding multi-view features and rectifying defective 3D objects. C2F attention mechanism enables the model to learn multi-view information flow and synthesize 3D surface correction in a coarse to fine-grained manner. The proposed model is evaluated by ShapeNet and Multi-view Real-life datasets. Experimental results show that 3D-C2FT achieves notable results and outperforms several competing models on these datasets.
abstract_zh: 最近，Transformer 模型已成功应用于多视图 3D 重建问题。然而，设计注意力机制来探索多视图特征并利用它们的关系来增强编码-解码模块仍然存在挑战。本文提出了一种新模型，即 3D 粗到细变换器 (3D-C2FT)，通过引入一种新颖的粗到细 (C2F) 注意力机制来编码多视图特征并纠正有缺陷的 3D 对象。 C2F注意力机制使模型能够学习多视图信息流并以粗粒度到细粒度的方式合成3D表面校正。所提出的模型通过 ShapeNet 和多视图现实生活数据集进行评估。实验结果表明，3D-C2FT 在这些数据集上取得了显着的结果，并且优于多个竞争模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于粗到细注意力机制的Transformer模型（3D-C2FT），用于改进多视角3D重建任务中的特征融合与缺陷修正。
AI.motivation: 尽管Transformer在多视角3D重建中取得进展，但现有方法在设计注意力机制以有效探索多视角特征关联性及优化重建质量方面仍存在不足。
AI.method: 通过引入粗到细（C2F）注意力机制，分层次编码多视角特征并逐步细化3D表面修正，强化特征交互与缺陷修复能力。
AI.result: 在ShapeNet和Multi-view Real-life数据集上，3D-C2FT在重建精度和鲁棒性方面优于多个对比模型。
AI.conclusion: 3D-C2FT通过创新的C2F注意力机制有效提升了多视角3D重建效果，验证了分层特征处理策略在复杂场景下的优势。

authors_text: Wending Yan,Lu Xu,Wenhan Yang,Robby T. Tan
title: Feature-Aligned Video Raindrop Removal with Temporal Constraints
title_zh: 具有时间约束的特征对齐视频雨滴去除
abstract: Existing adherent raindrop removal methods focus on the detection of the raindrop locations, and then use inpainting techniques or generative networks to recover the background behind raindrops. Yet, as adherent raindrops are diverse in sizes and appearances, the detection is challenging for both single image and video. Moreover, unlike rain streaks, adherent raindrops tend to cover the same area in several frames. Addressing these problems, our method employs a two-stage video-based raindrop removal method. The first stage is the single image module, which generates initial clean results. The second stage is the multiple frame module, which further refines the initial results using temporal constraints, namely, by utilizing multiple input frames in our process and applying temporal consistency between adjacent output frames. Our single image module employs a raindrop removal network to generate initial raindrop removal results, and create a mask representing the differences between the input and initial output. Once the masks and initial results for consecutive frames are obtained, our multiple-frame module aligns the frames in both the image and feature levels and then obtains the clean background. Our method initially employs optical flow to align the frames, and then utilizes deformable convolution layers further to achieve feature-level frame alignment. To remove small raindrops and recover correct backgrounds, a target frame is predicted from adjacent frames. A series of unsupervised losses are proposed so that our second stage, which is the video raindrop removal module, can self-learn from video data without ground truths. Experimental results on real videos demonstrate the state-of-art performance of our method both quantitatively and qualitatively.
summary: Existing adherent raindrop removal methods focus on the detection of the raindrop locations, and then use inpainting techniques or generative networks to recover the background behind raindrops. Yet, as adherent raindrops are diverse in sizes and appearances, the detection is challenging for both single image and video. Moreover, unlike rain streaks, adherent raindrops tend to cover the same area in several frames. Addressing these problems, our method employs a two-stage video-based raindrop removal method. The first stage is the single image module, which generates initial clean results. The second stage is the multiple frame module, which further refines the initial results using temporal constraints, namely, by utilizing multiple input frames in our process and applying temporal consistency between adjacent output frames. Our single image module employs a raindrop removal network to generate initial raindrop removal results, and create a mask representing the differences between the input and initial output. Once the masks and initial results for consecutive frames are obtained, our multiple-frame module aligns the frames in both the image and feature levels and then obtains the clean background. Our method initially employs optical flow to align the frames, and then utilizes deformable convolution layers further to achieve feature-level frame alignment. To remove small raindrops and recover correct backgrounds, a target frame is predicted from adjacent frames. A series of unsupervised losses are proposed so that our second stage, which is the video raindrop removal module, can self-learn from video data without ground truths. Experimental results on real videos demonstrate the state-of-art performance of our method both quantitatively and qualitatively.
abstract_zh: 现有的粘附雨滴去除方法侧重于检测雨滴位置，然后使用修复技术或生成网络来恢复雨滴背后的背景。然而，由于附着的雨滴的大小和外观各不相同，因此对于单幅图像和视频来说，检测都具有挑战性。此外，与雨条纹不同，附着的雨滴往往会覆盖多个帧中的同一区域。为了解决这些问题，我们的方法采用了两阶段基于视频的雨滴去除方法。第一阶段是单图像模块，它生成初始干净的结果。第二阶段是多帧模块，它使用时间约束进一步细化初始结果，即在我们的过程中利用多个输入帧并在相邻输出帧之间应用时间一致性。我们的单图像模块采用雨滴去除网络来生成初始雨滴去除结果，并创建一个表示输入和初始输出之间差异的掩模。一旦获得连续帧的掩模和初始结果，我们的多帧模块就会在图像和特征级别上对齐帧，然后获得干净的背景。我们的方法首先采用光流来对齐帧，然后进一步利用可变形卷积层来实现特征级帧对齐。为了去除小雨滴并恢复正确的背景，从相邻帧预测目标帧。提出了一系列无监督损失，以便我们的第二阶段，即视频雨滴去除模块，可以在没有地面事实的情况下从视频数据中进行自学习。真实视频的实验结果从数量和质量上证明了我们的方法的最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于特征对齐和时序约束的视频雨滴去除方法，通过两阶段处理提升视频中粘附性雨滴的移除效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以准确检测多样化的粘附性雨滴，且无法有效处理雨滴在多帧中覆盖相同区域的问题，导致视频修复效果不佳。
AI.method: 采用两阶段框架：第一阶段通过单帧网络生成初始清洁结果并生成差异掩码；第二阶段利用光流对齐和可变形卷积实现多帧特征级对齐，结合相邻帧预测目标帧，并引入无监督损失进行自监督训练。
AI.result: 在真实视频数据集上，该方法在定量和定性指标上均达到当时最先进的性能，有效去除小雨滴并恢复背景细节。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合单帧修复与多帧时序约束，该方法在无需真实标签的情况下实现了鲁棒的视频雨滴去除，为动态场景修复提供了新思路。

Moreover, unlike rain streaks, adherent raindrops tend to cover the same area in several frames. Addressing these problems, our method employs a two-stage video-based raindrop removal method. The first stage is the single image module, which generates initial clean results. The second stage is the multiple frame module, which further refines the initial results using temporal constraints, namely, by utilizing multiple input frames in our process and applying temporal consistency between adjacent output frames. Our single image module employs a raindrop removal network to generate initial raindrop removal results, and create a mask representing the differences between the input and initial output. Once the masks and initial results for consecutive frames are obtained, our multiple-frame module aligns the frames in both the image and feature levels and then obtains the clean background. Our method initially employs optical flow to align the frames, and then utilizes deformable convolution layers further to achieve feature-level frame alignment. To remove small raindrops and recover correct backgrounds, a target frame is predicted from adjacent frames. A series of unsupervised losses are proposed so that our second stage, which is the video raindrop removal module, can self-learn from video data without ground truths. Experimental results on real videos demonstrate the state-of-art performance of our method both quantitatively and qualitatively. 现有的粘附雨滴去除方法侧重于检测雨滴位置，然后使用修复技术或生成网络来恢复雨滴背后的背景。然而，由于附着的雨滴的大小和外观各不相同，因此对于单幅图像和视频来说，检测都具有挑战性。此外，与雨条纹不同，附着的雨滴往往会覆盖多个帧中的同一区域。为了解决这些问题，我们的方法采用了两阶段基于视频的雨滴去除方法。第一阶段是单图像模块，它生成初始干净的结果。第二阶段是多帧模块，它使用时间约束进一步细化初始结果，即在我们的过程中利用多个输入帧并在相邻输出帧之间应用时间一致性。我们的单图像模块采用雨滴去除网络来生成初始雨滴去除结果，并创建一个表示输入和初始输出之间差异的掩模。一旦获得连续帧的掩模和初始结果，我们的多帧模块就会在图像和特征级别上对齐帧，然后获得干净的背景。我们的方法首先采用光流来对齐帧，然后进一步利用可变形卷积层来实现特征级帧对齐。为了去除小雨滴并恢复正确的背景，从相邻帧预测目标帧。提出了一系列无监督损失，以便我们的第二阶段，即视频雨滴去除模块，可以在没有地面事实的情况下从视频数据中进行自学习。真实视频的实验结果从数量和质量上证明了我们的方法的最先进的性能。 本文提出一种基于特征对齐和时序约束的视频雨滴去除方法，通过两阶段处理提升视频中粘附性雨滴的移除效果。 Wending Yan,Lu Xu,Wenhan Yang,Robby T. Tan cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Haoxiang Guo,Shilin Liu,Hao Pan,Yang Liu,Xin Tong,Baining Guo
title: ComplexGen: CAD Reconstruction by B-Rep Chain Complex Generation
title_zh: ComplexGen：通过 B-Rep 链复数生成进行 CAD 重建
comment: This article is published by ACM Trans. Graph. (SIGGRAPH 2022). This is the author's preprint version
comments: This article is published by ACM Trans. Graph. (SIGGRAPH 2022). This is the author's preprint version
abstract: We view the reconstruction of CAD models in the boundary representation (B-Rep) as the detection of geometric primitives of different orders, i.e. vertices, edges and surface patches, and the correspondence of primitives, which are holistically modeled as a chain complex, and show that by modeling such comprehensive structures more complete and regularized reconstructions can be achieved. We solve the complex generation problem in two steps. First, we propose a novel neural framework that consists of a sparse CNN encoder for input point cloud processing and a tri-path transformer decoder for generating geometric primitives and their mutual relationships with estimated probabilities. Second, given the probabilistic structure predicted by the neural network, we recover a definite B-Rep chain complex by solving a global optimization maximizing the likelihood under structural validness constraints and applying geometric refinements. Extensive tests on large scale CAD datasets demonstrate that the modeling of B-Rep chain complex structure enables more accurate detection for learning and more constrained reconstruction for optimization, leading to structurally more faithful and complete CAD B-Rep models than previous results.
summary: We view the reconstruction of CAD models in the boundary representation (B-Rep) as the detection of geometric primitives of different orders, i.e. vertices, edges and surface patches, and the correspondence of primitives, which are holistically modeled as a chain complex, and show that by modeling such comprehensive structures more complete and regularized reconstructions can be achieved. We solve the complex generation problem in two steps. First, we propose a novel neural framework that consists of a sparse CNN encoder for input point cloud processing and a tri-path transformer decoder for generating geometric primitives and their mutual relationships with estimated probabilities. Second, given the probabilistic structure predicted by the neural network, we recover a definite B-Rep chain complex by solving a global optimization maximizing the likelihood under structural validness constraints and applying geometric refinements. Extensive tests on large scale CAD datasets demonstrate that the modeling of B-Rep chain complex structure enables more accurate detection for learning and more constrained reconstruction for optimization, leading to structurally more faithful and complete CAD B-Rep models than previous results.
abstract_zh: 我们将边界表示（B-Rep）中的 CAD 模型重建视为检测不同阶的几何图元，即顶点、边和面片，以及图元的对应关系，将其整体建模为链复合体，并表明通过对这种综合结构进行建模，可以实现更完整和规则化的重建。我们分两步解决复杂的生成问题。首先，我们提出了一种新颖的神经框架，该框架由用于输入点云处理的稀疏 CNN 编码器和用于生成几何基元及其与估计概率的相互关系的三路径变换器解码器组成。其次，给定神经网络预测的概率结构，我们通过求解在结构有效性约束下最大化似然的全局优化并应用几何细化来恢复确定的 B-Rep 链复合体。对大规模 CAD 数据集的广泛测试表明，B-Rep 链复杂结构的建模能够实现更准确的学习检测和更约束的优化重建，从而导致比以前的结果在结构上更加忠实和完整的 CAD B-Rep 模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ComplexGen方法，通过构建B-Rep链复形结构实现更准确的CAD模型重建。
AI.motivation: 传统CAD重建方法难以同时保证几何原语检测的完整性与结构关系的准确性，需通过链复形建模实现全局优化。
AI.method: 分两阶段：1）稀疏CNN编码器处理点云输入，三路径Transformer解码器生成几何原语及概率关系；2）基于概率结构求解全局优化问题，结合几何优化生成有效B-Rep链复形。
AI.result: 在大规模CAD数据集上实现更精确的几何原语检测与结构重建，生成模型在完整性和结构忠实度上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 链复形结构建模有效提升了CAD重建的准确性与完整性，为后续研究提供了新的方法框架。

authors_text: Alekh Agarwal,Yuda Song,Wen Sun,Kaiwen Wang,Mengdi Wang,Xuezhou Zhang
title: Provable Benefits of Representational Transfer in Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 强化学习中表征迁移的可证明的好处
abstract: We study the problem of representational transfer in RL, where an agent first pretrains in a number of source tasks to discover a shared representation, which is subsequently used to learn a good policy in a \emph{target task}. We propose a new notion of task relatedness between source and target tasks, and develop a novel approach for representational transfer under this assumption. Concretely, we show that given generative access to source tasks, we can discover a representation, using which subsequent linear RL techniques quickly converge to a near-optimal policy in the target task. The sample complexity is close to knowing the ground truth features in the target task, and comparable to prior representation learning results in the source tasks. We complement our positive results with lower bounds without generative access, and validate our findings with empirical evaluation on rich observation MDPs that require deep exploration. In our experiments, we observe a speed up in learning in the target by pre-training, and also validate the need for generative access in source tasks.
summary: We study the problem of representational transfer in RL, where an agent first pretrains in a number of source tasks to discover a shared representation, which is subsequently used to learn a good policy in a \emph{target task}. We propose a new notion of task relatedness between source and target tasks, and develop a novel approach for representational transfer under this assumption. Concretely, we show that given generative access to source tasks, we can discover a representation, using which subsequent linear RL techniques quickly converge to a near-optimal policy in the target task. The sample complexity is close to knowing the ground truth features in the target task, and comparable to prior representation learning results in the source tasks. We complement our positive results with lower bounds without generative access, and validate our findings with empirical evaluation on rich observation MDPs that require deep exploration. In our experiments, we observe a speed up in learning in the target by pre-training, and also validate the need for generative access in source tasks.
abstract_zh: 我们研究 RL 中的表征迁移问题，其中代理首先在多个源任务中进行预训练以发现共享表征，随后将其用于在 \emph{目标任务} 中学习良好的策略。我们提出了源任务和目标任务之间的任务相关性的新概念，并在此假设下开发了一种新的表征迁移方法。具体来说，我们表明，给定对源任务的生成访问，我们可以发现一种表示，使用该表示，后续的线性强化学习技术可以快速收敛到目标任务中的接近最优的策略。样本复杂度接近于了解目标任务中的真实特征，并且与源任务中的先前表示学习结果相当。我们在没有生成访问的情况下用下限来补充我们的积极结果，并通过对需要深入探索的丰富观察 MDP 的实证评估来验证我们的发现。在我们的实验中，我们观察到通过预训练目标学习速度加快，并且还验证了源任务中生成访问的需要。

AI.tldr: 本文研究强化学习中表示迁移的问题，通过在源任务中预训练发现共享表示，以加速目标任务的策略学习。
AI.motivation: 强化学习中目标任务的学习效率受限，需利用源任务的先验知识提升策略学习效果，尤其在复杂环境和深度探索需求下。
AI.method: 提出任务相关性新定义，基于生成模型访问源任务，学习共享表示并结合线性RL技术，使目标任务快速收敛到近最优策略。
AI.result: 理论证明样本复杂度接近目标任务真实特征知识水平，实验验证预训练加速目标任务学习，并证明生成模型访问的必要性。
AI.conclusion: 生成模型访问源任务的表示迁移方法可提供可证明的样本效率优势，为复杂观测MDP中的强化学习策略优化提供有效途径。

authors_text: Tamas G. Molnar,Anil Alan,Adam K. Kiss,Aaron D. Ames,Gabor Orosz
title: Input-to-State Safety with Input Delay in Longitudinal Vehicle Control
title_zh: 纵向车辆控制中输入延迟的输入状态安全
comment: Accepted to the 17th IFAC Workshop on Time Delay Systems. 6 pages, 3 figures
comments: Accepted to the 17th IFAC Workshop on Time Delay Systems. 6 pages, 3 figures
abstract: Safe longitudinal control is discussed for a connected automated truck traveling behind a preceding connected vehicle. A controller is proposed based on control barrier function theory and predictor feedback for provably safe, collision-free behavior by taking into account the significant response time of the truck as input delay and the uncertainty of its dynamical model as input disturbance. The benefits of the proposed controller compared to control designs that neglect the delay or treat the delay as disturbance are shown by numerical simulations.
summary: Safe longitudinal control is discussed for a connected automated truck traveling behind a preceding connected vehicle. A controller is proposed based on control barrier function theory and predictor feedback for provably safe, collision-free behavior by taking into account the significant response time of the truck as input delay and the uncertainty of its dynamical model as input disturbance. The benefits of the proposed controller compared to control designs that neglect the delay or treat the delay as disturbance are shown by numerical simulations.
abstract_zh: 讨论了在前面的联网车辆后面行驶的联网自动卡车的安全纵向控制。提出了一种基于控制障碍函数理论和预测器反馈的控制器，通过考虑卡车的显着响应时间作为输入延迟和其动态模型的不确定性作为输入干扰，可证明安全、无碰撞行为。数值模拟显示了与忽略延迟或将延迟视为干扰的控制设计相比，所提出的控制器的优点。

AI.tldr: 本文讨论了在考虑输入延迟和动态模型不确定性的情况下，如何实现连接自动驾驶卡车的纵向安全控制。
AI.motivation: 由于卡车响应时间较长且动态模型存在不确定性，传统的控制方法可能无法确保安全，因此需要一种新的控制器来解决这些问题。
AI.method: 本文基于控制屏障函数理论和预测反馈方法，提出了一种新的控制器，以确保在输入延迟和动态模型不确定性下的安全、无碰撞行为。
AI.result: 通过数值模拟，展示了所提出控制器相比忽略延迟或将延迟视为干扰的控制设计的优势。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的控制器能够有效处理输入延迟和动态模型不确定性，从而实现纵向安全控制。

search_text: Input-to-State Safety with Input Delay in Longitudinal Vehicle Control 纵向车辆控制中输入延迟的输入状态安全 Safe longitudinal control is discussed for a connected automated truck traveling behind a preceding connected vehicle. A controller is proposed based on control barrier function theory and predictor feedback for provably safe, collision-free behavior by taking into account the significant response time of the truck as input delay and the uncertainty of its dynamical model as input disturbance. The benefits of the proposed controller compared to control designs that neglect the delay or treat the delay as disturbance are shown by numerical simulations. 讨论了在前面的联网车辆后面行驶的联网自动卡车的安全纵向控制。提出了一种基于控制障碍函数理论和预测器反馈的控制器，通过考虑卡车的显着响应时间作为输入延迟和其动态模型的不确定性作为输入干扰，可证明安全、无碰撞行为。数值模拟显示了与忽略延迟或将延迟视为干扰的控制设计相比，所提出的控制器的优点。 本文讨论了在考虑输入延迟和动态模型不确定性的情况下，如何实现连接自动驾驶卡车的纵向安全控制。 Tamas G. authors_text: Yuhe Ding,Lijun Sheng,Jian Liang,Aihua Zheng,Ran He
title: ProxyMix: Proxy-based Mixup Training with Label Refinery for Source-Free Domain Adaptation
title_zh: ProxyMix：基于代理的混合训练与标签精炼，用于无源域适应
abstract: Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) aims to transfer knowledge from a labeled source domain to an unlabeled target domain. Owing to privacy concerns and heavy data transmission, source-free UDA, exploiting the pre-trained source models instead of the raw source data for target learning, has been gaining popularity in recent years. Some works attempt to recover unseen source domains with generative models, however introducing additional network parameters. Other works propose to fine-tune the source model by pseudo labels, while noisy pseudo labels may misguide the decision boundary, leading to unsatisfied results. To tackle these issues, we propose an effective method named Proxy-based Mixup training with label refinery (ProxyMix). First of all, to avoid additional parameters and explore the information in the source model, ProxyMix defines the weights of the classifier as the class prototypes and then constructs a class-balanced proxy source domain by the nearest neighbors of the prototypes to bridge the unseen source domain and the target domain. To improve the reliability of pseudo labels, we further propose the frequency-weighted aggregation strategy to generate soft pseudo labels for unlabeled target data. The proposed strategy exploits the internal structure of target features, pulls target features to their semantic neighbors, and increases the weights of low-frequency classes samples during gradient updating. With the proxy domain and the reliable pseudo labels, we employ two kinds of mixup regularization, i.e., inter- and intra-domain mixup, in our framework, to align the proxy and the target domain, enforcing the consistency of predictions, thereby further mitigating the negative impacts of noisy labels. Experiments on three 2D image and one 3D point cloud object recognition benchmarks demonstrate that ProxyMix yields state-of-the-art performance for source-free UDA tasks.
summary: Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) aims to transfer knowledge from a labeled source domain to an unlabeled target domain. Owing to privacy concerns and heavy data transmission, source-free UDA, exploiting the pre-trained source models instead of the raw source data for target learning, has been gaining popularity in recent years. Some works attempt to recover unseen source domains with generative models, however introducing additional network parameters. Other works propose to fine-tune the source model by pseudo labels, while noisy pseudo labels may misguide the decision boundary, leading to unsatisfied results. To tackle these issues, we propose an effective method named Proxy-based Mixup training with label refinery (ProxyMix). First of all, to avoid additional parameters and explore the information in the source model, ProxyMix defines the weights of the classifier as the class prototypes and then constructs a class-balanced proxy source domain by the nearest neighbors of the prototypes to bridge the unseen source domain and the target domain. To improve the reliability of pseudo labels, we further propose the frequency-weighted aggregation strategy to generate soft pseudo labels for unlabeled target data. The proposed strategy exploits the internal structure of target features, pulls target features to their semantic neighbors, and increases the weights of low-frequency classes samples during gradient updating. With the proxy domain and the reliable pseudo labels, we employ two kinds of mixup regularization, i.e., inter- and intra-domain mixup, in our framework, to align the proxy and the target domain, enforcing the consistency of predictions, thereby further mitigating the negative impacts of noisy labels. Experiments on three 2D image and one 3D point cloud object recognition benchmarks demonstrate that ProxyMix yields state-of-the-art performance for source-free UDA tasks.
abstract_zh: 无监督域适应（UDA）旨在将知识从标记的源域转移到未标记的目标域。由于隐私问题和大量数据传输，无源UDA（利用预先训练的源模型而不是原始源数据进行目标学习）近年来越来越受欢迎。一些工作尝试使用生成模型恢复看不见的源域，但是引入了额外的网络参数。其他工作提出通过伪标签来微调源模型，而嘈杂的伪标签可能会误导决策边界，导致结果不满意。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种有效的方法，名为带有标签精炼的基于代理的混合训练（ProxyMix）。首先，为了避免额外的参数并探索源模型中的信息，ProxyMix将分类器的权重定义为类原型，然后通过原型的最近邻构建类平衡的代理源域，以桥接不可见的源域和目标域。为了提高伪标签的可靠性，我们进一步提出了频率加权聚合策略，为未标记的目标数据生成软伪标签。所提出的策略利用目标特征的内部结构，将目标特征拉至其语义邻居，并在梯度更新期间增加低频类样本的权重。有了代理域和可靠的伪标签，我们在我们的框架中采用两种混合正则化，即域间和域内混合，来对齐代理域和目标域，增强预测的一致性，从而进一步减轻噪声标签的负面影响。对三个 2D 图像和一个 3D 点云对象识别基准进行的实验表明，ProxyMix 可为无源 UDA 任务提供最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ProxyMix方法，通过代理源域构建和伪标签优化解决无源域适应问题。
AI.motivation: 现有无源域适应方法存在引入额外参数或伪标签噪声导致性能下降的问题，需更高效可靠的解决方案。
AI.method: 利用源模型分类器权重生成类原型，构建平衡代理源域；采用频率加权聚合策略生成软伪标签，并结合跨域和域内Mixup正则化对齐领域分布。
AI.result: 在三个2D图像和一个3D点云基准测试中取得最先进的无源域适应性能。
AI.conclusion: ProxyMix通过代理域构造与标签优化有效缓解了无源域适应中的噪声干扰问题，为领域对齐提供了新思路。

authors_text: Qiang He,Huangyuan Su,Jieyu Zhang,Xinwen Hou
title: Frustratingly Easy Regularization on Representation Can Boost Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 令人沮丧的简单正则化表示可以促进深度强化学习
abstract: Deep reinforcement learning (DRL) gives the promise that an agent learns good policy from high-dimensional information, whereas representation learning removes irrelevant and redundant information and retains pertinent information. In this work, we demonstrate that the learned representation of the $Q$-network and its target $Q$-network should, in theory, satisfy a favorable distinguishable representation property. Specifically, there exists an upper bound on the representation similarity of the value functions of two adjacent time steps in a typical DRL setting. However, through illustrative experiments, we show that the learned DRL agent may violate this property and lead to a sub-optimal policy. Therefore, we propose a simple yet effective regularizer called Policy Evaluation with Easy Regularization on Representation (PEER), which aims to maintain the distinguishable representation property via explicit regularization on internal representations. And we provide the convergence rate guarantee of PEER. Implementing PEER requires only one line of code. Our experiments demonstrate that incorporating PEER into DRL can significantly improve performance and sample efficiency. Comprehensive experiments show that PEER achieves state-of-the-art performance on all 4 environments on PyBullet, 9 out of 12 tasks on DMControl, and 19 out of 26 games on Atari. To the best of our knowledge, PEER is the first work to study the inherent representation property of Q-network and its target. Our code is available at https://sites.google.com/view/peer-cvpr2023/.
summary: Deep reinforcement learning (DRL) gives the promise that an agent learns good policy from high-dimensional information, whereas representation learning removes irrelevant and redundant information and retains pertinent information. In this work, we demonstrate that the learned representation of the $Q$-network and its target $Q$-network should, in theory, satisfy a favorable distinguishable representation property. Specifically, there exists an upper bound on the representation similarity of the value functions of two adjacent time steps in a typical DRL setting. However, through illustrative experiments, we show that the learned DRL agent may violate this property and lead to a sub-optimal policy. Therefore, we propose a simple yet effective regularizer called Policy Evaluation with Easy Regularization on Representation (PEER), which aims to maintain the distinguishable representation property via explicit regularization on internal representations. And we provide the convergence rate guarantee of PEER. Implementing PEER requires only one line of code. Our experiments demonstrate that incorporating PEER into DRL can significantly improve performance and sample efficiency. Comprehensive experiments show that PEER achieves state-of-the-art performance on all 4 environments on PyBullet, 9 out of 12 tasks on DMControl, and 19 out of 26 games on Atari. To the best of our knowledge, PEER is the first work to study the inherent representation property of Q-network and its target. Our code is available at https://sites.google.com/view/peer-cvpr2023/.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习（DRL）承诺代理从高维信息中学习良好的策略，而表示学习则删除不相关和冗余信息并保留相关信息。在这项工作中，我们证明了$Q$网络及其目标$Q$网络的学习表示在理论上应该满足有利的可区分表示属性。具体来说，在典型的 DRL 设置中，两个相邻时间步的值函数的表示相似性存在上限。然而，通过说明性实验，我们表明学习的 DRL 代理可能会违反此属性并导致次优策略。因此，我们提出了一种简单而有效的正则化器，称为策略评估与简单正则化表示（PEER），其目的是通过内部表示的显式正则化来保持可区分的表示属性。并且我们提供了PEER的收敛速度保证。实现 PEER 只需一行代码。我们的实验表明，将 PEER 纳入 DRL 可以显着提高性能和样本效率。综合实验表明，PEER 在 PyBullet 上的所有 4 个环境中、在 DMControl 上的 12 个任务中的 9 个上、以及在 Atari 上的 26 个游戏中的 19 个上都实现了最先进的性能。据我们所知，PEER 是第一个研究 Q 网络及其目标的固有表示性质的工作。我们的代码可在 https://sites.google.com/view/peer-cvpr2023/ 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过正则化Q网络表示来提升深度强化学习性能的方法PEER。
AI.motivation: 现有深度强化学习代理可能因表示不可区分导致次优策略，需显式约束Q网络表示的可区分性。
AI.method: 设计PEER正则化项，通过显式约束相邻时间步值函数表示相似度，仅需一行代码实现。
AI.result: 在PyBullet、DMControl和Atari多个环境中显著提升性能，达到SOTA水平。
AI.conclusion: PEER是首个研究Q网络内在表示性质的工作，证明表示正则化能有效提升DRL效果。

tldr: 本文提出通过正则化Q网络表示来提升深度强化学习性能的方法PEER。
motivation: 现有深度强化学习代理可能因表示不可区分导致次优策略，需显式约束Q网络表示的可区分性。
method: 设计PEER正则化项，通过显式约束相邻时间步值函数表示相似度，仅需一行代码实现。
result: 在PyBullet、DMControl和Atari多个环境中显著提升性能，达到SOTA水平。

search_text: Frustratingly Easy Regularization on Representation Can Boost Deep Reinforcement Learning 令人沮丧的简单正则化表示可以促进深度强化学习 Deep reinforcement learning (DRL) gives the promise that an agent learns good policy from high-dimensional information, whereas representation learning removes irrelevant and redundant information and retains pertinent information. In this work, we demonstrate that the learned representation of the $Q$-network and its target $Q$-network should, in theory, satisfy a favorable distinguishable representation property. Specifically, there exists an upper bound on the representation similarity of the value functions of two adjacent time steps in a typical DRL setting. However, through illustrative experiments, we show that the learned DRL agent may violate this property and lead to a sub-optimal policy. Therefore, we propose a simple yet effective regularizer called Policy Evaluation with Easy Regularization on Representation (PEER), which aims to maintain the distinguishable representation property via explicit regularization on internal representations. And we provide the convergence rate guarantee of PEER. Implementing PEER requires only one line of code. Our experiments demonstrate that incorporating PEER into DRL can significantly improve performance and sample efficiency. Comprehensive experiments show that PEER achieves state-of-the-art performance on all 4 environments on PyBullet, 9 out of 12 tasks on DMControl, and 19 out of 26 games on Atari. To the best of our knowledge, PEER is the first work to study the inherent representation property of Q-network and its target. Our code is available at https://sites.google.com/view/peer-cvpr2023/. 深度强化学习（DRL）承诺代理从高维信息中学习良好的策略，而表示学习则删除不相关和冗余信息并保留相关信息。在这项工作中，我们证明了$Q$网络及其目标$Q$网络的学习表示在理论上应该满足有利的可区分表示属性。具体来说，在典型的 DRL 设置中，两个相邻时间步的值函数的表示相似性存在上限。然而，通过说明性实验，我们表明学习的 DRL 代理可能会违反此属性并导致次优策略。因此，我们提出了一种简单而有效的正则化器，称为策略评估与简单正则化表示（PEER），其目的是通过内部表示的显式正则化来保持可区分的表示属性。并且我们提供了PEER的收敛速度保证。实现 PEER 只需一行代码。我们的实验表明，将 PEER 纳入 DRL 可以显着提高性能和样本效率。综合实验表明，PEER 在 PyBullet 上的所有 4 个环境中、在 DMControl 上的 12 个任务中的 9 个上、以及在 Atari 上的 26 个游戏中的 19 个上都实现了最先进的性能。据我们所知，PEER 是第一个研究 Q 网络及其目标的固有表示性质的工作。我们的代码可在 https://sites.google.com/view/peer-cvpr2023/ 上获取。 本文提出通过正则化Q网络表示来提升深度强化学习性能的方法PEER。 Qiang He,Huangyuan Su,Jieyu Zhang,Xinwen Hou cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Chunwei Tian,Yixuan Yuan,Shichao Zhang,Chia-Wen Lin,Wangmeng Zuo,David Zhang
title: Image Super-resolution with An Enhanced Group Convolutional Neural Network
title_zh: 使用增强型组卷积神经网络实现图像超分辨率
abstract: CNNs with strong learning abilities are widely chosen to resolve super-resolution problem. However, CNNs depend on deeper network architectures to improve performance of image super-resolution, which may increase computational cost in general. In this paper, we present an enhanced super-resolution group CNN (ESRGCNN) with a shallow architecture by fully fusing deep and wide channel features to extract more accurate low-frequency information in terms of correlations of different channels in single image super-resolution (SISR). Also, a signal enhancement operation in the ESRGCNN is useful to inherit more long-distance contextual information for resolving long-term dependency. An adaptive up-sampling operation is gathered into a CNN to obtain an image super-resolution model with low-resolution images of different sizes. Extensive experiments report that our ESRGCNN surpasses the state-of-the-arts in terms of SISR performance, complexity, execution speed, image quality evaluation and visual effect in SISR. Code is found at https://github.com/hellloxiaotian/ESRGCNN.
summary: CNNs with strong learning abilities are widely chosen to resolve super-resolution problem. However, CNNs depend on deeper network architectures to improve performance of image super-resolution, which may increase computational cost in general. In this paper, we present an enhanced super-resolution group CNN (ESRGCNN) with a shallow architecture by fully fusing deep and wide channel features to extract more accurate low-frequency information in terms of correlations of different channels in single image super-resolution (SISR). Also, a signal enhancement operation in the ESRGCNN is useful to inherit more long-distance contextual information for resolving long-term dependency. An adaptive up-sampling operation is gathered into a CNN to obtain an image super-resolution model with low-resolution images of different sizes. Extensive experiments report that our ESRGCNN surpasses the state-of-the-arts in terms of SISR performance, complexity, execution speed, image quality evaluation and visual effect in SISR. Code is found at https://github.com/hellloxiaotian/ESRGCNN.
abstract_zh: 具有强大学习能力的CNN被广泛选择来解决超分辨率问题。然而，CNN 依赖于更深的网络架构来提高图像超分辨率的性能，这通常可能会增加计算成本。在本文中，我们提出了一种具有浅层架构的增强型超分辨率组CNN（ESRGCNN），通过充分融合深通道和宽通道特征，根据单图像超分辨率（SISR）中不同通道的相关性来提取更准确的低频信息。此外，ESRGCNN 中的信号增强操作对于继承更多长距离上下文信息以解决长期依赖性非常有用。将自适应上采样操作汇聚到CNN中，以获得具有不同尺寸的低分辨率图像的图像超分辨率模型。大量实验表明，我们的 ESRGCNN 在 SISR 性能、复杂度、执行速度、图像质量评估和 SISR 视觉效果方面超越了最先进的技术。代码可在 https://github.com/helloxiaotian/ESRGCNN 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种浅层增强组卷积神经网络（ESRGCNN），用于单图像超分辨率任务，在降低计算成本的同时提升重建质量。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN依赖深层结构提升超分性能但计算成本高，需设计更高效的浅层网络架构以平衡性能与复杂度。
AI.method: 通过融合深宽通道特征提取低频信息，引入信号增强模块捕捉长距离依赖，并采用自适应上采样处理不同尺寸低分辨率输入。
AI.result: 在多个评价指标上超越现有SOTA方法，实现更优的超分性能、更低的复杂度与更快的执行速度。
AI.conclusion: ESRGCNN通过创新网络设计有效解决了超分任务中深度与效率的矛盾，为轻量化超分模型提供新思路。

authors_text: Dongsung Huh,Avinash Baidya
title: The Missing Invariance Principle Found -- the Reciprocal Twin of Invariant Risk Minimization
title_zh: 发现缺失的不变性原理——不变性风险最小化的倒数双胞胎
abstract: Machine learning models often generalize poorly to out-of-distribution (OOD) data as a result of relying on features that are spuriously correlated with the label during training. Recently, the technique of Invariant Risk Minimization (IRM) was proposed to learn predictors that only use invariant features by conserving the feature-conditioned label expectation $\mathbb{E}_e[y|f(x)]$ across environments. However, more recent studies have demonstrated that IRM-v1, a practical version of IRM, can fail in various settings. Here, we identify a fundamental flaw of IRM formulation that causes the failure. We then introduce a complementary notion of invariance, MRI, based on conserving the label-conditioned feature expectation $\mathbb{E}_e[f(x)|y]$, which is free of this flaw. Further, we introduce a simplified, practical version of the MRI formulation called MRI-v1. We prove that for general linear problems, MRI-v1 guarantees invariant predictors given sufficient number of environments. We also empirically demonstrate that MRI-v1 strongly out-performs IRM-v1 and consistently achieves near-optimal OOD generalization in image-based nonlinear problems.
summary: Machine learning models often generalize poorly to out-of-distribution (OOD) data as a result of relying on features that are spuriously correlated with the label during training. Recently, the technique of Invariant Risk Minimization (IRM) was proposed to learn predictors that only use invariant features by conserving the feature-conditioned label expectation $\mathbb{E}_e[y|f(x)]$ across environments. However, more recent studies have demonstrated that IRM-v1, a practical version of IRM, can fail in various settings. Here, we identify a fundamental flaw of IRM formulation that causes the failure. We then introduce a complementary notion of invariance, MRI, based on conserving the label-conditioned feature expectation $\mathbb{E}_e[f(x)|y]$, which is free of this flaw. Further, we introduce a simplified, practical version of the MRI formulation called MRI-v1. We prove that for general linear problems, MRI-v1 guarantees invariant predictors given sufficient number of environments. We also empirically demonstrate that MRI-v1 strongly out-performs IRM-v1 and consistently achieves near-optimal OOD generalization in image-based nonlinear problems.
abstract_zh: 由于依赖于训练期间与标签虚假相关的特征，机器学习模型对于分布外 (OOD) 数据的泛化能力通常很差。最近，提出了不变风险最小化（IRM）技术，通过跨环境保存特征条件标签期望 $\mathbb{E}_e[y|f(x)]$ 来学习仅使用不变特征的预测器。然而，最近的研究表明，IRM-v1（IRM 的实用版本）可能在各种设置中失败。在这里，我们发现了导致失败的 IRM 公式的根本缺陷。然后，我们引入了一个互补的不变性概念 MRI，它基于保存标签条件特征期望 $\mathbb{E}_e[f(x)|y]$，它没有这个缺陷。此外，我们还介绍了 MRI 公式的简化实用版本，称为 MRI-v1。我们证明，对于一般线性问题，MRI-v1 保证在足够数量的环境下预测变量不变。我们还凭经验证明 MRI-v1 的性能明显优于 IRM-v1，并且在基于图像的非线性问题中始终实现接近最优的 OOD 泛化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MRI的新不变性原则，作为不变风险最小化（IRM）的补充，以解决其在分布外（OOD）数据上泛化能力不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有IRM方法在实际应用中存在缺陷，导致其在多种场景下失效，因此需要寻找一种更稳健的不变性原则来提升模型的泛化能力。
AI.method: 通过引入基于标签条件特征期望的MRI原则（保持$\\mathbb{E}_e[f(x)|y]$不变），并提出简化版MRI-v1算法，结合理论证明与图像非线性问题的实验验证。
AI.result: MRI-v1在多种线性问题中保证不变预测器，并在图像非线性任务中显著优于IRM-v1，实现接近最优的分布外泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: MRI-v1通过新的不变性原则有效解决了IRM的缺陷，为提升机器学习模型的分布外泛化能力提供了新思路。

authors_text: Nathan Beckmann,Phillip B Gibbons,Charles McGuffey
title: Spatial Locality and Granularity Change in Caching
title_zh: 缓存的空间局部性和粒度变化
abstract: Caches exploit temporal and spatial locality to allow a small memory to provide fast access to data stored in large, slow memory. The temporal aspect of locality is extremely well studied and understood, but the spatial aspect much less so. We seek to gain an increased understanding of spatial locality by defining and studying the Granularity-Change Caching Problem. This problem modifies the traditional caching setup by grouping data items into blocks, such that a cache can choose any subset of a block to load for the same cost as loading any individual item in the block. We show that modeling such spatial locality significantly changes the caching problem. This begins with a proof that Granularity-Change Caching is NP-Complete in the offline setting, even when all items have unit size and all blocks have unit load cost. In the online setting, we show a lower bound for competitive ratios of deterministic policies that is significantly worse than traditional caching. Moreover, we present a deterministic replacement policy called Item-Block Layered Partitioning and show that it obtains a competitive ratio close to that lower bound. Moreover, our bounds reveal a new issue arising in the Granularity-Change Caching Problem where the choice of offline cache size affects the competitiveness of different online algorithms relative to one another. To deal with this issue, we extend a prior (temporal) locality model to account for spatial locality, and provide a general lower bound in addition to an upper bound for Item-Block Layered Partitioning.

abstract_zh: 高速缓存利用时间和空间局部性来允许小存储器提供对存储在大而慢的存储器中的数据的快速访问。局部性的时间方面已经得到了很好的研究和理解，但空间方面的研究和理解却少之又少。我们寻求通过定义和研究粒度变化缓存问题来加深对空间局部性的理解。此问题通过将数据项分组为块来修改传统的缓存设置，以便缓存可以选择块的任何子集来加载，其成本与加载块中任何单个项目的成本相同。我们表明，对这种空间局部性进行建模可以显着改变缓存问题。首先证明粒度更改缓存在离线设置中是 NP 完全的，即使所有项目都具有单位大小并且所有块都具有单位加载成本。在在线环境中，我们显示了确定性策略的竞争比下限，该下限明显比传统缓存差。此外，我们提出了一种称为项目块分层分区的确定性替换策略，并表明它获得了接近该下限的竞争率。此外，我们的界限揭示了粒度变化缓存问题中出现的一个新问题，其中离线缓存大小的选择会影响不同在线算法相对于彼此的竞争力。为了解决这个问题，我们扩展了先验（时间）局部性模型来考虑空间局部性，并为项目块分层分区提供除了上限之外的一般下限。

AI.tldr: 本文研究缓存中空间局部性与粒度变化的关系，提出新的缓存问题模型并分析其复杂性及算法性能。
AI.motivation: 传统缓存研究侧重时间局部性，而空间局部性缺乏系统性分析，需通过新模型深入理解其特性。
AI.method: 定义粒度变化缓存问题，将数据分块并允许子集加载；证明离线场景NP难性，分析在线算法下界，提出分层分区策略并扩展时间局部性模型。
AI.result: 离线场景NP难性成立，在线算法下界显著劣于传统缓存；分层分区策略接近下界，缓存大小影响算法竞争力，扩展模型给出上下界。
AI.conclusion: 新模型揭示缓存容量对算法相对竞争力的影响，扩展的时间-空间联合模型为未来研究提供理论基础。
