search_text: Spatial Locality and Granularity Change in Caching 缓存的空间局部性和粒度变化 Caches exploit temporal and spatial locality to allow a small memory to provide fast access to data stored in large, slow memory. The temporal aspect of locality is extremely well studied and understood, but the spatial aspect much less so. We seek to gain an increased understanding of spatial locality by defining and studying the Granularity-Change Caching Problem. This problem modifies the traditional caching setup by grouping data items into blocks, such that a cache can choose any subset of a block to load for the same cost as loading any individual item in the block. We show that modeling such spatial locality significantly changes the caching problem. This begins with a proof that Granularity-Change Caching is NP-Complete in the offline setting, even when all items have unit size and all blocks have unit load cost. In the online setting, we show a lower bound for competitive ratios of deterministic policies that is significantly worse than traditional caching. Moreover, we present a deterministic replacement policy called Item-Block Layered Partitioning and show that it obtains a competitive ratio close to that lower bound. Moreover, our bounds reveal a new issue arising in the Granularity-Change Caching Problem where the choice of offline cache size affects the competitiveness of different online algorithms relative to one another. To deal with this issue, we extend a prior (temporal) locality model to account for spatial locality, and provide a general lower bound in addition to an upper bound for Item-Block Layered Partitioning. 高速缓存利用时间和空间局部性来允许小存储器提供对存储在大而慢的存储器中的数据的快速访问。局部性的时间方面已经得到了很好的研究和理解，但空间方面的研究和理解却少之又少。我们寻求通过定义和研究粒度变化缓存问题来加深对空间局部性的理解。此问题通过将数据项分组为块来修改传统的缓存设置，以便缓存可以选择块的任何子集来加载，其成本与加载块中任何单个项目的成本相同。我们表明，对这种空间局部性进行建模可以显着改变缓存问题。首先证明粒度更改缓存在离线设置中是 NP 完全的，即使所有项目都具有单位大小并且所有块都具有单位加载成本。在在线环境中，我们显示了确定性策略的竞争比下限，该下限明显比传统缓存差。此外，我们提出了一种称为项目块分层分区的确定性替换策略，并表明它获得了接近该下限的竞争率。此外，我们的界限揭示了粒度变化缓存问题中出现的一个新问题，其中离线缓存大小的选择会影响不同在线算法相对于彼此的竞争力。为了解决这个问题，我们扩展了先验（时间）局部性模型来考虑空间局部性，并为项目块分层分区提供除了上限之外的一般下限。 本文研究缓存中空间局部性与粒度变化的关系，提出新的缓存问题模型并分析其复杂性及算法性能。 Nathan Beckmann,Phillip B Gibbons,Charles McGuffey cs.DS

authors_text: Feng Liang,Yangguang Li,Diana Marculescu
title: SupMAE: Supervised Masked Autoencoders Are Efficient Vision Learners
title_zh: SupMAE：有监督的蒙版自动编码器是高效的视觉学习器
comment: Edge Intelligence Workshop Workshop at AAAI 2024
comments: Edge Intelligence Workshop Workshop at AAAI 2024
abstract: Recently, self-supervised Masked Autoencoders (MAE) have attracted unprecedented attention for their impressive representation learning ability. However, the pretext task, Masked Image Modeling (MIM), reconstructs the missing local patches, lacking the global understanding of the image. This paper extends MAE to a fully supervised setting by adding a supervised classification branch, thereby enabling MAE to learn global features from golden labels effectively. The proposed Supervised MAE (SupMAE) only exploits a visible subset of image patches for classification, unlike the standard supervised pre-training where all image patches are used. Through experiments, we demonstrate that SupMAE is not only more training efficient but it also learns more robust and transferable features. Specifically, SupMAE achieves comparable performance with MAE using only 30% of compute when evaluated on ImageNet with the ViT-B/16 model. SupMAE's robustness on ImageNet variants and transfer learning performance outperforms MAE and standard supervised pre-training counterparts. Codes are available at https://github.com/enyac-group/supmae.
summary: Recently, self-supervised Masked Autoencoders (MAE) have attracted unprecedented attention for their impressive representation learning ability. However, the pretext task, Masked Image Modeling (MIM), reconstructs the missing local patches, lacking the global understanding of the image. This paper extends MAE to a fully supervised setting by adding a supervised classification branch, thereby enabling MAE to learn global features from golden labels effectively. The proposed Supervised MAE (SupMAE) only exploits a visible subset of image patches for classification, unlike the standard supervised pre-training where all image patches are used. Through experiments, we demonstrate that SupMAE is not only more training efficient but it also learns more robust and transferable features. Specifically, SupMAE achieves comparable performance with MAE using only 30% of compute when evaluated on ImageNet with the ViT-B/16 model. SupMAE's robustness on ImageNet variants and transfer learning performance outperforms MAE and standard supervised pre-training counterparts. Codes are available at https://github.com/enyac-group/supmae.
abstract_zh: 最近，自监督掩码自动编码器（MAE）因其令人印象深刻的表示学习能力而引起了前所未有的关注。然而，借口任务，掩模图像建模（MIM），重建了丢失的局部补丁，缺乏对图像的全局理解。本文通过添加监督分类分支将 MAE 扩展到完全监督的设置，从而使 MAE 能够有效地从黄金标签中学习全局特征。所提出的监督 MAE (SupMAE) 仅利用图像块的可见子集进行分类，这与使用所有图像块的标准监督预训练不同。通过实验，我们证明 SupMAE 不仅训练效率更高，而且还能学习更稳健和可转移的特征。具体来说，当使用 ViT-B/16 模型在 ImageNet 上进行评估时，SupMAE 仅使用 30% 的计算就实现了与 MAE 相当的性能。 SupMAE 在 ImageNet 变体和迁移学习性能方面的稳健性优于 MAE 和标准监督预训练同行。代码可在 https://github.com/enyac-group/supmae 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SupMAE，通过在自监督的Masked Autoencoders（MAE）中添加监督分类分支，提升图像全局特征学习效率。
AI.motivation: 现有MAE依赖局部补丁重建任务（MIM），缺乏对图像全局语义的理解，而传统监督预训练需使用全部图像补丁，效率较低。
AI.method: 在MAE框架中引入监督分类分支，仅利用可见补丁进行分类，结合自监督重建任务与监督信号，优化全局特征学习。
AI.result: SupMAE在ImageNet数据集上使用ViT-B/16模型时，仅需30%计算量即可达到与MAE相当性能，且在ImageNet变体和迁移学习任务中表现优于MAE及传统监督预训练方法。
AI.conclusion: SupMAE通过融合自监督与监督学习，实现了更高效、鲁棒的视觉表征学习，为模型训练提供了新思路。

authors_text: Hanlin Li,Brent Hecht,Stevie Chancellor
title: All That's Happening behind the Scenes: Putting the Spotlight on Volunteer Moderator Labor in Reddit
title_zh: 幕后发生的一切：聚焦 Reddit 的志愿者版主劳动
comment: This is a preprint. The paper will be presented at the 2022 International Conference on Web and Social Media (ICWSM'22)
comments: This is a preprint. The paper will be presented at the 2022 International Conference on Web and Social Media (ICWSM'22)
abstract: Online volunteers are an uncompensated yet valuable labor force for many social platforms. For example, volunteer content moderators perform a vast amount of labor to maintain online communities. However, as social platforms like Reddit favor revenue generation and user engagement, moderators are under-supported to manage the expansion of online communities. To preserve these online communities, developers and researchers of social platforms must account for and support as much of this labor as possible. In this paper, we quantitatively characterize the publicly visible and invisible actions taken by moderators on Reddit, using a unique dataset of private moderator logs for 126 subreddits and over 900 moderators. Our analysis of this dataset reveals the heterogeneity of moderation work across both communities and moderators. Moreover, we find that analyzing only visible work - the dominant way that moderation work has been studied thus far - drastically underestimates the amount of human moderation labor on a subreddit. We discuss the implications of our results on content moderation research and social platforms.
summary: Online volunteers are an uncompensated yet valuable labor force for many social platforms. For example, volunteer content moderators perform a vast amount of labor to maintain online communities. However, as social platforms like Reddit favor revenue generation and user engagement, moderators are under-supported to manage the expansion of online communities. To preserve these online communities, developers and researchers of social platforms must account for and support as much of this labor as possible. In this paper, we quantitatively characterize the publicly visible and invisible actions taken by moderators on Reddit, using a unique dataset of private moderator logs for 126 subreddits and over 900 moderators. Our analysis of this dataset reveals the heterogeneity of moderation work across both communities and moderators. Moreover, we find that analyzing only visible work - the dominant way that moderation work has been studied thus far - drastically underestimates the amount of human moderation labor on a subreddit. We discuss the implications of our results on content moderation research and social platforms.
abstract_zh: 对于许多社交平台来说，在线志愿者是无偿但有价值的劳动力。例如，志愿者内容版主需要付出大量的劳动来维护在线社区。然而，由于 Reddit 等社交平台偏重创收和用户参与，版主在管理在线社区扩张方面缺乏支持。为了保护这些在线社区，社交平台的开发者和研究人员必须尽可能多地考虑和支持这些劳动力。在本文中，我们使用 126 个 Reddit 子版块和 900 多名版主的私有版主日志的独特数据集，定量描述了版主在 Reddit 上采取的公开可见和不可见的操作。我们对该数据集的分析揭示了社区和管理员之间的审核工作的异质性。此外，我们发现仅分析可见的工作（迄今为止研究审核工作的主要方式）大大低估了 Reddit 子版块上人类审核工作的数量。我们讨论了我们的结果对内容审核研究和社交平台的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析Reddit的私人版主日志数据，量化研究志愿者版主在可见和不可见方面的劳动情况。
AI.motivation: 现有研究过度关注可见的版主工作，忽视了大量隐藏劳动，而社交平台对版主支持不足，需重新评估其劳动价值。
AI.method: 基于126个子版块和900余名版主的私人日志数据，对比分析可见与不可见的版主行为差异。
AI.result: 发现可见工作仅占总劳动量的小部分，不同社区和版主间劳动强度存在显著异质性。
AI.conclusion: 应重视版主的隐形劳动，社交平台需改进对志愿者劳动的支持机制，相关研究需拓展分析维度。

search_text: All That's Happening behind the Scenes: Putting the Spotlight on Volunteer Moderator Labor in Reddit 幕后发生的一切：聚焦 Reddit 的志愿者版主劳动 Online volunteers are an uncompensated yet valuable labor force for many social platforms. For example, volunteer content moderators perform a vast amount of labor to maintain online communities. However, as social platforms like Reddit favor revenue generation and user engagement, moderators are under-supported to manage the expansion of online communities. To preserve these online communities, developers and researchers of social platforms must account for and support as much of this labor as possible. In this paper, we quantitatively characterize the publicly visible and invisible actions taken by moderators on Reddit, using a unique dataset of private moderator logs for 126 subreddits and over 900 moderators. Our analysis of this dataset reveals the heterogeneity of moderation work across both communities and moderators. Moreover, we find that analyzing only visible work - the dominant way that moderation work has been studied thus far - drastically underestimates the amount of human moderation labor on a subreddit. We discuss the implications of our results on content moderation research and social platforms. 对于许多社交平台来说，在线志愿者是无偿但有价值的劳动力。例如，志愿者内容版主需要付出大量的劳动来维护在线社区。然而，由于 Reddit 等社交平台偏重创收和用户参与，版主在管理在线社区扩张方面缺乏支持。为了保护这些在线社区，社交平台的开发者和研究人员必须尽可能多地考虑和支持这些劳动力。在本文中，我们使用 126 个 Reddit 子版块和 900 多名版主的私有版主日志的独特数据集，定量描述了版主在 Reddit 上采取的公开可见和不可见的操作。我们对该数据集的分析揭示了社区和管理员之间的审核工作的异质性。此外，我们发现仅分析可见的工作（迄今为止研究审核工作的主要方式）大大低估了 Reddit 子版块上人类审核工作的数量。我们讨论了我们的结果对内容审核研究和社交平台的影响。 本文通过分析Reddit的私人版主日志数据，量化研究志愿者版主在可见和不可见方面的劳动情况。 Hanlin Li,Brent Hecht,Stevie Chancellor cs.HC

authors_text: Hanlin Li,Brent Hecht,Stevie Chancellor
title: Measuring the Monetary Value of Online Volunteer Work
title_zh: 衡量在线志愿工作的货币价值
comment: This is a preprint. The paper will be presented at the 2022 International Conference on Web and Social Media (ICWSM'22)
comments: This is a preprint. The paper will be presented at the 2022 International Conference on Web and Social Media (ICWSM'22)
abstract: Online volunteers are a crucial labor force that keeps many for-profit systems afloat (e.g. social media platforms and online review sites). Despite their substantial role in upholding highly valuable technological systems, online volunteers have no way of knowing the value of their work. This paper uses content moderation as a case study and measures its monetary value to make apparent volunteer labor's value. Using a novel dataset of private logs generated by moderators, we use linear mixed-effect regression and estimate that Reddit moderators worked a minimum of 466 hours per day in 2020. These hours amount to 3.4 million USD a year based on the median hourly wage for comparable content moderation services in the U.S. We discuss how this information may inform pathways to alleviate the one-sided relationship between technology companies and online volunteers.
summary: Online volunteers are a crucial labor force that keeps many for-profit systems afloat (e.g. social media platforms and online review sites). Despite their substantial role in upholding highly valuable technological systems, online volunteers have no way of knowing the value of their work. This paper uses content moderation as a case study and measures its monetary value to make apparent volunteer labor's value. Using a novel dataset of private logs generated by moderators, we use linear mixed-effect regression and estimate that Reddit moderators worked a minimum of 466 hours per day in 2020. These hours amount to 3.4 million USD a year based on the median hourly wage for comparable content moderation services in the U.S. We discuss how this information may inform pathways to alleviate the one-sided relationship between technology companies and online volunteers.
abstract_zh: 在线志愿者是维持许多营利性系统（例如社交媒体平台和在线评论网站）运转的重要劳动力。尽管在线志愿者在维护高价值技术系统方面发挥着重要作用，但他们无法了解他们工作的价值。本文以内容审核为案例，衡量其货币价值，以凸显志愿劳动的价值。通过使用由版主生成的新颖的私人日志数据集，我们使用线性混合效应回归，并估计 Reddit 版主在 2020 年每天至少工作 466 小时。根据美国可比内容审核服务的时薪中位数，这些时间相当于每年 340 万美元。我们讨论了这些信息如何为缓解科技公司和在线志愿者之间的片面关系提供信息。

AI.tldr: 本文通过内容审核案例研究，量化在线志愿者劳动的货币价值，揭示其对技术系统的贡献。
AI.motivation: 在线志愿者（如内容审核员）对维系科技平台至关重要，但其劳动价值长期被忽视，需建立量化评估以改善平台与志愿者间的不平衡关系。
AI.method: 基于Reddit审核员私有日志数据，采用线性混合效应回归模型估算劳动时间与货币价值。
AI.result: 估算2020年Reddit审核员每日工作至少466小时，按美国同类服务中位数时薪计算，年价值达340万美元。
AI.conclusion: 量化志愿者劳动价值可为技术公司与志愿者之间建立更公平的权益分配机制提供依据。

authors_text: Dongjie Wang,Yanjie Fu,Kunpeng Liu,Xiaolin Li,Yan Solihin
title: Group-wise Reinforcement Feature Generation for Optimal and Explainable Representation Space Reconstruction
title_zh: 用于最佳且可解释的表示空间重建的分组强化特征生成
abstract: Representation (feature) space is an environment where data points are vectorized, distances are computed, patterns are characterized, and geometric structures are embedded. Extracting a good representation space is critical to address the curse of dimensionality, improve model generalization, overcome data sparsity, and increase the availability of classic models. Existing literature, such as feature engineering and representation learning, is limited in achieving full automation (e.g., over heavy reliance on intensive labor and empirical experiences), explainable explicitness (e.g., traceable reconstruction process and explainable new features), and flexible optimal (e.g., optimal feature space reconstruction is not embedded into downstream tasks). Can we simultaneously address the automation, explicitness, and optimal challenges in representation space reconstruction for a machine learning task? To answer this question, we propose a group-wise reinforcement generation perspective. We reformulate representation space reconstruction into an interactive process of nested feature generation and selection, where feature generation is to generate new meaningful and explicit features, and feature selection is to eliminate redundant features to control feature sizes. We develop a cascading reinforcement learning method that leverages three cascading Markov Decision Processes to learn optimal generation policies to automate the selection of features and operations and the feature crossing. We design a group-wise generation strategy to cross a feature group, an operation, and another feature group to generate new features and find the strategy that can enhance exploration efficiency and augment reward signals of cascading agents. Finally, we present extensive experiments to demonstrate the effectiveness, efficiency, traceability, and explicitness of our system.
summary: Representation (feature) space is an environment where data points are vectorized, distances are computed, patterns are characterized, and geometric structures are embedded. Extracting a good representation space is critical to address the curse of dimensionality, improve model generalization, overcome data sparsity, and increase the availability of classic models. Existing literature, such as feature engineering and representation learning, is limited in achieving full automation (e.g., over heavy reliance on intensive labor and empirical experiences), explainable explicitness (e.g., traceable reconstruction process and explainable new features), and flexible optimal (e.g., optimal feature space reconstruction is not embedded into downstream tasks). Can we simultaneously address the automation, explicitness, and optimal challenges in representation space reconstruction for a machine learning task? To answer this question, we propose a group-wise reinforcement generation perspective. We reformulate representation space reconstruction into an interactive process of nested feature generation and selection, where feature generation is to generate new meaningful and explicit features, and feature selection is to eliminate redundant features to control feature sizes. We develop a cascading reinforcement learning method that leverages three cascading Markov Decision Processes to learn optimal generation policies to automate the selection of features and operations and the feature crossing. We design a group-wise generation strategy to cross a feature group, an operation, and another feature group to generate new features and find the strategy that can enhance exploration efficiency and augment reward signals of cascading agents. Finally, we present extensive experiments to demonstrate the effectiveness, efficiency, traceability, and explicitness of our system.
abstract_zh: 表示（特征）空间是一个环境，其中数据点被矢量化，距离被计算，模式被表征，并且几何结构被嵌入。提取良好的表示空间对于解决维数灾难、提高模型泛化性、克服数据稀疏性以及提高经典模型的可用性至关重要。现有文献，例如特征工程和表示学习，在实现完全自动化（例如，过度依赖密集劳动和经验经验）、可解释的明确性（例如，可追踪的重建过程和可解释的新特征）和灵活的最优（例如，最优特征空间重建不嵌入到下游任务中）方面受到限制。我们能否同时解决机器学习任务的表示空间重建中的自动化、显式性和最优挑战？为了回答这个问题，我们提出了分组强化生成的观点。我们将表示空间重建重新表述为嵌套特征生成和选择的交互过程，其中特征生成是生成新的有意义且明确的特征，特征选择是消除冗余特征以控制特征大小。我们开发了一种级联强化学习方法，该方法利用三个级联马尔可夫决策过程来学习最佳生成策略，以自动选择特征和操作以及特征交叉。我们设计了一种分组生成策略来跨越一个特征组、一个操作和另一个特征组来生成新特征，并找到可以提高探索效率并增强级联代理奖励信号的策略。最后，我们提出了广泛的实验来证明我们系统的有效性、效率、可追溯性和明确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分组强化学习的特征生成方法，旨在解决表示空间重建中的自动化、可解释性和最优性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有特征工程和表示学习方法存在自动化程度低、过程不可解释、无法嵌入下游任务等局限性。
AI.method: 构建级联强化学习框架，通过三个级联马尔可夫决策过程学习最优特征生成策略，并设计分组生成策略增强探索效率。
AI.result: 实验验证了方法在特征重建效果、计算效率、过程可追溯性和特征可解释性方面的优势。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了表示空间重建的自动化、可解释性和最优性统一，为特征学习提供了新范式。

We develop a cascading reinforcement learning method that leverages three cascading Markov Decision Processes to learn optimal generation policies to automate the selection of features and operations and the feature crossing. We design a group-wise generation strategy to cross a feature group, an operation, and another feature group to generate new features and find the strategy that can enhance exploration efficiency and augment reward signals of cascading agents. Finally, we present extensive experiments to demonstrate the effectiveness, efficiency, traceability, and explicitness of our system. 表示（特征）空间是一个环境，其中数据点被矢量化，距离被计算，模式被表征，并且几何结构被嵌入。提取良好的表示空间对于解决维数灾难、提高模型泛化性、克服数据稀疏性以及提高经典模型的可用性至关重要。现有文献，例如特征工程和表示学习，在实现完全自动化（例如，过度依赖密集劳动和经验经验）、可解释的明确性（例如，可追踪的重建过程和可解释的新特征）和灵活的最优（例如，最优特征空间重建不嵌入到下游任务中）方面受到限制。我们能否同时解决机器学习任务的表示空间重建中的自动化、显式性和最优挑战？为了回答这个问题，我们提出了分组强化生成的观点。我们将表示空间重建重新表述为嵌套特征生成和选择的交互过程，其中特征生成是生成新的有意义且明确的特征，特征选择是消除冗余特征以控制特征大小。我们开发了一种级联强化学习方法，该方法利用三个级联马尔可夫决策过程来学习最佳生成策略，以自动选择特征和操作以及特征交叉。我们设计了一种分组生成策略来跨越一个特征组、一个操作和另一个特征组来生成新特征，并找到可以提高探索效率并增强级联代理奖励信号的策略。最后，我们提出了广泛的实验来证明我们系统的有效性、效率、可追溯性和明确性。 本文提出一种基于分组强化学习的特征生成方法，旨在解决表示空间重建中的自动化、可解释性和最优性问题。 Dongjie Wang,Yanjie Fu,Kunpeng Liu,Xiaolin Li,Yan Solihin cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Shih-Han Chan,Yinpeng Dong,Jun Zhu,Xiaolu Zhang,Jun Zhou
title: BadDet: Backdoor Attacks on Object Detection
title_zh: BadDet：对象检测的后门攻击
abstract: Deep learning models have been deployed in numerous real-world applications such as autonomous driving and surveillance. However, these models are vulnerable in adversarial environments. Backdoor attack is emerging as a severe security threat which injects a backdoor trigger into a small portion of training data such that the trained model behaves normally on benign inputs but gives incorrect predictions when the specific trigger appears. While most research in backdoor attacks focuses on image classification, backdoor attacks on object detection have not been explored but are of equal importance. Object detection has been adopted as an important module in various security-sensitive applications such as autonomous driving. Therefore, backdoor attacks on object detection could pose severe threats to human lives and properties. We propose four kinds of backdoor attacks for object detection task: 1) Object Generation Attack: a trigger can falsely generate an object of the target class; 2) Regional Misclassification Attack: a trigger can change the prediction of a surrounding object to the target class; 3) Global Misclassification Attack: a single trigger can change the predictions of all objects in an image to the target class; and 4) Object Disappearance Attack: a trigger can make the detector fail to detect the object of the target class. We develop appropriate metrics to evaluate the four backdoor attacks on object detection. We perform experiments using two typical object detection models -- Faster-RCNN and YOLOv3 on different datasets. More crucially, we demonstrate that even fine-tuning on another benign dataset cannot remove the backdoor hidden in the object detection model. To defend against these backdoor attacks, we propose Detector Cleanse, an entropy-based run-time detection framework to identify poisoned testing samples for any deployed object detector.
summary: Deep learning models have been deployed in numerous real-world applications such as autonomous driving and surveillance. However, these models are vulnerable in adversarial environments. Backdoor attack is emerging as a severe security threat which injects a backdoor trigger into a small portion of training data such that the trained model behaves normally on benign inputs but gives incorrect predictions when the specific trigger appears. While most research in backdoor attacks focuses on image classification, backdoor attacks on object detection have not been explored but are of equal importance. Object detection has been adopted as an important module in various security-sensitive applications such as autonomous driving. Therefore, backdoor attacks on object detection could pose severe threats to human lives and properties. We propose four kinds of backdoor attacks for object detection task: 1) Object Generation Attack: a trigger can falsely generate an object of the target class; 2) Regional Misclassification Attack: a trigger can change the prediction of a surrounding object to the target class; 3) Global Misclassification Attack: a single trigger can change the predictions of all objects in an image to the target class; and 4) Object Disappearance Attack: a trigger can make the detector fail to detect the object of the target class. We develop appropriate metrics to evaluate the four backdoor attacks on object detection. We perform experiments using two typical object detection models -- Faster-RCNN and YOLOv3 on different datasets. More crucially, we demonstrate that even fine-tuning on another benign dataset cannot remove the backdoor hidden in the object detection model. To defend against these backdoor attacks, we propose Detector Cleanse, an entropy-based run-time detection framework to identify poisoned testing samples for any deployed object detector.
abstract_zh: 深度学习模型已被部署在许多现实世界的应用中，例如自动驾驶和监控。然而，这些模型在对抗环境中很容易受到攻击。后门攻击正在成为一种严重的安全威胁，它将后门触发器注入一小部分训练数据中，使得训练后的模型在良性输入上表现正常，但在特定触发器出现时给出错误的预测。虽然后门攻击的大多数研究都集中在图像分类上，但对象检测的后门攻击尚未被探索，但同样重要。物体检测已成为自动驾驶等各种安全敏感应用中的重要模块。因此，针对目标检测的后门攻击可能对人类生命和财产造成严重威胁。我们针对对象检测任务提出了四种后门攻击： 1）对象生成攻击：触发器可以错误地生成目标类的对象； 2）区域错误分类攻击：触发器可以将周围物体的预测更改为目标类别； 3）全局误分类攻击：单个触发器可以将图像中所有对象的预测更改为目标类； 4）对象消失攻击：触发可以使检测器无法检测到目标类的对象。我们开发了适当的指标来评估对象检测的四种后门攻击。我们使用两种典型的目标检测模型——Faster-RCNN 和 YOLOv3 在不同的数据集上进行实验。更重要的是，我们证明即使对另一个良性数据集进行微调也无法消除隐藏在对象检测模型中的后门。为了防御这些后门攻击，我们提出了 Detector Cleanse，这是一种基于熵的运行时检测框架，用于识别任何已部署的对象检测器的中毒测试样本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出针对目标检测模型的四种后门攻击方法，并设计防御框架Detector Cleanse以识别中毒样本。
AI.motivation: 目标检测广泛应用于自动驾驶等安全敏感场景，但现有研究主要关注分类任务的后门攻击，忽视了目标检测的潜在威胁。
AI.method: 设计四类后门攻击（生成目标、区域误分类、全局误分类、目标消失），构建评估指标，并提出基于熵值的运行时检测框架Detector Cleanse。
AI.result: 实验表明四种攻击均有效，且微调良性数据无法清除后门；Detector Cleanse能有效识别中毒样本。
AI.conclusion: 目标检测模型存在严重后门攻击风险，需通过运行时检测等方法进行防御。

authors_text: Hanqing Guo,Qiben Yan,Nikolay Ivanov,Ying Zhu,Li Xiao,Eric J. Hunter
title: SuperVoice: Text-Independent Speaker Verification Using Ultrasound Energy in Human Speech
title_zh: SuperVoice：在人类语音中使用超声波能量进行与文本无关的说话者验证
abstract: Voice-activated systems are integrated into a variety of desktop, mobile, and Internet-of-Things (IoT) devices. However, voice spoofing attacks, such as impersonation and replay attacks, in which malicious attackers synthesize the voice of a victim or simply replay it, have brought growing security concerns. Existing speaker verification techniques distinguish individual speakers via the spectrographic features extracted from an audible frequency range of voice commands. However, they often have high error rates and/or long delays. In this paper, we explore a new direction of human voice research by scrutinizing the unique characteristics of human speech at the ultrasound frequency band. Our research indicates that the high-frequency ultrasound components (e.g. speech fricatives) from 20 to 48 kHz can significantly enhance the security and accuracy of speaker verification. We propose a speaker verification system, SUPERVOICE that uses a two-stream DNN architecture with a feature fusion mechanism to generate distinctive speaker models. To test the system, we create a speech dataset with 12 hours of audio (8,950 voice samples) from 127 participants. In addition, we create a second spoofed voice dataset to evaluate its security. In order to balance between controlled recordings and real-world applications, the audio recordings are collected from two quiet rooms by 8 different recording devices, including 7 smartphones and an ultrasound microphone. Our evaluation shows that SUPERVOICE achieves 0.58% equal error rate in the speaker verification task, it only takes 120 ms for testing an incoming utterance, outperforming all existing speaker verification systems. Moreover, within 91 ms processing time, SUPERVOICE achieves 0% equal error rate in detecting replay attacks launched by 5 different loudspeakers.
summary: Voice-activated systems are integrated into a variety of desktop, mobile, and Internet-of-Things (IoT) devices. However, voice spoofing attacks, such as impersonation and replay attacks, in which malicious attackers synthesize the voice of a victim or simply replay it, have brought growing security concerns. Existing speaker verification techniques distinguish individual speakers via the spectrographic features extracted from an audible frequency range of voice commands. However, they often have high error rates and/or long delays. In this paper, we explore a new direction of human voice research by scrutinizing the unique characteristics of human speech at the ultrasound frequency band. Our research indicates that the high-frequency ultrasound components (e.g. speech fricatives) from 20 to 48 kHz can significantly enhance the security and accuracy of speaker verification. We propose a speaker verification system, SUPERVOICE that uses a two-stream DNN architecture with a feature fusion mechanism to generate distinctive speaker models. To test the system, we create a speech dataset with 12 hours of audio (8,950 voice samples) from 127 participants. In addition, we create a second spoofed voice dataset to evaluate its security. In order to balance between controlled recordings and real-world applications, the audio recordings are collected from two quiet rooms by 8 different recording devices, including 7 smartphones and an ultrasound microphone. Our evaluation shows that SUPERVOICE achieves 0.58% equal error rate in the speaker verification task, it only takes 120 ms for testing an incoming utterance, outperforming all existing speaker verification systems. Moreover, within 91 ms processing time, SUPERVOICE achieves 0% equal error rate in detecting replay attacks launched by 5 different loudspeakers.
abstract_zh: 语音激活系统集成到各种桌面、移动和物联网 (IoT) 设备中。然而，语音欺骗攻击，例如冒充和重放攻击，其中恶意攻击者合成受害者的声音或简单地重放它，带来了越来越多的安全问题。现有的说话者验证技术通过从语音命令的可听频率范围中提取的频谱特征来区分各个说话者。然而，它们通常具有较高的错误率和/或较长的延迟。在本文中，我们通过仔细研究人类语音在超声频段的独特特征，探索了人类语音研究的新方向。我们的研究表明，20 至 48 kHz 的高频超声成分（例如语音摩擦音）可以显着提高说话人验证的安全性和准确性。我们提出了一种说话人验证系统 SUPERVOICE，它使用具有特征融合机制的双流 DNN 架构来生成独特的说话人模型。为了测试系统，我们创建了一个语音数据集，其中包含来自 127 名参与者的 12 小时音频（8,950 个语音样本）。此外，我们创建了第二个欺骗语音数据集来评估其安全性。为了平衡受控录音和实际应用之间的平衡，录音是通过 8 个不同的录音设备（包括 7 个智能手机和一个超声波麦克风）从两个安静的房间收集的。我们的评估表明，SUPERVOICE 在说话人验证任务中实现了 0.58% 的等错误率，测试传入语音仅需 120 毫秒，优于所有现有的说话人验证系统。此外，在91毫秒的处理时间内，SUPERVOICE在检测5个不同扬声器发起的重放攻击时实现了0%的等错误率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于超声波能量的文本无关说话人验证系统SuperVoice，通过分析人类语音中的超声波频率成分来提升验证的安全性和准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有说话人验证技术易受语音欺骗攻击且存在较高错误率和延迟，而超声波频段（20-48kHz）的语音特征（如摩擦音）具有独特性和难以被复制的特性，可有效增强系统安全性。
AI.method: 设计双流DNN架构结合特征融合机制，构建说话人模型；收集127名参与者的12小时语音数据（含8950个样本）及仿冒语音数据集，使用8种设备（含7部手机和超声波麦克风）在安静环境中录制以平衡可控性与实际应用。
AI.result: 在说话人验证任务中实现0.58%的等错误率，验证时间仅需120ms；在91ms内对5种扬声器发起的重放攻击检测达到0%等错误率，优于所有现有系统。
AI.conclusion: SuperVoice通过利用超声波频段特征显著提升了说话人验证的准确性与防欺骗能力，同时保持了实时性，为语音安全认证提供了新方向。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于超声波能量的文本无关说话人验证系统SuperVoice，通过分析人类语音中的超声波频率成分来提升验证的安全性和准确性。
motivation: 现有说话人验证技术易受语音欺骗攻击且存在较高错误率和延迟，而超声波频段（20-48kHz）的语音特征（如摩擦音）具有独特性和难以被复制的特性，可有效增强系统安全性。
method: 设计双流DNN架构结合特征融合机制，构建说话人模型；收集127名参与者的12小时语音数据（含8950个样本）及仿冒语音数据集，使用8种设备（含7部手机和超声波麦克风）在安静环境中录制以平衡可控性与实际应用。
result: 在说话人验证任务中实现0.58%的等错误率，验证时间仅需120ms；在91ms内对5种扬声器发起的重放攻击检测达到0%等错误率，优于所有现有系统。
conclusion: SuperVoice通过利用超声波频段特征显著提升了说话人验证的准确性与防欺骗能力，同时保持了实时性，为语音安全认证提供了新方向。
search_text: SuperVoice: Text-Independent Speaker Verification Using Ultrasound Energy in Human Speech SuperVoice：在人类语音中使用超声波能量进行与文本无关的说话者验证 Voice-activated systems are integrated into a variety of desktop, mobile, and Internet-of-Things (IoT) devices. However, voice spoofing attacks, such as impersonation and replay attacks, in which malicious attackers synthesize the voice of a victim or simply replay it, have brought growing security concerns. Existing speaker verification techniques distinguish individual speakers via the spectrographic features extracted from an audible frequency range of voice commands. However, they often have high error rates and/or long delays. In this paper, we explore a new direction of human voice research by scrutinizing the unique characteristics of human speech at the ultrasound frequency band. Our research indicates that the high-frequency ultrasound components (e.g. speech fricatives) from 20 to 48 kHz can significantly enhance the security and accuracy of speaker verification. We propose a speaker verification system, SUPERVOICE that uses a two-stream DNN architecture with a feature fusion mechanism to generate distinctive speaker models. To test the system, we create a speech dataset with 12 hours of audio (8,950 voice samples) from 127 participants. In addition, we create a second spoofed voice dataset to evaluate its security. In order to balance between controlled recordings and real-world applications, the audio recordings are collected from two quiet rooms by 8 different recording devices, including 7 smartphones and an ultrasound microphone. Our evaluation shows that SUPERVOICE achieves 0.58% equal error rate in the speaker verification task, it only takes 120 ms for testing an incoming utterance, outperforming all existing speaker verification systems. Moreover, within 91 ms processing time, SUPERVOICE achieves 0% equal error rate in detecting replay attacks launched by 5 different loudspeakers. 语音激活系统集成到各种桌面、移动和物联网 (IoT) 设备中。然而，语音欺骗攻击，例如冒充和重放攻击，其中恶意攻击者合成受害者的声音或简单地重放它，带来了越来越多的安全问题。现有的说话者验证技术通过从语音命令的可听频率范围中提取的频谱特征来区分各个说话者。然而，它们通常具有较高的错误率和/或较长的延迟。在本文中，我们通过仔细研究人类语音在超声频段的独特特征，探索了人类语音研究的新方向。我们的研究表明，20 至 48 kHz 的高频超声成分（例如语音摩擦音）可以显着提高说话人验证的安全性和准确性。我们提出了一种说话人验证系统 SUPERVOICE，它使用具有特征融合机制的双流 DNN 架构来生成独特的说话人模型。为了测试系统，我们创建了一个语音数据集，其中包含来自 127 名参与者的 12 小时音频（8,950 个语音样本）。此外，我们创建了第二个欺骗语音数据集来评估其安全性。为了平衡受控录音和实际应用之间的平衡，录音是通过 8 个不同的录音设备（包括 7 个智能手机和一个超声波麦克风）从两个安静的房间收集的。我们的评估表明，SUPERVOICE 在说话人验证任务中实现了 0.58% 的等错误率，测试传入语音仅需 120 毫秒，优于所有现有的说话人验证系统。此外，在91毫秒的处理时间内，SUPERVOICE在检测5个不同扬声器发起的重放攻击时实现了0%的等错误率。 本文提出了一种基于超声波能量的文本无关说话人验证系统SuperVoice，通过分析人类语音中的超声波频率成分来提升验证的安全性和准确性。 Hanqing Guo,Qiben Yan,Nikolay Ivanov,Ying Zhu,Li Xiao,Eric J. Hunter cs.SD,cs.HC,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Magnús M. Halldórsson,Alexandre Nolin,Tigran Tonoyan
title: Overcoming Congestion in Distributed Coloring
title_zh: 克服分布式着色中的拥塞
comment: This paper incorporates results from the technical report arXiv:2105.04700 on adapting LOCAL algorithms to CONGEST. This excludes the other results in arXiv:2105.04700, which were refactored in arXiv:2112.00604
comments: This paper incorporates results from the technical report arXiv:2105.04700 on adapting LOCAL algorithms to CONGEST. This excludes the other results in arXiv:2105.04700, which were refactored in arXiv:2112.00604
abstract: We present a new technique to efficiently sample and communicate a large number of elements from a distributed sampling space. When used in the context of a recent LOCAL algorithm for $(\operatorname{degree}+1)$-list-coloring (D1LC), this allows us to solve D1LC in $O(\log^5 \log n)$ CONGEST rounds, and in only $O(\log^* n)$ rounds when the graph has minimum degree $Ω(\log^7 n)$, w.h.p. The technique also has immediate applications in testing some graph properties locally, and for estimating the sparsity/density of local subgraphs in $O(1)$ CONGEST rounds, w.h.p.
summary: We present a new technique to efficiently sample and communicate a large number of elements from a distributed sampling space. When used in the context of a recent LOCAL algorithm for $(\operatorname{degree}+1)$-list-coloring (D1LC), this allows us to solve D1LC in $O(\log^5 \log n)$ CONGEST rounds, and in only $O(\log^* n)$ rounds when the graph has minimum degree $Ω(\log^7 n)$, w.h.p. The technique also has immediate applications in testing some graph properties locally, and for estimating the sparsity/density of local subgraphs in $O(1)$ CONGEST rounds, w.h.p.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新技术，可以从分布式采样空间中有效地采样和通信大量元素。当在最近的 $(\operatorname{ Degree}+1)$-list-coloring (D1LC) 的 LOCAL 算法中使用时，这使我们能够在 $O(\log^5 \log n)$ CONGEST 轮中求解 D1LC，并且当图形具有最小度 $Ω(\log^7 n)$ 时，仅在 $O(\log^* n)$ 轮中求解，w.h.p。该技术还可以直接应用于本地测试某些图属性，以及估计 $O(1)$ CONGEST 轮中局部子图的稀疏性/密度，w.h.p.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分布式采样与通信技术，用于解决分布式图着色中的拥塞问题，显著提升算法效率。
AI.motivation: 现有分布式图着色算法在处理大规模网络时面临通信拥塞瓶颈，导致效率低下，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计新型采样与通信机制，结合LOCAL算法优化（degree+1）-list-coloring过程，并扩展至图属性测试与子图密度估计。
AI.result: 在CONGEST模型中，D1LC问题可在O(log⁵log n)轮内解决，高最小度图仅需O(log* n)轮；局部子图分析可在O(1)轮内完成。
AI.conclusion: 该技术有效缓解分布式算法拥塞问题，为图着色及局部分析提供高效通用方案，具有广泛适用性。

authors_text: Tian Lv,Chongyang Bai,Chaojie Wang
title: MDMLP: Image Classification from Scratch on Small Datasets with MLP
title_zh: MDMLP：使用 MLP 在小数据集上从头开始进行图像分类
abstract: The attention mechanism has become a go-to technique for natural language processing and computer vision tasks. Recently, the MLP-Mixer and other MLP-based architectures, based simply on multi-layer perceptrons (MLPs), are also powerful compared to CNNs and attention techniques and raises a new research direction. However, the high capability of the MLP-based networks severely relies on large volume of training data, and lacks of explanation ability compared to the Vision Transformer (ViT) or ConvNets. When trained on small datasets, they usually achieved inferior results than ConvNets. To resolve it, we present (i) multi-dimensional MLP (MDMLP), a conceptually simple and lightweight MLP-based architecture yet achieves SOTA when training from scratch on small-size datasets; (ii) multi-dimension MLP Attention Tool (MDAttnTool), a novel and efficient attention mechanism based on MLPs. Even without strong data augmentation, MDMLP achieves 90.90% accuracy on CIFAR10 with only 0.3M parameters, while the well-known MLP-Mixer achieves 85.45% with 17.1M parameters. In addition, the lightweight MDAttnTool highlights objects in images, indicating its explanation power. Our code is available at https://github.com/Amoza-Theodore/MDMLP.
summary: The attention mechanism has become a go-to technique for natural language processing and computer vision tasks. Recently, the MLP-Mixer and other MLP-based architectures, based simply on multi-layer perceptrons (MLPs), are also powerful compared to CNNs and attention techniques and raises a new research direction. However, the high capability of the MLP-based networks severely relies on large volume of training data, and lacks of explanation ability compared to the Vision Transformer (ViT) or ConvNets. When trained on small datasets, they usually achieved inferior results than ConvNets. To resolve it, we present (i) multi-dimensional MLP (MDMLP), a conceptually simple and lightweight MLP-based architecture yet achieves SOTA when training from scratch on small-size datasets; (ii) multi-dimension MLP Attention Tool (MDAttnTool), a novel and efficient attention mechanism based on MLPs. Even without strong data augmentation, MDMLP achieves 90.90% accuracy on CIFAR10 with only 0.3M parameters, while the well-known MLP-Mixer achieves 85.45% with 17.1M parameters. In addition, the lightweight MDAttnTool highlights objects in images, indicating its explanation power. Our code is available at https://github.com/Amoza-Theodore/MDMLP.
abstract_zh: 注意力机制已成为自然语言处理和计算机视觉任务的首选技术。最近，MLP-Mixer 和其他基于 MLP 的架构，仅基于多层感知器（MLP），与 CNN 和注意力技术相比也更强大，并提出了一个新的研究方向。然而，基于 MLP 的网络的高性能严重依赖于大量的训练数据，并且与 Vision Transformer (ViT) 或 ConvNet 相比缺乏解释能力。当在小型数据集上进行训练时，它们通常取得的结果比 ConvNet 差。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了（i）多维 MLP（MDMLP），这是一种概念上简单且轻量级的基于 MLP 的架构，但在小规模数据集上从头开始训练时实现了 SOTA； （ii）多维MLP注意力工具（MDAttnTool），一种基于MLP的新颖且高效的注意力机制。即使没有强大的数据增强，MDMLP 在 CIFAR10 上仅用 0.3M 参数即可实现 90.90% 的准确率，而著名的 MLP-Mixer 用 17.1M 参数即可实现 85.45% 的准确率。此外，轻量级的MDAttnTool突出显示了图像中的对象，显示了其解释能力。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/Amoza-Theodore/MDMLP 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多层感知机（MLP）的轻量级图像分类模型MDMLP，旨在解决小数据集上的图像分类问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管MLP-based模型在大规模数据上表现优异，但其性能严重依赖于大量训练数据且缺乏可解释性，且在小数据集上通常不如卷积神经网络（CNN）。
AI.method: 提出多维MLP（MDMLP）架构和基于MLP的多维注意力工具（MDAttnTool），通过轻量化设计和新型注意力机制提升小数据集下的分类性能与可解释性。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10数据集上，MDMLP以仅0.3M参数达到90.90%准确率，优于参数量17.1M的MLP-Mixer（85.45%），且MDAttnTool能有效突出图像目标区域。
AI.conclusion: MDMLP通过轻量设计和注意力机制，在小数据集图像分类任务中实现了参数效率与性能的平衡，并具备良好的可解释性。

Even without strong data augmentation, MDMLP achieves 90.90% accuracy on CIFAR10 with only 0.3M parameters, while the well-known MLP-Mixer achieves 85.45% with 17.1M parameters. In addition, the lightweight MDAttnTool highlights objects in images, indicating its explanation power. Our code is available at https://github.com/Amoza-Theodore/MDMLP. 注意力机制已成为自然语言处理和计算机视觉任务的首选技术。最近，MLP-Mixer 和其他基于 MLP 的架构，仅基于多层感知器（MLP），与 CNN 和注意力技术相比也更强大，并提出了一个新的研究方向。然而，基于 MLP 的网络的高性能严重依赖于大量的训练数据，并且与 Vision Transformer (ViT) 或 ConvNet 相比缺乏解释能力。当在小型数据集上进行训练时，它们通常取得的结果比 ConvNet 差。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了（i）多维 MLP（MDMLP），这是一种概念上简单且轻量级的基于 MLP 的架构，但在小规模数据集上从头开始训练时实现了 SOTA； （ii）多维MLP注意力工具（MDAttnTool），一种基于MLP的新颖且高效的注意力机制。即使没有强大的数据增强，MDMLP 在 CIFAR10 上仅用 0.3M 参数即可实现 90.90% 的准确率，而著名的 MLP-Mixer 用 17.1M 参数即可实现 85.45% 的准确率。此外，轻量级的MDAttnTool突出显示了图像中的对象，显示了其解释能力。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/Amoza-Theodore/MDMLP 获取。 本文提出了一种基于多层感知机（MLP）的轻量级图像分类模型MDMLP，旨在解决小数据集上的图像分类问题。 Tian Lv,Chongyang Bai,Chaojie Wang cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Alexander Avery,Andreas Savakis
title: DeepRM: Deep Recurrent Matching for 6D Pose Refinement
title_zh: DeepRM：用于 6D 姿势细化的深度循环匹配
abstract: Precise 6D pose estimation of rigid objects from RGB images is a critical but challenging task in robotics, augmented reality and human-computer interaction. To address this problem, we propose DeepRM, a novel recurrent network architecture for 6D pose refinement. DeepRM leverages initial coarse pose estimates to render synthetic images of target objects. The rendered images are then matched with the observed images to predict a rigid transform for updating the previous pose estimate. This process is repeated to incrementally refine the estimate at each iteration. The DeepRM architecture incorporates LSTM units to propagate information through each refinement step, significantly improving overall performance. In contrast to current 2-stage Perspective-n-Point based solutions, DeepRM is trained end-to-end, and uses a scalable backbone that can be tuned via a single parameter for accuracy and efficiency. During training, a multi-scale optical flow head is added to predict the optical flow between the observed and synthetic images. Optical flow prediction stabilizes the training process, and enforces the learning of features that are relevant to the task of pose estimation. Our results demonstrate that DeepRM achieves state-of-the-art performance on two widely accepted challenging datasets.
summary: Precise 6D pose estimation of rigid objects from RGB images is a critical but challenging task in robotics, augmented reality and human-computer interaction. To address this problem, we propose DeepRM, a novel recurrent network architecture for 6D pose refinement. DeepRM leverages initial coarse pose estimates to render synthetic images of target objects. The rendered images are then matched with the observed images to predict a rigid transform for updating the previous pose estimate. This process is repeated to incrementally refine the estimate at each iteration. The DeepRM architecture incorporates LSTM units to propagate information through each refinement step, significantly improving overall performance. In contrast to current 2-stage Perspective-n-Point based solutions, DeepRM is trained end-to-end, and uses a scalable backbone that can be tuned via a single parameter for accuracy and efficiency. During training, a multi-scale optical flow head is added to predict the optical flow between the observed and synthetic images. Optical flow prediction stabilizes the training process, and enforces the learning of features that are relevant to the task of pose estimation. Our results demonstrate that DeepRM achieves state-of-the-art performance on two widely accepted challenging datasets.
abstract_zh: 从 RGB 图像中精确估计刚性物体的 6D 姿态是机器人、增强现实和人机交互中一项关键但具有挑战性的任务。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 DeepRM，一种用于 6D 姿态细化的新型循环网络架构。 DeepRM 利用初始粗略姿态估计来渲染目标对象的合成图像。然后将渲染的图像与观察到的图像进行匹配，以预测刚性变换以更新先前的姿态估计。重复此过程以逐步细化每次迭代的估计。 DeepRM 架构结合了 LSTM 单元，通过每个细化步骤传播信息，从而显着提高整体性能。与当前基于 Perspective-n-Point 的 2 阶段解决方案相比，DeepRM 进行端到端训练，并使用可通过单个参数进行调整的可扩展主干，以提高准确性和效率。在训练过程中，添加多尺度光流头来预测观察图像和合成图像之间的光流。光流预测稳定了训练过程，并强制学习与姿态估计任务相关的特征。我们的结果表明 DeepRM 在两个广泛接受的具有挑战性的数据集上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeepRM，一种基于深度循环匹配的6D姿态细化方法，通过合成图像与真实图像的迭代匹配提升姿态估计精度。
AI.motivation: 现有6D姿态估计方法依赖传统两阶段PnP框架，存在效率低、难以端到端优化等问题，需更高效的深度学习解决方案。
AI.method: 采用LSTM循环网络架构，利用初始粗略姿态生成合成图像，通过光流匹配优化姿态参数，结合多尺度光流预测提升训练稳定性。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上达到当时最先进的6D姿态估计性能，验证了方法在精度与效率上的优势。
AI.conclusion: DeepRM通过端到端循环优化机制有效解决了姿态细化难题，为实际应用提供了高效可靠的解决方案。

authors_text: Subhrajyoti Maji,John Dingliana
title: Perceptually Optimized Color Selection for Visualization
title_zh: 视觉感知优化的颜色选择
comment: 2 pages, 4 figures, 1 table, Poster presented at IEEE Visualization Conference, Oct 21 - 26, 2018, Berlin, Germany
comments: 2 pages, 4 figures, 1 table, Poster presented at IEEE Visualization Conference, Oct 21 - 26, 2018, Berlin, Germany
abstract: We propose an approach, called the Equilibrium Distribution Model (EDM), for automatically selecting colors with optimum perceptual contrast for scientific visualization. Given any number of features that need to be emphasized in a visualization task, our approach derives evenly distributed points in the CIELAB color space to assign colors to the features so that the minimum Euclidean Distance among the colors are optimized. Our approach can assign colors with high perceptual contrast even for very high numbers of features, where other color selection methods typically fail. We compare our approach with the widely used Harmonic color selection scheme and demonstrate that while the harmonic scheme can achieve reasonable color contrast for visualizing up to 20 different features, our Equilibrium scheme provides significantly better contrast and achieves perceptible contrast for visualizing even up to 100 unique features.
summary: We propose an approach, called the Equilibrium Distribution Model (EDM), for automatically selecting colors with optimum perceptual contrast for scientific visualization. Given any number of features that need to be emphasized in a visualization task, our approach derives evenly distributed points in the CIELAB color space to assign colors to the features so that the minimum Euclidean Distance among the colors are optimized. Our approach can assign colors with high perceptual contrast even for very high numbers of features, where other color selection methods typically fail. We compare our approach with the widely used Harmonic color selection scheme and demonstrate that while the harmonic scheme can achieve reasonable color contrast for visualizing up to 20 different features, our Equilibrium scheme provides significantly better contrast and achieves perceptible contrast for visualizing even up to 100 unique features.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种称为平衡分布模型（EDM）的方法，用于自动选择具有最佳感知对比度的颜色以进行科学可视化。给定可视化任务中需要强调的任意数量的特征，我们的方法在 CIELAB 颜色空间中导出均匀分布的点，为特征分配颜色，从而优化颜色之间的最小欧几里得距离。即使对于大量特征，我们的方法也可以分配具有高感知对比度的颜色，而其他颜色选择方法通常会失败。我们将我们的方法与广泛使用的谐波颜色选择方案进行比较，并证明虽然谐波方案可以实现合理的颜色对比度，以可视化多达 20 个不同的特征，但我们的平衡方案提供了明显更好的对比度，并实现了可感知的对比度，甚至可以可视化多达 100 个独特的特征。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为均衡分布模型（EDM）的方法，用于在科学可视化中自动选择具有最佳感知对比度的颜色。
AI.motivation: 传统颜色选择方法（如谐波方案）在处理大量特征时对比度不足，难以满足高数量特征的可视化需求。
AI.method: 在CIELAB颜色空间中通过优化颜色点的欧几里得距离分布，生成感知对比度更高的颜色分配方案。
AI.result: EDM方案在可视化最多100个特征时仍能保持显著感知对比度，优于传统谐波方案的20个特征限制。
AI.conclusion: EDM模型通过优化颜色空间分布，有效解决了高数量特征可视化中的对比度问题，优于现有方法。

authors_text: Jianfei Yang,Xiangyu Peng,Kai Wang,Zheng Zhu,Jiashi Feng,Lihua Xie,Yang You
title: Divide to Adapt: Mitigating Confirmation Bias for Domain Adaptation of Black-Box Predictors
title_zh: 划分以适应：减轻黑盒预测器域适应的确认偏差
comment: A black-box model adaptation approach that proposes divide-to-adapt to suppress the confirmation bias
comments: A black-box model adaptation approach that proposes divide-to-adapt to suppress the confirmation bias
abstract: Domain Adaptation of Black-box Predictors (DABP) aims to learn a model on an unlabeled target domain supervised by a black-box predictor trained on a source domain. It does not require access to both the source-domain data and the predictor parameters, thus addressing the data privacy and portability issues of standard domain adaptation. Existing DABP approaches mostly rely on model distillation from the black-box predictor, \emph{i.e.}, training the model with its noisy target-domain predictions, which however inevitably introduces the confirmation bias accumulated from the prediction noises. To mitigate such bias, we propose a new method, named BETA, to incorporate knowledge distillation and noisy label learning into one coherent framework. This is enabled by a new divide-to-adapt strategy. BETA divides the target domain into an easy-to-adapt subdomain with less noise and a hard-to-adapt subdomain. Then it deploys mutually-teaching twin networks to filter the predictor errors for each other and improve them progressively, from the easy to hard subdomains. As such, BETA effectively purifies the noisy labels and reduces error accumulation. We theoretically show that the target error of BETA is minimized by decreasing the noise ratio of the subdomains. Extensive experiments demonstrate BETA outperforms existing methods on all DABP benchmarks, and is even comparable with the standard domain adaptation methods that use the source-domain data.
summary: Domain Adaptation of Black-box Predictors (DABP) aims to learn a model on an unlabeled target domain supervised by a black-box predictor trained on a source domain. It does not require access to both the source-domain data and the predictor parameters, thus addressing the data privacy and portability issues of standard domain adaptation. Existing DABP approaches mostly rely on model distillation from the black-box predictor, \emph{i.e.}, training the model with its noisy target-domain predictions, which however inevitably introduces the confirmation bias accumulated from the prediction noises. To mitigate such bias, we propose a new method, named BETA, to incorporate knowledge distillation and noisy label learning into one coherent framework. This is enabled by a new divide-to-adapt strategy. BETA divides the target domain into an easy-to-adapt subdomain with less noise and a hard-to-adapt subdomain. Then it deploys mutually-teaching twin networks to filter the predictor errors for each other and improve them progressively, from the easy to hard subdomains. As such, BETA effectively purifies the noisy labels and reduces error accumulation. We theoretically show that the target error of BETA is minimized by decreasing the noise ratio of the subdomains. Extensive experiments demonstrate BETA outperforms existing methods on all DABP benchmarks, and is even comparable with the standard domain adaptation methods that use the source-domain data.
abstract_zh: 黑盒预测器的域适应（DABP）旨在学习未标记目标域上的模型，该模型由在源域上训练的黑盒预测器监督。它不需要访问源域数据和预测参数，从而解决了标准域适应的数据隐私和可移植性问题。现有的 DABP 方法主要依赖于黑盒预测器 \emph{i.e.} 的模型蒸馏，用其噪声目标域预测来训练模型，但这不可避免地引入了从预测噪声中积累的确认偏差。为了减轻这种偏差，我们提出了一种名为 BETA 的新方法，将知识蒸馏和噪声标签学习纳入一个连贯的框架中。这是通过新的划分适应策略实现的。 BETA将目标域分为噪声较小的易适应子域和难适应子域。然后，它部署相互教学的孪生网络来过滤彼此的预测误差，并从简单到困难的子域逐步改进它们。因此，BETA 有效地净化了噪声标签并减少了错误累积。我们从理论上证明，BETA 的目标误差可以通过降低子域的噪声比来最小化。大量实验表明，BETA 在所有 DABP 基准上都优于现有方法，甚至可以与使用源域数据的标准域自适应方法相媲美。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BETA方法，通过划分目标领域并利用双网络相互教学，解决黑盒预测器领域适应中的确认偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 现有领域适应方法依赖黑盒预测器的噪声标签进行知识蒸馏，导致确认偏差累积，影响模型性能。
AI.method: BETA将目标领域划分为易适应和难适应子领域，通过双网络相互纠正预测错误，从易到难逐步优化。
AI.result: 实验表明BETA在所有DABP基准测试中优于现有方法，且性能接近使用源领域数据的标准领域适应方法。
AI.conclusion: BETA通过减少子领域噪声比例理论保证误差最小化，有效净化噪声标签并提升领域适应效果。

search_text: Divide to Adapt: Mitigating Confirmation Bias for Domain Adaptation of Black-Box Predictors 划分以适应：减轻黑盒预测器域适应的确认偏差 Domain Adaptation of Black-box Predictors (DABP) aims to learn a model on an unlabeled target domain supervised by a black-box predictor trained on a source domain. It does not require access to both the source-domain data and the predictor parameters, thus addressing the data privacy and portability issues of standard domain adaptation. Existing DABP approaches mostly rely on model distillation from the black-box predictor, \emph{i.e.}, training the model with its noisy target-domain predictions, which however inevitably introduces the confirmation bias accumulated from the prediction noises. To mitigate such bias, we propose a new method, named BETA, to incorporate knowledge distillation and noisy label learning into one coherent framework. This is enabled by a new divide-to-adapt strategy. BETA divides the target domain into an easy-to-adapt subdomain with less noise and a hard-to-adapt subdomain. Then it deploys mutually-teaching twin networks to filter the predictor errors for each other and improve them progressively, from the easy to hard subdomains. As such, BETA effectively purifies the noisy labels and reduces error accumulation. We theoretically show that the target error of BETA is minimized by decreasing the noise ratio of the subdomains. Extensive experiments demonstrate BETA outperforms existing methods on all DABP benchmarks, and is even comparable with the standard domain adaptation methods that use the source-domain data. 黑盒预测器的域适应（DABP）旨在学习未标记目标域上的模型，该模型由在源域上训练的黑盒预测器监督。它不需要访问源域数据和预测参数，从而解决了标准域适应的数据隐私和可移植性问题。现有的 DABP 方法主要依赖于黑盒预测器 \emph{i.e.} 的模型蒸馏，用其噪声目标域预测来训练模型，但这不可避免地引入了从预测噪声中积累的确认偏差。为了减轻这种偏差，我们提出了一种名为 BETA 的新方法，将知识蒸馏和噪声标签学习纳入一个连贯的框架中。这是通过新的划分适应策略实现的。 BETA将目标域分为噪声较小的易适应子域和难适应子域。然后，它部署相互教学的孪生网络来过滤彼此的预测误差，并从简单到困难的子域逐步改进它们。因此，BETA 有效地净化了噪声标签并减少了错误累积。我们从理论上证明，BETA 的目标误差可以通过降低子域的噪声比来最小化。大量实验表明，BETA 在所有 DABP 基准上都优于现有方法，甚至可以与使用源域数据的标准域自适应方法相媲美。 本文提出BETA方法，通过划分目标领域并利用双网络相互教学，解决黑盒预测器领域适应中的确认偏差问题。 Jianfei Yang,Xiangyu Peng,Kai Wang,Zheng Zhu,Jiashi Feng,Lihua Xie,Yang You cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Chaofeng Wang,Sarah Elizabeth Antos,Jessica Grayson Gosling Goldsmith,Luis Miguel Triveno
title: Visual Perception of Building and Household Vulnerability from Streets
title_zh: 街道上建筑物和家庭脆弱性的视觉感知
abstract: In developing countries, building codes often are outdated or not enforced. As a result, a large portion of the housing stock is substandard and vulnerable to natural hazards and climate related events. Assessing housing quality is key to inform public policies and private investments. Standard assessment methods are typically carried out only on a sample / pilot basis due to its high costs or, when complete, tend to be obsolete due to the lack of compliance with recommended updating standards or not accessible to most users with the level of detail needed to take key policy or business decisions. Thus, we propose an evaluation framework that is cost-efficient for first capture and future updates, and is reliable at the block level. The framework complements existing work of using street view imagery combined with deep learning to automatically extract building information to assist the identification of housing characteristics. We then check its potential for scalability and higher level reliability. For that purpose, we create an index, which synthesises the highest possible level of granularity of data at the housing unit and at the household level at the block level, and assess whether the predictions made by our model could be used to approximate vulnerability conditions with a lower budget and in selected areas. Our results indicated that the predictions from the images are clearly correlated with the index.
summary: In developing countries, building codes often are outdated or not enforced. As a result, a large portion of the housing stock is substandard and vulnerable to natural hazards and climate related events. Assessing housing quality is key to inform public policies and private investments. Standard assessment methods are typically carried out only on a sample / pilot basis due to its high costs or, when complete, tend to be obsolete due to the lack of compliance with recommended updating standards or not accessible to most users with the level of detail needed to take key policy or business decisions. Thus, we propose an evaluation framework that is cost-efficient for first capture and future updates, and is reliable at the block level. The framework complements existing work of using street view imagery combined with deep learning to automatically extract building information to assist the identification of housing characteristics. We then check its potential for scalability and higher level reliability. For that purpose, we create an index, which synthesises the highest possible level of granularity of data at the housing unit and at the household level at the block level, and assess whether the predictions made by our model could be used to approximate vulnerability conditions with a lower budget and in selected areas. Our results indicated that the predictions from the images are clearly correlated with the index.
abstract_zh: 在发展中国家，建筑规范往往已经过时或不被执行。因此，很大一部分住房不合格，容易受到自然灾害和气候相关事件的影响。评估住房质量是为公共政策和私人投资提供信息的关键。由于成本高昂，标准评估方法通常仅在样本/试点的基础上进行，或者在完成后，由于不符合建议的更新标准，或者大多数用户无法获得制定关键政策或业务决策所需的详细信息，因此往往会过时。因此，我们提出了一个评估框架，该框架对于首次捕获和未来更新来说具有成本效益，并且在块级别上是可靠的。该框架补充了使用街景图像与深度学习相结合自动提取建筑信息以协助识别住房特征的现有工作。然后我们检查其可扩展性和更高级别可靠性的潜力。为此，我们创建了一个索引，该索引综合了住房单元和街区级别家庭级别的尽可能高的数据粒度，并评估我们的模型所做的预测是否可以用于以较低的预算和选定的区域来估计脆弱性状况。我们的结果表明，图像的预测与索引明显相关。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于街景图像和深度学习的框架，用于评估发展中国家建筑与家庭的脆弱性。
AI.motivation: 传统住房质量评估方法成本高、更新滞后，难以支持政策制定与投资决策，需更高效可靠的解决方案。
AI.method: 结合街景图像与深度学习自动提取建筑信息，构建包含住房单元和家庭层面细节的指标，并验证模型预测的可扩展性与可靠性。
AI.result: 模型预测结果与脆弱性指标呈现显著相关性，表明图像分析可有效替代传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为低成本、高精度评估住房脆弱性提供了可行方案，支持政策制定与灾害预防。

authors_text: Shashank Goel,Hritik Bansal,Sumit Bhatia,Ryan A. Rossi,Vishwa Vinay,Aditya Grover
title: CyCLIP: Cyclic Contrastive Language-Image Pretraining
title_zh: CyCLIP：循环对比语言-图像预训练
comment: 19 pages, 13 tables, 6 figures, Oral at NeuRIPS 2022
comments: 19 pages, 13 tables, 6 figures, Oral at NeuRIPS 2022
abstract: Recent advances in contrastive representation learning over paired image-text data have led to models such as CLIP that achieve state-of-the-art performance for zero-shot classification and distributional robustness. Such models typically require joint reasoning in the image and text representation spaces for downstream inference tasks. Contrary to prior beliefs, we demonstrate that the image and text representations learned via a standard contrastive objective are not interchangeable and can lead to inconsistent downstream predictions. To mitigate this issue, we formalize consistency and propose CyCLIP, a framework for contrastive representation learning that explicitly optimizes for the learned representations to be geometrically consistent in the image and text space. In particular, we show that consistent representations can be learned by explicitly symmetrizing (a) the similarity between the two mismatched image-text pairs (cross-modal consistency); and (b) the similarity between the image-image pair and the text-text pair (in-modal consistency). Empirically, we show that the improved consistency in CyCLIP translates to significant gains over CLIP, with gains ranging from 10%-24% for zero-shot classification accuracy on standard benchmarks (CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, ImageNet1K) and 10%-27% for robustness to various natural distribution shifts. The code is available at https://github.com/goel-shashank/CyCLIP.
summary: Recent advances in contrastive representation learning over paired image-text data have led to models such as CLIP that achieve state-of-the-art performance for zero-shot classification and distributional robustness. Such models typically require joint reasoning in the image and text representation spaces for downstream inference tasks. Contrary to prior beliefs, we demonstrate that the image and text representations learned via a standard contrastive objective are not interchangeable and can lead to inconsistent downstream predictions. To mitigate this issue, we formalize consistency and propose CyCLIP, a framework for contrastive representation learning that explicitly optimizes for the learned representations to be geometrically consistent in the image and text space. In particular, we show that consistent representations can be learned by explicitly symmetrizing (a) the similarity between the two mismatched image-text pairs (cross-modal consistency); and (b) the similarity between the image-image pair and the text-text pair (in-modal consistency). Empirically, we show that the improved consistency in CyCLIP translates to significant gains over CLIP, with gains ranging from 10%-24% for zero-shot classification accuracy on standard benchmarks (CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, ImageNet1K) and 10%-27% for robustness to various natural distribution shifts. The code is available at https://github.com/goel-shashank/CyCLIP.
abstract_zh: 配对图像-文本数据的对比表示学习的最新进展催生了诸如 CLIP 之类的模型，这些模型在零样本分类和分布鲁棒性方面实现了最先进的性能。此类模型通常需要在图像和文本表示空间中进行联合推理以进行下游推理任务。与先前的信念相反，我们证明通过标准对比目标学习的图像和文本表示不可互换，并且可能导致下游预测不一致。为了缓解这个问题，我们形式化了一致性并提出了 CyCLIP，这是一个用于对比表示学习的框架，它明确优化了学习到的表示，使其在图像和文本空间中保持几何一致。特别是，我们表明可以通过显式对称化（a）两个不匹配的图像文本对之间的相似性（跨模式一致性）来学习一致的表示； （b）图像-图像对和文本-文本对之间的相似性（模态一致性）。根据经验，我们表明 CyCLIP 中一致性的提高意味着相对于 CLIP 的显着增益，标准基准（CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100、ImageNet1K）上的零样本分类精度增益范围为 10%-24%，对各种自然分布变化的鲁棒性增益范围为 10%-27%。代码可在 https://github.com/goel-shashank/CyCLIP 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CyCLIP框架，通过优化图像与文本表示的一致性，提升对比学习模型在零样本分类和分布鲁棒性上的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习模型（如CLIP）的图像与文本表示不可互换，导致下游任务预测不一致，需解决表示空间几何一致性问题。
AI.method: 通过显式对称化跨模态（图像-文本对相似性）和内模态（图像-图像与文本-文本对相似性）的相似度，实现几何一致性优化。
AI.result: 在标准基准测试中，零样本分类准确率提升10%-24%，分布偏移鲁棒性提升10%-27%。
AI.conclusion: CyCLIP通过增强表示一致性，显著提升了对比学习模型的性能和鲁棒性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出CyCLIP框架，通过优化图像与文本表示的一致性，提升对比学习模型在零样本分类和分布鲁棒性上的性能。
ai_content.motivation: 现有对比学习模型（如CLIP）的图像与文本表示不可互换，导致下游任务预测不一致，需解决表示空间几何一致性问题。
ai_content.method: 通过显式对称化跨模态（图像-文本对相似性）和内模态（图像-图像与文本-文本对相似性）的相似度，实现几何一致性优化。
ai_content.result: 在标准基准测试中，零样本分类准确率提升10%-24%，分布偏移鲁棒性提升10%-27%。
ai_content.conclusion: CyCLIP通过增强表示一致性，显著提升了对比学习模型的性能和鲁棒性。

search_text: CyCLIP: Cyclic Contrastive Language-Image Pretraining CyCLIP：循环对比语言-图像预训练 Recent advances in contrastive representation learning over paired image-text data have led to models such as CLIP that achieve state-of-the-art performance for zero-shot classification and distributional robustness. Such models typically require joint reasoning in the image and text representation spaces for downstream inference tasks. Contrary to prior beliefs, we demonstrate that the image and text representations learned via a standard contrastive objective are not interchangeable and can lead to inconsistent downstream predictions. To mitigate this issue, we formalize consistency and propose CyCLIP, a framework for contrastive representation learning that explicitly optimizes for the learned representations to be geometrically consistent in the image and text space. In particular, we show that consistent representations can be learned by explicitly symmetrizing (a) the similarity between the two mismatched image-text pairs (cross-modal consistency); and (b) the similarity between the image-image pair and the text-text pair (in-modal consistency). Empirically, we show that the improved consistency in CyCLIP translates to significant gains over CLIP, with gains ranging from 10%-24% for zero-shot classification accuracy on standard benchmarks (CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, ImageNet1K) and 10%-27% for robustness to various natural distribution shifts. The code is available at https://github.com/goel-shashank/CyCLIP. 配对图像-文本数据的对比表示学习的最新进展催生了诸如 CLIP 之类的模型，这些模型在零样本分类和分布鲁棒性方面实现了最先进的性能。此类模型通常需要在图像和文本表示空间中进行联合推理以进行下游推理任务。与先前的信念相反，我们证明通过标准对比目标学习的图像和文本表示不可互换，并且可能导致下游预测不一致。为了缓解这个问题，我们形式化了一致性并提出了 CyCLIP，这是一个用于对比表示学习的框架，它明确优化了学习到的表示，使其在图像和文本空间中保持几何一致。特别是，我们表明可以通过显式对称化（a）两个不匹配的图像文本对之间的相似性（跨模式一致性）来学习一致的表示； （b）图像-图像对和文本-文本对之间的相似性（模态一致性）。根据经验，我们表明 CyCLIP 中一致性的提高意味着相对于 CLIP 的显着增益，标准基准（CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100、ImageNet1K）上的零样本分类精度增益范围为 10%-24%，对各种自然分布变化的鲁棒性增益范围为 10%-27%。代码可在 https://github.com/goel-shashank/CyCLIP 获取。 本文提出CyCLIP框架，通过优化图像与文本表示的一致性，提升对比学习模型在零样本分类和分布鲁棒性上的性能。 Shashank Goel,Hritik Bansal,Sumit Bhatia,Ryan A. Rossi,Vishwa Vinay,Aditya Grover cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Longzhen Yang,Yihang Liu,Yitao Peng,Lianghua He
title: Variational Transformer: A Framework Beyond the Trade-off between Accuracy and Diversity for Image Captioning
title_zh: 变分变换器：超越图像字幕准确性和多样性之间权衡的框架
abstract: Accuracy and Diversity are two essential metrizable manifestations in generating natural and semantically correct captions. Many efforts have been made to enhance one of them with another decayed due to the trade-off gap. In this work, we will show that the inferior standard of accuracy draws from human annotations (leave-one-out) are not appropriate for machine-generated captions. To improve diversity with a solid accuracy performance, we exploited a novel Variational Transformer framework. By introducing the "Invisible Information Prior" and the "Auto-selectable GMM", we instruct the encoder to learn the precise language information and object relation in different scenes for accuracy assurance. By introducing the "Range-Median Reward" baseline, we retain more diverse candidates with higher rewards during the RL-based training process for diversity assurance. Experiments show that our method achieves the simultaneous promotion of accuracy (CIDEr) and diversity (self-CIDEr), up to 1.1 and 4.8 percent. Also, our method got the most similar performance of the semantic retrieval compared to human annotations, with 50.3 (50.6 of human) for R@1(i2t).
summary: Accuracy and Diversity are two essential metrizable manifestations in generating natural and semantically correct captions. Many efforts have been made to enhance one of them with another decayed due to the trade-off gap. In this work, we will show that the inferior standard of accuracy draws from human annotations (leave-one-out) are not appropriate for machine-generated captions. To improve diversity with a solid accuracy performance, we exploited a novel Variational Transformer framework. By introducing the "Invisible Information Prior" and the "Auto-selectable GMM", we instruct the encoder to learn the precise language information and object relation in different scenes for accuracy assurance. By introducing the "Range-Median Reward" baseline, we retain more diverse candidates with higher rewards during the RL-based training process for diversity assurance. Experiments show that our method achieves the simultaneous promotion of accuracy (CIDEr) and diversity (self-CIDEr), up to 1.1 and 4.8 percent. Also, our method got the most similar performance of the semantic retrieval compared to human annotations, with 50.3 (50.6 of human) for R@1(i2t).
abstract_zh: 准确性和多样性是生成自然且语义正确的字幕的两个重要的可度量化表现。人们已经做出了许多努力来增强其中一项，而另一项则由于权衡差距而遭到削弱。在这项工作中，我们将证明，来自人类注释（留一法）的较低准确度标准不适合机器生成的字幕。为了以可靠的准确性性能提高多样性，我们开发了一种新颖的变分变压器框架。通过引入“不可见信息先验”和“自动选择GMM”，我们指导编码器学习不同场景中精确的语言信息和对象关系，以保证准确性。通过引入“范围中值奖励”基线，我们在基于强化学习的训练过程中以更高的奖励保留了更多多样化的候选人，以保证多样性。实验表明，我们的方法实现了准确性（CIDEr）和多样性（self-CIDEr）的同时提升，分别达到1.1%和4.8%。此外，与人类注释相比，我们的方法获得了最相似的语义检索性能，R@1(i2t) 为 50.3（人类的 50.6）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Variational Transformer的新框架，旨在同时提升图像描述生成任务中准确性和多样性的表现。
AI.motivation: 传统的图像描述生成方法在提升准确性的同时往往会牺牲多样性，或者反之，而本文认为这是由于使用人类标注数据作为评估标准所导致的问题。
AI.method: 本文通过引入“Invisible Information Prior”和“Auto-selectable GMM”来确保准确性，并通过“Range-Median Reward”基线在基于强化学习的训练过程中保留更多多样性的候选结果。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在准确性和多样性上分别提升了1.1%和4.8%，并且在语义检索任务中表现接近人类标注的水平。
AI.conclusion: Variational Transformer框架成功突破了准确性与多样性之间的权衡，为图像描述生成任务提供了新的解决方案。

authors_text: Berk Guler,Pouya P. Niaz,Alireza Madani,Yusuf Aydin,Cagatay Basdogan
title: An adaptive admittance controller for collaborative drilling with a robot based on subtask classification via deep learning
title_zh: 基于深度学习子任务分类的机器人协同钻孔自适应导纳控制器
abstract: In this paper, we propose a supervised learning approach based on an Artificial Neural Network (ANN) model for real-time classification of subtasks in a physical human-robot interaction (pHRI) task involving contact with a stiff environment. In this regard, we consider three subtasks for a given pHRI task: Idle, Driving, and Contact. Based on this classification, the parameters of an admittance controller that regulates the interaction between human and robot are adjusted adaptively in real time to make the robot more transparent to the operator (i.e. less resistant) during the Driving phase and more stable during the Contact phase. The Idle phase is primarily used to detect the initiation of task. Experimental results have shown that the ANN model can learn to detect the subtasks under different admittance controller conditions with an accuracy of 98% for 12 participants. Finally, we show that the admittance adaptation based on the proposed subtask classifier leads to 20% lower human effort (i.e. higher transparency) in the Driving phase and 25% lower oscillation amplitude (i.e. higher stability) during drilling in the Contact phase compared to an admittance controller with fixed parameters.
summary: In this paper, we propose a supervised learning approach based on an Artificial Neural Network (ANN) model for real-time classification of subtasks in a physical human-robot interaction (pHRI) task involving contact with a stiff environment. In this regard, we consider three subtasks for a given pHRI task: Idle, Driving, and Contact. Based on this classification, the parameters of an admittance controller that regulates the interaction between human and robot are adjusted adaptively in real time to make the robot more transparent to the operator (i.e. less resistant) during the Driving phase and more stable during the Contact phase. The Idle phase is primarily used to detect the initiation of task. Experimental results have shown that the ANN model can learn to detect the subtasks under different admittance controller conditions with an accuracy of 98% for 12 participants. Finally, we show that the admittance adaptation based on the proposed subtask classifier leads to 20% lower human effort (i.e. higher transparency) in the Driving phase and 25% lower oscillation amplitude (i.e. higher stability) during drilling in the Contact phase compared to an admittance controller with fixed parameters.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于人工神经网络（ANN）模型的监督学习方法，用于对涉及与刚性环境接触的物理人机交互（pHRI）任务中的子任务进行实时分类。在这方面，我们考虑给定 pHRI 任务的三个子任务：空闲、驾驶和接触。基于这种分类，实时自适应地调整调节人与机器人之间交互的导纳控制器的参数，以使机器人在驱动阶段对操作员更加透明（即阻力较小），在接触阶段更加稳定。空闲阶段主要用于检测任务的启动。实验结果表明，ANN 模型可以学习检测不同导纳控制器条件下的子任务，对于 12 名参与者，准确率达到 98%。最后，我们表明，与具有固定参数的导纳控制器相比，基于所提出的子任务分类器的导纳自适应可以在驱动阶段降低 20% 的人力（即更高的透明度），并在接触阶段的钻井过程中降低 25% 的振荡幅度（即更高的稳定性）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的子任务分类方法，通过实时调整阻抗控制器参数，实现人机协作钻孔任务中机器人透明性与稳定性的优化。
AI.motivation: 传统固定参数阻抗控制器难以适应人机协作中不同子任务（如空闲、驱动、接触）对机器人透明性与稳定性的动态需求，导致操作效率与安全性不足。
AI.method: 采用监督学习构建人工神经网络（ANN）模型，实时分类物理人机交互任务中的三个子任务（空闲、驱动、接触），并据此动态调整阻抗控制器参数。
AI.result: ANN模型在12名参与者实验中实现98%分类准确率，驱动阶段人力消耗降低20%，接触阶段钻孔振幅减少25%。
AI.conclusion: 基于子任务分类的自适应阻抗控制显著提升了人机协作钻孔任务的透明性与稳定性，验证了深度学习在动态人机交互中的有效性。

conclusion: 基于子任务分类的自适应阻抗控制显著提升了人机协作钻孔任务的透明性与稳定性，验证了深度学习在动态人机交互中的有效性。
search_text: An adaptive admittance controller for collaborative drilling with a robot based on subtask classification via deep learning 基于深度学习子任务分类的机器人协同钻孔自适应导纳控制器 In this paper, we propose a supervised learning approach based on an Artificial Neural Network (ANN) model for real-time classification of subtasks in a physical human-robot interaction (pHRI) task involving contact with a stiff environment. In this regard, we consider three subtasks for a given pHRI task: Idle, Driving, and Contact. Based on this classification, the parameters of an admittance controller that regulates the interaction between human and robot are adjusted adaptively in real time to make the robot more transparent to the operator (i.e. less resistant) during the Driving phase and more stable during the Contact phase. The Idle phase is primarily used to detect the initiation of task. Experimental results have shown that the ANN model can learn to detect the subtasks under different admittance controller conditions with an accuracy of 98% for 12 participants. Finally, we show that the admittance adaptation based on the proposed subtask classifier leads to 20% lower human effort (i.e. higher transparency) in the Driving phase and 25% lower oscillation amplitude (i.e. higher stability) during drilling in the Contact phase compared to an admittance controller with fixed parameters. 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于人工神经网络（ANN）模型的监督学习方法，用于对涉及与刚性环境接触的物理人机交互（pHRI）任务中的子任务进行实时分类。在这方面，我们考虑给定 pHRI 任务的三个子任务：空闲、驾驶和接触。基于这种分类，实时自适应地调整调节人与机器人之间交互的导纳控制器的参数，以使机器人在驱动阶段对操作员更加透明（即阻力较小），在接触阶段更加稳定。空闲阶段主要用于检测任务的启动。实验结果表明，ANN 模型可以学习检测不同导纳控制器条件下的子任务，对于 12 名参与者，准确率达到 98%。最后，我们表明，与具有固定参数的导纳控制器相比，基于所提出的子任务分类器的导纳自适应可以在驱动阶段降低 20% 的人力（即更高的透明度），并在接触阶段的钻井过程中降低 25% 的振荡幅度（即更高的稳定性）。 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的子任务分类方法，通过实时调整阻抗控制器参数，实现人机协作钻孔任务中机器人透明性与稳定性的优化。 Berk Guler,Pouya P. Niaz,Alireza Madani,Yusuf Aydin,Cagatay Basdogan cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Chhavi Sharma,Vishnu Narayanan,P. Balamurugan
title: Stochastic Gradient Methods with Compressed Communication for Decentralized Saddle Point Problems
title_zh: 具有压缩通信的随机梯度法解决分散鞍点问题
abstract: We develop two compression based stochastic gradient algorithms to solve a class of non-smooth strongly convex-strongly concave saddle-point problems in a decentralized setting (without a central server). Our first algorithm is a Restart-based Decentralized Proximal Stochastic Gradient method with Compression (C-RDPSG) for general stochastic settings. We provide rigorous theoretical guarantees of C-RDPSG with gradient computation complexity and communication complexity of order $\mathcal{O}( (1+δ)^4 \frac{1}{L^2}{κ_f^2}κ_g^2 \frac{1}ε )$, to achieve an $ε$-accurate saddle-point solution, where $δ$ denotes the compression factor, $κ_f$ and $κ_g$ denote respectively the condition numbers of objective function and communication graph, and $L$ denotes the smoothness parameter of the smooth part of the objective function. Next, we present a Decentralized Proximal Stochastic Variance Reduced Gradient algorithm with Compression (C-DPSVRG) for finite sum setting which exhibits gradient computation complexity and communication complexity of order $\mathcal{O} \left((1+δ) \max \{κ_f^2, \sqrtδκ^2_fκ_g,κ_g \} \log\left(\frac{1}ε\right) \right)$. Extensive numerical experiments show competitive performance of the proposed algorithms and provide support to the theoretical results obtained.
summary: We develop two compression based stochastic gradient algorithms to solve a class of non-smooth strongly convex-strongly concave saddle-point problems in a decentralized setting (without a central server). Our first algorithm is a Restart-based Decentralized Proximal Stochastic Gradient method with Compression (C-RDPSG) for general stochastic settings. We provide rigorous theoretical guarantees of C-RDPSG with gradient computation complexity and communication complexity of order $\mathcal{O}( (1+δ)^4 \frac{1}{L^2}{κ_f^2}κ_g^2 \frac{1}ε )$, to achieve an $ε$-accurate saddle-point solution, where $δ$ denotes the compression factor, $κ_f$ and $κ_g$ denote respectively the condition numbers of objective function and communication graph, and $L$ denotes the smoothness parameter of the smooth part of the objective function. Next, we present a Decentralized Proximal Stochastic Variance Reduced Gradient algorithm with Compression (C-DPSVRG) for finite sum setting which exhibits gradient computation complexity and communication complexity of order $\mathcal{O} \left((1+δ) \max \{κ_f^2, \sqrtδκ^2_fκ_g,κ_g \} \log\left(\frac{1}ε\right) \right)$. Extensive numerical experiments show competitive performance of the proposed algorithms and provide support to the theoretical results obtained.
abstract_zh: 我们开发了两种基于压缩的随机梯度算法来解决去中心化设置（没有中央服务器）中的一类非光滑强凸强凹鞍点问题。我们的第一个算法是用于一般随机设置的基于重启的去中心化近端随机梯度压缩方法（C-RDPSG）。我们为梯度计算复杂度和通信复杂度为$\mathcal{O}( (1+δ)^4 \frac{1}{L^2}{κ_f^2}κ_g^2 \frac{1}ε )$的C-RDPSG提供了严格的理论保证，以实现$ε$精确的鞍点解，其中$δ$表示压缩因子，$κ_f$和$κ_g$分别表示目标函数和通信的条件数图形，$L$表示目标函数平滑部分的平滑参数。接下来，我们提出了一种用于有限和设置的分散式近端随机方差减少梯度算法（C-DPSVRG），其梯度计算复杂度和通信复杂度为 $\mathcal{O} \left((1+δ) \max \{κ_f^2, \sqrtδκ^2_fκ_g,κ_g \} \log\left(\frac{1}ε\right) \right)$。大量的数值实验显示了所提出的算法的竞争性能，并为所获得的理论结果提供了支持。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种基于压缩通信的随机梯度算法，用于解决去中心化设置下的非光滑强凸-强凹鞍点问题。
AI.motivation: 在去中心化分布式优化中，节点间频繁通信会导致高延迟和带宽消耗，需通过压缩通信降低开销。
AI.method: 设计了两种算法：基于重启的压缩去中心化近端随机梯度法（C-RDPSG）和压缩去中心化近端方差缩减随机梯度法（C-DPSVRG），分别适用于一般随机设置和有限和设置，并分析其计算与通信复杂度。
AI.result: 理论证明C-RDPSG和C-DPSVRG的梯度计算与通信复杂度分别为$\\mathcal{O}((1+δ)^4 \ rac{1}{L^2}κ_f^2κ_g^2 \ rac{1}{ε})$和$\\mathcal{O}((1+δ) \\max\\{κ_f^2, \\sqrt{δ}κ_f^2κ_g, κ_g\\} \\log(\ rac{1}{ε}))$，实验验证了算法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的压缩通信算法在理论分析和实验上均表现良好，为去中心化鞍点问题提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Qi Zheng,Chaoyue Wang,Dadong Wang,Dacheng Tao
title: Visual Superordinate Abstraction for Robust Concept Learning
title_zh: 用于鲁棒概念学习的视觉高级抽象
abstract: Concept learning constructs visual representations that are connected to linguistic semantics, which is fundamental to vision-language tasks. Although promising progress has been made, existing concept learners are still vulnerable to attribute perturbations and out-of-distribution compositions during inference. We ascribe the bottleneck to a failure of exploring the intrinsic semantic hierarchy of visual concepts, e.g. \{red, blue,...\} $\in$ `color' subspace yet cube $\in$ `shape'. In this paper, we propose a visual superordinate abstraction framework for explicitly modeling semantic-aware visual subspaces (i.e. visual superordinates). With only natural visual question answering data, our model first acquires the semantic hierarchy from a linguistic view, and then explores mutually exclusive visual superordinates under the guidance of linguistic hierarchy. In addition, a quasi-center visual concept clustering and a superordinate shortcut learning schemes are proposed to enhance the discrimination and independence of concepts within each visual superordinate. Experiments demonstrate the superiority of the proposed framework under diverse settings, which increases the overall answering accuracy relatively by 7.5\% on reasoning with perturbations and 15.6\% on compositional generalization tests.
summary: Concept learning constructs visual representations that are connected to linguistic semantics, which is fundamental to vision-language tasks. Although promising progress has been made, existing concept learners are still vulnerable to attribute perturbations and out-of-distribution compositions during inference. We ascribe the bottleneck to a failure of exploring the intrinsic semantic hierarchy of visual concepts, e.g. \{red, blue,...\} $\in$ `color' subspace yet cube $\in$ `shape'. In this paper, we propose a visual superordinate abstraction framework for explicitly modeling semantic-aware visual subspaces (i.e. visual superordinates). With only natural visual question answering data, our model first acquires the semantic hierarchy from a linguistic view, and then explores mutually exclusive visual superordinates under the guidance of linguistic hierarchy. In addition, a quasi-center visual concept clustering and a superordinate shortcut learning schemes are proposed to enhance the discrimination and independence of concepts within each visual superordinate. Experiments demonstrate the superiority of the proposed framework under diverse settings, which increases the overall answering accuracy relatively by 7.5\% on reasoning with perturbations and 15.6\% on compositional generalization tests.
abstract_zh: 概念学习构建与语言语义相关的视觉表示，这是视觉语言任务的基础。尽管已经取得了可喜的进展，但现有的概念学习器在推理过程中仍然容易受到属性扰动和分布外组合的影响。我们将瓶颈归因于未能探索视觉概念的内在语义层次结构，例如\{红色，蓝色，...\} $\in$“颜色”子空间，而立方体$\in$“形状”。在本文中，我们提出了一种视觉上位抽象框架，用于显式建模语义感知的视觉子空间（即视觉上位）。仅使用自然视觉问答数据，我们的模型首先从语言学角度获取语义层次结构，然后在语言层次结构的指导下探索互斥的视觉上级。此外，还提出了准中心视觉概念聚类和上位快捷学习方案，以增强每个视觉上位内概念的辨别力和独立性。实验证明了所提出的框架在不同设置下的优越性，在扰动推理上的整体回答精度相对提高了 7.5%，在组合泛化测试上相对提高了 15.6%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种视觉超ordinate抽象框架，通过建模语义感知的视觉子空间来提升概念学习的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有概念学习模型在推理时易受属性扰动和分布外组合影响，原因在于未充分探索视觉概念的内在语义层次结构。
AI.method: 基于自然视觉问答数据，从语言视角获取语义层次，指导探索互斥的视觉超ordinate子空间，并引入准中心聚类和超ordinate快捷学习方案增强概念区分性。
AI.result: 在扰动推理和组合泛化测试中分别提升7.5%和15.6%的答题准确率。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过显式建模语义层次结构，有效提升了视觉-语言任务中概念学习的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

With only natural visual question answering data, our model first acquires the semantic hierarchy from a linguistic view, and then explores mutually exclusive visual superordinates under the guidance of linguistic hierarchy.
