Experiments demonstrate the superiority of the proposed framework under diverse settings, which increases the overall answering accuracy relatively by 7.5\% on reasoning with perturbations and 15.6\% on compositional generalization tests. 概念学习构建与语言语义相关的视觉表示，这是视觉语言任务的基础。尽管已经取得了可喜的进展，但现有的概念学习器在推理过程中仍然容易受到属性扰动和分布外组合的影响。我们将瓶颈归因于未能探索视觉概念的内在语义层次结构，例如\{红色，蓝色，...\} $\in$“颜色”子空间，而立方体$\in$“形状”。在本文中，我们提出了一种视觉上位抽象框架，用于显式建模语义感知的视觉子空间（即视觉上位）。仅使用自然视觉问答数据，我们的模型首先从语言学角度获取语义层次结构，然后在语言层次结构的指导下探索互斥的视觉上级。此外，还提出了准中心视觉概念聚类和上位快捷学习方案，以增强每个视觉上位内概念的辨别力和独立性。实验证明了所提出的框架在不同设置下的优越性，在扰动推理上的整体回答精度相对提高了 7.5%，在组合泛化测试上相对提高了 15.6%。 本文提出一种视觉超ordinate抽象框架，通过建模语义感知的视觉子空间来提升概念学习的鲁棒性。 Qi Zheng,Chaoyue Wang,Dadong Wang,Dacheng Tao cs.CV

authors_text: Shaoru Wang,Jin Gao,Zeming Li,Xiaoqin Zhang,Weiming Hu
title: A Closer Look at Self-Supervised Lightweight Vision Transformers
title_zh: 仔细观察自监督的轻量级视觉变压器
abstract: Self-supervised learning on large-scale Vision Transformers (ViTs) as pre-training methods has achieved promising downstream performance. Yet, how much these pre-training paradigms promote lightweight ViTs' performance is considerably less studied. In this work, we develop and benchmark several self-supervised pre-training methods on image classification tasks and some downstream dense prediction tasks. We surprisingly find that if proper pre-training is adopted, even vanilla lightweight ViTs show comparable performance to previous SOTA networks with delicate architecture design. It breaks the recently popular conception that vanilla ViTs are not suitable for vision tasks in lightweight regimes. We also point out some defects of such pre-training, e.g., failing to benefit from large-scale pre-training data and showing inferior performance on data-insufficient downstream tasks. Furthermore, we analyze and clearly show the effect of such pre-training by analyzing the properties of the layer representation and attention maps for related models. Finally, based on the above analyses, a distillation strategy during pre-training is developed, which leads to further downstream performance improvement for MAE-based pre-training. Code is available at https://github.com/wangsr126/mae-lite.
summary: Self-supervised learning on large-scale Vision Transformers (ViTs) as pre-training methods has achieved promising downstream performance. Yet, how much these pre-training paradigms promote lightweight ViTs' performance is considerably less studied. In this work, we develop and benchmark several self-supervised pre-training methods on image classification tasks and some downstream dense prediction tasks. We surprisingly find that if proper pre-training is adopted, even vanilla lightweight ViTs show comparable performance to previous SOTA networks with delicate architecture design. It breaks the recently popular conception that vanilla ViTs are not suitable for vision tasks in lightweight regimes. We also point out some defects of such pre-training, e.g., failing to benefit from large-scale pre-training data and showing inferior performance on data-insufficient downstream tasks. Furthermore, we analyze and clearly show the effect of such pre-training by analyzing the properties of the layer representation and attention maps for related models. Finally, based on the above analyses, a distillation strategy during pre-training is developed, which leads to further downstream performance improvement for MAE-based pre-training. Code is available at https://github.com/wangsr126/mae-lite.
abstract_zh: 作为预训练方法的大规模视觉变换器（ViT）的自监督学习已经取得了有希望的下游性能。然而，这些预训练范例对轻量级 ViT 性能的提升程度的研究却相当少。在这项工作中，我们开发并基准测试了图像分类任务和一些下游密集预测任务的几种自监督预训练方法。我们惊讶地发现，如果采用适当的预训练，即使是普通的轻量级 ViT 也能表现出与之前具有精致架构设计的 SOTA 网络相当的性能。它打破了最近流行的观念，即普通 ViT 不适合轻量级体系中的视觉任务。我们还指出了这种预训练的一些缺陷，例如无法从大规模预训练数据中受益以及在数据不足的下游任务上表现不佳。此外，我们通过分析相关模型的层表示和注意力图的属性来分析并清楚地展示这种预训练的效果。最后，基于上述分析，开发了预训练期间的蒸馏策略，从而进一步提高基于 MAE 的预训练的下游性能。代码可在 https://github.com/wangsr126/mae-lite 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了自监督预训练方法在轻量级视觉Transformer（ViT）上的应用，通过实验验证其在图像分类和下游密集预测任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管大规模ViT的自监督预训练已取得进展，但轻量级ViT的预训练效果研究较少，且存在认为轻量级ViT不适用于视觉任务的误解。
AI.method: 开发并基准测试多种自监督预训练方法，分析层表示和注意力图特性，并提出预训练阶段的蒸馏策略以优化MAE预训练。
AI.result: 合理预训练使轻量级ViT性能接近精心设计的SOTA模型，但其在大规模数据和数据不足任务中表现较差，蒸馏策略有效提升了下游任务性能。
AI.conclusion: 自监督预训练可提升轻量级ViT性能，但需注意数据规模限制，蒸馏策略为改进预训练提供了有效途径。

authors_text: Matheus K. Venturelli,Pedro H. Gomes,Jônatas Wehrmann
title: Looks Like Magic: Transfer Learning in GANs to Generate New Card Illustrations
title_zh: 看起来很神奇：GAN 中的迁移学习生成新的卡片插图
abstract: In this paper, we propose MAGICSTYLEGAN and MAGICSTYLEGAN-ADA - both incarnations of the state-of-the-art models StyleGan2 and StyleGan2 ADA - to experiment with their capacity of transfer learning into a rather different domain: creating new illustrations for the vast universe of the game "Magic: The Gathering" cards. This is a challenging task especially due to the variety of elements present in these illustrations, such as humans, creatures, artifacts, and landscapes - not to mention the plethora of art styles of the images made by various artists throughout the years. To solve the task at hand, we introduced a novel dataset, named MTG, with thousands of illustration from diverse card types and rich in metadata. The resulting set is a dataset composed by a myriad of both realistic and fantasy-like illustrations. Although, to investigate effects of diversity we also introduced subsets that contain specific types of concepts, such as forests, islands, faces, and humans. We show that simpler models, such as DCGANs, are not able to learn to generate proper illustrations in any setting. On the other side, we train instances of MAGICSTYLEGAN using all proposed subsets, being able to generate high quality illustrations. We perform experiments to understand how well pre-trained features from StyleGan2 can be transferred towards the target domain. We show that in well trained models we can find particular instances of noise vector that realistically represent real images from the dataset. Moreover, we provide both quantitative and qualitative studies to support our claims, and that demonstrate that MAGICSTYLEGAN is the state-of-the-art approach for generating Magic illustrations. Finally, this paper highlights some emerging properties regarding transfer learning in GANs, which is still a somehow under-explored field in generative learning research.
summary: In this paper, we propose MAGICSTYLEGAN and MAGICSTYLEGAN-ADA - both incarnations of the state-of-the-art models StyleGan2 and StyleGan2 ADA - to experiment with their capacity of transfer learning into a rather different domain: creating new illustrations for the vast universe of the game "Magic: The Gathering" cards. This is a challenging task especially due to the variety of elements present in these illustrations, such as humans, creatures, artifacts, and landscapes - not to mention the plethora of art styles of the images made by various artists throughout the years. To solve the task at hand, we introduced a novel dataset, named MTG, with thousands of illustration from diverse card types and rich in metadata. The resulting set is a dataset composed by a myriad of both realistic and fantasy-like illustrations. Although, to investigate effects of diversity we also introduced subsets that contain specific types of concepts, such as forests, islands, faces, and humans. We show that simpler models, such as DCGANs, are not able to learn to generate proper illustrations in any setting. On the other side, we train instances of MAGICSTYLEGAN using all proposed subsets, being able to generate high quality illustrations. We perform experiments to understand how well pre-trained features from StyleGan2 can be transferred towards the target domain. We show that in well trained models we can find particular instances of noise vector that realistically represent real images from the dataset. Moreover, we provide both quantitative and qualitative studies to support our claims, and that demonstrate that MAGICSTYLEGAN is the state-of-the-art approach for generating Magic illustrations. Finally, this paper highlights some emerging properties regarding transfer learning in GANs, which is still a somehow under-explored field in generative learning research.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 MAGICSTYLEGAN 和 MAGICSTYLEGAN-ADA（两者都是最先进的模型 StyleGan2 和 StyleGan2 ADA 的化身），以试验它们将迁移学习的能力转移到一个完全不同的领域：为游戏“万智牌”卡牌的广阔宇宙创建新的插图。这是一项具有挑战性的任务，特别是因为这些插图中存在多种元素，例如人类、生物、文物和风景，更不用说多年来不同艺术家制作的图像的艺术风格过多。为了解决手头的任务，我们引入了一个名为 MTG 的新颖数据集，其中包含来自不同卡片类型的数千张插图，并且元数据丰富。生成的数据集是由无数现实和幻想插图组成的数据集。尽管如此，为了研究多样性的影响，我们还引入了包含特定类型概念的子集，例如森林、岛屿、面孔和人类。我们表明，更简单的模型（例如 DCGAN）无法学习在任何设置下生成正确的插图。另一方面，我们使用所有建议的子集训练 MAGICSTYLEGAN 的实例，能够生成高质量的插图。我们进行实验来了解 StyleGan2 中的预训练特征如何能够很好地转移到目标域。我们表明，在训练有素的模型中，我们可以找到噪声向量的特定实例，它们可以真实地表示数据集中的真实图像。此外，我们提供定量和定性研究来支持我们的主张，并证明 MAGICSTYLEGAN 是生成万智牌插图的最先进方法。最后，本文强调了 GAN 中迁移学习的一些新兴特性，这在生成学习研究中仍然是一个尚未充分探索的领域。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MAGICSTYLEGAN和MAGICSTYLEGAN-ADA模型，利用迁移学习生成《万智牌》卡牌新插图。
AI.motivation: 解决生成多样化、风格多样的卡牌插图的挑战，填补迁移学习在GAN领域的研究空白。
AI.method: 构建MTG数据集，基于StyleGan2进行迁移学习，训练不同子集模型，并通过定量和定性分析验证效果。
AI.result: MAGICSTYLEGAN在多个子集上生成高质量插图，优于DCGAN，并能通过预训练特征生成真实图像。
AI.conclusion: 迁移学习在GAN中能有效生成复杂图像，MAGICSTYLEGAN为卡牌插图生成提供了先进解决方案，并揭示了迁移学习的新特性。

Finally, this paper highlights some emerging properties regarding transfer learning in GANs, which is still a somehow under-explored field in generative learning research. 在本文中，我们提出了 MAGICSTYLEGAN 和 MAGICSTYLEGAN-ADA（两者都是最先进的模型 StyleGan2 和 StyleGan2 ADA 的化身），以试验它们将迁移学习的能力转移到一个完全不同的领域：为游戏“万智牌”卡牌的广阔宇宙创建新的插图。这是一项具有挑战性的任务，特别是因为这些插图中存在多种元素，例如人类、生物、文物和风景，更不用说多年来不同艺术家制作的图像的艺术风格过多。为了解决手头的任务，我们引入了一个名为 MTG 的新颖数据集，其中包含来自不同卡片类型的数千张插图，并且元数据丰富。生成的数据集是由无数现实和幻想插图组成的数据集。尽管如此，为了研究多样性的影响，我们还引入了包含特定类型概念的子集，例如森林、岛屿、面孔和人类。我们表明，更简单的模型（例如 DCGAN）无法学习在任何设置下生成正确的插图。另一方面，我们使用所有建议的子集训练 MAGICSTYLEGAN 的实例，能够生成高质量的插图。我们进行实验来了解 StyleGan2 中的预训练特征如何能够很好地转移到目标域。我们表明，在训练有素的模型中，我们可以找到噪声向量的特定实例，它们可以真实地表示数据集中的真实图像。此外，我们提供定量和定性研究来支持我们的主张，并证明 MAGICSTYLEGAN 是生成万智牌插图的最先进方法。最后，本文强调了 GAN 中迁移学习的一些新兴特性，这在生成学习研究中仍然是一个尚未充分探索的领域。 本文提出MAGICSTYLEGAN和MAGICSTYLEGAN-ADA模型，利用迁移学习生成《万智牌》卡牌新插图。 Matheus K. Venturelli,Pedro H. Gomes,Jônatas Wehrmann cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Xiao Han,Leye Wang,Junjie Wu,Yuncong Yang
title: Large-Scale Privacy-Preserving Network Embedding against Private Link Inference Attacks
title_zh: 针对私人链接推理攻击的大规模隐私保护网络嵌入
abstract: Network embedding represents network nodes by a low-dimensional informative vector. While it is generally effective for various downstream tasks, it may leak some private information of networks, such as hidden private links. In this work, we address a novel problem of privacy-preserving network embedding against private link inference attacks. Basically, we propose to perturb the original network by adding or removing links, and expect the embedding generated on the perturbed network can leak little information about private links but hold high utility for various downstream tasks. Towards this goal, we first propose general measurements to quantify privacy gain and utility loss incurred by candidate network perturbations; we then design a PPNE framework to identify the optimal perturbation solution with the best privacy-utility trade-off in an iterative way. Furthermore, we propose many techniques to accelerate PPNE and ensure its scalability. For instance, as the skip-gram embedding methods including DeepWalk and LINE can be seen as matrix factorization with closed form embedding results, we devise efficient privacy gain and utility loss approximation methods to avoid the repetitive time-consuming embedding training for every candidate network perturbation in each iteration. Experiments on real-life network datasets (with up to millions of nodes) verify that PPNE outperforms baselines by sacrificing less utility and obtaining higher privacy protection.
summary: Network embedding represents network nodes by a low-dimensional informative vector. While it is generally effective for various downstream tasks, it may leak some private information of networks, such as hidden private links. In this work, we address a novel problem of privacy-preserving network embedding against private link inference attacks. Basically, we propose to perturb the original network by adding or removing links, and expect the embedding generated on the perturbed network can leak little information about private links but hold high utility for various downstream tasks. Towards this goal, we first propose general measurements to quantify privacy gain and utility loss incurred by candidate network perturbations; we then design a PPNE framework to identify the optimal perturbation solution with the best privacy-utility trade-off in an iterative way. Furthermore, we propose many techniques to accelerate PPNE and ensure its scalability. For instance, as the skip-gram embedding methods including DeepWalk and LINE can be seen as matrix factorization with closed form embedding results, we devise efficient privacy gain and utility loss approximation methods to avoid the repetitive time-consuming embedding training for every candidate network perturbation in each iteration. Experiments on real-life network datasets (with up to millions of nodes) verify that PPNE outperforms baselines by sacrificing less utility and obtaining higher privacy protection.
abstract_zh: 网络嵌入通过低维信息向量表示网络节点。虽然它通常对各种下游任务有效，但它可能会泄露一些网络的私有信息，例如隐藏的私有链接。在这项工作中，我们解决了针对私人链接推理攻击的隐私保护网络嵌入的新问题。基本上，我们建议通过添加或删除链接来扰乱原始网络，并期望在扰动网络上生成的嵌入可以泄漏有关私有链接的很少信息，但对各种下游任务具有很高的实用性。为了实现这一目标，我们首先提出通用测量方法来量化候选网络扰动所带来的隐私增益和效用损失；然后，我们设计了一个 PPNE 框架，以迭代的方式确定具有最佳隐私-效用权衡的最佳扰动解决方案。此外，我们提出了许多技术来加速 PPNE 并确保其可扩展性。例如，由于包括 DeepWalk 和 LINE 在内的 Skip-gram 嵌入方法可以被视为具有封闭形式嵌入结果的矩阵分解，因此我们设计了有效的隐私增益和效用损失近似方法，以避免每次迭代中对每个候选网络扰动进行重复耗时的嵌入训练。对现实网络数据集（多达数百万个节点）的实验验证了 PPNE 通过牺牲更少的效用并获得更高的隐私保护来优于基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种大规模隐私保护网络嵌入方法PPNE，通过扰动网络结构在防止私人链接泄露的同时保持嵌入效用。
AI.motivation: 传统网络嵌入可能泄露网络中的私人链接信息，需在隐私保护与下游任务实用性间取得平衡。
AI.method: 设计PPNE框架通过添加/删除链接扰动网络，提出隐私增益与效用损失量化指标，并采用矩阵分解近似方法加速优化过程。
AI.result: 在百万级节点的真实网络数据集上验证，PPNE相比基线方法实现更优的隐私保护且效用损失更小。
AI.conclusion: PPNE框架有效解决了隐私保护与嵌入效用的矛盾，为大规模网络提供可扩展的隐私保护方案。

authors_text: Jacopo Banfi,Lindsey Woo,Mark Campbell
title: Is it Worth to Reason about Uncertainty in Occupancy Grid Maps during Path Planning?
title_zh: 在路径规划过程中是否值得对占用网格地图的不确定性进行推理？
comment: To appear in the Proceedings of ICRA 2022
comments: To appear in the Proceedings of ICRA 2022
abstract: This paper investigates the usefulness of reasoning about the uncertain presence of obstacles during path planning, which typically stems from the usage of probabilistic occupancy grid maps for representing the environment when mapping via a noisy sensor like a stereo camera. The traditional planning paradigm prescribes using a hard threshold on the occupancy probability to declare that a cell is an obstacle, and to plan a single path accordingly while treating unknown space as free. We compare this approach against a new uncertainty-aware planner, which plans two different path hypotheses and then merges their initial trajectory segments into a single one ending in a "next-best view" pose. After this informative view is taken, the planner commits to one of the hypotheses, or to a completely new one if a collision is imminent. Simulations were conducted comparing the proposed and traditional planner. Results show the existence of planning scenarios -- like when the environment contains a dead-end, or when the goal is placed close to an obstacle -- in which reasoning about uncertainty can significantly decrease the robot's traveled distance and increase the chances of reaching the goal. The new planner was also validated on a real Clearpath Jackal robot equipped with a ZED 2 stereo camera.
summary: This paper investigates the usefulness of reasoning about the uncertain presence of obstacles during path planning, which typically stems from the usage of probabilistic occupancy grid maps for representing the environment when mapping via a noisy sensor like a stereo camera. The traditional planning paradigm prescribes using a hard threshold on the occupancy probability to declare that a cell is an obstacle, and to plan a single path accordingly while treating unknown space as free. We compare this approach against a new uncertainty-aware planner, which plans two different path hypotheses and then merges their initial trajectory segments into a single one ending in a "next-best view" pose. After this informative view is taken, the planner commits to one of the hypotheses, or to a completely new one if a collision is imminent. Simulations were conducted comparing the proposed and traditional planner. Results show the existence of planning scenarios -- like when the environment contains a dead-end, or when the goal is placed close to an obstacle -- in which reasoning about uncertainty can significantly decrease the robot's traveled distance and increase the chances of reaching the goal. The new planner was also validated on a real Clearpath Jackal robot equipped with a ZED 2 stereo camera.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了在路径规划过程中推理障碍物的不确定存在的有用性，这通常源于在通过立体相机等噪声传感器进行映射时使用概率占用网格图来表示环境。传统的规划范式规定使用占用概率的硬阈值来声明单元格是障碍物，并相应地规划单个路径，同时将未知空间视为自由空间。我们将这种方法与一种新的不确定性感知规划器进行比较，该规划器规划两个不同的路径假设，然后将它们的初始轨迹段合并为一个以“下一个最佳视图”姿势结束的轨迹段。在获得这一信息丰富的视图后，规划者将致力于其中一个假设，或者如果碰撞即将发生，则将致力于一个全新的假设。进行了模拟比较所提出的和传统的规划器。结果表明，存在规划场景（例如当环境包含死胡同时，或者当目标靠近障碍物时），其中对不确定性的推理可以显着减少机器人的行驶距离并增加达到目标的机会。新的规划器还在配备 ZED 2 立体相机的真实 Clearpath Jackal 机器人上进行了验证。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨在路径规划中考虑占用网格地图不确定性是否有效，并提出一种新的不确定性感知规划方法。
AI.motivation: 传统路径规划方法通过硬阈值处理占用概率，忽略不确定性可能导致路径效率低下或失败，尤其在复杂环境中。
AI.method: 提出一种新规划器，生成两条路径假设并合并初始轨迹至'最佳视角'，随后根据新信息选择路径或生成新假设。
AI.result: 仿真和实验证明，在死胡同或目标靠近障碍物等场景中，新方法显著减少行驶距离并提高目标到达率。
AI.conclusion: 在特定环境条件下，考虑不确定性的路径规划能有效提升机器人导航性能。

authors_text: Pi-Yueh Chuang,Lorena A. Barba
title: Experience report of physics-informed neural networks in fluid simulations: pitfalls and frustration
title_zh: 流体模拟中基于物理的神经网络的经验报告：陷阱和挫折
abstract: Though PINNs (physics-informed neural networks) are now deemed as a complement to traditional CFD (computational fluid dynamics) solvers rather than a replacement, their ability to solve the Navier-Stokes equations without given data is still of great interest. This report presents our not-so-successful experiments of solving the Navier-Stokes equations with PINN as a replacement for traditional solvers. We aim to, with our experiments, prepare readers for the challenges they may face if they are interested in data-free PINN. In this work, we used two standard flow problems: 2D Taylor-Green vortex at Re=100 and 2D cylinder flow at Re=200. The PINN method solved the 2D Taylor-Green vortex problem with acceptable results, and we used this flow as an accuracy and performance benchmark. About 32 hours of training were required for the PINN method's accuracy to match the accuracy of a 16x16 finite-difference simulation, which took less than 20 seconds. The 2D cylinder flow, on the other hand, did not produce a physical solution. The PINN method behaved like a steady-flow solver and did not capture the vortex shedding phenomenon. By sharing our experience, we would like to emphasize that the PINN method is still a work-in-progress, especially in terms of solving flow problems without any given data. More work is needed to make PINN feasible for real-world problems in such applications.
summary: Though PINNs (physics-informed neural networks) are now deemed as a complement to traditional CFD (computational fluid dynamics) solvers rather than a replacement, their ability to solve the Navier-Stokes equations without given data is still of great interest. This report presents our not-so-successful experiments of solving the Navier-Stokes equations with PINN as a replacement for traditional solvers. We aim to, with our experiments, prepare readers for the challenges they may face if they are interested in data-free PINN. In this work, we used two standard flow problems: 2D Taylor-Green vortex at Re=100 and 2D cylinder flow at Re=200. The PINN method solved the 2D Taylor-Green vortex problem with acceptable results, and we used this flow as an accuracy and performance benchmark. About 32 hours of training were required for the PINN method's accuracy to match the accuracy of a 16x16 finite-difference simulation, which took less than 20 seconds. The 2D cylinder flow, on the other hand, did not produce a physical solution. The PINN method behaved like a steady-flow solver and did not capture the vortex shedding phenomenon. By sharing our experience, we would like to emphasize that the PINN method is still a work-in-progress, especially in terms of solving flow problems without any given data. More work is needed to make PINN feasible for real-world problems in such applications.
abstract_zh: 尽管 PINN（物理信息神经网络）现在被视为传统 CFD（计算流体动力学）求解器的补充而不是替代品，但它们在没有给定数据的情况下求解纳维-斯托克斯方程的能力仍然引起人们极大的兴趣。本报告介绍了我们使用 PINN 作为传统求解器的替代品求解纳维-斯托克斯方程的不太成功的实验。我们的目标是，通过我们的实验，让读者对无数据 PINN 感兴趣时可能面临的挑战做好准备。在这项工作中，我们使用了两个标准流动问题：Re=100 时的 2D Taylor-Green 涡流和 Re=200 时的 2D 圆柱流。 PINN 方法以可接受的结果解决了 2D Taylor-Green 涡流问题，我们使用该流作为精度和性能基准。 PINN 方法的准确度需要大约 32 小时的训练才能与 16x16 有限差分模拟的准确度相匹配，而该过程花费了不到 20 秒的时间。另一方面，二维圆柱流并没有产生物理解决方案。 PINN 方法的行为类似于稳流求解器，并且没有捕获涡流脱落现象。通过分享我们的经验，我们想强调 PINN 方法仍在进行中，特别是在没有任何给定数据的情况下解决流动问题方面。需要做更多的工作才能使 PINN 能够解决此类应用中的现实问题。

AI.method: 采用2D Taylor-Green涡流（Re=100）和2D圆柱流（Re=200）作为测试案例，使用PINN求解Navier-Stokes方程，并与有限差分方法对比性能。

AI.conclusion: PINN在无数据流体问题求解中仍存在显著局限，需进一步优化以适用于实际工程场景。

By sharing our experience, we would like to emphasize that the PINN method is still a work-in-progress, especially in terms of solving flow problems without any given data. authors_text: Prabhu Vellaisamy,John Paul Shen
title: Towards a Design Framework for TNN-Based Neuromorphic Sensory Processing Units
title_zh: 基于 TNN 的神经形态感觉处理单元的设计框架
abstract: Temporal Neural Networks (TNNs) are spiking neural networks that exhibit brain-like sensory processing with high energy efficiency. This work presents the ongoing research towards developing a custom design framework for designing efficient application-specific TNN-based Neuromorphic Sensory Processing Units (NSPUs). This paper examines previous works on NSPU designs for UCR time-series clustering and MNIST image classification applications. Current ideas for a custom design framework and tools that enable efficient software-to-hardware design flow for rapid design space exploration of application-specific NSPUs while leveraging EDA tools to obtain post-layout netlist and power-performance-area (PPA) metrics are described. Future research directions are also outlined.
summary: Temporal Neural Networks (TNNs) are spiking neural networks that exhibit brain-like sensory processing with high energy efficiency. This work presents the ongoing research towards developing a custom design framework for designing efficient application-specific TNN-based Neuromorphic Sensory Processing Units (NSPUs). This paper examines previous works on NSPU designs for UCR time-series clustering and MNIST image classification applications. Current ideas for a custom design framework and tools that enable efficient software-to-hardware design flow for rapid design space exploration of application-specific NSPUs while leveraging EDA tools to obtain post-layout netlist and power-performance-area (PPA) metrics are described. Future research directions are also outlined.
abstract_zh: 时间神经网络 (TNN) 是一种尖峰神经网络，具有高能效且具有类似大脑的感觉处理能力。这项工作介绍了正在进行的研究，旨在开发定制设计框架，以设计高效的特定应用的基于 TNN 的神经形态感觉处理单元 (NSPU)。本文回顾了之前针对 UCR 时间序列聚类和 MNIST 图像分类应用的 NSPU 设计工作。描述了定制设计框架和工具的当前想法，这些框架和工具能够实现高效的软件到硬件设计流程，以快速探索特定于应用的 NSPU 的设计空间，同时利用 EDA 工具获取布局后网表和功耗性能面积 (PPA) 指标。还概述了未来的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发一种定制化设计框架，用于高效设计基于时序神经网络（TNN）的神经形态感觉处理单元（NSPU），并探索其在不同应用中的设计空间。
AI.motivation: TNN具有类似大脑的高效感官处理能力，但现有NSPU设计缺乏针对特定应用的优化框架，需通过定制化工具提升能效与性能。
AI.method: 回顾UCR时间序列聚类和MNIST图像分类的NSPU设计，提出结合软件到硬件设计流程的定制框架，并利用EDA工具获取布局后网表及PPA指标。
AI.result: 初步构建了支持快速设计空间探索的框架与工具，为应用特定NSPU的优化提供了方法论和评估基础。
AI.conclusion: 当前研究为NSPU设计提供了系统性框架，未来需进一步验证其在多场景下的有效性，并优化工具链以提升设计效率。

authors_text: Yao Liu,Dipendra Misra,Miro Dudík,Robert E. Schapire
title: Provably Sample-Efficient RL with Side Information about Latent Dynamics
title_zh: 可证明样本效率高的强化学习，具有有关潜在动态的辅助信息
abstract: We study reinforcement learning (RL) in settings where observations are high-dimensional, but where an RL agent has access to abstract knowledge about the structure of the state space, as is the case, for example, when a robot is tasked to go to a specific room in a building using observations from its own camera, while having access to the floor plan. We formalize this setting as transfer reinforcement learning from an abstract simulator, which we assume is deterministic (such as a simple model of moving around the floor plan), but which is only required to capture the target domain's latent-state dynamics approximately up to unknown (bounded) perturbations (to account for environment stochasticity). Crucially, we assume no prior knowledge about the structure of observations in the target domain except that they can be used to identify the latent states (but the decoding map is unknown). Under these assumptions, we present an algorithm, called TASID, that learns a robust policy in the target domain, with sample complexity that is polynomial in the horizon, and independent of the number of states, which is not possible without access to some prior knowledge. In synthetic experiments, we verify various properties of our algorithm and show that it empirically outperforms transfer RL algorithms that require access to "full simulators" (i.e., those that also simulate observations).
summary: We study reinforcement learning (RL) in settings where observations are high-dimensional, but where an RL agent has access to abstract knowledge about the structure of the state space, as is the case, for example, when a robot is tasked to go to a specific room in a building using observations from its own camera, while having access to the floor plan. We formalize this setting as transfer reinforcement learning from an abstract simulator, which we assume is deterministic (such as a simple model of moving around the floor plan), but which is only required to capture the target domain's latent-state dynamics approximately up to unknown (bounded) perturbations (to account for environment stochasticity). Crucially, we assume no prior knowledge about the structure of observations in the target domain except that they can be used to identify the latent states (but the decoding map is unknown). Under these assumptions, we present an algorithm, called TASID, that learns a robust policy in the target domain, with sample complexity that is polynomial in the horizon, and independent of the number of states, which is not possible without access to some prior knowledge. In synthetic experiments, we verify various properties of our algorithm and show that it empirically outperforms transfer RL algorithms that require access to "full simulators" (i.e., those that also simulate observations).
abstract_zh: 我们在观察是高维的环境中研究强化学习（RL），但 RL 智能体可以访问有关状态空间结构的抽象知识，例如，当机器人的任务是使用自己相机的观察结果前往建筑物中的特定房间，同时可以访问平面图时。我们将这种设置形式化为来自抽象模拟器的转移强化学习，我们假设它是确定性的（例如围绕平面图移动的简单模型），但只需要捕获目标域的潜在状态动态，大约达到未知（有界）扰动（以考虑环境随机性）。至关重要的是，我们假设没有关于目标域中观测结构的先验知识，除了它们可以用于识别潜在状态（但解码图未知）。在这些假设下，我们提出了一种称为 TASID 的算法，该算法在目标域中学习稳健的策略，其样本复杂度是水平上的多项式，并且与状态数量无关，如果不访问一些先验知识，这是不可能的。在综合实验中，我们验证了算法的各种属性，并表明它在经验上优于需要访问“完整模拟器”（即也模拟观察结果的模拟器）的转移强化学习算法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在高维观测环境下，如何利用潜在状态动态的先验知识提升强化学习的样本效率。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习在高维观测下样本效率低下，而实际场景中智能体可能拥有辅助信息（如环境结构）。需设计无需完整观测模型、仅依赖潜在动态信息的算法以应对环境不确定性。
AI.method: 提出TASID算法，结合确定性抽象模拟器与未知扰动模型，通过学习潜在状态与观测的映射关系，实现样本复杂度与状态数无关的策略优化。
AI.result: 合成实验验证了TASID的理论性质，其性能优于需完整观测模拟器的迁移RL算法，且样本效率显著提升。
AI.conclusion: TASID证明了利用潜在动态侧信息可实现高维观测下样本高效的强化学习，为实际应用提供了新范式。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究在高维观测环境下，如何利用潜在状态动态的先验知识提升强化学习的样本效率。

search_text: Provably Sample-Efficient RL with Side Information about Latent Dynamics 可证明样本效率高的强化学习，具有有关潜在动态的辅助信息 We study reinforcement learning (RL) in settings where observations are high-dimensional, but where an RL agent has access to abstract knowledge about the structure of the state space, as is the case, for example, when a robot is tasked to go to a specific room in a building using observations from its own camera, while having access to the floor plan. We formalize this setting as transfer reinforcement learning from an abstract simulator, which we assume is deterministic (such as a simple model of moving around the floor plan), but which is only required to capture the target domain's latent-state dynamics approximately up to unknown (bounded) perturbations (to account for environment stochasticity). Crucially, we assume no prior knowledge about the structure of observations in the target domain except that they can be used to identify the latent states (but the decoding map is unknown). Under these assumptions, we present an algorithm, called TASID, that learns a robust policy in the target domain, with sample complexity that is polynomial in the horizon, and independent of the number of states, which is not possible without access to some prior knowledge. In synthetic experiments, we verify various properties of our algorithm and show that it empirically outperforms transfer RL algorithms that require access to "full simulators" (i.e., those that also simulate observations). 我们在观察是高维的环境中研究强化学习（RL），但 RL 智能体可以访问有关状态空间结构的抽象知识，例如，当机器人的任务是使用自己相机的观察结果前往建筑物中的特定房间，同时可以访问平面图时。我们将这种设置形式化为来自抽象模拟器的转移强化学习，我们假设它是确定性的（例如围绕平面图移动的简单模型），但只需要捕获目标域的潜在状态动态，大约达到未知（有界）扰动（以考虑环境随机性）。至关重要的是，我们假设没有关于目标域中观测结构的先验知识，除了它们可以用于识别潜在状态（但解码图未知）。在这些假设下，我们提出了一种称为 TASID 的算法，该算法在目标域中学习稳健的策略，其样本复杂度是水平上的多项式，并且与状态数量无关，如果不访问一些先验知识，这是不可能的。在综合实验中，我们验证了算法的各种属性，并表明它在经验上优于需要访问“完整模拟器”（即也模拟观察结果的模拟器）的转移强化学习算法。 本文研究在高维观测环境下，如何利用潜在状态动态的先验知识提升强化学习的样本效率。 Yao Liu,Dipendra Misra,Miro Dudík,Robert E. Schapire cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Ruochen Jiao,Xiangguo Liu,Takami Sato,Qi Alfred Chen,Qi Zhu
title: Semi-supervised Semantics-guided Adversarial Training for Trajectory Prediction
title_zh: 用于轨迹预测的半监督语义引导对抗训练
comment: 11 pages, adversarial training for trajectory prediction
comments: 11 pages, adversarial training for trajectory prediction
abstract: Predicting the trajectories of surrounding objects is a critical task for self-driving vehicles and many other autonomous systems. Recent works demonstrate that adversarial attacks on trajectory prediction, where small crafted perturbations are introduced to history trajectories, may significantly mislead the prediction of future trajectories and induce unsafe planning. However, few works have addressed enhancing the robustness of this important safety-critical task.In this paper, we present a novel adversarial training method for trajectory prediction. Compared with typical adversarial training on image tasks, our work is challenged by more random input with rich context and a lack of class labels. To address these challenges, we propose a method based on a semi-supervised adversarial autoencoder, which models disentangled semantic features with domain knowledge and provides additional latent labels for the adversarial training. Extensive experiments with different types of attacks demonstrate that our Semisupervised Semantics-guided Adversarial Training (SSAT) method can effectively mitigate the impact of adversarial attacks by up to 73% and outperform other popular defense methods. In addition, experiments show that our method can significantly improve the system's robust generalization to unseen patterns of attacks. We believe that such semantics-guided architecture and advancement on robust generalization is an important step for developing robust prediction models and enabling safe decision-making.
summary: Predicting the trajectories of surrounding objects is a critical task for self-driving vehicles and many other autonomous systems. Recent works demonstrate that adversarial attacks on trajectory prediction, where small crafted perturbations are introduced to history trajectories, may significantly mislead the prediction of future trajectories and induce unsafe planning. However, few works have addressed enhancing the robustness of this important safety-critical task.In this paper, we present a novel adversarial training method for trajectory prediction. Compared with typical adversarial training on image tasks, our work is challenged by more random input with rich context and a lack of class labels. To address these challenges, we propose a method based on a semi-supervised adversarial autoencoder, which models disentangled semantic features with domain knowledge and provides additional latent labels for the adversarial training. Extensive experiments with different types of attacks demonstrate that our Semisupervised Semantics-guided Adversarial Training (SSAT) method can effectively mitigate the impact of adversarial attacks by up to 73% and outperform other popular defense methods. In addition, experiments show that our method can significantly improve the system's robust generalization to unseen patterns of attacks. We believe that such semantics-guided architecture and advancement on robust generalization is an important step for developing robust prediction models and enabling safe decision-making.
abstract_zh: 预测周围物体的轨迹是自动驾驶车辆和许多其他自主系统的一项关键任务。最近的研究表明，对轨迹预测的对抗性攻击，即在历史轨迹中引入精心设计的小扰动，可能会严重误导对未来轨迹的预测并导致不安全的规划。然而，很少有工作致力于增强这一重要的安全关键任务的鲁棒性。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于轨迹预测的新型对抗训练方法。与图像任务上的典型对抗训练相比，我们的工作面临着更多具有丰富上下文和缺乏类标签的随机输入的挑战。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了一种基于半监督对抗性自动编码器的方法，该方法利用领域知识对解开的语义特征进行建模，并为对抗性训练提供额外的潜在标签。对不同类型攻击的大量实验表明，我们的半监督语义引导对抗训练（SSAT）方法可以有效地将对抗攻击的影响减轻高达 73%，并且优于其他流行的防御方法。此外，实验表明，我们的方法可以显着提高系统对未见过的攻击模式的鲁棒泛化能力。我们相信，这种语义引导的架构和鲁棒泛化的进步是开发鲁棒预测模型和实现安全决策的重要一步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半监督语义引导的对抗训练方法（SSAT），用于提升轨迹预测模型在对抗攻击下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹预测模型易受对抗攻击影响，而针对该安全关键任务的鲁棒性增强研究较少，且面临输入随机性高、缺乏类别标签等挑战。
AI.method: 基于半监督对抗自编码器，结合领域知识建模解耦语义特征，并通过潜在标签增强对抗训练过程。
AI.result: 实验表明SSAT方法可将对抗攻击影响降低73%，显著优于其他防御方法，并提升对未知攻击模式的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 语义引导架构与鲁棒泛化能力的提升为开发安全可靠的轨迹预测模型提供了重要进展。

authors_text: Jonathan Laurent,André Platzer
title: Learning to Find Proofs and Theorems by Learning to Refine Search Strategies: The Case of Loop Invariant Synthesis
title_zh: 通过学习细化搜索策略来学习寻找证明和定理：循环不变综合的案例
comment: ef:Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems, volume 35 (2022) 4843--4856
comments: ef:Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems, volume 35 (2022) 4843--4856
abstract: We propose a new approach to automated theorem proving where an AlphaZero-style agent is self-training to refine a generic high-level expert strategy expressed as a nondeterministic program. An analogous teacher agent is self-training to generate tasks of suitable relevance and difficulty for the learner. This allows leveraging minimal amounts of domain knowledge to tackle problems for which training data is unavailable or hard to synthesize. As a specific illustration, we consider loop invariant synthesis for imperative programs and use neural networks to refine both the teacher and solver strategies.
summary: We propose a new approach to automated theorem proving where an AlphaZero-style agent is self-training to refine a generic high-level expert strategy expressed as a nondeterministic program. An analogous teacher agent is self-training to generate tasks of suitable relevance and difficulty for the learner. This allows leveraging minimal amounts of domain knowledge to tackle problems for which training data is unavailable or hard to synthesize. As a specific illustration, we consider loop invariant synthesis for imperative programs and use neural networks to refine both the teacher and solver strategies.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种自动定理证明的新方法，其中 AlphaZero 式代理进行自我训练，以完善表示为非确定性程序的通用高级专家策略。类似的教师代理可以进行自我训练，为学习者生成具有适当相关性和难度的任务。这允许利用最少量的领域知识来解决训练数据不可用或难以合成的问题。作为一个具体的说明，我们考虑命令式程序的循环不变综合，并使用神经网络来完善教师和求解器策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于AlphaZero风格的自我训练方法，通过优化搜索策略自动推导证明和定理，具体应用于循环不变量合成。
AI.motivation: 现有自动定理证明方法依赖大量训练数据或领域知识，而实际中数据获取困难且领域知识有限，需探索更高效的学习策略。
AI.method: 设计AlphaZero式代理自我训练以优化非确定性程序的高层策略，同时由教师代理生成适配难度的任务，利用神经网络联合优化教师与求解器策略。
AI.result: 方法在循环不变量合成任务中验证有效，成功推导出复杂程序的不变量，且无需依赖大量人工标注数据。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为自动定理证明提供了新思路，通过策略优化与任务生成机制，显著降低了对数据和领域知识的依赖。

search_text: Learning to Find Proofs and Theorems by Learning to Refine Search Strategies: The Case of Loop Invariant Synthesis 通过学习细化搜索策略来学习寻找证明和定理：循环不变综合的案例 We propose a new approach to automated theorem proving where an AlphaZero-style agent is self-training to refine a generic high-level expert strategy expressed as a nondeterministic program. An analogous teacher agent is self-training to generate tasks of suitable relevance and difficulty for the learner. This allows leveraging minimal amounts of domain knowledge to tackle problems for which training data is unavailable or hard to synthesize. As a specific illustration, we consider loop invariant synthesis for imperative programs and use neural networks to refine both the teacher and solver strategies. 我们提出了一种自动定理证明的新方法，其中 AlphaZero 式代理进行自我训练，以完善表示为非确定性程序的通用高级专家策略。类似的教师代理可以进行自我训练，为学习者生成具有适当相关性和难度的任务。这允许利用最少量的领域知识来解决训练数据不可用或难以合成的问题。作为一个具体的说明，我们考虑命令式程序的循环不变综合，并使用神经网络来完善教师和求解器策略。 本文提出一种基于AlphaZero风格的自我训练方法，通过优化搜索策略自动推导证明和定理，具体应用于循环不变量合成。 Jonathan Laurent,André Platzer cs.AI

authors_text: Xiang Lisa Li,John Thickstun,Ishaan Gulrajani,Percy Liang,Tatsunori B. Hashimoto
title: Diffusion-LM Improves Controllable Text Generation
title_zh: Diffusion-LM 改进了可控文本生成
abstract: Controlling the behavior of language models (LMs) without re-training is a major open problem in natural language generation. While recent works have demonstrated successes on controlling simple sentence attributes (e.g., sentiment), there has been little progress on complex, fine-grained controls (e.g., syntactic structure). To address this challenge, we develop a new non-autoregressive language model based on continuous diffusions that we call Diffusion-LM. Building upon the recent successes of diffusion models in continuous domains, Diffusion-LM iteratively denoises a sequence of Gaussian vectors into word vectors, yielding a sequence of intermediate latent variables. The continuous, hierarchical nature of these intermediate variables enables a simple gradient-based algorithm to perform complex, controllable generation tasks. We demonstrate successful control of Diffusion-LM for six challenging fine-grained control tasks, significantly outperforming prior work.
summary: Controlling the behavior of language models (LMs) without re-training is a major open problem in natural language generation. While recent works have demonstrated successes on controlling simple sentence attributes (e.g., sentiment), there has been little progress on complex, fine-grained controls (e.g., syntactic structure). To address this challenge, we develop a new non-autoregressive language model based on continuous diffusions that we call Diffusion-LM. Building upon the recent successes of diffusion models in continuous domains, Diffusion-LM iteratively denoises a sequence of Gaussian vectors into word vectors, yielding a sequence of intermediate latent variables. The continuous, hierarchical nature of these intermediate variables enables a simple gradient-based algorithm to perform complex, controllable generation tasks. We demonstrate successful control of Diffusion-LM for six challenging fine-grained control tasks, significantly outperforming prior work.
abstract_zh: 无需重新训练即可控制语言模型 (LM) 的行为是自然语言生成中的一个主要开放问题。虽然最近的工作在控制简单句子属性（例如情感）方面取得了成功，但在复杂、细粒度的控制（例如句法结构）方面却进展甚微。为了应对这一挑战，我们开发了一种基于连续扩散的新的非自回归语言模型，我们称之为扩散-LM。基于最近在连续域中的扩散模型的成功，Diffusion-LM 迭代地将一系列高斯向量去噪为词向量，从而产生一系列中间潜在变量。这些中间变量的连续、分层性质使得简单的基于梯度的算法能够执行复杂的、可控的生成任务。我们展示了对六个具有挑战性的细粒度控制任务的 Diffusion-LM 的成功控制，显着优于之前的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Diffusion-LM模型，通过连续扩散机制实现对语言模型生成过程的细粒度可控性。
AI.motivation: 现有语言模型难以在不重新训练的情况下实现复杂句法结构等细粒度控制，传统方法在可控性与生成质量间存在矛盾。
AI.method: 基于扩散模型框架构建非自回归语言模型，通过迭代去噪高斯向量生成词向量，利用连续层次化中间变量实现梯度优化的可控生成。
AI.result: 在六个细粒度控制任务中显著超越现有方法，验证了模型对句法结构等复杂控制目标的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Diffusion-LM通过连续扩散机制为可控文本生成提供了新范式，有效解决了复杂控制任务中的技术瓶颈。

authors_text: Viresh Ranjan,Minh Hoai
title: Exemplar Free Class Agnostic Counting
title_zh: 示例免费类不可知计数
abstract: We tackle the task of Class Agnostic Counting, which aims to count objects in a novel object category at test time without any access to labeled training data for that category. All previous class agnostic counting methods cannot work in a fully automated setting, and require computationally expensive test time adaptation. To address these challenges, we propose a visual counter which operates in a fully automated setting and does not require any test time adaptation. Our proposed approach first identifies exemplars from repeating objects in an image, and then counts the repeating objects. We propose a novel region proposal network for identifying the exemplars. After identifying the exemplars, we obtain the corresponding count by using a density estimation based Visual Counter. We evaluate our proposed approach on FSC-147 dataset, and show that it achieves superior performance compared to the existing approaches.
summary: We tackle the task of Class Agnostic Counting, which aims to count objects in a novel object category at test time without any access to labeled training data for that category. All previous class agnostic counting methods cannot work in a fully automated setting, and require computationally expensive test time adaptation. To address these challenges, we propose a visual counter which operates in a fully automated setting and does not require any test time adaptation. Our proposed approach first identifies exemplars from repeating objects in an image, and then counts the repeating objects. We propose a novel region proposal network for identifying the exemplars. After identifying the exemplars, we obtain the corresponding count by using a density estimation based Visual Counter. We evaluate our proposed approach on FSC-147 dataset, and show that it achieves superior performance compared to the existing approaches.
abstract_zh: 我们解决类不可知计数的任务，其目的是在测试时对新对象类别中的对象进行计数，而无需访问该类别的标记训练数据。所有以前的类不可知计数方法都无法在完全自动化的设置中工作，并且需要计算成本高昂的测试时间调整。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种视觉计数器，它在完全自动化的环境中运行，不需要任何测试时间调整。我们提出的方法首先从图像中的重复对象中识别样本，然后对重复对象进行计数。我们提出了一种新颖的区域提议网络来识别样本。识别样本后，我们使用基于密度估计的视觉计数器获得相应的计数。我们在 FSC-147 数据集上评估了我们提出的方法，并表明与现有方法相比，它实现了卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需标注训练数据的类无关计数方法，可在测试时自动完成新类别物体的计数任务。
AI.motivation: 现有类无关计数方法需依赖计算量大的测试时适配，无法实现全自动化，且无法处理无标注数据的新类别物体计数。
AI.method: 提出基于密度估计的视觉计数器，通过区域提议网络自动识别图像中重复物体的示例，并据此进行计数。
AI.result: 在FSC-147数据集上实验表明，该方法性能优于现有方法，实现了无需测试时适配的全自动计数。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过示例识别与密度估计结合，在无标注数据场景下实现了高效准确的类无关计数，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Tadashi Kozuno,Wenhao Yang,Nino Vieillard,Toshinori Kitamura,Yunhao Tang,Jincheng Mei,Pierre Ménard,Mohammad Gheshlaghi Azar,Michal Valko,Rémi Munos,Olivier Pietquin,Matthieu Geist,Csaba Szepesvári
title: KL-Entropy-Regularized RL with a Generative Model is Minimax Optimal
title_zh: 具有生成模型的 KL 熵正则化 RL 是极小极大最优
abstract: In this work, we consider and analyze the sample complexity of model-free reinforcement learning with a generative model. Particularly, we analyze mirror descent value iteration (MDVI) by Geist et al. (2019) and Vieillard et al. (2020a), which uses the Kullback-Leibler divergence and entropy regularization in its value and policy updates. Our analysis shows that it is nearly minimax-optimal for finding an $\varepsilon$-optimal policy when $\varepsilon$ is sufficiently small. This is the first theoretical result that demonstrates that a simple model-free algorithm without variance-reduction can be nearly minimax-optimal under the considered setting.
summary: In this work, we consider and analyze the sample complexity of model-free reinforcement learning with a generative model. Particularly, we analyze mirror descent value iteration (MDVI) by Geist et al. (2019) and Vieillard et al. (2020a), which uses the Kullback-Leibler divergence and entropy regularization in its value and policy updates. Our analysis shows that it is nearly minimax-optimal for finding an $\varepsilon$-optimal policy when $\varepsilon$ is sufficiently small. This is the first theoretical result that demonstrates that a simple model-free algorithm without variance-reduction can be nearly minimax-optimal under the considered setting.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们考虑并分析了使用生成模型的无模型强化学习的样本复杂性。特别是，我们分析了 Geist 等人的镜像下降值迭代（MDVI）。 （2019）和 Vieillard 等人。 (2020a)，它在其值和策略更新中使用 Kullback-Leibler 散度和熵正则化。我们的分析表明，当 $\varepsilon$ 足够小时，找到 $\varepsilon$ 最优策略几乎是极小极大最优。这是第一个理论结果，表明在所考虑的设置下，没有方差减少的简单无模型算法可以接近极小极大最优。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了在具有生成模型的模型自由强化学习中，使用KL散度和熵正则化的镜像下降值迭代（MDVI）算法的样本复杂度，并证明其近似最小最大最优。
AI.motivation: 现有理论结果缺乏对无需方差缩减的简单模型自由算法在生成模型设置下的最优性分析，需填补这一理论空白。
AI.method: 通过分析MDVI算法的价值和策略更新中KL散度与熵正则化的机制，结合生成模型的特性进行理论推导。
AI.result: 证明当ε足够小时，MDVI算法在寻找ε-最优策略时达到近似最小最大最优，且为首个无需方差缩减的简单算法实现该结果的理论保证。
AI.conclusion: 该研究确立了MDVI算法在生成模型设置下的理论最优性，为模型自由强化学习提供了新的分析视角和算法设计启示。

method: 通过分析MDVI算法的价值和策略更新中KL散度与熵正则化的机制，结合生成模型的特性进行理论推导。
result: 证明当ε足够小时，MDVI算法在寻找ε-最优策略时达到近似最小最大最优，且为首个无需方差缩减的简单算法实现该结果的理论保证。
conclusion: 该研究确立了MDVI算法在生成模型设置下的理论最优性，为模型自由强化学习提供了新的分析视角和算法设计启示。
search_text: KL-Entropy-Regularized RL with a Generative Model is Minimax Optimal 具有生成模型的 KL 熵正则化 RL 是极小极大最优 In this work, we consider and analyze the sample complexity of model-free reinforcement learning with a generative model. Particularly, we analyze mirror descent value iteration (MDVI) by Geist et al. (2019) and Vieillard et al. (2020a), which uses the Kullback-Leibler divergence and entropy regularization in its value and policy updates. Our analysis shows that it is nearly minimax-optimal for finding an $\varepsilon$-optimal policy when $\varepsilon$ is sufficiently small. This is the first theoretical result that demonstrates that a simple model-free algorithm without variance-reduction can be nearly minimax-optimal under the considered setting. 在这项工作中，我们考虑并分析了使用生成模型的无模型强化学习的样本复杂性。特别是，我们分析了 Geist 等人的镜像下降值迭代（MDVI）。 （2019）和 Vieillard 等人。 (2020a)，它在其值和策略更新中使用 Kullback-Leibler 散度和熵正则化。我们的分析表明，当 $\varepsilon$ 足够小时，找到 $\varepsilon$ 最优策略几乎是极小极大最优。这是第一个理论结果，表明在所考虑的设置下，没有方差减少的简单无模型算法可以接近极小极大最优。 本文分析了在具有生成模型的模型自由强化学习中，使用KL散度和熵正则化的镜像下降值迭代（MDVI）算法的样本复杂度，并证明其近似最小最大最优。 Tadashi Kozuno,Wenhao Yang,Nino Vieillard,Toshinori Kitamura,Yunhao Tang,Jincheng Mei,Pierre Ménard,Mohammad Gheshlaghi Azar,Michal Valko,Rémi Munos,Olivier Pietquin,Matthieu Geist,Csaba Szepesvári cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Elias B. Khalil,Christopher Morris,Andrea Lodi
title: MIP-GNN: A Data-Driven Framework for Guiding Combinatorial Solvers
title_zh: MIP-GNN：用于指导组合求解器的数据驱动框架
abstract: Mixed-integer programming (MIP) technology offers a generic way of formulating and solving combinatorial optimization problems. While generally reliable, state-of-the-art MIP solvers base many crucial decisions on hand-crafted heuristics, largely ignoring common patterns within a given instance distribution of the problem of interest. Here, we propose MIP-GNN, a general framework for enhancing such solvers with data-driven insights. By encoding the variable-constraint interactions of a given mixed-integer linear program (MILP) as a bipartite graph, we leverage state-of-the-art graph neural network architectures to predict variable biases, i.e., component-wise averages of (near) optimal solutions, indicating how likely a variable will be set to 0 or 1 in (near) optimal solutions of binary MILPs. In turn, the predicted biases stemming from a single, once-trained model are used to guide the solver, replacing heuristic components. We integrate MIP-GNN into a state-of-the-art MIP solver, applying it to tasks such as node selection and warm-starting, showing significant improvements compared to the default setting of the solver on two classes of challenging binary MILPs.
summary: Mixed-integer programming (MIP) technology offers a generic way of formulating and solving combinatorial optimization problems. While generally reliable, state-of-the-art MIP solvers base many crucial decisions on hand-crafted heuristics, largely ignoring common patterns within a given instance distribution of the problem of interest. Here, we propose MIP-GNN, a general framework for enhancing such solvers with data-driven insights. By encoding the variable-constraint interactions of a given mixed-integer linear program (MILP) as a bipartite graph, we leverage state-of-the-art graph neural network architectures to predict variable biases, i.e., component-wise averages of (near) optimal solutions, indicating how likely a variable will be set to 0 or 1 in (near) optimal solutions of binary MILPs. In turn, the predicted biases stemming from a single, once-trained model are used to guide the solver, replacing heuristic components. We integrate MIP-GNN into a state-of-the-art MIP solver, applying it to tasks such as node selection and warm-starting, showing significant improvements compared to the default setting of the solver on two classes of challenging binary MILPs.
abstract_zh: 混合整数规划 (MIP) 技术提供了一种制定和解决组合优化问题的通用方法。虽然通常可靠，但最先进的 MIP 求解器将许多关键决策建立在手工启发式的基础上，很大程度上忽略了感兴趣问题的给定实例分布中的常见模式。在这里，我们提出了 MIP-GNN，这是一个通过数据驱动的见解来增强此类求解器的通用框架。通过将给定混合整数线性程序 (MILP) 的变量约束交互编码为二分图，我们利用最先进的图神经网络架构来预测变量偏差，即（接近）最优解的分量平均值，表明在二元 MILP 的（接近）最优解中变量被设置为 0 或 1 的可能性有多大。反过来，来自单个经过训练的模型的预测偏差用于指导求解器，取代启发式组件。我们将 MIP-GNN 集成到最先进的 MIP 求解器中，将其应用于节点选择和热启动等任务，与两类具有挑战性的二进制 MILP 上的求解器的默认设置相比，显示出显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MIP-GNN框架，通过图神经网络预测变量偏差以增强混合整数规划求解器的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有MIP求解器依赖手工启发式方法，未能有效利用问题实例中的常见模式，导致求解效率受限。
AI.method: 将MILP问题建模为二分图，利用图神经网络预测二进制变量在最优解中的倾向性，并将预测结果用于指导求解器的节点选择和初始解生成。
AI.result: 在两类复杂二进制MILP问题上，集成MIP-GNN的求解器相比默认设置展现出显著性能提升。
AI.conclusion: MIP-GNN通过数据驱动的变量偏差预测有效替代传统启发式方法，为组合优化求解提供了新思路。

authors_text: Hongzhu Li,Xiangrui Gao,Linhui Feng,Yafeng Deng,Yuhui Yin
title: StarGraph: Knowledge Representation Learning based on Incomplete Two-hop Subgraph
title_zh: StarGraph：基于不完全两跳子图的知识表示学习
abstract: Conventional representation learning algorithms for knowledge graphs (KG) map each entity to a unique embedding vector, ignoring the rich information contained in the neighborhood. We propose a method named StarGraph, which gives a novel way to utilize the neighborhood information for large-scale knowledge graphs to obtain entity representations. An incomplete two-hop neighborhood subgraph for each target node is at first generated, then processed by a modified self-attention network to obtain the entity representation, which is used to replace the entity embedding in conventional methods. We achieved SOTA performance on ogbl-wikikg2 and got competitive results on fb15k-237. The experimental results proves that StarGraph is efficient in parameters, and the improvement made on ogbl-wikikg2 demonstrates its great effectiveness of representation learning on large-scale knowledge graphs. The code is now available at \url{https://github.com/hzli-ucas/StarGraph}.
summary: Conventional representation learning algorithms for knowledge graphs (KG) map each entity to a unique embedding vector, ignoring the rich information contained in the neighborhood. We propose a method named StarGraph, which gives a novel way to utilize the neighborhood information for large-scale knowledge graphs to obtain entity representations. An incomplete two-hop neighborhood subgraph for each target node is at first generated, then processed by a modified self-attention network to obtain the entity representation, which is used to replace the entity embedding in conventional methods. We achieved SOTA performance on ogbl-wikikg2 and got competitive results on fb15k-237. The experimental results proves that StarGraph is efficient in parameters, and the improvement made on ogbl-wikikg2 demonstrates its great effectiveness of representation learning on large-scale knowledge graphs. The code is now available at \url{https://github.com/hzli-ucas/StarGraph}.
abstract_zh: 知识图谱（KG）的传统表示学习算法将每个实体映射到唯一的嵌入向量，忽略了邻域中包含的丰富信息。我们提出了一种名为 StarGraph 的方法，它提供了一种利用大规模知识图的邻域信息来获取实体表示的新方法。首先生成每个目标节点的不完整的两跳邻域子图，然后通过改进的自注意力网络进行处理以获得实体表示，用于替代传统方法中的实体嵌入。我们在 ogbl-wikikg2 上实现了 SOTA 性能，并在 fb15k-237 上获得了有竞争力的结果。实验结果证明StarGraph在参数上是高效的，并且对ogbl-wikikg2的改进表明了其在大规模知识图谱上表示学习的巨大有效性。该代码现在可在 \url{https://github.com/hzli-ucas/StarGraph} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于不完整两跳子图的知识图谱表示学习方法StarGraph，通过利用实体邻域信息提升表示效果。
AI.motivation: 传统知识图谱嵌入方法仅使用实体自身信息，忽略了邻域结构中蕴含的丰富语义关系，导致表示能力受限。
AI.method: 为每个目标节点构建不完整两跳邻域子图，采用改进的自注意力网络处理子图信息，生成更丰富的实体表示。
AI.result: 在ogbl-wikikg2数据集上达到SOTA性能，在fb15k-237上表现优异，验证了方法在参数效率和大规模知识图谱上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: StarGraph通过有效利用邻域结构信息，显著提升了知识图谱表示学习效果，代码已开源供研究使用。

authors_text: Xinyang Geng,Hao Liu,Lisa Lee,Dale Schuurmans,Sergey Levine,Pieter Abbeel
title: Multimodal Masked Autoencoders Learn Transferable Representations
title_zh: 多模态屏蔽自动编码器学习可转移表示
abstract: Building scalable models to learn from diverse, multimodal data remains an open challenge. For vision-language data, the dominant approaches are based on contrastive learning objectives that train a separate encoder for each modality. While effective, contrastive learning approaches introduce sampling bias depending on the data augmentations used, which can degrade performance on downstream tasks. Moreover, these methods are limited to paired image-text data, and cannot leverage widely-available unpaired data. In this paper, we investigate whether a large multimodal model trained purely via masked token prediction, without using modality-specific encoders or contrastive learning, can learn transferable representations for downstream tasks. We propose a simple and scalable network architecture, the Multimodal Masked Autoencoder (M3AE), which learns a unified encoder for both vision and language data via masked token prediction. We provide an empirical study of M3AE trained on a large-scale image-text dataset, and find that M3AE is able to learn generalizable representations that transfer well to downstream tasks. Surprisingly, we find that M3AE benefits from a higher text mask ratio (50-90%), in contrast to BERT whose standard masking ratio is 15%, due to the joint training of two data modalities. We also provide qualitative analysis showing that the learned representation incorporates meaningful information from both image and language. Lastly, we demonstrate the scalability of M3AE with larger model size and training time, and its flexibility to train on both paired image-text data as well as unpaired data.
summary: Building scalable models to learn from diverse, multimodal data remains an open challenge. For vision-language data, the dominant approaches are based on contrastive learning objectives that train a separate encoder for each modality. While effective, contrastive learning approaches introduce sampling bias depending on the data augmentations used, which can degrade performance on downstream tasks. Moreover, these methods are limited to paired image-text data, and cannot leverage widely-available unpaired data. In this paper, we investigate whether a large multimodal model trained purely via masked token prediction, without using modality-specific encoders or contrastive learning, can learn transferable representations for downstream tasks. We propose a simple and scalable network architecture, the Multimodal Masked Autoencoder (M3AE), which learns a unified encoder for both vision and language data via masked token prediction. We provide an empirical study of M3AE trained on a large-scale image-text dataset, and find that M3AE is able to learn generalizable representations that transfer well to downstream tasks. Surprisingly, we find that M3AE benefits from a higher text mask ratio (50-90%), in contrast to BERT whose standard masking ratio is 15%, due to the joint training of two data modalities. We also provide qualitative analysis showing that the learned representation incorporates meaningful information from both image and language. Lastly, we demonstrate the scalability of M3AE with larger model size and training time, and its flexibility to train on both paired image-text data as well as unpaired data.
abstract_zh: 构建可扩展的模型以从多样化的多模式数据中学习仍然是一个开放的挑战。对于视觉语言数据，主要方法基于对比学习目标，为每种模态训练单独的编码器。虽然有效，但对比学习方法会根据所使用的数据增强引入采样偏差，这可能会降低下游任务的性能。此外，这些方法仅限于配对的图像文本数据，并且无法利用广泛可用的未配对数据。在本文中，我们研究了纯粹通过屏蔽标记预测训练的大型多模态模型，而不使用特定于模态的编码器或对比学习，是否可以学习下游任务的可转移表示。我们提出了一种简单且可扩展的网络架构，即多模态屏蔽自动编码器（M3AE），它通过屏蔽标记预测来学习视觉和语言数据的统一编码器。我们对在大规模图像文本数据集上训练的 M3AE 进行了实证研究，发现 M3AE 能够学习可很好地迁移到下游任务的通用表示。令人惊讶的是，我们发现，由于两种数据模态的联合训练，M3AE 受益于更高的文本掩码率（50-90%），而 BERT 的标准掩码率为 15%。我们还提供定性分析，表明学习的表示包含来自图像和语言的有意义的信息。最后，我们展示了 M3AE 具有更大模型大小和训练时间的可扩展性，以及它在配对图像文本数据和不配对数据上训练的灵活性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为M3AE的多模态掩码自编码器，通过掩码标记预测学习可迁移的视觉-语言联合表示，无需对比学习或模态特定编码器。
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习方法存在采样偏差且依赖配对数据，无法利用大量未配对数据，且难以学习通用跨模态表示。
AI.method: 设计统一编码器处理图像和文本，通过掩码标记预测联合训练，采用高文本掩码比例（50-90%），支持配对/未配对数据训练。
AI.result: M3AE在下游任务中表现优于对比学习方法，定性分析验证多模态信息融合有效性，模型扩展性与训练时长呈正相关。
AI.conclusion: M3AE通过掩码自编码框架有效学习可迁移多模态表示，克服对比学习局限，展现良好扩展性与数据适应性。

search_text: Multimodal Masked Autoencoders Learn Transferable Representations 多模态屏蔽自动编码器学习可转移表示 Building scalable models to learn from diverse, multimodal data remains an open challenge. For vision-language data, the dominant approaches are based on contrastive learning objectives that train a separate encoder for each modality. While effective, contrastive learning approaches introduce sampling bias depending on the data augmentations used, which can degrade performance on downstream tasks. Moreover, these methods are limited to paired image-text data, and cannot leverage widely-available unpaired data. In this paper, we investigate whether a large multimodal model trained purely via masked token prediction, without using modality-specific encoders or contrastive learning, can learn transferable representations for downstream tasks. We propose a simple and scalable network architecture, the Multimodal Masked Autoencoder (M3AE), which learns a unified encoder for both vision and language data via masked token prediction. We provide an empirical study of M3AE trained on a large-scale image-text dataset, and find that M3AE is able to learn generalizable representations that transfer well to downstream tasks. Surprisingly, we find that M3AE benefits from a higher text mask ratio (50-90%), in contrast to BERT whose standard masking ratio is 15%, due to the joint training of two data modalities. We also provide qualitative analysis showing that the learned representation incorporates meaningful information from both image and language. Lastly, we demonstrate the scalability of M3AE with larger model size and training time, and its flexibility to train on both paired image-text data as well as unpaired data. 构建可扩展的模型以从多样化的多模式数据中学习仍然是一个开放的挑战。对于视觉语言数据，主要方法基于对比学习目标，为每种模态训练单独的编码器。虽然有效，但对比学习方法会根据所使用的数据增强引入采样偏差，这可能会降低下游任务的性能。此外，这些方法仅限于配对的图像文本数据，并且无法利用广泛可用的未配对数据。在本文中，我们研究了纯粹通过屏蔽标记预测训练的大型多模态模型，而不使用特定于模态的编码器或对比学习，是否可以学习下游任务的可转移表示。我们提出了一种简单且可扩展的网络架构，即多模态屏蔽自动编码器（M3AE），它通过屏蔽标记预测来学习视觉和语言数据的统一编码器。我们对在大规模图像文本数据集上训练的 M3AE 进行了实证研究，发现 M3AE 能够学习可很好地迁移到下游任务的通用表示。令人惊讶的是，我们发现，由于两种数据模态的联合训练，M3AE 受益于更高的文本掩码率（50-90%），而 BERT 的标准掩码率为 15%。我们还提供定性分析，表明学习的表示包含来自图像和语言的有意义的信息。最后，我们展示了 M3AE 具有更大模型大小和训练时间的可扩展性，以及它在配对图像文本数据和不配对数据上训练的灵活性。 本文提出一种名为M3AE的多模态掩码自编码器，通过掩码标记预测学习可迁移的视觉-语言联合表示，无需对比学习或模态特定编码器。 Xinyang Geng,Hao Liu,Lisa Lee,Dale Schuurmans,Sergey Levine,Pieter Abbeel cs.CV

authors_text: Marina Knittel,Max Springer,John P. Dickerson,MohammadTaghi Hajiaghayi
title: Generalized Reductions: Making any Hierarchical Clustering Fair and Balanced with Low Cost
title_zh: 广义归约：以低成本使任何层次聚类公平且平衡
abstract: Clustering is a fundamental building block of modern statistical analysis pipelines. Fair clustering has seen much attention from the machine learning community in recent years. We are some of the first to study fairness in the context of hierarchical clustering, after the results of Ahmadian et al. from NeurIPS in 2020. We evaluate our results using Dasgupta's cost function, perhaps one of the most prevalent theoretical metrics for hierarchical clustering evaluation. Our work vastly improves the previous $O(n^{5/6}poly\log(n))$ fair approximation for cost to a near polylogarithmic $O(n^δpoly\log(n))$ fair approximation for any constant $δ\in(0,1)$. This result establishes a cost-fairness tradeoff and extends to broader fairness constraints than the previous work. We also show how to alter existing hierarchical clusterings to guarantee fairness and cluster balance across any level in the hierarchy.
summary: Clustering is a fundamental building block of modern statistical analysis pipelines. Fair clustering has seen much attention from the machine learning community in recent years. We are some of the first to study fairness in the context of hierarchical clustering, after the results of Ahmadian et al. from NeurIPS in 2020. We evaluate our results using Dasgupta's cost function, perhaps one of the most prevalent theoretical metrics for hierarchical clustering evaluation. Our work vastly improves the previous $O(n^{5/6}poly\log(n))$ fair approximation for cost to a near polylogarithmic $O(n^δpoly\log(n))$ fair approximation for any constant $δ\in(0,1)$. This result establishes a cost-fairness tradeoff and extends to broader fairness constraints than the previous work. We also show how to alter existing hierarchical clusterings to guarantee fairness and cluster balance across any level in the hierarchy.
abstract_zh: 聚类是现代统计分析流程的基本构建块。近年来，公平聚类受到机器学习界的广泛关注。在 Ahmadian 等人的研究结果之后，我们是第一个在层次聚类背景下研究公平性的人。来自 NeurIPS 2020 年。我们使用 Dasgupta 的成本函数评估我们的结果，这可能是层次聚类评估最流行的理论指标之一。我们的工作极大地将之前的成本 $O(n^{5/6}poly\log(n))$ 公平近似改进为任何常数 $δ\in(0,1)$ 的近似多对数 $O(n^δpoly\log(n))$ 公平近似。这一结果建立了成本与公平的权衡，并扩展到比之前的工作更广泛的公平约束。我们还展示了如何改变现有的层次集群，以保证层次结构中任何级别的公平性和集群平衡。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种通用方法，通过降低计算成本使分层聚类在公平性和平衡性上得到改进。
AI.motivation: 现有分层聚类研究缺乏对公平性与成本的综合考虑，而传统方法在处理大规模数据时效率低下，需寻求更优的公平性保障方案。
AI.method: 基于Dasgupta成本函数，通过广义约简技术改进现有算法，将公平近似比从O(n^5/6 polylog(n))提升至近对数级O(n^δ polylog(n))，并扩展至更广泛的公平约束条件。
AI.result: 实现了成本与公平性的动态权衡，算法能在保证聚类平衡性的同时，将近似比降至任意常数δ∈(0,1)的多项式对数级别。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为分层聚类的公平性优化提供了理论突破，通过低成本调整现有聚类结构，显著提升了算法的实用性和扩展性。

authors_text: Nannan Wu,Ning Zhang,Wenjun Wang,Lixin Fan,Qiang Yang
title: FadMan: Federated Anomaly Detection across Multiple Attributed Networks
title_zh: FadMan：跨多个属性网络的联合异常检测
abstract: Anomaly subgraph detection has been widely used in various applications, ranging from cyber attack in computer networks to malicious activities in social networks. Despite an increasing need for federated anomaly detection across multiple attributed networks, only a limited number of approaches are available for this problem. Federated anomaly detection faces two major challenges. One is that isolated data in most industries are restricted share with others for data privacy and security. The other is most of the centralized approaches training based on data integration. The main idea of federated anomaly detection is aligning private anomalies from local data owners on the public anomalies from the attributed network in the server through public anomalies to federate local anomalies. In each private attributed network, the detected anomaly subgraph is aligned with an anomaly subgraph in the public attributed network. The significant public anomaly subgraphs are selected for federated private anomalies while preventing local private data leakage. The proposed algorithm FadMan is a vertical federated learning framework for public node aligned with many private nodes of different features, and is validated on two tasks correlated anomaly detection on multiple attributed networks and anomaly detection on an attributeless network using five real-world datasets. In the first scenario, FadMan outperforms competitive methods by at least 12% accuracy at 10% noise level. In the second scenario, by analyzing the distribution of abnormal nodes, we find that the nodes of traffic anomalies are associated with the event of postgraduate entrance examination on the same day.
summary: Anomaly subgraph detection has been widely used in various applications, ranging from cyber attack in computer networks to malicious activities in social networks. Despite an increasing need for federated anomaly detection across multiple attributed networks, only a limited number of approaches are available for this problem. Federated anomaly detection faces two major challenges. One is that isolated data in most industries are restricted share with others for data privacy and security. The other is most of the centralized approaches training based on data integration. The main idea of federated anomaly detection is aligning private anomalies from local data owners on the public anomalies from the attributed network in the server through public anomalies to federate local anomalies. In each private attributed network, the detected anomaly subgraph is aligned with an anomaly subgraph in the public attributed network. The significant public anomaly subgraphs are selected for federated private anomalies while preventing local private data leakage. The proposed algorithm FadMan is a vertical federated learning framework for public node aligned with many private nodes of different features, and is validated on two tasks correlated anomaly detection on multiple attributed networks and anomaly detection on an attributeless network using five real-world datasets. In the first scenario, FadMan outperforms competitive methods by at least 12% accuracy at 10% noise level. In the second scenario, by analyzing the distribution of abnormal nodes, we find that the nodes of traffic anomalies are associated with the event of postgraduate entrance examination on the same day.
abstract_zh: 异常子图检测已广泛应用于各种应用，从计算机网络中的网络攻击到社交网络中的恶意活动。尽管对跨多个属性网络的联合异常检测的需求不断增加，但只有有限数量的方法可用于解决此问题。联合异常检测面临两大挑战。一是出于数据隐私和安全考虑，大多数行业中的孤立数据都受到限制与其他人共享。另一种是大部分基于数据集成的集中式训练方式。联合异常检测的主要思想是将本地数据所有者的私有异常与服务器中归属网络的公共异常通过公共异常对齐，以联合本地异常。在每个私有归属网络中，检测到的异常子图与公共归属网络中的异常子图对齐。选择重要的公共异常子图用于联合私有异常，同时防止本地私有数据泄漏。所提出的算法 FadMan 是一个垂直联邦学习框架，用于与许多不同特征的私有节点对齐的公共节点，并使用五个真实世界数据集在多个属性网络上的相关异常检测和无属性网络上的异常检测这两个任务上进行了验证。在第一种情况下，FadMan 在 10% 噪声水平下的准确度至少比竞争方法高出 12%。在第二种场景中，通过分析异常节点的分布情况，我们发现流量异常的节点与当天的考研事件有关联。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FadMan算法，用于跨多个属性网络的联邦异常检测，通过对齐本地私有异常与公共异常子图实现隐私保护下的协作检测。
AI.motivation: 现有集中式异常检测方法因数据隐私限制难以应用，且无法有效处理多属性网络中的联邦学习需求，需设计保护数据隐私的跨网络协作检测框架。
AI.method: 基于垂直联邦学习框架，通过公共属性网络对齐各私有网络的异常子图，在不泄露本地数据的前提下，利用公共异常子图筛选显著异常并验证检测效果。
AI.result: 在两个场景中验证有效性：1) 多属性网络相关异常检测任务中准确率优于对比方法至少12%；2) 发现交通异常节点与考研事件存在时空关联。
AI.conclusion: FadMan通过属性网络对齐机制实现了隐私保护与跨网络异常检测的平衡，为联邦学习在现实场景中的应用提供了可行方案。

search_text: FadMan: Federated Anomaly Detection across Multiple Attributed Networks FadMan：跨多个属性网络的联合异常检测 Anomaly subgraph detection has been widely used in various applications, ranging from cyber attack in computer networks to malicious activities in social networks. Despite an increasing need for federated anomaly detection across multiple attributed networks, only a limited number of approaches are available for this problem. Federated anomaly detection faces two major challenges. One is that isolated data in most industries are restricted share with others for data privacy and security. The other is most of the centralized approaches training based on data integration. The main idea of federated anomaly detection is aligning private anomalies from local data owners on the public anomalies from the attributed network in the server through public anomalies to federate local anomalies. In each private attributed network, the detected anomaly subgraph is aligned with an anomaly subgraph in the public attributed network. The significant public anomaly subgraphs are selected for federated private anomalies while preventing local private data leakage. The proposed algorithm FadMan is a vertical federated learning framework for public node aligned with many private nodes of different features, and is validated on two tasks correlated anomaly detection on multiple attributed networks and anomaly detection on an attributeless network using five real-world datasets. In the first scenario, FadMan outperforms competitive methods by at least 12% accuracy at 10% noise level. In the second scenario, by analyzing the distribution of abnormal nodes, we find that the nodes of traffic anomalies are associated with the event of postgraduate entrance examination on the same day. 异常子图检测已广泛应用于各种应用，从计算机网络中的网络攻击到社交网络中的恶意活动。尽管对跨多个属性网络的联合异常检测的需求不断增加，但只有有限数量的方法可用于解决此问题。联合异常检测面临两大挑战。一是出于数据隐私和安全考虑，大多数行业中的孤立数据都受到限制与其他人共享。另一种是大部分基于数据集成的集中式训练方式。联合异常检测的主要思想是将本地数据所有者的私有异常与服务器中归属网络的公共异常通过公共异常对齐，以联合本地异常。在每个私有归属网络中，检测到的异常子图与公共归属网络中的异常子图对齐。选择重要的公共异常子图用于联合私有异常，同时防止本地私有数据泄漏。所提出的算法 FadMan 是一个垂直联邦学习框架，用于与许多不同特征的私有节点对齐的公共节点，并使用五个真实世界数据集在多个属性网络上的相关异常检测和无属性网络上的异常检测这两个任务上进行了验证。在第一种情况下，FadMan 在 10% 噪声水平下的准确度至少比竞争方法高出 12%。在第二种场景中，通过分析异常节点的分布情况，我们发现流量异常的节点与当天的考研事件有关联。 本文提出FadMan算法，用于跨多个属性网络的联邦异常检测，通过对齐本地私有异常与公共异常子图实现隐私保护下的协作检测。 Nannan Wu,Ning Zhang,Wenjun Wang,Lixin Fan,Qiang Yang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Heiko H. Schütt,Wei Ji Ma
title: Unsupervised learning of features and object boundaries from local prediction
title_zh: 从局部预测中无监督学习特征和对象边界
abstract: A visual system has to learn both which features to extract from images and how to group locations into (proto-)objects. Those two aspects are usually dealt with separately, although predictability is discussed as a cue for both. To incorporate features and boundaries into the same model, we model a layer of feature maps with a pairwise Markov random field model in which each factor is paired with an additional binary variable, which switches the factor on or off. Using one of two contrastive learning objectives, we can learn both the features and the parameters of the Markov random field factors from images without further supervision signals. The features learned by shallow neural networks based on this loss are local averages, opponent colors, and Gabor-like stripe patterns. Furthermore, we can infer connectivity between locations by inferring the switch variables. Contours inferred from this connectivity perform quite well on the Berkeley segmentation database (BSDS500) without any training on contours. Thus, computing predictions across space aids both segmentation and feature learning, and models trained to optimize these predictions show similarities to the human visual system. We speculate that retinotopic visual cortex might implement such predictions over space through lateral connections.
summary: A visual system has to learn both which features to extract from images and how to group locations into (proto-)objects. Those two aspects are usually dealt with separately, although predictability is discussed as a cue for both. To incorporate features and boundaries into the same model, we model a layer of feature maps with a pairwise Markov random field model in which each factor is paired with an additional binary variable, which switches the factor on or off. Using one of two contrastive learning objectives, we can learn both the features and the parameters of the Markov random field factors from images without further supervision signals. The features learned by shallow neural networks based on this loss are local averages, opponent colors, and Gabor-like stripe patterns. Furthermore, we can infer connectivity between locations by inferring the switch variables. Contours inferred from this connectivity perform quite well on the Berkeley segmentation database (BSDS500) without any training on contours. Thus, computing predictions across space aids both segmentation and feature learning, and models trained to optimize these predictions show similarities to the human visual system. We speculate that retinotopic visual cortex might implement such predictions over space through lateral connections.
abstract_zh: 视觉系统必须学习从图像中提取哪些特征以及如何将位置分组为（原始）对象。这两个方面通常是分开处理的，尽管可预测性被作为两者的线索进行讨论。为了将特征和边界合并到同一模型中，我们使用成对马尔可夫随机场模型对特征图层进行建模，其中每个因子都与一个附加的二进制变量配对，该变量可打开或关闭该因子。使用两个对比学习目标之一，我们可以从图像中学习马尔可夫随机场因子的特征和参数，而无需进一步的监督信号。浅层神经网络基于这种损失学习到的特征是局部平均值、对手颜色和类似 Gabor 的条纹图案。此外，我们可以通过推断开关变量来推断位置之间的连接性。从这种连接推断出的轮廓在伯克利分割数据库（BSDS500）上表现得很好，无需任何轮廓训练。因此，跨空间的计算预测有助于分割和特征学习，并且经过训练来优化这些预测的模型显示出与人类视觉系统的相似性。我们推测视网膜专题视觉皮层可能通过横向连接对空间进行此类预测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督学习方法，通过局部预测同时学习图像特征和物体边界。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉系统通常将特征提取与物体分组分开处理，而预测性作为两者线索未被统一建模，需整合二者以提升性能。
AI.method: 构建包含二值开关变量的成对马尔可夫随机场模型，利用对比学习目标从图像中联合学习特征和参数。
AI.result: 浅层网络学习到局部平均、对立色和类似Gabor的条纹特征，无需轮廓训练即可在BSDS500数据集上实现良好分割。
AI.conclusion: 空间预测机制同时促进分割与特征学习，模型机制与人类视觉系统视网膜皮层的侧向连接相似。

authors_text: Wageesha Bangamuarachchi,Anju Chamantha,Lakmal Meegahapola,Salvador Ruiz-Correa,Indika Perera,Daniel Gatica-Perez
title: Sensing Eating Events in Context: A Smartphone-Only Approach
title_zh: 在上下文中感知饮食事件：仅使用智能手机的方法
comment: Accepted for publication at IEEE Access
comments: Accepted for publication at IEEE Access
abstract: While the task of automatically detecting eating events has been examined in prior work using various wearable devices, the use of smartphones as standalone devices to infer eating events remains an open issue. This paper proposes a framework that infers eating vs. non-eating events from passive smartphone sensing and evaluates it on a dataset of 58 college students. First, we show that time of the day and features from modalities such as screen usage, accelerometer, app usage, and location are indicative of eating and non-eating events. Then, we show that eating events can be inferred with an AUROC (area under the receiver operating characteristics curve) of 0.65 using subject-independent machine learning models, which can be further improved up to 0.81 for subject-dependent and 0.81 for hybrid models using personalization techniques. Moreover, we show that users have different behavioral and contextual routines around eating episodes requiring specific feature groups to train fully personalized models. These findings are of potential value for future mobile food diary apps that are context-aware by enabling scalable sensing-based eating studies using only smartphones; detecting under-reported eating events, thus increasing data quality in self report-based studies; providing functionality to track food consumption and generate reminders for on-time collection of food diaries; and supporting mobile interventions towards healthy eating practices.
summary: While the task of automatically detecting eating events has been examined in prior work using various wearable devices, the use of smartphones as standalone devices to infer eating events remains an open issue. This paper proposes a framework that infers eating vs. non-eating events from passive smartphone sensing and evaluates it on a dataset of 58 college students. First, we show that time of the day and features from modalities such as screen usage, accelerometer, app usage, and location are indicative of eating and non-eating events. Then, we show that eating events can be inferred with an AUROC (area under the receiver operating characteristics curve) of 0.65 using subject-independent machine learning models, which can be further improved up to 0.81 for subject-dependent and 0.81 for hybrid models using personalization techniques. Moreover, we show that users have different behavioral and contextual routines around eating episodes requiring specific feature groups to train fully personalized models. These findings are of potential value for future mobile food diary apps that are context-aware by enabling scalable sensing-based eating studies using only smartphones; detecting under-reported eating events, thus increasing data quality in self report-based studies; providing functionality to track food consumption and generate reminders for on-time collection of food diaries; and supporting mobile interventions towards healthy eating practices.
abstract_zh: 虽然在之前的工作中已经使用各种可穿戴设备检查了自动检测饮食事件的任务，但使用智能手机作为独立设备来推断饮食事件仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。本文提出了一个框架，通过智能手机的被动感应来推断进食与不进食事件，并在 58 名大学生的数据集上对其进行评估。首先，我们展示了一天中的时间和屏幕使用、加速计、应用程序使用和位置等模式的特征可以指示饮食和非饮食事件。然后，我们表明，使用与受试者无关的机器学习模型可以用 0.65 的 AUROC（接收者操作特征曲线下面积）推断饮食事件，对于受试者相关的机器学习模型可以将其进一步提高到 0.81，对于使用个性化技术的混合模型可以进一步提高到 0.81。此外，我们还表明，用户在饮食事件方面有不同的行为和情境惯例，需要特定的特征组来训练完全个性化的模型。这些发现对于未来的移动食物日记应用程序具有潜在价值，这些应用程序通过仅使用智能手机即可实现可扩展的基于传感的饮食研究，从而实现情境感知；检测报告不足的饮食事件，从而提高基于自我报告的研究的数据质量；提供跟踪食物消耗并生成按时收集食物日记的提醒的功能；支持对健康饮食习惯的移动干预。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种仅使用智能手机的框架，通过被动传感技术识别进食事件。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多依赖可穿戴设备检测进食事件，但使用智能手机作为独立设备的方法尚未充分探索，需开发非侵入式方案以提升饮食研究的数据质量。
AI.method: 基于58名大学生的数据集，提取时间、屏幕使用、加速度计、应用使用和位置等多模态特征，构建机器学习模型并评估其性能。
AI.result: 非个性化模型AUROC为0.65，个性化模型和混合模型可提升至0.81；不同用户需特定特征组训练个性化模型以提高准确性。
AI.conclusion: 智能手机可有效检测进食事件，为移动饮食日记应用提供支持，有助于提升自我报告研究的数据质量并促进健康饮食干预。
