authors_text: Martin R. Albrecht,Yixin Shen
title: Quantum Augmented Dual Attack
title_zh: 量子增强双重攻击
comment: Error in the code of the previous version and updates to the estimates in the paper
comments: Error in the code of the previous version and updates to the estimates in the paper
abstract: We present a quantum augmented variant of the dual lattice attack on the Learning with Errors (LWE) problem, using classical memory with quantum random access (QRACM). Applying our results to lattice parameters from the literature, we find that our algorithm outperforms previous algorithms, assuming unit cost access to a QRACM. On a technical level, we show how to obtain a quantum speedup on the search for Fast Fourier Transform (FFT) coefficients above a given threshold by leveraging the relative sparseness of the FFT and using quantum amplitude estimation. We also discuss the applicability of the Quantum Fourier Transform in this context. Furthermore, we give a more rigorous analysis of the classical and quantum expected complexity of guessing part of the secret vector where coefficients follow a discrete Gaussian (mod \(q\)).
summary: We present a quantum augmented variant of the dual lattice attack on the Learning with Errors (LWE) problem, using classical memory with quantum random access (QRACM). Applying our results to lattice parameters from the literature, we find that our algorithm outperforms previous algorithms, assuming unit cost access to a QRACM. On a technical level, we show how to obtain a quantum speedup on the search for Fast Fourier Transform (FFT) coefficients above a given threshold by leveraging the relative sparseness of the FFT and using quantum amplitude estimation. We also discuss the applicability of the Quantum Fourier Transform in this context. Furthermore, we give a more rigorous analysis of the classical and quantum expected complexity of guessing part of the secret vector where coefficients follow a discrete Gaussian (mod \(q\)).
abstract_zh: 我们使用具有量子随机存取（QRACM）的经典存储器，提出了针对错误学习（LWE）问题的双晶格攻击的量子增强变体。将我们的结果应用于文献中的晶格参数，我们发现我们的算法优于以前的算法，假设访问 QRACM 的单位成本。在技​​术层面上，我们展示了如何通过利用 FFT 的相对稀疏性并使用量子幅度估计，在搜索高于给定阈值的快速傅里叶变换 (FFT) 系数时获得量子加速。我们还讨论了量子傅立叶变换在这种情况下的适用性。此外，我们对秘密向量的猜测部分的经典和量子预期复杂性进行了更严格的分析，其中系数遵循离散高斯 (mod \(q\))。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于量子随机存取存储器（QRACM）的量子增强型双格攻击算法，用于改进学习误差（LWE）问题的攻击效率。
AI.motivation: 传统双格攻击在解决LWE问题时存在效率瓶颈，而量子计算技术可能为格密码攻击提供新的优化方向。
AI.method: 结合QRACM与量子振幅估计技术，加速FFT系数阈值搜索；利用量子傅里叶变换特性，并对离散高斯分布下的秘密向量猜测进行复杂度分析。
AI.result: 在文献参数下，该算法假设QRACM单位成本时优于现有方法，且实现了对部分秘密向量更严格的复杂度分析。
AI.conclusion: 量子增强方法可有效提升LWE攻击效率，但实际效果依赖于QRACM的可行性，需进一步研究量子硬件实现。

search_text: Quantum Augmented Dual Attack 量子增强双重攻击 We present a quantum augmented variant of the dual lattice attack on the Learning with Errors (LWE) problem, using classical memory with quantum random access (QRACM). Applying our results to lattice parameters from the literature, we find that our algorithm outperforms previous algorithms, assuming unit cost access to a QRACM. On a technical level, we show how to obtain a quantum speedup on the search for Fast Fourier Transform (FFT) coefficients above a given threshold by leveraging the relative sparseness of the FFT and using quantum amplitude estimation. We also discuss the applicability of the Quantum Fourier Transform in this context. Furthermore, we give a more rigorous analysis of the classical and quantum expected complexity of guessing part of the secret vector where coefficients follow a discrete Gaussian (mod \(q\)). 我们使用具有量子随机存取（QRACM）的经典存储器，提出了针对错误学习（LWE）问题的双晶格攻击的量子增强变体。将我们的结果应用于文献中的晶格参数，我们发现我们的算法优于以前的算法，假设访问 QRACM 的单位成本。在技​​术层面上，我们展示了如何通过利用 FFT 的相对稀疏性并使用量子幅度估计，在搜索高于给定阈值的快速傅里叶变换 (FFT) 系数时获得量子加速。我们还讨论了量子傅立叶变换在这种情况下的适用性。此外，我们对秘密向量的猜测部分的经典和量子预期复杂性进行了更严格的分析，其中系数遵循离散高斯 (mod \(q\))。 本文提出一种基于量子随机存取存储器（QRACM）的量子增强型双格攻击算法，用于改进学习误差（LWE）问题的攻击效率。 Martin R. Albrecht,Yixin Shen quant-ph,cs.CR,cs.DS

authors_text: Yan Gao,Chenggang Bai,Quan Quan
title: Robust Distributed Control within a Curve Virtual Tube for a Robotic Swarm under Self-Localization Drift and Precise Relative Navigation
title_zh: 自定位漂移和精确相对导航下机器人群曲线虚拟管内的鲁棒分布式控制
abstract: To guide the movement of a robotic swarm in a corridor-like environment, a curve virtual tube with no obstacle inside is designed in our previous work. This paper generalizes the controller design to the condition that all robots have self-localization drifts and precise relative navigation, where the flocking algorithm is introduced to reduce the negative impact of the self-localization drift. It is shown that the cohesion behavior and the velocity alignment behavior are able to reduce the influence of the position measurement drift and the velocity measurement error, respectively. For the convenience in practical use, a modified vector field controller with five control terms is put forward. Finally, the effectiveness of the proposed method is validated by numerical simulations and real experiments.
summary: To guide the movement of a robotic swarm in a corridor-like environment, a curve virtual tube with no obstacle inside is designed in our previous work. This paper generalizes the controller design to the condition that all robots have self-localization drifts and precise relative navigation, where the flocking algorithm is introduced to reduce the negative impact of the self-localization drift. It is shown that the cohesion behavior and the velocity alignment behavior are able to reduce the influence of the position measurement drift and the velocity measurement error, respectively. For the convenience in practical use, a modified vector field controller with five control terms is put forward. Finally, the effectiveness of the proposed method is validated by numerical simulations and real experiments.
abstract_zh: 为了引导机器人群在类似走廊的环境中移动，我们在之前的工作中设计了一个内部没有障碍物的曲线虚拟管道。本文将控制器设计推广到所有机器人都具有自定位漂移和精确相对导航的情况，其中引入集群算法来减少自定位漂移的负面影响。结果表明，内聚行为和速度对准行为能够分别减少位置测量漂移和速度测量误差的影响。为了方便实际使用，提出了一种改进的具有五个控制项的矢量场控制器。最后，通过数值模拟和真实实验验证了所提方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在存在自定位漂移和精确相对导航条件下，基于曲线虚拟管的机器人集群鲁棒分布式控制方法。
AI.motivation: 现有曲线虚拟管方法未考虑机器人自定位漂移问题，而实际应用中定位误差会显著影响集群控制性能，需提升系统鲁棒性。
AI.method: 结合群体算法的凝聚行为与速度对齐行为分别抑制位置漂移和速度误差，设计包含五项控制因子的改进向量场控制器。
AI.result: 通过数值仿真和物理实验验证了控制器在定位漂移场景下仍能保持集群轨迹跟踪与编队稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了自定位漂移对机器人集群控制的干扰，为复杂环境下的分布式控制提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Hayssam Dahrouj,Shasha Liu,Mohamed-Slim Alouini
title: Machine Learning-Based User Scheduling in Integrated Satellite-HAPS-Ground Networks
title_zh: 卫星-HAPS-地面集成网络中基于机器学习的用户调度
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2204.13257
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2204.13257
abstract: Integrated space-air-ground networks promise to offer a valuable solution space for empowering the sixth generation of communication networks (6G), particularly in the context of connecting the unconnected and ultraconnecting the connected. Such digital inclusion thrive makes resource management problems, especially those accounting for load-balancing considerations, of particular interest. The conventional model-based optimization methods, however, often fail to meet the real-time processing and quality-of-service needs, due to the high heterogeneity of the space-air-ground networks, and the typical complexity of the classical algorithms. Given the premises of artificial intelligence at automating wireless networks design and the large-scale heterogeneity of non-terrestrial networks, this paper focuses on showcasing the prospects of machine learning in the context of user scheduling in integrated space-air-ground communications. The paper first overviews the most relevant state-of-the art in the context of machine learning applications to the resource allocation problems, with a dedicated attention to space-air-ground networks. The paper then proposes, and shows the benefit of, one specific use case that uses ensembling deep neural networks for optimizing the user scheduling policies in integrated space-high altitude platform station (HAPS)-ground networks. Finally, the paper sheds light on the challenges and open issues that promise to spur the integration of machine learning in space-air-ground networks, namely, online HAPS power adaptation, learning-based channel sensing, data-driven multi-HAPSs resource management, and intelligent flying taxis-empowered systems.

abstract_zh: 集成的空空地网络有望为第六代通信网络（6G）提供宝贵的解决方案空间，特别是在连接未连接和超连接连接的背景下。这种数字包容性的蓬勃发展使得资源管理问题特别令人感兴趣，特别是那些考虑负载平衡的问题。然而，由于空-空-地网络的高度异构性以及经典算法的典型复杂性，传统的基于模型的优化方法往往无法满足实时处理和服务质量的需求。考虑到人工智能在无线网络设计自动化方面的前提以及非地面网络的大规模异构性，本文重点展示了机器学习在空地一体化通信中用户调度方面的前景。本文首先概述了机器学习应用到资源分配问题的最相关的最新技术，特别关注空-空-地网络。然后，本文提出并展示了一种使用集成深度神经网络来优化空间-高空平台站（HAPS）-地面综合网络中的用户调度策略的具体用例，并展示了其优点。最后，本文阐述了有望促进机器学习在空地网络中集成的挑战和未解决的问题，即在线 HAPS 功率适应、基于学习的通道感知、数据驱动的多 HAPS 资源管理和智能飞行出租车授权系统。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在综合卫星-高海拔平台站（HAPS）-地面网络中应用机器学习优化用户调度策略，以解决资源分配和负载均衡问题。
AI.motivation: 传统优化方法难以应对空天地网络的高异构性和复杂性，无法满足6G通信的实时性与服务质量需求，需借助机器学习实现智能化资源管理。
AI.method: 概述机器学习在资源分配中的最新研究，提出基于集成深度神经网络的用户调度优化框架，并分析其在空天地网络中的适用性。
AI.result: 验证了机器学习方法在用户调度中的有效性，同时指出在线HAPS功率调节、多HAPS资源管理等技术挑战需进一步研究。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习为6G空天地网络资源管理提供新思路，但需突破实时学习、多节点协同等关键技术瓶颈以实现大规模应用。

result: 验证了机器学习方法在用户调度中的有效性，同时指出在线HAPS功率调节、多HAPS资源管理等技术挑战需进一步研究。
conclusion: 机器学习为6G空天地网络资源管理提供新思路，但需突破实时学习、多节点协同等关键技术瓶颈以实现大规模应用。
search_text: Machine Learning-Based User Scheduling in Integrated Satellite-HAPS-Ground Networks 卫星-HAPS-地面集成网络中基于机器学习的用户调度 Integrated space-air-ground networks promise to offer a valuable solution space for empowering the sixth generation of communication networks (6G), particularly in the context of connecting the unconnected and ultraconnecting the connected. Such digital inclusion thrive makes resource management problems, especially those accounting for load-balancing considerations, of particular interest. The conventional model-based optimization methods, however, often fail to meet the real-time processing and quality-of-service needs, due to the high heterogeneity of the space-air-ground networks, and the typical complexity of the classical algorithms. Given the premises of artificial intelligence at automating wireless networks design and the large-scale heterogeneity of non-terrestrial networks, this paper focuses on showcasing the prospects of machine learning in the context of user scheduling in integrated space-air-ground communications. The paper first overviews the most relevant state-of-the art in the context of machine learning applications to the resource allocation problems, with a dedicated attention to space-air-ground networks. The paper then proposes, and shows the benefit of, one specific use case that uses ensembling deep neural networks for optimizing the user scheduling policies in integrated space-high altitude platform station (HAPS)-ground networks. Finally, the paper sheds light on the challenges and open issues that promise to spur the integration of machine learning in space-air-ground networks, namely, online HAPS power adaptation, learning-based channel sensing, data-driven multi-HAPSs resource management, and intelligent flying taxis-empowered systems. 集成的空空地网络有望为第六代通信网络（6G）提供宝贵的解决方案空间，特别是在连接未连接和超连接连接的背景下。这种数字包容性的蓬勃发展使得资源管理问题特别令人感兴趣，特别是那些考虑负载平衡的问题。然而，由于空-空-地网络的高度异构性以及经典算法的典型复杂性，传统的基于模型的优化方法往往无法满足实时处理和服务质量的需求。考虑到人工智能在无线网络设计自动化方面的前提以及非地面网络的大规模异构性，本文重点展示了机器学习在空地一体化通信中用户调度方面的前景。本文首先概述了机器学习应用到资源分配问题的最相关的最新技术，特别关注空-空-地网络。然后，本文提出并展示了一种使用集成深度神经网络来优化空间-高空平台站（HAPS）-地面综合网络中的用户调度策略的具体用例，并展示了其优点。最后，本文阐述了有望促进机器学习在空地网络中集成的挑战和未解决的问题，即在线 HAPS 功率适应、基于学习的通道感知、数据驱动的多 HAPS 资源管理和智能飞行出租车授权系统。 本文探讨了在综合卫星-高海拔平台站（HAPS）-地面网络中应用机器学习优化用户调度策略，以解决资源分配和负载均衡问题。 Hayssam Dahrouj,Shasha Liu,Mohamed-Slim Alouini cs.AI

authors_text: Mei Wang,Weihong Deng
title: Cycle Label-Consistent Networks for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 用于无监督域适应的循环标签一致网络
abstract: Domain adaptation aims to leverage a labeled source domain to learn a classifier for the unlabeled target domain with a different distribution. Previous methods mostly match the distribution between two domains by global or class alignment. However, global alignment methods cannot achieve a fine-grained class-to-class overlap; class alignment methods supervised by pseudo-labels cannot guarantee their reliability. In this paper, we propose a simple yet efficient domain adaptation method, i.e. Cycle Label-Consistent Network (CLCN), by exploiting the cycle consistency of classification label, which applies dual cross-domain nearest centroid classification procedures to generate a reliable self-supervised signal for the discrimination in the target domain. The cycle label-consistent loss reinforces the consistency between ground-truth labels and pseudo-labels of source samples leading to statistically similar latent representations between source and target domains. This new loss can easily be added to any existing classification network with almost no computational overhead. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on MNIST-USPS-SVHN, Office-31, Office-Home and Image CLEF-DA benchmarks. Results validate that the proposed method can alleviate the negative influence of falsely-labeled samples and learn more discriminative features, leading to the absolute improvement over source-only model by 9.4% on Office-31 and 6.3% on Image CLEF-DA.
summary: Domain adaptation aims to leverage a labeled source domain to learn a classifier for the unlabeled target domain with a different distribution. Previous methods mostly match the distribution between two domains by global or class alignment. However, global alignment methods cannot achieve a fine-grained class-to-class overlap; class alignment methods supervised by pseudo-labels cannot guarantee their reliability. In this paper, we propose a simple yet efficient domain adaptation method, i.e. Cycle Label-Consistent Network (CLCN), by exploiting the cycle consistency of classification label, which applies dual cross-domain nearest centroid classification procedures to generate a reliable self-supervised signal for the discrimination in the target domain. The cycle label-consistent loss reinforces the consistency between ground-truth labels and pseudo-labels of source samples leading to statistically similar latent representations between source and target domains. This new loss can easily be added to any existing classification network with almost no computational overhead. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on MNIST-USPS-SVHN, Office-31, Office-Home and Image CLEF-DA benchmarks. Results validate that the proposed method can alleviate the negative influence of falsely-labeled samples and learn more discriminative features, leading to the absolute improvement over source-only model by 9.4% on Office-31 and 6.3% on Image CLEF-DA.
abstract_zh: 域适应旨在利用标记的源域来学习具有不同分布的未标记的目标域的分类器。以前的方法主要通过全局或类对齐来匹配两个域之间的分布。然而，全局对齐方法无法实现细粒度的类与类之间的重叠；由伪标签监督的类对齐方法不能保证其可靠性。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的域适应方法，即循环标签一致性网络（CLCN），通过利用分类标签的循环一致性，该方法应用双跨域最近质心分类程序来生成可靠的自监督信号以在目标域中进行区分。循环标签一致性损失增强了源样本的真实标签和伪标签之间的一致性，从而导致源域和目标域之间统计上相似的潜在表示。这种新的损失可以很容易地添加到任何现有的分类网络中，几乎没有计算开销。我们在 MNIST-USPS-SVHN、Office-31、Office-Home 和 Image CLEF-DA 基准测试中证明了我们方法的有效性。结果验证了该方法可以减轻错误标记样本的负面影响，并学习更多判别性特征，在 Office-31 上比纯源模型绝对提高 9.4%，在 Image CLEF-DA 上比纯源模型提高 6.3%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Cycle Label-Consistent Network (CLCN)的无监督域适应方法，通过循环标签一致性损失解决域间分布差异问题。
AI.motivation: 现有域适应方法存在全局对齐无法实现细粒度类别重叠、基于伪标签的类别对齐可靠性不足的问题，需设计更稳健的标签一致性机制。
AI.method: 利用分类标签的循环一致性，通过双跨域最近质心分类生成自监督信号，设计循环标签一致性损失强化源域真实标签与目标域伪标签的一致性。
AI.result: 在MNIST-USPS-SVHN、Office-31等基准测试中，该方法在Office-31上较源域模型提升9.4%，在Image CLEF-DA上提升6.3%，有效缓解了误标签影响。
AI.conclusion: CLCN通过标签一致性约束实现了跨域潜在表示的统计相似性，以较低计算成本提升了域适应性能，为无监督域适应提供了新思路。

authors_text: Bin Lu,Xiaoying Gan,Lina Yang,Weinan Zhang,Luoyi Fu,Xinbing Wang
title: Geometer: Graph Few-Shot Class-Incremental Learning via Prototype Representation
title_zh: 几何：图少镜头类-通过原型表示进行增量学习
abstract: With the tremendous expansion of graphs data, node classification shows its great importance in many real-world applications. Existing graph neural network based methods mainly focus on classifying unlabeled nodes within fixed classes with abundant labeling. However, in many practical scenarios, graph evolves with emergence of new nodes and edges. Novel classes appear incrementally along with few labeling due to its newly emergence or lack of exploration. In this paper, we focus on this challenging but practical graph few-shot class-incremental learning (GFSCIL) problem and propose a novel method called Geometer. Instead of replacing and retraining the fully connected neural network classifer, Geometer predicts the label of a node by finding the nearest class prototype. Prototype is a vector representing a class in the metric space. With the pop-up of novel classes, Geometer learns and adjusts the attention-based prototypes by observing the geometric proximity, uniformity and separability. Teacher-student knowledge distillation and biased sampling are further introduced to mitigate catastrophic forgetting and unbalanced labeling problem respectively. Experimental results on four public datasets demonstrate that Geometer achieves a substantial improvement of 9.46% to 27.60% over state-of-the-art methods.
summary: With the tremendous expansion of graphs data, node classification shows its great importance in many real-world applications. Existing graph neural network based methods mainly focus on classifying unlabeled nodes within fixed classes with abundant labeling. However, in many practical scenarios, graph evolves with emergence of new nodes and edges. Novel classes appear incrementally along with few labeling due to its newly emergence or lack of exploration. In this paper, we focus on this challenging but practical graph few-shot class-incremental learning (GFSCIL) problem and propose a novel method called Geometer. Instead of replacing and retraining the fully connected neural network classifer, Geometer predicts the label of a node by finding the nearest class prototype. Prototype is a vector representing a class in the metric space. With the pop-up of novel classes, Geometer learns and adjusts the attention-based prototypes by observing the geometric proximity, uniformity and separability. Teacher-student knowledge distillation and biased sampling are further introduced to mitigate catastrophic forgetting and unbalanced labeling problem respectively. Experimental results on four public datasets demonstrate that Geometer achieves a substantial improvement of 9.46% to 27.60% over state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 随着图数据的巨大扩展，节点分类在许多实际应用中显示出其重要性。现有的基于图神经网络的方法主要集中于对具有丰富标记的固定类中的未标记节点进行分类。然而，在许多实际场景中，图随着新节点和边的出现而演变。由于新出现或缺乏探索，新类别逐渐出现，并且很少有标签。在本文中，我们专注于这个具有挑战性但实用的图少镜头类增量学习（GFSCIL）问题，并提出了一种称为 Geometer 的新颖方法。 Geometry 不是替换和重新训练全连接的神经网络分类器，而是通过查找最近的类原型来预测节点的标签。原型是表示度量空间中的类的向量。随着新类的弹出，Geometry 通过观察几何接近性、均匀性和可分离性来学习和调整基于注意力的原型。进一步引入师生知识蒸馏和有偏抽样来分别减轻灾难性遗忘和不平衡标签问题。在四个公共数据集上的实验结果表明，Geometry 比最先进的方法实现了 9.46% 至 27.60% 的大幅改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Geometer的新方法，用于解决图数据中随时间演进且新类别不断出现的少样本类别增量学习问题。
AI.motivation: 现有图神经网络方法难以处理图结构动态变化、新类别逐步出现且标注数据稀缺的现实场景，亟需一种无需重新训练分类器的增量学习框架。
AI.method: 通过构建基于几何特性的类原型表示，利用注意力机制动态调整原型向量，并结合知识蒸馏与偏差采样技术缓解灾难性遗忘和标签不平衡问题。
AI.result: 在四个公开数据集上实验表明，Geometer相比现有方法在准确率上提升了9.46%至27.60%。
AI.conclusion: Geometer通过几何感知的原型学习机制有效解决了图数据类别增量学习中的核心挑战，为动态图分析提供了新思路。

Experimental results on four public datasets demonstrate that Geometer achieves a substantial improvement of 9.46% to 27.60% over state-of-the-art methods. 随着图数据的巨大扩展，节点分类在许多实际应用中显示出其重要性。现有的基于图神经网络的方法主要集中于对具有丰富标记的固定类中的未标记节点进行分类。然而，在许多实际场景中，图随着新节点和边的出现而演变。由于新出现或缺乏探索，新类别逐渐出现，并且很少有标签。在本文中，我们专注于这个具有挑战性但实用的图少镜头类增量学习（GFSCIL）问题，并提出了一种称为 Geometer 的新颖方法。 Geometry 不是替换和重新训练全连接的神经网络分类器，而是通过查找最近的类原型来预测节点的标签。原型是表示度量空间中的类的向量。随着新类的弹出，Geometry 通过观察几何接近性、均匀性和可分离性来学习和调整基于注意力的原型。进一步引入师生知识蒸馏和有偏抽样来分别减轻灾难性遗忘和不平衡标签问题。在四个公共数据集上的实验结果表明，Geometry 比最先进的方法实现了 9.46% 至 27.60% 的大幅改进。 本文提出了一种名为Geometer的新方法，用于解决图数据中随时间演进且新类别不断出现的少样本类别增量学习问题。 Bin Lu,Xiaoying Gan,Lina Yang,Weinan Zhang,Luoyi Fu,Xinbing Wang cs.AI

authors_text: Bowen Zhao,Wei-Neng Chen,Feng-Feng Wei,Ximeng Liu,Qingqi Pei,Jun Zhang
title: Evolution as a Service: A Privacy-Preserving Genetic Algorithm for Combinatorial Optimization
title_zh: 进化即服务：用于组合优化的隐私保护遗传算法
abstract: Evolutionary algorithms (EAs), such as the genetic algorithm (GA), offer an elegant way to handle combinatorial optimization problems (COPs). However, limited by expertise and resources, most users do not have enough capability to implement EAs to solve COPs. An intuitive and promising solution is to outsource evolutionary operations to a cloud server, whilst it suffers from privacy concerns. To this end, this paper proposes a novel computing paradigm, evolution as a service (EaaS), where a cloud server renders evolutionary computation services for users without sacrificing users' privacy. Inspired by the idea of EaaS, this paper designs PEGA, a novel privacy-preserving GA for COPs. Specifically, PEGA enables users outsourcing COPs to the cloud server holding a competitive GA and approximating the optimal solution in a privacy-preserving manner. PEGA features the following characteristics. First, any user without expertise and enough resources can solve her COPs. Second, PEGA does not leak contents of optimization problems, i.e., users' privacy. Third, PEGA has the same capability as the conventional GA to approximate the optimal solution. We implements PEGA falling in a twin-server architecture and evaluates it in the traveling salesman problem (TSP, a widely known COP). Particularly, we utilize encryption cryptography to protect users' privacy and carefully design a suit of secure computing protocols to support evolutionary operators of GA on encrypted data. Privacy analysis demonstrates that PEGA does not disclose the contents of the COP to the cloud server. Experimental evaluation results on four TSP datasets show that PEGA is as effective as the conventional GA in approximating the optimal solution.
summary: Evolutionary algorithms (EAs), such as the genetic algorithm (GA), offer an elegant way to handle combinatorial optimization problems (COPs). However, limited by expertise and resources, most users do not have enough capability to implement EAs to solve COPs. An intuitive and promising solution is to outsource evolutionary operations to a cloud server, whilst it suffers from privacy concerns. To this end, this paper proposes a novel computing paradigm, evolution as a service (EaaS), where a cloud server renders evolutionary computation services for users without sacrificing users' privacy. Inspired by the idea of EaaS, this paper designs PEGA, a novel privacy-preserving GA for COPs. Specifically, PEGA enables users outsourcing COPs to the cloud server holding a competitive GA and approximating the optimal solution in a privacy-preserving manner. PEGA features the following characteristics. First, any user without expertise and enough resources can solve her COPs. Second, PEGA does not leak contents of optimization problems, i.e., users' privacy. Third, PEGA has the same capability as the conventional GA to approximate the optimal solution. We implements PEGA falling in a twin-server architecture and evaluates it in the traveling salesman problem (TSP, a widely known COP). Particularly, we utilize encryption cryptography to protect users' privacy and carefully design a suit of secure computing protocols to support evolutionary operators of GA on encrypted data. Privacy analysis demonstrates that PEGA does not disclose the contents of the COP to the cloud server. Experimental evaluation results on four TSP datasets show that PEGA is as effective as the conventional GA in approximating the optimal solution.
abstract_zh: 进化算法 (EA)，例如遗传算法 (GA)，提供了一种处理组合优化问题 (COP) 的优雅方法。然而，由于专业知识和资源的限制，大多数用户没有足够的能力来实施 EA 来解决 COP。一个直观且有前途的解决方案是将进化操作外包给云服务器，但它存在隐私问题。为此，本文提出了一种新颖的计算范式，即进化即服务（EaaS），其中云服务器在不牺牲用户隐私的情况下为用户提供进化计算服务。受 EaaS 思想的启发，本文设计了 PEGA，一种新颖的 COP 隐私保护 GA。具体来说，PEGA 使用户能够将 COP 外包给持有有竞争力的 GA 的云服务器，并以保护隐私的方式逼近最优解决方案。 PEGA具有以下特点。首先，任何没有专业知识和足够资源的用户都可以解决她的 COP。其次，PEGA不会泄露优化问题的内容，即用户的隐私。第三，PEGA具有与传统GA相同的逼近最优解的能力。我们在双服务器架构中实现了 PEGA，并在旅行商问题（TSP，众所周知的 COP）中对其进行了评估。特别是，我们利用加密密码学来保护用户的隐私，并精心设计了一套安全计算协议来支持加密数据上的遗传算法的进化算子。隐私分析表明，PEGA 不会向云服务器泄露 COP 的内容。在四个 TSP 数据集上的实验评估结果表明，PEGA 在逼近最优解方面与传统 GA 一样有效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PEGA的隐私保护遗传算法，通过云计算服务解决组合优化问题，同时保护用户隐私。
AI.motivation: 用户因缺乏专业知识和资源难以实现进化算法解决组合优化问题，而将计算外包至云端存在隐私泄露风险，需在保证隐私的前提下提供高效服务。
AI.method: 设计基于双服务器架构的PEGA算法，利用加密技术保护数据隐私，并构建安全计算协议以支持加密数据上的遗传操作。
AI.result: 在四个TSP数据集上的实验表明，PEGA在逼近最优解的性能与传统遗传算法相当，且未泄露优化问题内容。
AI.conclusion: PEGA实现了隐私保护与计算效率的平衡，为云端组合优化服务提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Bin Lu,Xiaoying Gan,Weinan Zhang,Huaxiu Yao,Luoyi Fu,Xinbing Wang
title: Spatio-Temporal Graph Few-Shot Learning with Cross-City Knowledge Transfer
title_zh: 时空图小样本学习与跨城市知识转移
abstract: Spatio-temporal graph learning is a key method for urban computing tasks, such as traffic flow, taxi demand and air quality forecasting. Due to the high cost of data collection, some developing cities have few available data, which makes it infeasible to train a well-performed model. To address this challenge, cross-city knowledge transfer has shown its promise, where the model learned from data-sufficient cities is leveraged to benefit the learning process of data-scarce cities. However, the spatio-temporal graphs among different cities show irregular structures and varied features, which limits the feasibility of existing Few-Shot Learning (\emph{FSL}) methods. Therefore, we propose a model-agnostic few-shot learning framework for spatio-temporal graph called ST-GFSL. Specifically, to enhance feature extraction by transfering cross-city knowledge, ST-GFSL proposes to generate non-shared parameters based on node-level meta knowledge. The nodes in target city transfer the knowledge via parameter matching, retrieving from similar spatio-temporal characteristics. Furthermore, we propose to reconstruct the graph structure during meta-learning. The graph reconstruction loss is defined to guide structure-aware learning, avoiding structure deviation among different datasets. We conduct comprehensive experiments on four traffic speed prediction benchmarks and the results demonstrate the effectiveness of ST-GFSL compared with state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Spatio-temporal graph learning is a key method for urban computing tasks, such as traffic flow, taxi demand and air quality forecasting. Due to the high cost of data collection, some developing cities have few available data, which makes it infeasible to train a well-performed model. To address this challenge, cross-city knowledge transfer has shown its promise, where the model learned from data-sufficient cities is leveraged to benefit the learning process of data-scarce cities. However, the spatio-temporal graphs among different cities show irregular structures and varied features, which limits the feasibility of existing Few-Shot Learning (\emph{FSL}) methods. Therefore, we propose a model-agnostic few-shot learning framework for spatio-temporal graph called ST-GFSL. Specifically, to enhance feature extraction by transfering cross-city knowledge, ST-GFSL proposes to generate non-shared parameters based on node-level meta knowledge. The nodes in target city transfer the knowledge via parameter matching, retrieving from similar spatio-temporal characteristics. Furthermore, we propose to reconstruct the graph structure during meta-learning. The graph reconstruction loss is defined to guide structure-aware learning, avoiding structure deviation among different datasets. We conduct comprehensive experiments on four traffic speed prediction benchmarks and the results demonstrate the effectiveness of ST-GFSL compared with state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 时空图学习是交通流量、出租车需求和空气质量预测等城市计算任务的关键方法。由于数据收集成本高昂，一些发展中城市可用数据很少，这使得训练性能良好的模型变得不可行。为了应对这一挑战，跨城市知识转移已显示出其前景，利用从数据充足的城市学习的模型来促进数据稀缺城市的学习过程。然而，不同城市之间的时空图表现出不规则的结构和不同的特征，这限制了现有的少样本学习（\emph{FSL}）方法的可行性。因此，我们提出了一种与模型无关的时空图小样本学习框架，称为 ST-GFSL。具体来说，为了通过传输跨城市知识来增强特征提取，ST-GFSL提出基于节点级元知识生成非共享参数。目标城市的节点通过参数匹配传递知识，检索相似的时空特征。此外，我们建议在元学习期间重建图结构。定义图重建损失来指导结构感知学习，避免不同数据集之间的结构偏差。我们对四个交通速度预测基准进行了全面的实验，结果证明了 ST-GFSL 与最先进的方法相比的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种跨城市知识迁移的时空图少样本学习框架ST-GFSL，以解决数据稀缺城市的交通预测问题。
AI.motivation: 由于数据收集成本高，发展中国家城市数据不足，现有少样本学习方法难以处理不同城市间时空图结构不规则和特征差异的问题。
AI.method: ST-GFSL通过节点级元知识生成非共享参数，利用参数匹配实现跨城市知识迁移，并在元学习过程中重构图结构以避免结构偏差。
AI.result: 在四个交通速度预测基准数据集上的实验表明，ST-GFSL相比现有方法具有更高的预测准确性。
AI.conclusion: ST-GFSL有效解决了跨城市时空图学习中的数据稀缺问题，为少样本场景下的城市计算任务提供了新思路。

We conduct comprehensive experiments on four traffic speed prediction benchmarks and the results demonstrate the effectiveness of ST-GFSL compared with state-of-the-art methods. 时空图学习是交通流量、出租车需求和空气质量预测等城市计算任务的关键方法。由于数据收集成本高昂，一些发展中城市可用数据很少，这使得训练性能良好的模型变得不可行。为了应对这一挑战，跨城市知识转移已显示出其前景，利用从数据充足的城市学习的模型来促进数据稀缺城市的学习过程。然而，不同城市之间的时空图表现出不规则的结构和不同的特征，这限制了现有的少样本学习（\emph{FSL}）方法的可行性。因此，我们提出了一种与模型无关的时空图小样本学习框架，称为 ST-GFSL。具体来说，为了通过传输跨城市知识来增强特征提取，ST-GFSL提出基于节点级元知识生成非共享参数。目标城市的节点通过参数匹配传递知识，检索相似的时空特征。此外，我们建议在元学习期间重建图结构。定义图重建损失来指导结构感知学习，避免不同数据集之间的结构偏差。我们对四个交通速度预测基准进行了全面的实验，结果证明了 ST-GFSL 与最先进的方法相比的有效性。 本文提出了一种跨城市知识迁移的时空图少样本学习框架ST-GFSL，以解决数据稀缺城市的交通预测问题。 Bin Lu,Xiaoying Gan,Weinan Zhang,Huaxiu Yao,Luoyi Fu,Xinbing Wang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Zhe Liu,Chunyang Chen,Junjie Wang,Yuekai Huang,Jun Hu,Qing Wang
title: Nighthawk: Fully Automated Localizing UI Display Issues via Visual Understanding
title_zh: Nighthawk：通过视觉理解全自动本地化 UI 显示问题
comment: Accepted by IEEE TRANSACTIONS ON SOFTWARE ENGINEERING(TSE 22). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2009.01417
comments: Accepted by IEEE TRANSACTIONS ON SOFTWARE ENGINEERING(TSE 22). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2009.01417
abstract: Graphical User Interface (GUI) provides a visual bridge between a software application and end users, through which they can interact with each other. With the upgrading of mobile devices and the development of aesthetics, the visual effects of the GUI are more and more attracting, and users pay more attention to the accessibility and usability of applications. However, such GUI complexity posts a great challenge to the GUI implementation. According to our pilot study of crowdtesting bug reports, display issues such as text overlap, component occlusion, missing image always occur during GUI rendering on different devices due to the software or hardware compatibility. They negatively influence the app usability, resulting in poor user experience. To detect these issues, we propose a fully automated approach, Nighthawk, based on deep learning for modelling visual information of the GUI screenshot. Nighthawk can detect GUIs with display issues and also locate the detailed region of the issue in the given GUI for guiding developers to fix the bug. At the same time, training the model needs a large amount of labeled buggy screenshots, which requires considerable manual effort to prepare them. We therefore propose a heuristic-based training data auto-generation method to automatically generate the labeled training data. The evaluation demonstrates that our Nighthawk can achieve average 0.84 precision and 0.84 recall in detecting UI display issues, average 0.59 AP and 0.60 AR in localizing these issues. We also evaluate Nighthawk with popular Android apps on Google Play and F-Droid, and successfully uncover 151 previously-undetected UI display issues with 75 of them being confirmed or fixed so far.

With the upgrading of mobile devices and the development of aesthetics, the visual effects of the GUI are more and more attracting, and users pay more attention to the accessibility and usability of applications. However, such GUI complexity posts a great challenge to the GUI implementation. According to our pilot study of crowdtesting bug reports, display issues such as text overlap, component occlusion, missing image always occur during GUI rendering on different devices due to the software or hardware compatibility. They negatively influence the app usability, resulting in poor user experience. To detect these issues, we propose a fully automated approach, Nighthawk, based on deep learning for modelling visual information of the GUI screenshot. Nighthawk can detect GUIs with display issues and also locate the detailed region of the issue in the given GUI for guiding developers to fix the bug. At the same time, training the model needs a large amount of labeled buggy screenshots, which requires considerable manual effort to prepare them. We therefore propose a heuristic-based training data auto-generation method to automatically generate the labeled training data. The evaluation demonstrates that our Nighthawk can achieve average 0.84 precision and 0.84 recall in detecting UI display issues, average 0.59 AP and 0.60 AR in localizing these issues. We also evaluate Nighthawk with popular Android apps on Google Play and F-Droid, and successfully uncover 151 previously-undetected UI display issues with 75 of them being confirmed or fixed so far.
abstract_zh: 图形用户界面 (GUI) 在软件应用程序和最终用户之间提供了一座可视桥梁，通过它他们可以相互交互。随着移动设备的升级和审美的发展，GUI的视觉效果越来越吸引人，用户更加注重应用程序的可访问性和可用性。然而，这样的GUI复杂性给GUI的实现带来了巨大的挑战。根据我们对众测错误报告的试点研究，由于软件或硬件兼容性的原因，在不同设备上进行 GUI 渲染时，经常会出现文本重叠、组件遮挡、图像丢失等显示问题。它们会对应用程序的可用性产生负面影响，导致用户体验不佳。为了检测这些问题，我们提出了一种基于深度学习的全自动方法 Nighthawk，用于对 GUI 屏幕截图的视觉信息进行建模。 Nighthawk 可以检测有显示问题的 GUI，并在给定 GUI 中定位问题的详细区域，以指导开发人员修复错误。同时，训练模型需要大量带标签的错误屏幕截图，这需要大量的手动准备工作。因此，我们提出了一种基于启发式的训练数据自动生成方法来自动生成标记的训练数据。评估表明，我们的 Nighthawk 在检测 UI 显示问题方面可以实现平均 0.84 的准确率和 0.84 的召回率，在定位这些问题时平均可以达到 0.59 AP 和 0.60 AR。我们还使用 Google Play 和 F-Droid 上流行的 Android 应用程序对 Nighthawk 进行评估，并成功发现了 151 个以前未检测到的 UI 显示问题，其中 75 个目前已得到确认或修复。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的自动化方法Nighthawk，用于检测和定位GUI中的显示问题。
AI.motivation: GUI复杂性导致显示问题（如文本重叠、组件遮挡）频发，影响用户体验，而现有方法依赖大量人工标注数据，效率低下。
AI.method: 采用深度学习建模GUI截图的视觉信息，结合启发式方法自动生成标注训练数据，实现问题检测与定位。
AI.result: 检测精确率为0.84，召回率为0.84；定位平均精度0.59，召回率0.60。在主流应用中发现151个未被报告的显示问题，其中75个已被确认或修复。
AI.conclusion: Nighthawk有效自动化检测GUI显示问题，减少人工标注依赖，提升应用可用性与开发效率。

authors_text: Siyuan Li,Di Wu,Fang Wu,Zelin Zang,Stan. Z. Li
title: Architecture-Agnostic Masked Image Modeling -- From ViT back to CNN
title_zh: 与架构无关的掩模图像建模——从 ViT 回到 CNN
comment: ICML 2023 (poster). The source code will be released in https://github.com/Westlake-AI/A2MIM
comments: ICML 2023 (poster). The source code will be released in https://github.com/Westlake-AI/A2MIM
abstract: Masked image modeling, an emerging self-supervised pre-training method, has shown impressive success across numerous downstream vision tasks with Vision transformers. Its underlying idea is simple: a portion of the input image is masked out and then reconstructed via a pre-text task. However, the working principle behind MIM is not well explained, and previous studies insist that MIM primarily works for the Transformer family but is incompatible with CNNs. In this work, we observe that MIM essentially teaches the model to learn better middle-order interactions among patches for more generalized feature extraction. We then propose an Architecture-Agnostic Masked Image Modeling framework (A$^2$MIM), which is compatible with both Transformers and CNNs in a unified way. Extensive experiments on popular benchmarks show that A$^2$MIM learns better representations without explicit design and endows the backbone model with the stronger capability to transfer to various downstream tasks.
summary: Masked image modeling, an emerging self-supervised pre-training method, has shown impressive success across numerous downstream vision tasks with Vision transformers. Its underlying idea is simple: a portion of the input image is masked out and then reconstructed via a pre-text task. However, the working principle behind MIM is not well explained, and previous studies insist that MIM primarily works for the Transformer family but is incompatible with CNNs. In this work, we observe that MIM essentially teaches the model to learn better middle-order interactions among patches for more generalized feature extraction. We then propose an Architecture-Agnostic Masked Image Modeling framework (A$^2$MIM), which is compatible with both Transformers and CNNs in a unified way. Extensive experiments on popular benchmarks show that A$^2$MIM learns better representations without explicit design and endows the backbone model with the stronger capability to transfer to various downstream tasks.
abstract_zh: 蒙版图像建模是一种新兴的自监督预训练方法，它在使用 Vision Transformer 的众多下游视觉任务中取得了令人印象深刻的成功。其基本思想很简单：输入图像的一部分被屏蔽，然后通过前置文本任务重建。然而，MIM 背后的工作原理还没有得到很好的解释，之前的研究坚持认为 MIM 主要适用于 Transformer 系列，但与 CNN 不兼容。在这项工作中，我们观察到 MIM 本质上是教导模型学习补丁之间更好的中阶交互，以实现更通用的特征提取。然后，我们提出了一个与架构无关的掩模图像建模框架（A$^2$MIM），它以统一的方式与 Transformer 和 CNN 兼容。对流行基准的大量实验表明，A$^2$MIM无需显式设计即可学习更好的表示，并赋予骨干模型更强的迁移到各种下游任务的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种适用于不同架构（如Transformer和CNN）的通用掩码图像建模框架A²MIM，以提升特征提取与迁移能力。
AI.motivation: 现有掩码图像建模（MIM）方法被认为仅适用于Transformer架构，无法兼容CNN，且其工作原理缺乏解释。作者发现MIM本质是通过学习中间层次的块间交互实现特征泛化，因此需要设计架构无关的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出A²MIM框架，通过统一的掩码重建机制兼容Transformer与CNN，无需针对不同架构进行特殊设计，重点优化中间层次的特征交互学习。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，A²MIM在无显式设计的情况下学习到更优表示，显著提升下游任务的模型迁移性能，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: A²MIM验证了掩码图像建模的架构无关性，为通用视觉预训练提供了新思路，同时增强了模型在不同任务中的适应能力。

authors_text: Mei Wang,Weihong Deng
title: Deep face recognition with clustering based domain adaptation
title_zh: 具有基于聚类的域适应的深度人脸识别
abstract: Despite great progress in face recognition tasks achieved by deep convolution neural networks (CNNs), these models often face challenges in real world tasks where training images gathered from Internet are different from test images because of different lighting condition, pose and image quality. These factors increase domain discrepancy between training (source domain) and testing (target domain) database and make the learnt models degenerate in application. Meanwhile, due to lack of labeled target data, directly fine-tuning the pre-learnt models becomes intractable and impractical. In this paper, we propose a new clustering-based domain adaptation method designed for face recognition task in which the source and target domain do not share any classes. Our method effectively learns the discriminative target feature by aligning the feature domain globally, and, at the meantime, distinguishing the target clusters locally. Specifically, it first learns a more reliable representation for clustering by minimizing global domain discrepancy to reduce domain gaps, and then applies simplified spectral clustering method to generate pseudo-labels in the domain-invariant feature space, and finally learns discriminative target representation. Comprehensive experiments on widely-used GBU, IJB-A/B/C and RFW databases clearly demonstrate the effectiveness of our newly proposed approach. State-of-the-art performance of GBU data set is achieved by only unsupervised adaptation from the target training data.
summary: Despite great progress in face recognition tasks achieved by deep convolution neural networks (CNNs), these models often face challenges in real world tasks where training images gathered from Internet are different from test images because of different lighting condition, pose and image quality. These factors increase domain discrepancy between training (source domain) and testing (target domain) database and make the learnt models degenerate in application. Meanwhile, due to lack of labeled target data, directly fine-tuning the pre-learnt models becomes intractable and impractical. In this paper, we propose a new clustering-based domain adaptation method designed for face recognition task in which the source and target domain do not share any classes. Our method effectively learns the discriminative target feature by aligning the feature domain globally, and, at the meantime, distinguishing the target clusters locally. Specifically, it first learns a more reliable representation for clustering by minimizing global domain discrepancy to reduce domain gaps, and then applies simplified spectral clustering method to generate pseudo-labels in the domain-invariant feature space, and finally learns discriminative target representation. Comprehensive experiments on widely-used GBU, IJB-A/B/C and RFW databases clearly demonstrate the effectiveness of our newly proposed approach. State-of-the-art performance of GBU data set is achieved by only unsupervised adaptation from the target training data.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度卷积神经网络（CNN）在人脸识别任务方面取得了巨大进步，但这些模型在现实世界任务中经常面临挑战，因为由于光照条件、姿势和图像质量不同，从互联网收集的训练图像与测试图像不同。这些因素增加了训练（源域）和测试（目标域）数据库之间的域差异，并使学习的模型在应用中退化。同时，由于缺乏标记的目标数据，直接微调预学习模型变得棘手且不切实际。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的基于聚类的域适应方法，专为人脸识别任务而设计，其中源域和目标域不共享任何类。我们的方法通过全局对齐特征域来有效地学习有区别的目标特征，同时在本地区分目标簇。具体来说，它首先通过最小化全局域差异以减少域间隙来学习更可靠的聚类表示，然后应用简化的谱聚类方法在域不变特征空间中生成伪标签，最后学习有区别的目标表示。对广泛使用的 GBU、IJB-A/B/C 和 RFW 数据库进行的综合实验清楚地证明了我们新提出的方法的有效性。 GBU 数据集的最先进性能是通过目标训练数据的无监督适应来实现的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于聚类的领域自适应方法，用于解决深度人脸识别人脸识别任务中源域和目标域之间的领域差异问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度卷积神经网络在人脸识别任务中取得显著进展，但实际应用中训练数据与测试数据因光照、姿态和图像质量差异导致领域差异，且目标域缺乏标注数据，传统微调方法难以奏效。
AI.method: 通过全局对齐特征域减少领域差距，利用简化谱聚类生成伪标签，并在领域不变特征空间中学习判别性目标表示。
AI.result: 在GBU、IJB-A/B/C和RFW数据集上的实验表明，该方法在GBU数据集上通过无监督自适应达到最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解了无标注目标数据下的领域差异问题，为跨领域人脸识别提供了新思路。

authors_text: Deeksha Varshney,Akshara Prabhakar,Asif Ekbal
title: Commonsense and Named Entity Aware Knowledge Grounded Dialogue Generation
title_zh: 常识和命名实体感知知识基础对话生成
abstract: Grounding dialogue on external knowledge and interpreting linguistic patterns in dialogue history context, such as ellipsis, anaphora, and co-references is critical for dialogue comprehension and generation. In this paper, we present a novel open-domain dialogue generation model which effectively utilizes the large-scale commonsense and named entity based knowledge in addition to the unstructured topic-specific knowledge associated with each utterance. We enhance the commonsense knowledge with named entity-aware structures using co-references. Our proposed model utilizes a multi-hop attention layer to preserve the most accurate and critical parts of the dialogue history and the associated knowledge. In addition, we employ a Commonsense and Named Entity Enhanced Attention Module, which starts with the extracted triples from various sources and gradually finds the relevant supporting set of triples using multi-hop attention with the query vector obtained from the interactive dialogue-knowledge module. Empirical results on two benchmark dataset demonstrate that our model significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in terms of both automatic evaluation metrics and human judgment. Our code is publicly available at \href{https://github.com/deekshaVarshney/CNTF}{https://github.com/deekshaVarshney/CNTF}; \href{https://www.iitp.ac.in/~ai-nlp-ml/resources/codes/CNTF.zip}{https://www.iitp.ac.in/-ai-nlp-ml/resources/ codes/CNTF.zip}.
summary: Grounding dialogue on external knowledge and interpreting linguistic patterns in dialogue history context, such as ellipsis, anaphora, and co-references is critical for dialogue comprehension and generation. In this paper, we present a novel open-domain dialogue generation model which effectively utilizes the large-scale commonsense and named entity based knowledge in addition to the unstructured topic-specific knowledge associated with each utterance. We enhance the commonsense knowledge with named entity-aware structures using co-references. Our proposed model utilizes a multi-hop attention layer to preserve the most accurate and critical parts of the dialogue history and the associated knowledge. In addition, we employ a Commonsense and Named Entity Enhanced Attention Module, which starts with the extracted triples from various sources and gradually finds the relevant supporting set of triples using multi-hop attention with the query vector obtained from the interactive dialogue-knowledge module. Empirical results on two benchmark dataset demonstrate that our model significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in terms of both automatic evaluation metrics and human judgment. Our code is publicly available at \href{https://github.com/deekshaVarshney/CNTF}{https://github.com/deekshaVarshney/CNTF}; \href{https://www.iitp.ac.in/~ai-nlp-ml/resources/codes/CNTF.zip}{https://www.iitp.ac.in/-ai-nlp-ml/resources/ codes/CNTF.zip}.
abstract_zh: 将对话建立在外部知识的基础上并解释对话历史背景中的语言模式（例如省略、照应和共同引用）对于对话理解和生成至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的开放域对话生成模型，除了与每个话语相关的非结构化特定主题知识之外，该模型还有效地利用了大规模常识和基于命名实体的知识。我们通过使用共同引用的命名实体感知结构来增强常识知识。我们提出的模型利用多跳注意力层来保留对话历史和相关知识中最准确和最关键的部分。此外，我们采用了常识和命名实体增强注意模块，该模块从各种来源提取的三元组开始，并使用多跳注意和从交互式对话知识模块获得的查询向量逐渐找到相关的三元组支持集。两个基准数据集的实证结果表明，我们的模型在自动评估指标和人类判断方面都显着优于最先进的方法。我们的代码可在 \href{https://github.com/deekshaVarshney/CNTF}{https://github.com/deekshaVarshney/CNTF} 公开获取； \href{https://www.iitp.ac.in/~ai-nlp-ml/resources/codes/CNTF.zip}{https://www.iitp.ac.in/-ai-nlp-ml/resources/codes/CNTF.zip}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合常识和命名实体知识的开放域对话生成模型，通过多跳注意力机制和增强模块提升对话理解与生成效果。
AI.motivation: 现有对话生成模型在处理对话历史中的省略、指代等语言现象时效果有限，且未能有效整合大规模常识知识与命名实体信息。
AI.method: 设计多跳注意力层保留对话关键信息，构建命名实体感知的常识知识结构，并通过常识-实体增强注意力模块，基于多跳注意力筛选支持性知识三元组。
AI.result: 在两个基准数据集上，模型在自动评估指标和人工评价中均显著优于现有最佳方法。
AI.conclusion: 该模型通过融合多源知识有效提升了对话生成质量，代码已开源供研究使用。

authors_text: Jilan Xu,Junlin Hou,Yuejie Zhang,Rui Feng,Rui-Wei Zhao,Tao Zhang,Xuequan Lu,Shang Gao
title: CREAM: Weakly Supervised Object Localization via Class RE-Activation Mapping
title_zh: CREAM：通过类重新激活映射进行弱监督对象定位
abstract: Weakly Supervised Object Localization (WSOL) aims to localize objects with image-level supervision. Existing works mainly rely on Class Activation Mapping (CAM) derived from a classification model. However, CAM-based methods usually focus on the most discriminative parts of an object (i.e., incomplete localization problem). In this paper, we empirically prove that this problem is associated with the mixup of the activation values between less discriminative foreground regions and the background. To address it, we propose Class RE-Activation Mapping (CREAM), a novel clustering-based approach to boost the activation values of the integral object regions. To this end, we introduce class-specific foreground and background context embeddings as cluster centroids. A CAM-guided momentum preservation strategy is developed to learn the context embeddings during training. At the inference stage, the re-activation mapping is formulated as a parameter estimation problem under Gaussian Mixture Model, which can be solved by deriving an unsupervised Expectation-Maximization based soft-clustering algorithm. By simply integrating CREAM into various WSOL approaches, our method significantly improves their performance. CREAM achieves the state-of-the-art performance on CUB, ILSVRC and OpenImages benchmark datasets. Code will be available at https://github.com/Jazzcharles/CREAM.

To this end, we introduce class-specific foreground and background context embeddings as cluster centroids. A CAM-guided momentum preservation strategy is developed to learn the context embeddings during training. At the inference stage, the re-activation mapping is formulated as a parameter estimation problem under Gaussian Mixture Model, which can be solved by deriving an unsupervised Expectation-Maximization based soft-clustering algorithm. By simply integrating CREAM into various WSOL approaches, our method significantly improves their performance. CREAM achieves the state-of-the-art performance on CUB, ILSVRC and OpenImages benchmark datasets. Code will be available at https://github.com/Jazzcharles/CREAM.
abstract_zh: 弱监督对象定位（WSOL）旨在通过图像级监督来定位对象。现有的工作主要依赖于分类模型派生的类激活映射（CAM）。然而，基于 CAM 的方法通常关注对象最具辨别力的部分（即不完整的定位问题）。在本文中，我们凭经验证明该问题与区分性较差的前景区域和背景之间的激活值混合有关。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了类重新激活映射（CREAM），这是一种基于聚类的新颖方法，用于提高整体对象区域的激活值。为此，我们引入特定于类的前景和背景上下文嵌入作为集群质心。开发了 CAM 引导的动量保持策略来在训练期间学习上下文嵌入。在推理阶段，重新激活映射被表述为高斯混合模型下的参数估计问题，可以通过推导基于无监督期望最大化的软聚类算法来解决。通过简单地将 CREAM 集成到各种 WSOL 方法中，我们的方法显着提高了它们的性能。 CREAM 在 CUB、ILSVRC 和 OpenImages 基准数据集上实现了最先进的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/Jazzcharles/CREAM 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CREAM的新方法，通过类重激活映射解决弱监督目标定位中的不完整定位问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于类别激活映射（CAM）的方法倾向于聚焦于物体最具判别性的局部区域，导致定位不完整，问题源于前景与背景激活值的混合。
AI.method: 引入基于聚类的CREAM方法，利用类别特定的前景/背景上下文嵌入作为聚类中心，并通过CAM引导的动量保持策略学习嵌入，最终通过高斯混合模型的EM算法实现软聚类定位。
AI.result: CREAM在CUB、ILSVRC和OpenImages基准数据集上达到最先进性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: CREAM通过增强完整物体区域的激活值有效解决了不完整定位问题，显著提升了多种弱监督定位方法的性能。

search_text: CREAM: Weakly Supervised Object Localization via Class RE-Activation Mapping CREAM：通过类重新激活映射进行弱监督对象定位 Weakly Supervised Object Localization (WSOL) aims to localize objects with image-level supervision. Existing works mainly rely on Class Activation Mapping (CAM) derived from a classification model. However, CAM-based methods usually focus on the most discriminative parts of an object (i.e., incomplete localization problem). In this paper, we empirically prove that this problem is associated with the mixup of the activation values between less discriminative foreground regions and the background. To address it, we propose Class RE-Activation Mapping (CREAM), a novel clustering-based approach to boost the activation values of the integral object regions. To this end, we introduce class-specific foreground and background context embeddings as cluster centroids. A CAM-guided momentum preservation strategy is developed to learn the context embeddings during training. At the inference stage, the re-activation mapping is formulated as a parameter estimation problem under Gaussian Mixture Model, which can be solved by deriving an unsupervised Expectation-Maximization based soft-clustering algorithm. By simply integrating CREAM into various WSOL approaches, our method significantly improves their performance. CREAM achieves the state-of-the-art performance on CUB, ILSVRC and OpenImages benchmark datasets. Code will be available at https://github.com/Jazzcharles/CREAM. 弱监督对象定位（WSOL）旨在通过图像级监督来定位对象。现有的工作主要依赖于分类模型派生的类激活映射（CAM）。然而，基于 CAM 的方法通常关注对象最具辨别力的部分（即不完整的定位问题）。在本文中，我们凭经验证明该问题与区分性较差的前景区域和背景之间的激活值混合有关。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了类重新激活映射（CREAM），这是一种基于聚类的新颖方法，用于提高整体对象区域的激活值。为此，我们引入特定于类的前景和背景上下文嵌入作为集群质心。开发了 CAM 引导的动量保持策略来在训练期间学习上下文嵌入。在推理阶段，重新激活映射被表述为高斯混合模型下的参数估计问题，可以通过推导基于无监督期望最大化的软聚类算法来解决。通过简单地将 CREAM 集成到各种 WSOL 方法中，我们的方法显着提高了它们的性能。 CREAM 在 CUB、ILSVRC 和 OpenImages 基准数据集上实现了最先进的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/Jazzcharles/CREAM 获取。 本文提出了一种名为CREAM的新方法，通过类重激活映射解决弱监督目标定位中的不完整定位问题。 Jilan Xu,Junlin Hou,Yuejie Zhang,Rui Feng,Rui-Wei Zhao,Tao Zhang,Xuequan Lu,Shang Gao cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Woojung Kim,Keondo Park,Kihyuk Sohn,Raphael Shu,Hyung-Sin Kim
title: Federated Semi-Supervised Learning with Prototypical Networks
title_zh: 带有原型网络的联邦半监督学习
abstract: With the increasing computing power of edge devices, Federated Learning (FL) emerges to enable model training without privacy concerns. The majority of existing studies assume the data are fully labeled on the client side. In practice, however, the amount of labeled data is often limited. Recently, federated semi-supervised learning (FSSL) is explored as a way to effectively utilize unlabeled data during training. In this work, we propose ProtoFSSL, a novel FSSL approach based on prototypical networks. In ProtoFSSL, clients share knowledge with each other via lightweight prototypes, which prevents the local models from diverging. For computing loss on unlabeled data, each client creates accurate pseudo-labels based on shared prototypes. Jointly with labeled data, the pseudo-labels provide training signals for local prototypes. Compared to a FSSL approach based on weight sharing, the prototype-based inter-client knowledge sharing significantly reduces both communication and computation costs, enabling more frequent knowledge sharing between more clients for better accuracy. In multiple datasets, ProtoFSSL results in higher accuracy compared to the recent FSSL methods with and without knowledge sharing, such as FixMatch, FedRGD, and FedMatch. On SVHN dataset, ProtoFSSL performs comparably to fully supervised FL methods.
summary: With the increasing computing power of edge devices, Federated Learning (FL) emerges to enable model training without privacy concerns. The majority of existing studies assume the data are fully labeled on the client side. In practice, however, the amount of labeled data is often limited. Recently, federated semi-supervised learning (FSSL) is explored as a way to effectively utilize unlabeled data during training. In this work, we propose ProtoFSSL, a novel FSSL approach based on prototypical networks. In ProtoFSSL, clients share knowledge with each other via lightweight prototypes, which prevents the local models from diverging. For computing loss on unlabeled data, each client creates accurate pseudo-labels based on shared prototypes. Jointly with labeled data, the pseudo-labels provide training signals for local prototypes. Compared to a FSSL approach based on weight sharing, the prototype-based inter-client knowledge sharing significantly reduces both communication and computation costs, enabling more frequent knowledge sharing between more clients for better accuracy. In multiple datasets, ProtoFSSL results in higher accuracy compared to the recent FSSL methods with and without knowledge sharing, such as FixMatch, FedRGD, and FedMatch. On SVHN dataset, ProtoFSSL performs comparably to fully supervised FL methods.
abstract_zh: 随着边缘设备计算能力的不断增强，联邦学习（FL）的出现使得模型训练无需担心隐私问题。大多数现有研究假设数据在客户端已完全标记。然而，在实践中，标记数据的数量通常是有限的。最近，联合半监督学习（FSSL）被探索作为在训练期间有效利用未标记数据的一种方法。在这项工作中，我们提出了 ProtoFSSL，一种基于原型网络的新型 FSSL 方法。在 ProtoFSSL 中，客户端通过轻量级原型相互共享知识，这可以防止本地模型出现分歧。为了计算未标记数据的损失，每个客户端基于共享原型创建准确的伪标签。伪标签与标记数据一起为本地原型提供训练信号。与基于权重共享的 FSSL 方法相比，基于原型的客户端间知识共享显着降低了通信和计算成本，使得更多客户端之间能够更频繁地共享知识，从而获得更高的准确性。在多个数据集中，与最近有或没有知识共享的 FSSL 方法（例如 FixMatch、FedRGD 和 FedMatch）相比，ProtoFSSL 的准确性更高。在 SVHN 数据集上，ProtoFSSL 的性能与完全监督的 FL 方法相当。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于原型网络的联邦半监督学习方法ProtoFSSL，通过轻量级原型共享和伪标签生成提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习假设客户端数据全标注，但实际中标注数据有限，需有效利用未标注数据。传统方法存在通信和计算成本高、模型易发散等问题。
AI.method: ProtoFSSL基于原型网络，客户端通过共享轻量原型实现知识传递，利用共享原型为未标注数据生成伪标签，并结合标注数据联合训练本地原型。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上ProtoFSSL准确率优于FixMatch、FedRGD等现有方法，在SVHN数据集上表现接近全监督联邦学习方法。
AI.conclusion: ProtoFSSL通过原型共享机制降低了通信与计算成本，同时提升模型精度，为联邦半监督学习提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Ramin Safaeian,Saber Salehkaleybar,Mahmoud Tabandeh
title: Fast Causal Orientation Learning in Directed Acyclic Graphs
title_zh: 有向无环图中的快速因果定向学习
abstract: Causal relationships among a set of variables are commonly represented by a directed acyclic graph. The orientations of some edges in the causal DAG can be discovered from observational/interventional data. Further edges can be oriented by iteratively applying so-called Meek rules. Inferring edges' orientations from some previously oriented edges, which we call Causal Orientation Learning (COL), is a common problem in various causal discovery tasks. In these tasks, it is often required to solve multiple COL problems and therefore applying Meek rules could be time-consuming. Motivated by Meek rules, we introduce Meek functions that can be utilized in solving COL problems. In particular, we show that these functions have some desirable properties, enabling us to speed up the process of applying Meek rules. In particular, we propose a dynamic programming (DP) based method to apply Meek functions. Moreover, based on the proposed DP method, we present a lower bound on the number of edges that can be oriented as a result of intervention. We also propose a method to check whether some oriented edges belong to a causal DAG. Experimental results show that the proposed methods can outperform previous work in several causal discovery tasks in terms of running-time.
summary: Causal relationships among a set of variables are commonly represented by a directed acyclic graph. The orientations of some edges in the causal DAG can be discovered from observational/interventional data. Further edges can be oriented by iteratively applying so-called Meek rules. Inferring edges' orientations from some previously oriented edges, which we call Causal Orientation Learning (COL), is a common problem in various causal discovery tasks. In these tasks, it is often required to solve multiple COL problems and therefore applying Meek rules could be time-consuming. Motivated by Meek rules, we introduce Meek functions that can be utilized in solving COL problems. In particular, we show that these functions have some desirable properties, enabling us to speed up the process of applying Meek rules. In particular, we propose a dynamic programming (DP) based method to apply Meek functions. Moreover, based on the proposed DP method, we present a lower bound on the number of edges that can be oriented as a result of intervention. We also propose a method to check whether some oriented edges belong to a causal DAG. Experimental results show that the proposed methods can outperform previous work in several causal discovery tasks in terms of running-time.
abstract_zh: 一组变量之间的因果关系通常由有向无环图表示。因果 DAG 中某些边缘的方向可以从观察/干预数据中发现。可以通过迭代应用所谓的 Meek 规则来定向更多边缘。从一些先前定向的边缘推断边缘的方向，我们称之为因果方向学习（COL），是各种因果发现任务中的常见问题。在这些任务中，通常需要解决多个 COL 问题，因此应用 Meek 规则可能非常耗时。受 Meek 规则的启发，我们引入了可用于解决 COL 问题的 Meek 函数。特别是，我们表明这些函数具有一些理想的属性，使我们能够加快应用 Meek 规则的过程。特别是，我们提出了一种基于动态规划（DP）的方法来应用 Meek 函数。此外，基于所提出的 DP 方法，我们提出了由于干预而可以定向的边数的下界。我们还提出了一种方法来检查某些有向边是否属于因果 DAG。实验结果表明，所提出的方法在几个因果发现任务中在运行时间方面优于以前的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于动态规划的方法，用于加速有向无环图中因果方向学习的过程。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通过反复应用Meek规则进行因果方向学习效率较低，需寻找更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 引入Meek函数并设计动态规划（DP）方法，结合干预下可定向边数的下界计算，优化因果方向推断过程。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多个因果发现任务中显著优于现有方法，运行时间更短。
AI.conclusion: 提出的动态规划方法有效提升了因果方向学习的效率，为大规模因果推理提供了新思路。

ai_content.motivation: 传统方法通过反复应用Meek规则进行因果方向学习效率较低，需寻找更高效的解决方案。

ai_content.result: 实验表明，该方法在多个因果发现任务中显著优于现有方法，运行时间更短。

search_text: Fast Causal Orientation Learning in Directed Acyclic Graphs 有向无环图中的快速因果定向学习 Causal relationships among a set of variables are commonly represented by a directed acyclic graph. The orientations of some edges in the causal DAG can be discovered from observational/interventional data. Further edges can be oriented by iteratively applying so-called Meek rules. Inferring edges' orientations from some previously oriented edges, which we call Causal Orientation Learning (COL), is a common problem in various causal discovery tasks. In these tasks, it is often required to solve multiple COL problems and therefore applying Meek rules could be time-consuming. Motivated by Meek rules, we introduce Meek functions that can be utilized in solving COL problems. In particular, we show that these functions have some desirable properties, enabling us to speed up the process of applying Meek rules. In particular, we propose a dynamic programming (DP) based method to apply Meek functions. Moreover, based on the proposed DP method, we present a lower bound on the number of edges that can be oriented as a result of intervention. We also propose a method to check whether some oriented edges belong to a causal DAG. Experimental results show that the proposed methods can outperform previous work in several causal discovery tasks in terms of running-time. 一组变量之间的因果关系通常由有向无环图表示。因果 DAG 中某些边缘的方向可以从观察/干预数据中发现。可以通过迭代应用所谓的 Meek 规则来定向更多边缘。从一些先前定向的边缘推断边缘的方向，我们称之为因果方向学习（COL），是各种因果发现任务中的常见问题。在这些任务中，通常需要解决多个 COL 问题，因此应用 Meek 规则可能非常耗时。受 Meek 规则的启发，我们引入了可用于解决 COL 问题的 Meek 函数。特别是，我们表明这些函数具有一些理想的属性，使我们能够加快应用 Meek 规则的过程。特别是，我们提出了一种基于动态规划（DP）的方法来应用 Meek 函数。此外，基于所提出的 DP 方法，我们提出了由于干预而可以定向的边数的下界。我们还提出了一种方法来检查某些有向边是否属于因果 DAG。实验结果表明，所提出的方法在几个因果发现任务中在运行时间方面优于以前的工作。 本文提出了一种基于动态规划的方法，用于加速有向无环图中因果方向学习的过程。 Ramin Safaeian,Saber Salehkaleybar,Mahmoud Tabandeh cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.DS

authors_text: Biao Zhang,Matthias Nießner,Peter Wonka
title: 3DILG: Irregular Latent Grids for 3D Generative Modeling
title_zh: 3DILG：用于 3D 生成建模的不规则潜在网格
comment: Accepted at NeurIPS 2022. Project page: https://1zb.github.io/3DILG
comments: Accepted at NeurIPS 2022. Project page: https://1zb.github.io/3DILG
abstract: We propose a new representation for encoding 3D shapes as neural fields. The representation is designed to be compatible with the transformer architecture and to benefit both shape reconstruction and shape generation. Existing works on neural fields are grid-based representations with latents defined on a regular grid. In contrast, we define latents on irregular grids, enabling our representation to be sparse and adaptive. In the context of shape reconstruction from point clouds, our shape representation built on irregular grids improves upon grid-based methods in terms of reconstruction accuracy. For shape generation, our representation promotes high-quality shape generation using auto-regressive probabilistic models. We show different applications that improve over the current state of the art. First, we show results for probabilistic shape reconstruction from a single higher resolution image. Second, we train a probabilistic model conditioned on very low resolution images. Third, we apply our model to category-conditioned generation. All probabilistic experiments confirm that we are able to generate detailed and high quality shapes to yield the new state of the art in generative 3D shape modeling.
summary: We propose a new representation for encoding 3D shapes as neural fields. The representation is designed to be compatible with the transformer architecture and to benefit both shape reconstruction and shape generation. Existing works on neural fields are grid-based representations with latents defined on a regular grid. In contrast, we define latents on irregular grids, enabling our representation to be sparse and adaptive. In the context of shape reconstruction from point clouds, our shape representation built on irregular grids improves upon grid-based methods in terms of reconstruction accuracy. For shape generation, our representation promotes high-quality shape generation using auto-regressive probabilistic models. We show different applications that improve over the current state of the art. First, we show results for probabilistic shape reconstruction from a single higher resolution image. Second, we train a probabilistic model conditioned on very low resolution images. Third, we apply our model to category-conditioned generation. All probabilistic experiments confirm that we are able to generate detailed and high quality shapes to yield the new state of the art in generative 3D shape modeling.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种将 3D 形状编码为神经场的新表示。该表示被设计为与变压器架构兼容，并且有利于形状重建和形状生成。神经领域的现有工作是基于网格的表示，其潜伏在规则网格上定义。相反，我们在不规则网格上定义潜在变量，使我们的表示变得稀疏和自适应。在点云形状重建的背景下，我们基于不规则网格的形状表示在重建精度方面改进了基于网格的方法。对于形状生成，我们的表示使用自回归概率模型促进高质量的形状生成。我们展示了比当前技术水平有所改进的不同应用程序。首先，我们展示了从单个更高分辨率图像进行概率形状重建的结果。其次，我们训练一个以极低分辨率图像为条件的概率模型。第三，我们将我们的模型应用于类别条件生成。所有概率实验都证实我们能够生成详细且高质量的形状，从而实现生成 3D 形状建模的最新技术水平。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于不规则潜在网格的神经场表示方法，用于改进3D生成建模。
AI.motivation: 现有神经场方法依赖规则网格表示，存在稀疏性和自适应性不足的问题，难以兼顾形状重建与生成质量。
AI.method: 设计兼容Transformer架构的不规则潜在网格表示，通过自适应稀疏网格结构和自回归概率模型实现形状重建与生成。
AI.result: 在单图高分辨率重建、低分辨率条件生成和类别条件生成任务中均超越现有方法，达到生成3D形状领域的新SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 不规则潜在网格有效提升了神经场在3D生成任务中的表现，为高质量形状建模提供了新范式。

authors_text: Zhishu Sun,Zhifeng Shen,Luojun Lin,Yuanlong Yu,Zhifeng Yang,Shicai Yang,Weijie Chen
title: Dynamic Domain Generalization
title_zh: 动态域泛化
abstract: Domain generalization (DG) is a fundamental yet very challenging research topic in machine learning. The existing arts mainly focus on learning domain-invariant features with limited source domains in a static model. Unfortunately, there is a lack of training-free mechanism to adjust the model when generalized to the agnostic target domains. To tackle this problem, we develop a brand-new DG variant, namely Dynamic Domain Generalization (DDG), in which the model learns to twist the network parameters to adapt the data from different domains. Specifically, we leverage a meta-adjuster to twist the network parameters based on the static model with respect to different data from different domains. In this way, the static model is optimized to learn domain-shared features, while the meta-adjuster is designed to learn domain-specific features. To enable this process, DomainMix is exploited to simulate data from diverse domains during teaching the meta-adjuster to adapt to the upcoming agnostic target domains. This learning mechanism urges the model to generalize to different agnostic target domains via adjusting the model without training. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method. Code is available at: https://github.com/MetaVisionLab/DDG
summary: Domain generalization (DG) is a fundamental yet very challenging research topic in machine learning. The existing arts mainly focus on learning domain-invariant features with limited source domains in a static model. Unfortunately, there is a lack of training-free mechanism to adjust the model when generalized to the agnostic target domains. To tackle this problem, we develop a brand-new DG variant, namely Dynamic Domain Generalization (DDG), in which the model learns to twist the network parameters to adapt the data from different domains. Specifically, we leverage a meta-adjuster to twist the network parameters based on the static model with respect to different data from different domains. In this way, the static model is optimized to learn domain-shared features, while the meta-adjuster is designed to learn domain-specific features. To enable this process, DomainMix is exploited to simulate data from diverse domains during teaching the meta-adjuster to adapt to the upcoming agnostic target domains. This learning mechanism urges the model to generalize to different agnostic target domains via adjusting the model without training. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method. Code is available at: https://github.com/MetaVisionLab/DDG
abstract_zh: 领域泛化（DG）是机器学习中一个基础但非常具有挑战性的研究课题。现有技术主要集中于在静态模型中学习具有有限源域的域不变特征。不幸的是，当推广到不可知的目标领域时，缺乏免训练的机制来调整模型。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了一种全新的 DG 变体，即动态域泛化（DDG），其中模型学习扭曲网络参数以适应来自不同域的数据。具体来说，我们利用元调整器根据来自不同领域的不同数据的静态模型来扭曲网络参数。通过这种方式，静态模型被优化以学习域共享特征，而元调整器被设计为学习特定于域的特征。为了实现这一过程，在教导元调整器适应即将到来的不可知目标域的过程中，利用 DomainMix 来模拟​​来自不同域的数据。这种学习机制促使模型通过调整模型而无需训练来泛化到不同的不可知目标领域。大量的实验证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。代码位于：https://github.com/MetaVisionLab/DDG

AI.tldr: 本文提出动态领域泛化（DDG）方法，通过调整网络参数使模型适应不同领域数据，无需额外训练。
AI.motivation: 现有领域泛化方法依赖静态模型学习领域不变特征，缺乏无需训练的机制应对未知目标领域。
AI.method: 设计元调整器动态调整网络参数，结合DomainMix模拟多领域数据，使静态模型学习共享特征，元调整器学习领域特有特征。
AI.result: 实验验证了DDG在未知目标领域的有效性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: DDG通过动态参数调整机制，实现了无需训练的跨领域泛化能力，优于传统静态模型方法。

authors_text: Miklós Z. Horváth,Mark Niklas Müller,Marc Fischer,Martin Vechev
title: (De-)Randomized Smoothing for Decision Stump Ensembles
title_zh: 决策树桩集成的（去）随机平滑
abstract: Tree-based models are used in many high-stakes application domains such as finance and medicine, where robustness and interpretability are of utmost importance. Yet, methods for improving and certifying their robustness are severely under-explored, in contrast to those focusing on neural networks. Targeting this important challenge, we propose deterministic smoothing for decision stump ensembles. Whereas most prior work on randomized smoothing focuses on evaluating arbitrary base models approximately under input randomization, the key insight of our work is that decision stump ensembles enable exact yet efficient evaluation via dynamic programming. Importantly, we obtain deterministic robustness certificates, even jointly over numerical and categorical features, a setting ubiquitous in the real world. Further, we derive an MLE-optimal training method for smoothed decision stumps under randomization and propose two boosting approaches to improve their provable robustness. An extensive experimental evaluation on computer vision and tabular data tasks shows that our approach yields significantly higher certified accuracies than the state-of-the-art for tree-based models. We release all code and trained models at https://github.com/eth-sri/drs.
summary: Tree-based models are used in many high-stakes application domains such as finance and medicine, where robustness and interpretability are of utmost importance. Importantly, we obtain deterministic robustness certificates, even jointly over numerical and categorical features, a setting ubiquitous in the real world. Further, we derive an MLE-optimal training method for smoothed decision stumps under randomization and propose two boosting approaches to improve their provable robustness. An extensive experimental evaluation on computer vision and tabular data tasks shows that our approach yields significantly higher certified accuracies than the state-of-the-art for tree-based models. We release all code and trained models at https://github.com/eth-sri/drs.
abstract_zh: 基于树的模型用于许多高风险的应用领域，例如金融和医学，其中稳健性和可解释性至关重要。然而，与专注于神经网络的方法相比，改进和证明其鲁棒性的方法还严重不足。针对这一重要挑战，我们提出了决策树桩集成的确定性平滑。虽然大多数先前关于随机平滑的工作侧重于在输入随机化下近似评估任意基本模型，但我们工作的关键见解是决策树桩集成可以通过动态规划实现精确而高效的评估。重要的是，我们获得了确定性的鲁棒性证书，甚至是在数字和分类特征上共同获得的，这是现实世界中普遍存在的设置。此外，我们推导了一种用于随机化下平滑决策树桩的 MLE 最优训练方法，并提出了两种增强方法来提高其可证明的鲁棒性。对计算机视觉和表格数据任务的广泛实验评估表明，我们的方法比基于树的模型的最先进方法产生了显着更高的认证精度。我们在 https://github.com/eth-sri/drs 发布了所有代码和训练模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种确定性平滑方法，用于提升决策桩集成模型的鲁棒性，并通过动态规划实现高效精确的评估。
AI.motivation: 树模型在高风险领域广泛应用，但其鲁棒性研究远不如神经网络深入，亟需有效且可解释的鲁棒性增强方法。
AI.method: 利用动态规划对决策桩集成进行精确评估，结合MLE最优训练方法与两种提升方法，实现数值和类别特征联合的确定性鲁棒性认证。
AI.result: 在计算机视觉和表格数据任务中，该方法的认证准确率显著优于现有树模型最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过确定性平滑有效提升了决策桩集成的鲁棒性，为实际应用提供了更可靠的模型认证方案。

search_text: (De-)Randomized Smoothing for Decision Stump Ensembles 决策树桩集成的（去）随机平滑 Tree-based models are used in many high-stakes application domains such as finance and medicine, where robustness and interpretability are of utmost importance. Yet, methods for improving and certifying their robustness are severely under-explored, in contrast to those focusing on neural networks. Targeting this important challenge, we propose deterministic smoothing for decision stump ensembles. Whereas most prior work on randomized smoothing focuses on evaluating arbitrary base models approximately under input randomization, the key insight of our work is that decision stump ensembles enable exact yet efficient evaluation via dynamic programming. Importantly, we obtain deterministic robustness certificates, even jointly over numerical and categorical features, a setting ubiquitous in the real world. Further, we derive an MLE-optimal training method for smoothed decision stumps under randomization and propose two boosting approaches to improve their provable robustness. An extensive experimental evaluation on computer vision and tabular data tasks shows that our approach yields significantly higher certified accuracies than the state-of-the-art for tree-based models. We release all code and trained models at https://github.com/eth-sri/drs. 基于树的模型用于许多高风险的应用领域，例如金融和医学，其中稳健性和可解释性至关重要。然而，与专注于神经网络的方法相比，改进和证明其鲁棒性的方法还严重不足。针对这一重要挑战，我们提出了决策树桩集成的确定性平滑。虽然大多数先前关于随机平滑的工作侧重于在输入随机化下近似评估任意基本模型，但我们工作的关键见解是决策树桩集成可以通过动态规划实现精确而高效的评估。重要的是，我们获得了确定性的鲁棒性证书，甚至是在数字和分类特征上共同获得的，这是现实世界中普遍存在的设置。此外，我们推导了一种用于随机化下平滑决策树桩的 MLE 最优训练方法，并提出了两种增强方法来提高其可证明的鲁棒性。对计算机视觉和表格数据任务的广泛实验评估表明，我们的方法比基于树的模型的最先进方法产生了显着更高的认证精度。我们在 https://github.com/eth-sri/drs 发布了所有代码和训练模型。 本文提出了一种确定性平滑方法，用于提升决策桩集成模型的鲁棒性，并通过动态规划实现高效精确的评估。 Miklós Z. authors_text: Edson Nobuyuki Egashira,Diana Pamela Moya Osorio,Nhan Thanh Nguyen,Markku Juntti
title: Secrecy Capacity Maximization for a Hybrid Relay-RIS Scheme in mmWave MIMO Networks
title_zh: 毫米波 MIMO 网络中混合中继-RIS 方案的保密容量最大化
abstract: The hybrid relay-reflecting intelligent surface (HR-RIS) has been recently introduced as an efficient solution to overcome the double path loss and limited beamforming diversity of the conventional fully passive reflecting surface. This motivates us to investigate the application of the HR-RIS in improving the secrecy capacity of millimeter wave multiple-input-multiple-output (MIMO) systems with the presence of multi-antenna eavesdropper. The joint optimization of the transmit beamformer and the relay-reflecting coefficients at RIS is tackled via alternating optimization. In the proposed solution, a closed-form expression for the optimal transmit beamformer at the transmitter is derived, and a metaheuristic solution based on particle swarm optimization is proposed to optimize the active and passive elements at the HR-RIS. The simulation results verify that under various scenarios, the HR-RIS provides significant improvement in the secrecy capacity with respect to the conventional passive reflecting surface.
summary: The hybrid relay-reflecting intelligent surface (HR-RIS) has been recently introduced as an efficient solution to overcome the double path loss and limited beamforming diversity of the conventional fully passive reflecting surface. This motivates us to investigate the application of the HR-RIS in improving the secrecy capacity of millimeter wave multiple-input-multiple-output (MIMO) systems with the presence of multi-antenna eavesdropper. The joint optimization of the transmit beamformer and the relay-reflecting coefficients at RIS is tackled via alternating optimization. In the proposed solution, a closed-form expression for the optimal transmit beamformer at the transmitter is derived, and a metaheuristic solution based on particle swarm optimization is proposed to optimize the active and passive elements at the HR-RIS. The simulation results verify that under various scenarios, the HR-RIS provides significant improvement in the secrecy capacity with respect to the conventional passive reflecting surface.
abstract_zh: 最近推出了混合中继反射智能表面（HR-RIS）作为一种有效的解决方案，以克服传统全无源反射表面的双路径损耗和有限的波束形成多样性。这促使我们研究 HR-RIS 在提高存在多天线窃听器的毫米波多输入多输出 (MIMO) 系统的保密能力方面的应用。 RIS 上的发射波束形成器和中继反射系数的联合优化是通过交替优化来解决的。在所提出的解决方案中，导出了发射机处最优发射波束形成器的封闭式表达式，并提出了基于粒子群优化的元启发式解决方案来优化 HR-RIS 上的有源和无源元件。仿真结果验证了在各种场景下，HR-RIS相对于传统的无源反射面在保密能力上有显着的提高。

AI.tldr: 研究混合中继-智能反射面（HR-RIS）在毫米波MIMO网络中的应用，以最大化系统保密容量。
AI.motivation: 传统被动反射面存在双路径损耗和波束成形多样性不足的问题，需通过HR-RIS提升毫米波MIMO系统的保密性。
AI.method: 通过交替优化联合优化发射波束成形器和RIS参数，结合闭合解和粒子群优化算法进行优化。
AI.result: 仿真显示HR-RIS在多种场景下显著提升保密容量，优于传统被动反射面。
AI.conclusion: HR-RIS能有效提升毫米波MIMO系统的保密容量，所提方法具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Runlin Lei,Zhen Wang,Yaliang Li,Bolin Ding,Zhewei Wei
title: EvenNet: Ignoring Odd-Hop Neighbors Improves Robustness of Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: EvenNet：忽略奇跳邻居可以提高图神经网络的鲁棒性
abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have received extensive research attention for their promising performance in graph machine learning. Despite their extraordinary predictive accuracy, existing approaches, such as GCN and GPRGNN, are not robust in the face of homophily changes on test graphs, rendering these models vulnerable to graph structural attacks and with limited capacity in generalizing to graphs of varied homophily levels. Although many methods have been proposed to improve the robustness of GNN models, most of these techniques are restricted to the spatial domain and employ complicated defense mechanisms, such as learning new graph structures or calculating edge attentions. In this paper, we study the problem of designing simple and robust GNN models in the spectral domain. We propose EvenNet, a spectral GNN corresponding to an even-polynomial graph filter. Based on our theoretical analysis in both spatial and spectral domains, we demonstrate that EvenNet outperforms full-order models in generalizing across homophilic and heterophilic graphs, implying that ignoring odd-hop neighbors improves the robustness of GNNs. We conduct experiments on both synthetic and real-world datasets to demonstrate the effectiveness of EvenNet. Notably, EvenNet outperforms existing defense models against structural attacks without introducing additional computational costs and maintains competitiveness in traditional node classification tasks on homophilic and heterophilic graphs.
summary: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have received extensive research attention for their promising performance in graph machine learning. Despite their extraordinary predictive accuracy, existing approaches, such as GCN and GPRGNN, are not robust in the face of homophily changes on test graphs, rendering these models vulnerable to graph structural attacks and with limited capacity in generalizing to graphs of varied homophily levels. Although many methods have been proposed to improve the robustness of GNN models, most of these techniques are restricted to the spatial domain and employ complicated defense mechanisms, such as learning new graph structures or calculating edge attentions. In this paper, we study the problem of designing simple and robust GNN models in the spectral domain. We propose EvenNet, a spectral GNN corresponding to an even-polynomial graph filter. Based on our theoretical analysis in both spatial and spectral domains, we demonstrate that EvenNet outperforms full-order models in generalizing across homophilic and heterophilic graphs, implying that ignoring odd-hop neighbors improves the robustness of GNNs. We conduct experiments on both synthetic and real-world datasets to demonstrate the effectiveness of EvenNet. Notably, EvenNet outperforms existing defense models against structural attacks without introducing additional computational costs and maintains competitiveness in traditional node classification tasks on homophilic and heterophilic graphs.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）因其在图机器学习中的良好表现而受到广泛的研究关注。尽管 GCN 和 GPRGNN 等现有方法具有非凡的预测准确性，但在面对测试图的同质性变化时并不鲁棒，使得这些模型容易受到图结构攻击，并且泛化到不同同质性级别的图的能力有限。尽管已经提出了许多方法来提高 GNN 模型的鲁棒性，但大多数技术仅限于空间域并采用复杂的防御机制，例如学习新的图结构或计算边缘注意力。在本文中，我们研究了在谱域中设计简单且鲁棒的 GNN 模型的问题。我们提出了 EvenNet，一种对应于偶多项式图滤波器的谱 GNN。基于我们在空间和谱域的理论分析，我们证明 EvenNet 在泛化同性图和异性图方面优于全阶模型，这意味着忽略奇跳邻居可以提高 GNN 的鲁棒性。我们在合成数据集和真实数据集上进行了实验，以证明 EvenNet 的有效性。值得注意的是，EvenNet 在不引入额外计算成本的情况下优于现有的结构性攻击防御模型，并在同亲图和异亲图上的传统节点分类任务中保持竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EvenNet，一种通过忽略奇数跳邻居来提高图神经网络鲁棒性的谱域模型。
AI.motivation: 现有GNN模型在面对图同质性变化和结构攻击时鲁棒性不足，且防御方法多依赖复杂机制。
AI.method: 设计基于谱域偶多项式图滤波器的EvenNet，通过理论分析证明忽略奇数跳邻居可提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: EvenNet在合成与真实数据集上优于现有防御模型，且无需额外计算成本，保持分类任务竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 忽略奇数跳邻居的EvenNet有效提升GNN跨同质性图的泛化能力与抗攻击性，且计算高效。
