result: 在非受限场景下成功生成无缝融合的人脸，现代人脸识别系统对其识别准确率降至55-70%，验证了方法的有效性及系统脆弱性。
conclusion: 该方法表明，通过理解人脸识别系统的特征提取机制可有效构造攻击样本，揭示了系统在形态化攻击下的安全缺陷。
search_text: Face Morphing: Fooling a Face Recognition System Is Simple! 脸部变形：欺骗脸部识别系统很简单！ State-of-the-art face recognition (FR) approaches have shown remarkable results in predicting whether two faces belong to the same identity, yielding accuracies between 92% and 100% depending on the difficulty of the protocol. However, the accuracy drops substantially when exposed to morphed faces, specifically generated to look similar to two identities. To generate morphed faces, we integrate a simple pretrained FR model into a generative adversarial network (GAN) and modify several loss functions for face morphing. In contrast to previous works, our approach and analyses are not limited to pairs of frontal faces with the same ethnicity and gender. Our qualitative and quantitative results affirm that our approach achieves a seamless change between two faces even in unconstrained scenarios. Despite using features from a simpler FR model for face morphing, we demonstrate that even recent FR systems struggle to distinguish the morphed face from both identities obtaining an accuracy of only 55-70%. Besides, we provide further insights into how knowing the FR system makes it particularly vulnerable to face morphing attacks. 最先进的人脸识别 (FR) 方法在预测两张脸是否属于同一身份方面显示出显着的效果，根据协议的难度，准确率在 92% 到 100% 之间。然而，当暴露于变形的面孔（专门生成为看起来类似于两个身份）时，准确度会大幅下降。为了生成变形的脸部，我们将一个简单的预训练 FR 模型集成到生成对抗网络 (GAN) 中，并修改了几个用于脸部变形的损失函数。与以前的作品相比，我们的方法和分析不限于具有相同种族和性别的正面面孔对。我们的定性和定量结果证实，即使在不受约束的情况下，我们的方法也能实现两张面孔之间的无缝变化。尽管使用更简单的 FR 模型中的特征进行面部变形，但我们证明，即使是最近的 FR 系统也很难将变形后的面部与两个身份区分开来，准确率仅为 55-70%。此外，我们还进一步深入了解了 FR 系统如何使其特别容易受到变形攻击。 本文提出一种生成融合两张人脸的形态化图像的方法，以欺骗人脸识别系统。 Stefan Hörmann,Tianlin Kong,Torben Teepe,Fabian Herzog,Martin Knoche,Gerhard Rigoll cs.CV

authors_text: Tingting Liang,Hongwei Xie,Kaicheng Yu,Zhongyu Xia,Zhiwei Lin,Yongtao Wang,Tao Tang,Bing Wang,Zhi Tang
title: BEVFusion: A Simple and Robust LiDAR-Camera Fusion Framework
title_zh: BEVFusion：简单而强大的激光雷达相机融合框架
abstract: Fusing the camera and LiDAR information has become a de-facto standard for 3D object detection tasks. Current methods rely on point clouds from the LiDAR sensor as queries to leverage the feature from the image space. However, people discovered that this underlying assumption makes the current fusion framework infeasible to produce any prediction when there is a LiDAR malfunction, regardless of minor or major. This fundamentally limits the deployment capability to realistic autonomous driving scenarios. In contrast, we propose a surprisingly simple yet novel fusion framework, dubbed BEVFusion, whose camera stream does not depend on the input of LiDAR data, thus addressing the downside of previous methods. We empirically show that our framework surpasses the state-of-the-art methods under the normal training settings. Under the robustness training settings that simulate various LiDAR malfunctions, our framework significantly surpasses the state-of-the-art methods by 15.7% to 28.9% mAP. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to handle realistic LiDAR malfunction and can be deployed to realistic scenarios without any post-processing procedure. The code is available at https://github.com/ADLab-AutoDrive/BEVFusion.
summary: Fusing the camera and LiDAR information has become a de-facto standard for 3D object detection tasks. Current methods rely on point clouds from the LiDAR sensor as queries to leverage the feature from the image space. However, people discovered that this underlying assumption makes the current fusion framework infeasible to produce any prediction when there is a LiDAR malfunction, regardless of minor or major. This fundamentally limits the deployment capability to realistic autonomous driving scenarios. In contrast, we propose a surprisingly simple yet novel fusion framework, dubbed BEVFusion, whose camera stream does not depend on the input of LiDAR data, thus addressing the downside of previous methods. We empirically show that our framework surpasses the state-of-the-art methods under the normal training settings. Under the robustness training settings that simulate various LiDAR malfunctions, our framework significantly surpasses the state-of-the-art methods by 15.7% to 28.9% mAP. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to handle realistic LiDAR malfunction and can be deployed to realistic scenarios without any post-processing procedure. The code is available at https://github.com/ADLab-AutoDrive/BEVFusion.
abstract_zh: 融合相机和 LiDAR 信息已成为 3D 物体检测任务的事实上的标准。当前的方法依赖于激光雷达传感器的点云作为查询来利用图像空间的特征。然而，人们发现，这一基本假设使得当前的融合框架在激光雷达出现故障时无法产生任何预测，无论是轻微还是严重。这从根本上限制了现实自动驾驶场景的部署能力。相比之下，我们提出了一种令人惊讶的简单而新颖的融合框架，称为 BEVFusion，其摄像头流不依赖于 LiDAR 数据的输入，从而解决了以前方法的缺点。我们的经验表明，我们的框架超越了正常训练环境下最先进的方法。在模拟各种 LiDAR 故障的鲁棒性训练设置下，我们的框架明显超越了最先进的方法 15.7% 至 28.9% mAP。据我们所知，我们是第一个处理现实 LiDAR 故障的公司，并且可以部署到现实场景中，而无需任何后处理程序。该代码可从 https://github.com/ADLab-AutoDrive/BEVFusion 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为BEVFusion的简单且鲁棒的激光雷达-相机融合框架，用于解决现有方法在激光雷达故障时无法进行预测的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有激光雷达-相机融合方法依赖激光雷达点云作为查询，导致在激光雷达出现故障时完全失效，限制了其在真实自动驾驶场景中的部署能力。
AI.method: BEVFusion框架通过相机流独立于激光雷达输入，无需依赖激光雷达数据即可完成感知任务，从而克服了传统方法的缺陷。
AI.result: 在正常训练设置下，BEVFusion优于现有方法；在模拟多种激光雷达故障的鲁棒性训练下，其mAP提升15.7%至28.9%。
AI.conclusion: BEVFusion是首个无需后处理即可处理真实激光雷达故障的融合框架，具有实际部署价值。

authors_text: Gianluigi Lopardo,Frederic Precioso,Damien Garreau
title: A Sea of Words: An In-Depth Analysis of Anchors for Text Data
title_zh: 词海：文本数据锚点的深入分析
comment: Accepted to AISTATS 2023. 9+2 page paper, 21-page appendix
comments: Accepted to AISTATS 2023. 9+2 page paper, 21-page appendix
abstract: Anchors (Ribeiro et al., 2018) is a post-hoc, rule-based interpretability method. For text data, it proposes to explain a decision by highlighting a small set of words (an anchor) such that the model to explain has similar outputs when they are present in a document. In this paper, we present the first theoretical analysis of Anchors, considering that the search for the best anchor is exhaustive. After formalizing the algorithm for text classification, we present explicit results on different classes of models when the vectorization step is TF-IDF, and words are replaced by a fixed out-of-dictionary token when removed. Our inquiry covers models such as elementary if-then rules and linear classifiers. We then leverage this analysis to gain insights on the behavior of Anchors for any differentiable classifiers. For neural networks, we empirically show that the words corresponding to the highest partial derivatives of the model with respect to the input, reweighted by the inverse document frequencies, are selected by Anchors.
summary: Anchors (Ribeiro et al., 2018) is a post-hoc, rule-based interpretability method. For text data, it proposes to explain a decision by highlighting a small set of words (an anchor) such that the model to explain has similar outputs when they are present in a document. In this paper, we present the first theoretical analysis of Anchors, considering that the search for the best anchor is exhaustive. After formalizing the algorithm for text classification, we present explicit results on different classes of models when the vectorization step is TF-IDF, and words are replaced by a fixed out-of-dictionary token when removed. Our inquiry covers models such as elementary if-then rules and linear classifiers. We then leverage this analysis to gain insights on the behavior of Anchors for any differentiable classifiers. For neural networks, we empirically show that the words corresponding to the highest partial derivatives of the model with respect to the input, reweighted by the inverse document frequencies, are selected by Anchors.
abstract_zh: 锚点（Ribeiro et al., 2018）是一种事后、基于规则的可解释性方法。对于文本数据，它建议通过突出显示一小组单词（锚点）来解释决策，以便解释的模型在文档中出现时具有相似的输出。在本文中，我们提出了对锚点的第一个理论分析，考虑到对最佳锚点的搜索是详尽的。在形式化文本分类算法之后，当向量化步骤为 TF-IDF 时，我们在不同类别的模型上呈现显式结果，并且单词在删除时由固定的字典外标记替换。我们的调查涵盖基本的 if-then 规则和线性分类器等模型。然后，我们利用此分析来深入了解任何可微分类器的锚点行为。对于神经网络，我们凭经验表明，与模型相对于输入的最高偏导数相对应的单词，通过逆文档频率重新加权，由锚点选择。

AI.tldr: 本文对文本数据的Anchors可解释性方法进行理论分析与实验验证，探讨其在不同模型中的行为机制。
AI.motivation: Anchors方法虽被广泛使用，但缺乏理论分析，需明确其在不同模型中的解释效果及适用性。
AI.method: 通过形式化Anchors算法，结合TF-IDF向量化与固定标记替换，对线性分类器及神经网络进行理论分析与实证研究。
AI.result: 发现Anchors在简单模型中与特征权重相关，在神经网络中选择高偏导数且逆文档频率加权的词语。
AI.conclusion: Anchors能有效解释文本模型决策，其选择机制与模型可微性及特征重要性密切相关。

authors_text: Lu Yang,He Jiang,Qing Song,Jun Guo
title: A Survey on Long-Tailed Visual Recognition
title_zh: 长尾视觉识别调查
comment: Accepted for publication in International Journal of Computer Vision (IJCV)
comments: Accepted for publication in International Journal of Computer Vision (IJCV)
abstract: The heavy reliance on data is one of the major reasons that currently limit the development of deep learning. Data quality directly dominates the effect of deep learning models, and the long-tailed distribution is one of the factors affecting data quality. The long-tailed phenomenon is prevalent due to the prevalence of power law in nature. In this case, the performance of deep learning models is often dominated by the head classes while the learning of the tail classes is severely underdeveloped. In order to learn adequately for all classes, many researchers have studied and preliminarily addressed the long-tailed problem. In this survey, we focus on the problems caused by long-tailed data distribution, sort out the representative long-tailed visual recognition datasets and summarize some mainstream long-tailed studies. Specifically, we summarize these studies into ten categories from the perspective of representation learning, and outline the highlights and limitations of each category. Besides, we have studied four quantitative metrics for evaluating the imbalance, and suggest using the Gini coefficient to evaluate the long-tailedness of a dataset. Based on the Gini coefficient, we quantitatively study 20 widely-used and large-scale visual datasets proposed in the last decade, and find that the long-tailed phenomenon is widespread and has not been fully studied. Finally, we provide several future directions for the development of long-tailed learning to provide more ideas for readers.
summary: The heavy reliance on data is one of the major reasons that currently limit the development of deep learning. Data quality directly dominates the effect of deep learning models, and the long-tailed distribution is one of the factors affecting data quality. The long-tailed phenomenon is prevalent due to the prevalence of power law in nature. In this case, the performance of deep learning models is often dominated by the head classes while the learning of the tail classes is severely underdeveloped. In order to learn adequately for all classes, many researchers have studied and preliminarily addressed the long-tailed problem. In this survey, we focus on the problems caused by long-tailed data distribution, sort out the representative long-tailed visual recognition datasets and summarize some mainstream long-tailed studies. Specifically, we summarize these studies into ten categories from the perspective of representation learning, and outline the highlights and limitations of each category. Besides, we have studied four quantitative metrics for evaluating the imbalance, and suggest using the Gini coefficient to evaluate the long-tailedness of a dataset. Based on the Gini coefficient, we quantitatively study 20 widely-used and large-scale visual datasets proposed in the last decade, and find that the long-tailed phenomenon is widespread and has not been fully studied. Finally, we provide several future directions for the development of long-tailed learning to provide more ideas for readers.
abstract_zh: 对数据的严重依赖是目前限制深度学习发展的主要原因之一。数据质量直接决定深度学习模型的效果，而长尾分布是影响数据质量的因素之一。由于自然界中幂律的盛行，长尾现象普遍存在。在这种情况下，深度学习模型的性能往往由头类主导，而尾类的学习严重不足。为了让所有班级都能充分学习，许多研究人员对长尾问题进行了研究并初步解决。在本次调查中，我们关注长尾数据分布带来的问题，梳理了具有代表性的长尾视觉识别数据集，并总结了一些主流的长尾研究。具体来说，我们从表征学习的角度将这些研究总结为十类，并概述了每一类的亮点和局限性。此外，我们研究了评估不平衡性的四个定量指标，并建议使用基尼系数来评估数据集的长尾性。基于基尼系数，我们定量研究了近十年来提出的20个广泛使用的大规模视觉数据集，发现长尾现象普遍存在且尚未得到充分研究。最后，我们提出了长尾学习未来发展的几个方向，为读者提供更多思路。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了长尾视觉识别领域的问题、数据集及主流方法，分析了长尾分布对深度学习模型性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 深度学习高度依赖数据质量，而长尾分布导致类别间样本量差异显著，尾部类别学习效果差，限制了模型性能。
AI.method: 整理长尾视觉数据集，将现有方法分为十类并总结其优劣，采用基尼系数等四类指标量化评估数据集不平衡性。
AI.result: 发现近十年20个主流视觉数据集普遍存在长尾现象，且相关研究尚未充分覆盖该问题的复杂性。
AI.conclusion: 长尾学习仍需深入研究，建议采用基尼系数评估数据集长尾程度，并从数据增强、损失函数等方向探索解决方案。

authors_text: Mansi Gupta,Aman Swaraj,Karan Verma
title: Classification of COVID-19 Patients with their Severity Level from Chest CT Scans using Transfer Learning
title_zh: 使用迁移学习根据胸部 CT 扫描对 COVID-19 患者的严重程度进行分类
abstract: Background and Objective: During pandemics, the use of artificial intelligence (AI) approaches combined with biomedical science play a significant role in reducing the burden on the healthcare systems and physicians. The rapid increment in cases of COVID-19 has led to an increase in demand for hospital beds and other medical equipment. However, since medical facilities are limited, it is recommended to diagnose patients as per the severity of the infection. Keeping this in mind, we share our research in detecting COVID-19 as well as assessing its severity using chest-CT scans and Deep Learning pre-trained models. Dataset: We have collected a total of 1966 CT Scan images for three different class labels, namely, Non-COVID, Severe COVID, and Non-Severe COVID, out of which 714 CT images belong to the Non-COVID category, 713 CT images are for Non-Severe COVID category and 539 CT images are of Severe COVID category. Methods: All of the images are initially pre-processed using the Contrast Limited Histogram Equalization (CLAHE) approach. The pre-processed images are then fed into the VGG-16 network for extracting features. Finally, the retrieved characteristics are categorized and the accuracy is evaluated using a support vector machine (SVM) with 10-fold cross-validation (CV). Result and Conclusion: In our study, we have combined well-known strategies for pre-processing, feature extraction, and classification which brings us to a remarkable success rate of disease and its severity recognition with an accuracy of 96.05% (97.7% for Non-Severe COVID-19 images and 93% for Severe COVID-19 images). Our model can therefore help radiologists detect COVID-19 and the extent of its severity.
summary: Background and Objective: During pandemics, the use of artificial intelligence (AI) approaches combined with biomedical science play a significant role in reducing the burden on the healthcare systems and physicians. The rapid increment in cases of COVID-19 has led to an increase in demand for hospital beds and other medical equipment. However, since medical facilities are limited, it is recommended to diagnose patients as per the severity of the infection. Keeping this in mind, we share our research in detecting COVID-19 as well as assessing its severity using chest-CT scans and Deep Learning pre-trained models. Dataset: We have collected a total of 1966 CT Scan images for three different class labels, namely, Non-COVID, Severe COVID, and Non-Severe COVID, out of which 714 CT images belong to the Non-COVID category, 713 CT images are for Non-Severe COVID category and 539 CT images are of Severe COVID category. Methods: All of the images are initially pre-processed using the Contrast Limited Histogram Equalization (CLAHE) approach. The pre-processed images are then fed into the VGG-16 network for extracting features. Finally, the retrieved characteristics are categorized and the accuracy is evaluated using a support vector machine (SVM) with 10-fold cross-validation (CV). Result and Conclusion: In our study, we have combined well-known strategies for pre-processing, feature extraction, and classification which brings us to a remarkable success rate of disease and its severity recognition with an accuracy of 96.05% (97.7% for Non-Severe COVID-19 images and 93% for Severe COVID-19 images). Our model can therefore help radiologists detect COVID-19 and the extent of its severity.
abstract_zh: 背景和目的：在大流行期间，人工智能（AI）方法与生物医学相结合的使用在减轻医疗保健系统和医生的负担方面发挥着重要作用。 COVID-19 病例的迅速增加导致对病床和其他医疗设备的需求增加。但由于医疗设施有限，建议根据感染的严重程度对患者进行诊断。考虑到这一点，我们分享了我们在检测 COVID-19 以及使用胸部 CT 扫描和深度学习预训练模型评估其严重程度方面的研究。数据集：我们总共收集了 1966 个不同类别标签的 CT 扫描图像，即非新冠病毒、严重新冠病毒和非新冠病毒，其中 714 张 CT 图像属于非新冠病毒类别，713 张 CT 图像属于非新冠病毒类别，539 张 CT 图像属于新冠病毒严重类别。方法：所有图像最初均使用对比度有限直方图均衡 (CLAHE) 方法进行预处理。然后将预处理后的图像输入 VGG-16 网络以提取特征。最后，对检索到的特征进行分类，并使用具有 10 倍交叉验证 (CV) 的支持向量机 (SVM) 评估准确性。结果和结论：在我们的研究中，我们结合了众所周知的预处理、特征提取和分类策略，这为我们带来了疾病及其严重程度识别的显着成功率，准确率达到 96.05%（非重症 COVID-19 图像为 97.7%，重症 COVID-19 图像为 93%）。因此，我们的模型可以帮助放射科医生检测 COVID-19 及其严重程度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于胸部CT扫描和深度学习预训练模型的COVID-19患者严重程度分类方法。
AI.motivation: 疫情期间医疗资源有限，需通过AI技术快速评估患者感染严重程度以优化医疗资源配置。
AI.method: 采用CLAHE预处理CT图像，使用VGG-16网络提取特征，结合SVM分类器并进行10折交叉验证。
AI.result: 模型总体准确率达96.05%，其中非严重COVID-19图像识别准确率为97.7%，严重COVID-19图像为93%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效辅助放射科医生检测COVID-19并评估其严重程度，具有临床应用价值。

authors_text: Haoxin Wang,BaekGyu Kim,Jiang Xie,Zhu Han
title: LEAF + AIO: Edge-Assisted Energy-Aware Object Detection for Mobile Augmented Reality
title_zh: LEAF + AIO：用于移动增强现实的边缘辅助能量感知对象检测
comment: This is a personal copy of the authors. Not for redistribution. The final version of this paper was accepted by IEEE Transactions on Mobile Computing
comments: This is a personal copy of the authors. Not for redistribution. The final version of this paper was accepted by IEEE Transactions on Mobile Computing
abstract: Today very few deep learning-based mobile augmented reality (MAR) applications are applied in mobile devices because they are significantly energy-guzzling. In this paper, we design an edge-based energy-aware MAR system that enables MAR devices to dynamically change their configurations, such as CPU frequency, computation model size, and image offloading frequency based on user preferences, camera sampling rates, and available radio resources. Our proposed dynamic MAR configuration adaptations can minimize the per frame energy consumption of multiple MAR clients without degrading their preferred MAR performance metrics, such as latency and detection accuracy. To thoroughly analyze the interactions among MAR configurations, user preferences, camera sampling rate, and energy consumption, we propose, to the best of our knowledge, the first comprehensive analytical energy model for MAR devices. Based on the proposed analytical model, we design a LEAF optimization algorithm to guide the MAR configuration adaptation and server radio resource allocation. An image offloading frequency orchestrator, coordinating with the LEAF, is developed to adaptively regulate the edge-based object detection invocations and to further improve the energy efficiency of MAR devices. Extensive evaluations are conducted to validate the performance of the proposed analytical model and algorithms.
summary: Today very few deep learning-based mobile augmented reality (MAR) applications are applied in mobile devices because they are significantly energy-guzzling. In this paper, we design an edge-based energy-aware MAR system that enables MAR devices to dynamically change their configurations, such as CPU frequency, computation model size, and image offloading frequency based on user preferences, camera sampling rates, and available radio resources. Our proposed dynamic MAR configuration adaptations can minimize the per frame energy consumption of multiple MAR clients without degrading their preferred MAR performance metrics, such as latency and detection accuracy. To thoroughly analyze the interactions among MAR configurations, user preferences, camera sampling rate, and energy consumption, we propose, to the best of our knowledge, the first comprehensive analytical energy model for MAR devices. Based on the proposed analytical model, we design a LEAF optimization algorithm to guide the MAR configuration adaptation and server radio resource allocation. An image offloading frequency orchestrator, coordinating with the LEAF, is developed to adaptively regulate the edge-based object detection invocations and to further improve the energy efficiency of MAR devices. Extensive evaluations are conducted to validate the performance of the proposed analytical model and algorithms.
abstract_zh: 如今，基于深度学习的移动增强现实（MAR）应用很少应用于移动设备，因为它们非常耗能。在本文中，我们设计了一种基于边缘的能源感知 MAR 系统，使 MAR 设备能够根据用户偏好、相机采样率和可用无线电资源动态更改其配置，例如 CPU 频率、计算模型大小和图像卸载频率。我们提出的动态 MAR 配置调整可以最大限度地减少多个 MAR 客户端的每帧能耗，而不会降低其首选的 MAR 性能指标，例如延迟和检测精度。为了彻底分析 MAR 配置、用户偏好、相机采样率和能耗之间的相互作用，据我们所知，我们提出了第一个针对 MAR 设备的综合分析能源模型。基于所提出的分析模型，我们设计了一种 LEAF 优化算法来指导 MAR 配置自适应和服务器无线电资源分配。开发了与 LEAF 协调的图像卸载频率协调器，以自适应调节基于边缘的对象检测调用，并进一步提高 MAR 设备的能源效率。进行了广泛的评估以验证所提出的分析模型和算法的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种基于边缘计算的能源感知移动增强现实（MAR）系统，通过动态调整设备配置和图像卸载策略来降低能耗。
AI.motivation: 当前基于深度学习的移动增强现实应用因高能耗难以在移动设备上广泛部署，需在不牺牲性能的前提下优化能源效率。
AI.method: 提出动态配置适应机制、首个MAR设备综合能耗模型、LEAF优化算法及图像卸载协调器，协同调整计算模型、CPU频率和图像卸载频率。
AI.result: 实验验证了所提模型和算法能有效降低多MAR客户端每帧能耗，同时保持用户偏好性能指标（如延迟和检测精度）。
AI.conclusion: 通过边缘辅助和动态资源分配，本文方法在移动增强现实场景中实现了能耗与性能的平衡优化。

search_text: LEAF + AIO: Edge-Assisted Energy-Aware Object Detection for Mobile Augmented Reality LEAF + AIO：用于移动增强现实的边缘辅助能量感知对象检测 Today very few deep learning-based mobile augmented reality (MAR) applications are applied in mobile devices because they are significantly energy-guzzling. In this paper, we design an edge-based energy-aware MAR system that enables MAR devices to dynamically change their configurations, such as CPU frequency, computation model size, and image offloading frequency based on user preferences, camera sampling rates, and available radio resources. Our proposed dynamic MAR configuration adaptations can minimize the per frame energy consumption of multiple MAR clients without degrading their preferred MAR performance metrics, such as latency and detection accuracy. To thoroughly analyze the interactions among MAR configurations, user preferences, camera sampling rate, and energy consumption, we propose, to the best of our knowledge, the first comprehensive analytical energy model for MAR devices. Based on the proposed analytical model, we design a LEAF optimization algorithm to guide the MAR configuration adaptation and server radio resource allocation. An image offloading frequency orchestrator, coordinating with the LEAF, is developed to adaptively regulate the edge-based object detection invocations and to further improve the energy efficiency of MAR devices. Extensive evaluations are conducted to validate the performance of the proposed analytical model and algorithms. 如今，基于深度学习的移动增强现实（MAR）应用很少应用于移动设备，因为它们非常耗能。在本文中，我们设计了一种基于边缘的能源感知 MAR 系统，使 MAR 设备能够根据用户偏好、相机采样率和可用无线电资源动态更改其配置，例如 CPU 频率、计算模型大小和图像卸载频率。我们提出的动态 MAR 配置调整可以最大限度地减少多个 MAR 客户端的每帧能耗，而不会降低其首选的 MAR 性能指标，例如延迟和检测精度。为了彻底分析 MAR 配置、用户偏好、相机采样率和能耗之间的相互作用，据我们所知，我们提出了第一个针对 MAR 设备的综合分析能源模型。基于所提出的分析模型，我们设计了一种 LEAF 优化算法来指导 MAR 配置自适应和服务器无线电资源分配。开发了与 LEAF 协调的图像卸载频率协调器，以自适应调节基于边缘的对象检测调用，并进一步提高 MAR 设备的能源效率。进行了广泛的评估以验证所提出的分析模型和算法的性能。 本文设计了一种基于边缘计算的能源感知移动增强现实（MAR）系统，通过动态调整设备配置和图像卸载策略来降低能耗。 Haoxin Wang,BaekGyu Kim,Jiang Xie,Zhu Han cs.CV,cs.MM,cs.NI

authors_text: Hao Chen,Wenyuan Li,Song Chen,Zhenwei Shi
title: Semantic-aware Dense Representation Learning for Remote Sensing Image Change Detection
title_zh: 用于遥感图像变化检测的语义感知密集表示学习
comment: 18 pages, 7 figures. Accepted article by IEEE TGRS
comments: 18 pages, 7 figures. Accepted article by IEEE TGRS
abstract: Supervised deep learning models depend on massive labeled data. Unfortunately, it is time-consuming and labor-intensive to collect and annotate bitemporal samples containing desired changes. Transfer learning from pre-trained models is effective to alleviate label insufficiency in remote sensing (RS) change detection (CD). We explore the use of semantic information during pre-training. Different from traditional supervised pre-training that learns the mapping from image to label, we incorporate semantic supervision into the self-supervised learning (SSL) framework. Typically, multiple objects of interest (e.g., buildings) are distributed in various locations in an uncurated RS image. Instead of manipulating image-level representations via global pooling, we introduce point-level supervision on per-pixel embeddings to learn spatially-sensitive features, thus benefiting downstream dense CD. To achieve this, we obtain multiple points via class-balanced sampling on the overlapped area between views using the semantic mask. We learn an embedding space where background and foreground points are pushed apart, and spatially aligned points across views are pulled together. Our intuition is the resulting semantically discriminative representations invariant to irrelevant changes (illumination and unconcerned land covers) may help change recognition. We collect large-scale image-mask pairs freely available in the RS community for pre-training. Extensive experiments on three CD datasets verify the effectiveness of our method. Ours significantly outperforms ImageNet pre-training, in-domain supervision, and several SSL methods. Empirical results indicate our pre-training improves the generalization and data efficiency of the CD model. Notably, we achieve competitive results using 20% training data than baseline (random initialization) using 100% data. Our code is available.

Transfer learning from pre-trained models is effective to alleviate label insufficiency in remote sensing (RS) change detection (CD). We explore the use of semantic information during pre-training. Different from traditional supervised pre-training that learns the mapping from image to label, we incorporate semantic supervision into the self-supervised learning (SSL) framework. Typically, multiple objects of interest (e.g., buildings) are distributed in various locations in an uncurated RS image. Instead of manipulating image-level representations via global pooling, we introduce point-level supervision on per-pixel embeddings to learn spatially-sensitive features, thus benefiting downstream dense CD. To achieve this, we obtain multiple points via class-balanced sampling on the overlapped area between views using the semantic mask. We learn an embedding space where background and foreground points are pushed apart, and spatially aligned points across views are pulled together. Our intuition is the resulting semantically discriminative representations invariant to irrelevant changes (illumination and unconcerned land covers) may help change recognition. We collect large-scale image-mask pairs freely available in the RS community for pre-training. Extensive experiments on three CD datasets verify the effectiveness of our method. Ours significantly outperforms ImageNet pre-training, in-domain supervision, and several SSL methods. Empirical results indicate our pre-training improves the generalization and data efficiency of the CD model. Notably, we achieve competitive results using 20% training data than baseline (random initialization) using 100% data. Our code is available.
abstract_zh: 有监督的深度学习模型依赖于大量标记数据。不幸的是，收集和注释包含所需变化的双时态样本既耗时又费力。来自预训练模型的迁移学习可以有效缓解遥感（RS）变化检测（CD）中的标签不足。我们探索在预训练期间语义信息的使用。与学习从图像到标签的映射的传统监督预训练不同，我们将语义监督纳入自监督学习（SSL）框架中。通常，多个感兴趣的对象（例如建筑物）分布在未经整理的 RS 图像中的各个位置。我们没有通过全局池化来操纵图像级表示，而是在每像素嵌入上引入点级监督来学习空间敏感特征，从而有利于下游的密集CD。为了实现这一点，我们使用语义掩码通过在视图之间的重叠区域上进行类平衡采样来获得多个点。我们学习一个嵌入空间，其中背景点和前景点被推开，并且视图中空间对齐的点被拉在一起。我们的直觉是，由此产生的对不相关变化（光照和不相关的土地覆盖）不变的语义区分表示可能有助于改变识别。我们收集 RS 社区中免费提供的大规模图像掩模对进行预训练。对三个 CD 数据集的广泛实验验证了我们方法的有效性。我们的方法明显优于 ImageNet 预训练、域内监督和多种 SSL 方法。实证结果表明我们的预训练提高了 CD 模型的泛化性和数据效率。值得注意的是，与使用 100% 数据的基线（随机初始化）相比，我们使用 20% 的训练数据获得了有竞争力的结果。我们的代码可用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于语义感知的密集表示学习方法，用于遥感图像变化检测，通过自监督学习框架利用语义信息提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 遥感图像变化检测面临标注数据稀缺的问题，传统预训练方法难以有效捕捉空间敏感特征，需探索更高效的数据利用方式。
AI.method: 在自监督学习框架中引入语义监督，通过语义掩码进行类别平衡采样，构建点级监督机制，使背景与前景点分离并拉近跨视图对齐点，学习不变于无关变化的语义判别表示。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上显著优于ImageNet预训练、领域内监督及多种自监督方法，使用20%训练数据即可达到基线模型（100%数据）的竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 语义感知的预训练有效提升变化检测模型的泛化能力与数据效率，为遥感领域小样本学习提供新思路。

authors_text: Takumi Fukunaga,Hiroyuki Kasai
title: Block-coordinate Frank-Wolfe algorithm and convergence analysis for semi-relaxed optimal transport problem
title_zh: 半松弛最优传输问题的块坐标Frank-Wolfe算法及收敛性分析
comment: IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP2022). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2103.05857
comments: IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP2022). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2103.05857
abstract: The optimal transport (OT) problem has been used widely for machine learning. It is necessary for computation of an OT problem to solve linear programming with tight mass-conservation constraints. These constraints prevent its application to large-scale problems. To address this issue, loosening such constraints enables us to propose the relaxed-OT method using a faster algorithm. This approach has demonstrated its effectiveness for applications. However, it remains slow. As a superior alternative, we propose a fast block-coordinate Frank-Wolfe (BCFW) algorithm for a convex semi-relaxed OT. Specifically, we prove their upper bounds of the worst convergence iterations, and equivalence between the linearization duality gap and the Lagrangian duality gap. Additionally, we develop two fast variants of the proposed BCFW. Numerical experiments have demonstrated that our proposed algorithms are effective for color transfer and surpass state-of-the-art algorithms. This report presents a short version of arXiv:2103.05857.
summary: The optimal transport (OT) problem has been used widely for machine learning. It is necessary for computation of an OT problem to solve linear programming with tight mass-conservation constraints. These constraints prevent its application to large-scale problems. To address this issue, loosening such constraints enables us to propose the relaxed-OT method using a faster algorithm. This approach has demonstrated its effectiveness for applications. However, it remains slow. As a superior alternative, we propose a fast block-coordinate Frank-Wolfe (BCFW) algorithm for a convex semi-relaxed OT. Specifically, we prove their upper bounds of the worst convergence iterations, and equivalence between the linearization duality gap and the Lagrangian duality gap. Additionally, we develop two fast variants of the proposed BCFW. Numerical experiments have demonstrated that our proposed algorithms are effective for color transfer and surpass state-of-the-art algorithms. This report presents a short version of arXiv:2103.05857.
abstract_zh: 最优传输（OT）问题已广泛用于机器学习。 OT 问题的计算需要求解具有严格质量守恒约束的线性规划。这些限制阻碍了其应用于大规模问题。为了解决这个问题，放宽此类约束使我们能够使用更快的算法提出宽松的 OT 方法。这种方法已经证明了其在应用中的有效性。然而，它仍然缓慢。作为一种更好的替代方案，我们提出了一种用于凸半松弛 OT 的快速块坐标 Frank-Wolfe (BCFW) 算法。具体来说，我们证明了它们的最差收敛迭代的上限，以及线性化对偶间隙和拉格朗日对偶间隙之间的等价性。此外，我们还开发了所提议的 BCFW 的两个快速变体。数值实验表明，我们提出的算法对于颜色传输是有效的，并且超越了最先进的算法。本报告提供了 arXiv:2103.05857 的简短版本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种快速的块坐标Frank-Wolfe算法，用于解决半松弛最优传输问题，并分析了其收敛性。
AI.motivation: 传统最优传输问题因严格的质量守恒约束导致计算效率低下，难以处理大规模数据，需通过松弛约束并设计更高效算法来改进。
AI.method: 提出块坐标Frank-Wolfe (BCFW) 算法，证明其最坏情况收敛迭代上界及线性化对偶间隙与拉格朗日对偶间隙的等价性，并开发两种快速变体。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，所提算法在颜色迁移任务中优于现有最先进方法，验证了其有效性与高效性。
AI.conclusion: BCFW算法为半松弛最优传输问题提供了高效解决方案，适用于大规模应用。

search_text: Block-coordinate Frank-Wolfe algorithm and convergence analysis for semi-relaxed optimal transport problem 半松弛最优传输问题的块坐标Frank-Wolfe算法及收敛性分析 The optimal transport (OT) problem has been used widely for machine learning. It is necessary for computation of an OT problem to solve linear programming with tight mass-conservation constraints. These constraints prevent its application to large-scale problems. To address this issue, loosening such constraints enables us to propose the relaxed-OT method using a faster algorithm. This approach has demonstrated its effectiveness for applications. However, it remains slow. As a superior alternative, we propose a fast block-coordinate Frank-Wolfe (BCFW) algorithm for a convex semi-relaxed OT. Specifically, we prove their upper bounds of the worst convergence iterations, and equivalence between the linearization duality gap and the Lagrangian duality gap. Additionally, we develop two fast variants of the proposed BCFW. Numerical experiments have demonstrated that our proposed algorithms are effective for color transfer and surpass state-of-the-art algorithms. This report presents a short version of arXiv:2103.05857. 最优传输（OT）问题已广泛用于机器学习。 OT 问题的计算需要求解具有严格质量守恒约束的线性规划。这些限制阻碍了其应用于大规模问题。为了解决这个问题，放宽此类约束使我们能够使用更快的算法提出宽松的 OT 方法。这种方法已经证明了其在应用中的有效性。然而，它仍然缓慢。作为一种更好的替代方案，我们提出了一种用于凸半松弛 OT 的快速块坐标 Frank-Wolfe (BCFW) 算法。具体来说，我们证明了它们的最差收敛迭代的上限，以及线性化对偶间隙和拉格朗日对偶间隙之间的等价性。此外，我们还开发了所提议的 BCFW 的两个快速变体。数值实验表明，我们提出的算法对于颜色传输是有效的，并且超越了最先进的算法。本报告提供了 arXiv:2103.05857 的简短版本。 本文提出了一种快速的块坐标Frank-Wolfe算法，用于解决半松弛最优传输问题，并分析了其收敛性。 Takumi Fukunaga,Hiroyuki Kasai cs.LG,cs.AI,math.OC

authors_text: Zhi Tian,Xiangxiang Chu,Xiaoming Wang,Xiaolin Wei,Chunhua Shen
title: Fully Convolutional One-Stage 3D Object Detection on LiDAR Range Images
title_zh: LiDAR 距离图像上的全卷积一级 3D 物体检测
comment: Accepted to: Proc. Thirty-sixth Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS) 2022. 14 pages
comments: Accepted to: Proc. Thirty-sixth Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS) 2022. 14 pages
abstract: We present a simple yet effective fully convolutional one-stage 3D object detector for LiDAR point clouds of autonomous driving scenes, termed FCOS-LiDAR. Unlike the dominant methods that use the bird-eye view (BEV), our proposed detector detects objects from the range view (RV, a.k.a. range image) of the LiDAR points. Due to the range view's compactness and compatibility with the LiDAR sensors' sampling process on self-driving cars, the range view-based object detector can be realized by solely exploiting the vanilla 2D convolutions, departing from the BEV-based methods which often involve complicated voxelization operations and sparse convolutions. For the first time, we show that an RV-based 3D detector with standard 2D convolutions alone can achieve comparable performance to state-of-the-art BEV-based detectors while being significantly faster and simpler. More importantly, almost all previous range view-based detectors only focus on single-frame point clouds, since it is challenging to fuse multi-frame point clouds into a single range view. In this work, we tackle this challenging issue with a novel range view projection mechanism, and for the first time demonstrate the benefits of fusing multi-frame point clouds for a range-view based detector. Extensive experiments on nuScenes show the superiority of our proposed method and we believe that our work can be strong evidence that an RV-based 3D detector can compare favourably with the current mainstream BEV-based detectors.
summary: We present a simple yet effective fully convolutional one-stage 3D object detector for LiDAR point clouds of autonomous driving scenes, termed FCOS-LiDAR. Unlike the dominant methods that use the bird-eye view (BEV), our proposed detector detects objects from the range view (RV, a.k.a. range image) of the LiDAR points. Due to the range view's compactness and compatibility with the LiDAR sensors' sampling process on self-driving cars, the range view-based object detector can be realized by solely exploiting the vanilla 2D convolutions, departing from the BEV-based methods which often involve complicated voxelization operations and sparse convolutions. For the first time, we show that an RV-based 3D detector with standard 2D convolutions alone can achieve comparable performance to state-of-the-art BEV-based detectors while being significantly faster and simpler. More importantly, almost all previous range view-based detectors only focus on single-frame point clouds, since it is challenging to fuse multi-frame point clouds into a single range view. In this work, we tackle this challenging issue with a novel range view projection mechanism, and for the first time demonstrate the benefits of fusing multi-frame point clouds for a range-view based detector. Extensive experiments on nuScenes show the superiority of our proposed method and we believe that our work can be strong evidence that an RV-based 3D detector can compare favourably with the current mainstream BEV-based detectors.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种简单而有效的全卷积单级 3D 物体检测器，用于自动驾驶场景的 LiDAR 点云，称为 FCOS-LiDAR。与使用鸟瞰图 (BEV) 的主流方法不同，我们提出的检测器从 LiDAR 点的距离视图（RV，又名距离图像）中检测物体。由于距离视图的紧凑性以及与自动驾驶汽车上 LiDAR 传感器采样过程的兼容性，基于距离视图的物体检测器可以通过单独利用普通的 2D 卷积来实现，这与基于 BEV 的方法（通常涉及复杂的体素化操作和稀疏卷积）不同。我们首次证明，仅具有标准 2D 卷积的基于 RV 的 3D 探测器就可以实现与最先进的基于 BEV 的探测器相当的性能，同时速度更快、更简单。更重要的是，几乎所有以前的基于距离视图的检测器都只关注单帧点云，因为将多帧点云融合到单个距离视图中具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们通过一种新颖的距离视图投影机制解决了这个具有挑战性的问题，并首次展示了融合多帧点云对于基于距离视图的检测器的好处。 nuScenes 上的大量实验表明了我们提出的方法的优越性，我们相信我们的工作可以有力地证明基于 RV 的 3D 检测器可以与当前主流的基于 BEV 的检测器相媲美。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于LiDAR范围图像的全卷积单阶段3D目标检测方法FCOS-LiDAR，用于自动驾驶场景中的点云检测。
AI.motivation: 现有BEV方法依赖复杂体素化操作，而范围视图（RV）更紧凑且兼容LiDAR采样过程，但此前多帧融合困难限制了其应用。
AI.method: 采用标准2D卷积处理范围图像，设计新颖的多帧投影机制实现跨帧点云融合，避免体素化与稀疏卷积。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集上性能优于现有RV方法，与BEV方法相当但速度更快，多帧融合显著提升检测效果。
AI.conclusion: 证明基于范围视图的3D检测器可有效替代BEV方法，为LiDAR点云检测提供更高效解决方案。

authors_text: Seok Bin Son,Soohyun Park,Haemin Lee,Joongheon Kim,Soyi Jung,Donghwa Kim
title: Tutorial on Course-of-Action (COA) Attack Search Methods in Computer Networks
title_zh: 计算机网络中的行动过程 (COA) 攻击搜索方法教程
abstract: In the literature of modern network security research, deriving effective and efficient course-of-action (COA) attach search methods are of interests in industry and academia. As the network size grows, the traditional COA attack search methods can suffer from the limitations to computing and communication resources. Therefore, various methods have been developed to solve these problems, and reinforcement learning (RL)-based intelligent algorithms are one of the most effective solutions. Therefore, we review the RL-based COA attack search methods for network attack scenarios in terms of the trends and their contrib
summary: In the literature of modern network security research, deriving effective and efficient course-of-action (COA) attach search methods are of interests in industry and academia. As the network size grows, the traditional COA attack search methods can suffer from the limitations to computing and communication resources. Therefore, various methods have been developed to solve these problems, and reinforcement learning (RL)-based intelligent algorithms are one of the most effective solutions. Therefore, we review the RL-based COA attack search methods for network attack scenarios in terms of the trends and their contrib
abstract_zh: 在现代网络安全研究文献中，推导有效且高效的行动过程（COA）附加搜索方法引起了工业界和学术界的兴趣。随着网络规模的增长，传统的COA攻击搜索方法会受到计算和通信资源的限制。因此，人们开发了各种方法来解决这些问题，而基于强化学习（RL）的智能算法是最有效的解决方案之一。因此，我们从趋势及其贡献的角度回顾了基于强化学习的网络攻击场景COA攻击搜索方法

AI.tldr: 综述基于强化学习的网络攻击COA搜索方法
AI.motivation: 传统COA方法在资源受限下效率不足，需更高效解决方案
AI.method: 回顾RL-based COA方法，分析其趋势与贡献
AI.result: 总结RL在COA攻击搜索中的应用趋势与技术贡献
AI.conclusion: 强化学习为网络攻击COA搜索提供高效智能解决方案

As the network size grows, the traditional COA attack search methods can suffer from the limitations to computing and communication resources. Therefore, various methods have been developed to solve these problems, and reinforcement learning (RL)-based intelligent algorithms are one of the most effective solutions. Therefore, we review the RL-based COA attack search methods for network attack scenarios in terms of the trends and their contrib 在现代网络安全研究文献中，推导有效且高效的行动过程（COA）附加搜索方法引起了工业界和学术界的兴趣。随着网络规模的增长，传统的COA攻击搜索方法会受到计算和通信资源的限制。因此，人们开发了各种方法来解决这些问题，而基于强化学习（RL）的智能算法是最有效的解决方案之一。因此，我们从趋势及其贡献的角度回顾了基于强化学习的网络攻击场景COA攻击搜索方法 综述基于强化学习的网络攻击COA搜索方法 Seok Bin Son,Soohyun Park,Haemin Lee,Joongheon Kim,Soyi Jung,Donghwa Kim cs.AI

authors_text: Haruo Hosoya
title: CIGMO: Categorical invariant representations in a deep generative framework
title_zh: CIGMO：深层生成框架中的分类不变表示
abstract: Data of general object images have two most common structures: (1) each object of a given shape can be rendered in multiple different views, and (2) shapes of objects can be categorized in such a way that the diversity of shapes is much larger across categories than within a category. Existing deep generative models can typically capture either structure, but not both. In this work, we introduce a novel deep generative model, called CIGMO, that can learn to represent category, shape, and view factors from image data. The model is comprised of multiple modules of shape representations that are each specialized to a particular category and disentangled from view representation, and can be learned using a group-based weakly supervised learning method. By empirical investigation, we show that our model can effectively discover categories of object shapes despite large view variation and quantitatively supersede various previous methods including the state-of-the-art invariant clustering algorithm. Further, we show that our approach using category-specialization can enhance the learned shape representation to better perform down-stream tasks such as one-shot object identification as well as shape-view disentanglement.
summary: Data of general object images have two most common structures: (1) each object of a given shape can be rendered in multiple different views, and (2) shapes of objects can be categorized in such a way that the diversity of shapes is much larger across categories than within a category. Existing deep generative models can typically capture either structure, but not both. In this work, we introduce a novel deep generative model, called CIGMO, that can learn to represent category, shape, and view factors from image data. The model is comprised of multiple modules of shape representations that are each specialized to a particular category and disentangled from view representation, and can be learned using a group-based weakly supervised learning method. By empirical investigation, we show that our model can effectively discover categories of object shapes despite large view variation and quantitatively supersede various previous methods including the state-of-the-art invariant clustering algorithm. Further, we show that our approach using category-specialization can enhance the learned shape representation to better perform down-stream tasks such as one-shot object identification as well as shape-view disentanglement.
abstract_zh: 一般对象图像的数据具有两种最常见的结构：（1）给定形状的每个对象可以在多个不同视图中呈现，以及（2）对象的形状可以以这样的方式进行分类：类别之间的形状多样性比类别内的形状多样性大得多。现有的深度生成模型通常可以捕获任一结构，但不能同时捕获两者。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种新颖的深度生成模型，称为 CIGMO，它可以学习表示图像数据中的类别、形状和视图因素。该模型由多个形状表示模块组成，每个模块专门针对特定类别并与视图表示分离，并且可以使用基于组的弱监督学习方法进行学习。通过实证研究，我们表明，尽管视图变化很大，我们的模型仍然可以有效地发现对象形状的类别，并定量地取代以前的各种方法，包括最先进的不变聚类算法。此外，我们表明，我们使用类别专业化的方法可以增强学习的形状表示，以更好地执行下游任务，例如一次性对象识别以及形状视图解开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CIGMO的深度生成模型，能够同时学习物体形状类别、形状和视角因素的解耦表示，解决现有模型无法兼顾两种数据结构的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度生成模型难以同时处理物体图像数据的两种结构：同一形状的多视角呈现与类别间形状多样性差异，导致无法有效建模复杂场景下的形状-视角联合分布。
AI.method: 设计包含类别专用形状表示模块的生成框架，通过弱监督学习方法实现形状与视角的解耦，利用群体级监督信号训练模块化表征网络。
AI.result: 实验表明模型在视角变化场景下能准确发现形状类别，定量指标优于现有方法，且在单样本识别和形状-视角解耦任务中取得更优性能。
AI.conclusion: CIGMO通过类别专业化与解耦表征设计，实现了对形状和视角因素的联合建模，为复杂视觉任务提供了更鲁棒的表示学习方案。
